21cea1a8-9f2a-5674-9aff-08faf455ee46.name: Burning Touch
21cea1a8-9f2a-5674-9aff-08faf455ee46.description: When the abominable beauty hits with a Slam attack, the Slam deals an extra 21 (6d6) fire damage (included in the attack). In addition, a creature that touches the abominable beauty or hits her with a melee weapon attack while within 5 feet of her takes 10 (3d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: When the abominable beauty hits with a Slam attack, the Slam deals an extra 21 (6d6) fire damage (included in the attack). In addition, a creature that touches the abominable beauty or hits her with a melee weapon attack while within 5 feet of her takes 10 (3d6) fire damage.

91734475-9734-51b4-8460-a14754a6b710.name: Blinding Gaze
91734475-9734-51b4-8460-a14754a6b710.description: The abominable beauty fixes her gaze on a creature within 30 feet of her. If the target can see the beauty's eyes, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to the abominable beauty's Blinding Gaze for the next 24 hours.

attributes.description: The abominable beauty fixes her gaze on a creature within 30 feet of her. If the target can see the beauty's eyes, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to the abominable beauty's Blinding Gaze for the next 24 hours.

14e7c0aa-439d-5691-997e-3f1bdd3700cf.name: Deafening Voice
14e7c0aa-439d-5691-997e-3f1bdd3700cf.description: The abominable beauty speaks a lilting incantation. Each creature within 30 feet of her and that can hear her voice must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 31 (9d6) thunder damage and is deafened for 1 hour. On a success, a creature takes half the damage, isn't deafened, and is immune to the abominable beauty's Deafening Voice for the next 24 hours.

On a failure, a creature takes 31 (9d6) thunder damage and is deafened for 1 hour. On a success, a creature takes half the damage, isn't deafened, and is immune to the abominable beauty's Deafening Voice for the next 24 hours.

b0417a87-828b-5e13-a620-47be23a3b825.name: Multiattack
b0417a87-828b-5e13-a620-47be23a3b825.description: The abominable beauty uses Blinding Gaze. She then makes two Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The abominable beauty uses Blinding Gaze. She then makes two Slam attacks.

93a324b8-f724-585d-94b2-d518e80eeb37.name: Slam
93a324b8-f724-585d-94b2-d518e80eeb37.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 21 (6d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 21 (6d6) fire damage.

358554a9-5fa0-5dc0-bce2-65e2690dd5f4.name: Cursed Existence
358554a9-5fa0-5dc0-bce2-65e2690dd5f4.description: When it drops to 0 hp in desert terrain, the accursed defiler’s body disintegrates into sand and a parched breeze. However, unless it was killed in a hallowed location, with radiant damage, or by a creature under the effects of the bless spell, the accursed defiler reforms at the next sundown 1d100 miles away from where it died in a random direction.

attributes.description: When it drops to 0 hp in desert terrain, the accursed defiler’s body disintegrates into sand and a parched breeze. However, unless it was killed in a hallowed location, with radiant damage, or by a creature under the effects of the bless spell, the accursed defiler reforms at the next sundown 1d100 miles away from where it died in a random direction.

381d6549-b2df-58d3-bbf8-649c4198c0c3.name: Sand Shroud
381d6549-b2df-58d3-bbf8-649c4198c0c3.description: A miniature sandstorm constantly whirls around the accursed defiler in a 10-foot radius. This area is lightly obscured to creatures other than the accursed defiler. Wisdom (Survival) checks made to follow tracks left by the accursed defiler or other creatures that were traveling in its sand shroud are made with disadvantage.

attributes.description: A miniature sandstorm constantly whirls around the accursed defiler in a 10-foot radius. This area is lightly obscured to creatures other than the accursed defiler. Wisdom (Survival) checks made to follow tracks left by the accursed defiler or other creatures that were traveling in its sand shroud are made with disadvantage.

f30c0315-16fe-54c7-b471-616f3744d007.name: Undead Nature
f30c0315-16fe-54c7-b471-616f3744d007.description: The accursed defiler doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The accursed defiler doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

14cf7629-07f6-52ee-b10b-6987688af0bd.name: Multiattack (Accursed Defiler)
14cf7629-07f6-52ee-b10b-6987688af0bd.description: The accursed defiler makes two Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The accursed defiler makes two Slam attacks.

dbdd3321-caa4-570c-b609-4ffb9894a5ce.name: Sandslash
dbdd3321-caa4-570c-b609-4ffb9894a5ce.description: The accursed defiler intensifies the vortex of sand that surrounds it. Each creature within 10 feet of the accursed defiler must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

5f34f5e7-324c-51f4-b843-38fa2761a9b8.name: Slam (Accursed Defiler)
5f34f5e7-324c-51f4-b843-38fa2761a9b8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the accursed defiler scores a critical hit, the target suffers one level of exhaustion.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the accursed defiler scores a critical hit, the target suffers one level of exhaustion.

d7a3677c-e4fd-5709-878b-fd19b6c5b49e.name: Darkness Aura
d7a3677c-e4fd-5709-878b-fd19b6c5b49e.description: The cave dragon emits magical darkness in a 30-foot radius around it. The darkness moves with the dragon and spreads around corners. Darkvision can’t penetrate this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 3rd level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled. At the start of each of its turns, the dragon chooses whether this aura is active. A successful dispel magic (DC 14) cast on the dragon suppresses this aura for 1 minute.

394c13c5-86f8-5910-933a-71cc1d2c6ae0.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
394c13c5-86f8-5910-933a-71cc1d2c6ae0.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

1cf83d04-03db-5883-a0cd-a688a5dd4c03.name: Magical Tunneler
1cf83d04-03db-5883-a0cd-a688a5dd4c03.description: The cave dragon can burrow through nonmagical unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dragon can choose whether to leave the material it moves through undisturbed or leave a 10-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: The cave dragon can burrow through nonmagical unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dragon can choose whether to leave the material it moves through undisturbed or leave a 10-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

d84a316e-45db-590e-ac16-ece1ad54c71f.name: Spiked Climb
d84a316e-45db-590e-ac16-ece1ad54c71f.description: The dragon uses its spikes to hold itself in place while climbing, allowing it to climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check. If it climbs upside down on a ceiling or suspends itself on a vertical surface while leaving its claws free, it can’t use the Ruff Spikes reaction.

4fa6b595-4ca9-50f4-b358-5981ca60fdcb.description: The dragon makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.

70e67854-e65e-55e8-8c7e-3626b6b2e417.name: Frightful Presence
70e67854-e65e-55e8-8c7e-3626b6b2e417.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. f47bc8fe-c037-565a-a212-aae3b5ac420a.name: Limb Sweep
f47bc8fe-c037-565a-a212-aae3b5ac420a.description: The dragon sweeps its wingless limbs outward. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or take 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and be pushed up to 10 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone.

attributes.description: The dragon sweeps its wingless limbs outward. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or take 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and be pushed up to 10 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone.

b19ba4a3-e3e7-5013-9776-c6799e6a8e35.name: Multiattack (Adult Cave Dragon)
b19ba4a3-e3e7-5013-9776-c6799e6a8e35.description: The dragon uses its Frightful Presence. It then makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The dragon uses its Frightful Presence. It then makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

87868dec-6627-587b-a4b0-9e108b28c5b0.name: Poison Breath
87868dec-6627-587b-a4b0-9e108b28c5b0.description: The dragon exhales a cone of black, poisonous gas in a 60-foot cone. Each target in that area must make a DC 21 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 56 (16d6) poison damage and is poisoned until it finishes a short rest. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each hour, ending the effect on itself on a success.

502865c4-e085-5870-aa3b-74912b9be203.name: Ruff Spikes
502865c4-e085-5870-aa3b-74912b9be203.description: When a creature moves to a space within 5 feet of the cave dragon, the dragon flares its many feelers and spikes. The creature must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or take 9 (2d8) piercing damage and be prevented from entering that space.

2a3107ee-7944-5089-a06b-b605abefa4de.name: Fire Incarnate
2a3107ee-7944-5089-a06b-b605abefa4de.description: Creatures with resistance to fire damage don’t have resistance to the fire damage dealt by the flame dragon. A creature with immunity to fire damage is still immune to the dragon’s fire damage.

a2b7d21e-0f13-5298-84dc-4fe12fa297ed.description: The dragon makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.

3f06a35c-8b9b-5bb2-84c6-02ca8e9f7d17.name: Fire Breath
3f06a35c-8b9b-5bb2-84c6-02ca8e9f7d17.description: The dragon exhales fire in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 56 (16d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Each creature in that area must also succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or go on a rampage for 1 minute. A rampaging creature must attack the nearest creature other than the dragon on its turn. If no other creature is near enough to move to and attack, the rampaging creature stalks off in a random direction, seeking a target for its rage. The rampaging creature can repeat the Wisdom saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

0966774e-10d1-58f3-bcc9-3a399d244b50.name: Wing Attack
0966774e-10d1-58f3-bcc9-3a399d244b50.description: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or take 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.

cc672bd8-0d51-578c-8a87-376f1011f6bf.name: Shifting Flames
cc672bd8-0d51-578c-8a87-376f1011f6bf.description: The dragon magically transforms into a Huge or smaller fire-based Elemental (such as a salamander, magma mephit, or fire elemental) or back into its true form, which is a Dragon. Without wings or other way of flying, it loses its flying speed. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

9437d2b4-0d8b-5fae-a9a6-e24c9a54741a.name: Magic Resistance
9437d2b4-0d8b-5fae-a9a6-e24c9a54741a.description: The dragon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The dragon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

d74cb82d-c062-51d8-8cb3-273a700765b7.name: Mithral Scales
d74cb82d-c062-51d8-8cb3-273a700765b7.description: If the dragon rolls a 20 on a saving throw against a spell that targets only it, the dragon is unaffected, and the spell is reflected back at the caster as though it originated from the dragon, turning the caster into the target.

9c278ba4-70d0-5304-a32b-d5e73f3d54b3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the dragon can end one magical effect of its choice of 5th level or lower on the target.

6845f50a-b121-521a-9fb0-0591ddb9c54a.name: Claw (Adult Mithral Dragon)
6845f50a-b121-521a-9fb0-0591ddb9c54a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 +6) slashing damage, and if the target isn't a Construct or Undead, it must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or lose 7 (2d6) hp at the start of each of its turns as a piece of metallic claw breaks off in the wound. Any creature can take an action to remove the claw with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The claw pops out of the wound if the target receives magical healing.

32277913-08fd-5b35-aea8-aff0d12bfe92.name: Shard Breath
32277913-08fd-5b35-aea8-aff0d12bfe92.description: The mithral dragon spits metallic shards in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute, then the shards dissolve into wisps of silvery smoke. When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes 7 (2d6) slashing damage for every 5 feet it travels.

On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

5ce4f8ab-f774-5849-b613-e3f5a4c76f55.name: Chill of the Void
5ce4f8ab-f774-5849-b613-e3f5a4c76f55.description: Creatures with resistance to cold damage don’t have resistance to the cold damage dealt by the Void dragon. A creature with immunity to cold damage is still immune to the dragon’s cold damage.

489fff5e-7216-57c8-8210-931ca2b01210.name: Expert Void Traveler
489fff5e-7216-57c8-8210-931ca2b01210.description: The Void dragon doesn’t require air, food, drink, sleep, or ambient pressure. While traveling in the Void, the dragon magically glides on solar winds, covering immense distances in short times.

efdc4d04-3cc6-5a2f-bc42-163a9d7d5562.name: Aura of Madness
efdc4d04-3cc6-5a2f-bc42-163a9d7d5562.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or suffer short-term madness for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Aura of Madness for the next 24 hours.

9c8f59da-755a-5f1d-8114-dda09fa17e85.name: Gravitic Breath
9c8f59da-755a-5f1d-8114-dda09fa17e85.description: The dragon exhales localized gravity in a 60-foot cube, originating from the dragon. When a creature ends a fall in the cube, it takes 1d10 bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it fell, to a maximum of 20d10. A creature that enters the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature is restrained. On a success, the creature's speed is halved as long as it remains in the cube. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The cube lasts until the dragon's breath weapon recharges.

61def5df-70ce-506d-894e-0aae58aeedb9.name: Void Slip
61def5df-70ce-506d-894e-0aae58aeedb9.description: The dragon twists the fabric of space around it, disappearing and reappearing in an unoccupied space it can see within 120 feet of it. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) cold damage and be knocked prone.

21aabe2e-a9e3-54f7-b497-737121ccd248.name: Void Twist
21aabe2e-a9e3-54f7-b497-737121ccd248.description: The dragon adds 5 to its AC against one attack that would hit it, as it twists reality to open a small rift in space to protect itself. To do so, the dragon must be able to see the attacker. If the attack misses by 5 or more, the dragon can choose to open a second, connected rift next to another creature it can see within 30 feet of it to direct the attack at that creature instead, using the original attack roll result against the new target's AC.

5767150f-96af-5f83-a567-6174bed6b22d.name: Tempest Breath
5767150f-96af-5f83-a567-6174bed6b22d.description: The dragon exhales a blast of stormy wind in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 27 (6d8) bludgeoning damage and 27 (6d8) lightning damage and is pushed up to 30 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone. Unprotected flames, such as torches, in the area are extinguished, and protected flames, such as those in lanterns, have a 75 percent chance of being extinguished.

7faabde2-7fa6-502d-a016-5bb79003dd5e.description: Akyishigal magically calls one spawn of Akyishigal. The spawn arrives in 1d4 rounds, acting as an ally of Akyishigal and obeying its telepathic commands. The spawn remains for 1 hour, until Akyishigal dies, or until Akyishigal dismisses it as a bonus action.

3710b793-3145-5176-9ee3-96aeaa67e9e9.name: Change Shape
3710b793-3145-5176-9ee3-96aeaa67e9e9.description: Akyishigal magically transforms into a Large or smaller insectoid Beast or back into his true form, which is a Fiend. His statistics, other than his size, are the same in each form. Any equipment he is wearing or carrying transforms with him. He reverts to his true form if he dies.

Akyishigal casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** detect evil and good, pass without trace
3/day: dispel magic, giant insect, insect plague
1/day: contagion (filth fever only)

0c378069-4c87-5224-9618-8a28e5fbdfe0.name: Air Hatred
0c378069-4c87-5224-9618-8a28e5fbdfe0.description: The al-aeshma has advantage on attack rolls against creatures that are flying.

attributes.description: The al-aeshma has advantage on attack rolls against creatures that are flying.

d7b844c2-6bb0-5ffb-b013-cec12237c320.name: Earth Bound
d7b844c2-6bb0-5ffb-b013-cec12237c320.description: The al-aeshma is anchored to the earth and can’t fly far from it. The al-aeshma can’t willingly fly more than 30 feet above the ground. If it starts its turn more than 30 feet away from the ground, it loses its damage immunities and is vulnerable to lightning and thunder damage until it starts its turn within 30 feet of the ground.

bc10d5a1-55ac-5f29-88d5-4e7ff2a2121c.name: Elemental Demise
bc10d5a1-55ac-5f29-88d5-4e7ff2a2121c.description: When an al-aeshma dies, its body disintegrates into a swirling spray of coarse sand, leaving behind only equipment it was wearing or carrying.

1cd7090b-f2b7-53d4-9f66-a2352583d8a6.name: Regeneration
1cd7090b-f2b7-53d4-9f66-a2352583d8a6.description: The al-aeshma regains 10 hp at the start of its turn. If it takes fire or radiant damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the al-Aeshma’s next turn. The al-aeshma dies only if it starts its turn at 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

71a46c1d-e3eb-50a1-8b0c-af8098806a44.name: Dust Devil
71a46c1d-e3eb-50a1-8b0c-af8098806a44.description: The al-aeshma creates a swirling dust devil centered on a point it can see within 120 feet of it. The dust devil appears in the shape of a cylinder that is 30 feet tall with a 5-foot radius. Each creature in the area and each creature that enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be restrained. While restrained, a creature takes 7 (2d6) slashing damage and 7 (2d6) necrotic damage at the start of each of the al-aeshma's turns. A creature, including a restrained creature, can take an action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 17 Strength check.

- **1/Day Each:** gaseous form, invisibility

643a6bb0-f52c-5e6f-b729-c91fe5de53a2.name: Poisonous Flesh
643a6bb0-f52c-5e6f-b729-c91fe5de53a2.description: The ala’s poison infuses its flesh. A creature that touches the ala or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 (2d6) poison damage.

1d379835-ad83-5484-9695-b6df6e7959bf.name: Storm’s Strength
1d379835-ad83-5484-9695-b6df6e7959bf.description: If the ala is outside and an electrical storm is within 1 mile of it, creatures have disadvantage on their saving throws against the ala’s Lightning’s Kiss.

a71ab3f9-dd31-5676-b204-448dc2750ba5.description: The ala launches a bolt of lightning at up to three targets it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

476f837c-07a9-5845-934a-46a2dc349617.name: Multiattack (Ala)

b07d2752-9c55-54ce-89e1-a96f24971b2e.name: Apothecary
b07d2752-9c55-54ce-89e1-a96f24971b2e.description: At the start of each of the kobold alchemist’s turns, the alchemist chooses one of the following damage types: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison. The alchemist has resistance to that damage type until the start of its next turn.

98f3616f-9b15-5a09-9ec8-57f446149ce6.name: Pack Tactics
98f3616f-9b15-5a09-9ec8-57f446149ce6.description: The kobold has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the kobold’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

985fc5d6-6724-5b34-8f12-bbf70dd3e40f.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
985fc5d6-6724-5b34-8f12-bbf70dd3e40f.description: While in sunlight, the kobold has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

6df80297-d4e6-50ad-8180-7d6d3e2cfe7a.name: Alchemical Bolt
6df80297-d4e6-50ad-8180-7d6d3e2cfe7a.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) damage of the type determined by Apothecary.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) damage of the type determined by Apothecary.

a2dfa948-3dd3-5ca5-8bff-34b3c866eb78.name: Alchemical Dagger
a2dfa948-3dd3-5ca5-8bff-34b3c866eb78.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) damage of the type determined by Apothecary.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) damage of the type determined by Apothecary.

6104c8cb-7c47-54f0-8595-b3418a049581.name: Alchemical Vapors
6104c8cb-7c47-54f0-8595-b3418a049581.description: The kobold alchemist releases alchemical vapors pleasing to draconic senses and unpleasant to all others. Each creature that isn't a dragonborn or kobold within 15 feet of the alchemist must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 17 (5d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Each dragonborn and kobold within 15 feet of the alchemist has resistance to damage of the type determined by Apothecary for 1 minute.

attributes.description: The kobold alchemist releases alchemical vapors pleasing to draconic senses and unpleasant to all others. d363f12d-eb25-5a50-abc6-d0f2829565c3.name: Explosive Flask
d363f12d-eb25-5a50-abc6-d0f2829565c3.description: The kobold alchemist throws a flask of volatile substances at a point it can see within 30 feet of it. The flask explodes, and each creature within 15 feet of that point must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) damage of the type determined by Apothecary and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

29b7a812-9c30-5b6b-bd35-f430e2214700.name: Claw (Alehouse Drake)
29b7a812-9c30-5b6b-bd35-f430e2214700.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) slashing damage.

cc8ed978-1e24-5343-8c05-f9750fe374f6.name: Dazing Breath
cc8ed978-1e24-5343-8c05-f9750fe374f6.description: The alehouse drake exhales sweet-smelling gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or become incapacitated for 1 minute. While incapacitated, the creature is indifferent about creatures that it is hostile toward within 50 feet of the drake. If the creature is attacked, harmed by a spell, or witnesses any of its allies being harmed, it is no longer indifferent but remains incapacitated. The incapacitated creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7359c354-fbc3-584d-965e-07eb846fbe3e.name: Discombobulating Bite

A discombobulated creature is incapacitated, and when it moves, it moves in a random direction.

70c81551-fbd5-5725-9818-96d29c404560.description: The algorith is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

de5f9476-7e71-5374-a79b-a5a7e1395994.name: Cone of Negation
de5f9476-7e71-5374-a79b-a5a7e1395994.description: The algorith projects null energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 33 (6d10) force damage and any spell of 4th level or lower on the creature ends, as if it had been the target of a dispel magic spell. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and spells on it don't end.

a2ac9f38-313f-5c17-9571-5f91f77f2aaa.description: The algorith summons and throws a tiny rune of law at a point it can see within 100 feet. The rune explodes on impact. Each creature within 30 feet of where the rune landed must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 27 (5d10) force damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned.

The algorith casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16): 

- **At Will:** bless, detect magic, dimension door, dispel magic
- **1/Day Each:** commune (as an action), wall of force

3b732eb0-a693-5261-99d4-c4c25e453291.name: Darkness Aura (Ancient Cave Dragon)
3b732eb0-a693-5261-99d4-c4c25e453291.description: The cave dragon emits magical darkness in a 30-foot radius around it. The darkness moves with the dragon and spreads around corners. Darkvision can’t penetrate this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 4th level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled. At the start of each of its turns, the dragon chooses whether this aura is active. A successful dispel magic (DC 15) cast on the dragon suppresses this aura for 1 minute.

40dfe2de-38b1-5fe7-bdb1-9e114bce1cd6.name: Magical Tunneler (Ancient Cave Dragon)
40dfe2de-38b1-5fe7-bdb1-9e114bce1cd6.description: The cave dragon can burrow through any unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dragon can choose whether to leave the material it moves through undisturbed or leave a 15-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: The cave dragon can burrow through any unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dragon can choose whether to leave the material it moves through undisturbed or leave a 15-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

275e6d06-52b1-524d-bf58-1218dff95ce7.name: Bite (Ancient Cave Dragon)

2f64acb7-cab2-524f-a236-4dfbce0db7e6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +18 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d6 + 10) slashing damage.

29ea18c4-d136-5983-89e8-693e3a368ee2.name: Frightful Presence (Ancient Cave Dragon)
29ea18c4-d136-5983-89e8-693e3a368ee2.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 20 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

a2ddedd6-3726-5cdc-94aa-94a221887721.name: Limb Sweep (Ancient Cave Dragon)
a2ddedd6-3726-5cdc-94aa-94a221887721.description: The dragon sweeps its wingless limbs outward. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 25 Dexterity saving throw or take 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and be pushed up to 10 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone.

f6da7177-9759-5abf-b168-28dcc48d0ed0.description: The dragon uses its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its Bite and two with its Claws.

2f30e410-0745-5147-a332-302f90878cc6.name: Poison Breath (Ancient Cave Dragon)
2f30e410-0745-5147-a332-302f90878cc6.description: The dragon exhales a cone of black, poisonous gas in a 90-foot cone. Each target in that area must make a DC 25 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 91 (26d6) poison damage and is poisoned until cured by the greater restoration spell or similar magic. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned.

8e11ce95-4e09-5884-9251-1615f5a70e54.name: Ruff Spikes (Ancient Cave Dragon)

e8a06ca5-4312-52ae-be11-b89402523415.name: Bite (Ancient Flame Dragon)

ef84dd4f-73d7-5314-abf9-e1a67610ad09.name: Fire Breath (Ancient Flame Dragon)
ef84dd4f-73d7-5314-abf9-e1a67610ad09.description: The dragon exhales fire in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw, taking 91 (26d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Each creature in that area must also succeed on a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw or go on a rampage for 1 minute. A rampaging creature must attack the nearest creature other than the dragon on its turn. If no other creature is near enough to move to and attack, the rampaging creature stalks off in a random direction, seeking a target for its rage. The rampaging creature can repeat the Wisdom saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

500cb382-fdac-5a4e-b0a2-371782e97dfe.name: Frightful Presence (Ancient Flame Dragon)
500cb382-fdac-5a4e-b0a2-371782e97dfe.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

6c15c342-7a5c-50c0-967b-ccc2119e0157.name: Wing Attack (Ancient Flame Dragon)
6c15c342-7a5c-50c0-967b-ccc2119e0157.description: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or take 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.

8d7d6eb5-09a1-5c25-9d53-09071fb5d321.name: Shifting Flames (Ancient Flame Dragon)
8d7d6eb5-09a1-5c25-9d53-09071fb5d321.description: The dragon magically transforms into a Gargantuan or smaller fire-based Elemental (such as a salamander, magma mephit, or fire elemental) or back into its true form, which is a Dragon. Without wings or other way of flying, it loses its flying speed. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

be82f83d-f600-51d2-a88c-b2ac2dd5a801.name: Mithral Scales (Ancient Mithral Dragon)
be82f83d-f600-51d2-a88c-b2ac2dd5a801.description: If the dragon succeeds on a saving throw by 5 or more against a spell that targets only it, the dragon is unaffected, and the spell is reflected back at the caster as though it originated from the dragon, turning the caster into the target.

When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes 7 (2d6) slashing damage for every 5 feet it travels.

83bc8de8-fe37-56d5-9160-748caaa82eb6.name: Tidal Breath (Ancient Sea Dragon)
83bc8de8-fe37-56d5-9160-748caaa82eb6.description: The dragon exhales a crushing wave of frigid seawater in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 44 (8d10) bludgeoning damage and 44 (8d10) cold damage and is pushed up to 45 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

38a6c8c0-73b8-56cf-94a4-3ec95494427f.name: Multiattack (Ancient Titan)
38a6c8c0-73b8-56cf-94a4-3ec95494427f.description: The ancient titan can use its Reality-Altering Words. It then makes two Greatsword attacks or three Word of Pain attacks.

8e46dc4a-fca1-51eb-b689-625e2f870865.name: Reality-Altering Words
8e46dc4a-fca1-51eb-b689-625e2f870865.description: The titan speaks a phrase that temporarily reshapes reality around it, warping the terrain, displacing creatures, and disrupting magic. Each creature within 30 feet of the titan must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or be pulled or pushed up to 25 feet toward or away from the titan (the titan's choice) and knocked prone. Instead of pushing or pulling a creature that failed the saving throw, the titan can end one magical effect of its choice of 4th level or lower on that creature. The area then becomes difficult terrain until the start of the titan's next turn. Moving through this difficult terrain doesn't cost the titan extra movement.

The area then becomes difficult terrain until the start of the titan's next turn. Moving through this difficult terrain doesn't cost the titan extra movement.

5b397fcc-42df-53d2-b58b-965dd671f229.name: Stunning Word
5b397fcc-42df-53d2-b58b-965dd671f229.description: The titan speaks a brief, echoing word of power at up to three creatures it can see within 60 feet of it. Each target must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 45 (10d8) force damage and is stunned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

30508c3e-23b4-5d4a-ae0e-d32bc62b73df.name: Word of Pain
30508c3e-23b4-5d4a-ae0e-d32bc62b73df.description: Ranged Spell Attack:+9 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) force damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws until the end of its next turn as pain courses through its body.

8dcab72d-aa61-5638-9594-2f6a0e0cc220.name: Collapsing Star
8dcab72d-aa61-5638-9594-2f6a0e0cc220.description: When the void dragon dies, it explodes in a swath of celestial destruction. Each creature within 1,000 feet of the dragon must make a DC 21 Constitution saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) bludgeoning damage and 55 (10d10) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Objects in the area that aren’t being worn or carried take half the bludgeoning damage. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is ejected to a random location on a random plane of existence or 5d100 miles away from its current location in a random direction (GM’s choice).

8110c8d6-3891-53c6-9157-3f11593ad989.name: Gravitic Breath (Ancient Void Dragon)
8110c8d6-3891-53c6-9157-3f11593ad989.description: The dragon exhales localized gravity in a 90-foot cube, originating from the dragon. When a creature ends a fall in the cube, it takes 1d10 bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it fell, to a maximum of 20d10. A creature that enters the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a DC 24 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature is restrained. On a success, the creature's speed is halved as long as it remains in the cube. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The cube lasts for 1 minute.

36f73d2f-28e8-5572-a1ff-8728a7740a09.description: The dragon twists the fabric of space around it, disappearing and reappearing in an unoccupied space it can see within 120 feet of it. Each creature within 15 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or take 17 (5d6) cold damage and be knocked prone.

a74791a6-31f5-5c31-983c-47ec414e8fb9.name: Void Twist (Ancient Void Dragon)
a74791a6-31f5-5c31-983c-47ec414e8fb9.description: The dragon adds 7 to its AC against one attack that would hit it, as it twists reality to open a small rift in space to protect itself. To do so, the dragon must be able to see the attacker. If the attack misses by 5 or more, the dragon can choose to open a second, connected rift next to another creature it can see within 30 feet of it to direct the attack at that creature instead, using the original attack roll result against the new target's AC.

attributes.description: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 24 Dexterity saving throw or take 16 (2d6 + 9) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.

0fb175b2-905c-573a-806d-e9865bd9d2ad.name: Agonizing Gaze
0fb175b2-905c-573a-806d-e9865bd9d2ad.description: When a creature that can see the angatra’s eyes starts its turn within 30 feet of the angatra, the angatra can force it to make a DC 13 Charisma saving throw if the angatra isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed saving throw, the creature’s pain threshold lowers, and it becomes vulnerable to all damage types until the end of its next turn.

On a failed saving throw, the creature’s pain threshold lowers, and it becomes vulnerable to all damage types until the end of its next turn.

3ff15c61-2ba5-5899-8907-afe0bd0e8b1b.name: Ancestral Wrath
3ff15c61-2ba5-5899-8907-afe0bd0e8b1b.description: The angatra immediately recognizes any individual descended from its tribe. It has advantage on attack rolls against such creatures, and those creatures have disadvantage on saving throws against the angatra’s traits and attacks.

attributes.description: The angatra immediately recognizes any individual descended from its tribe. It has advantage on attack rolls against such creatures, and those creatures have disadvantage on saving throws against the angatra’s traits and attacks.

4025b036-7975-5c43-9b87-8ed49e120c97.name: Undead Nature (Angatra)
4025b036-7975-5c43-9b87-8ed49e120c97.description: The angatra doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The angatra doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

0758345b-3df5-5977-9797-83f56be22837.name: Claw (Angatra)
0758345b-3df5-5977-9797-83f56be22837.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage, and the creature must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed by pain until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage, and the creature must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed by pain until the end of its next turn.

0ea13391-aea4-591f-95d0-97c280ec9a8e.name: Multiattack (Angatra)
0ea13391-aea4-591f-95d0-97c280ec9a8e.description: The angatra makes two Claw attacks.

0aad2bee-69c5-5702-a54a-7d456b894f39.name: Keen Touch
0aad2bee-69c5-5702-a54a-7d456b894f39.description: The angler worm has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on vibrations.

attributes.description: The angler worm has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on vibrations.

b9197704-3115-53eb-97c7-962967a631fd.name: Snare Walker
b9197704-3115-53eb-97c7-962967a631fd.description: The angler worm ignores movement restrictions caused by its snares or the snares of other angler worms.

attributes.description: The angler worm ignores movement restrictions caused by its snares or the snares of other angler worms.

47505811-4d1e-5a01-98c3-4e9eda8a29b3.name: Spider Climb
47505811-4d1e-5a01-98c3-4e9eda8a29b3.description: The angler worm can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The angler worm can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

f838ab32-ac97-51d3-9031-ff919468c7bf.name: Transparent Trap
f838ab32-ac97-51d3-9031-ff919468c7bf.description: With 10 minutes of work, the angler worm can create a web of nearly transparent snares in a 20-foot cube. The web must be anchored between two solid masses or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling. A web of snares layered over a flat surface has a depth of 5 feet. The web is difficult terrain, and the snares forming it are nearly transparent, requiring a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice them.

ca06a921-e5b7-585c-9875-28278e5a45b1.name: Bite (Angler Worm)
ca06a921-e5b7-585c-9875-28278e5a45b1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) acid damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) acid damage.

c1fde42c-63a2-5a27-a8bb-f192e0950200.name: Coils
c1fde42c-63a2-5a27-a8bb-f192e0950200.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 12 (3d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained by the angler worm, it can't breathe, it takes 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the angler worm's turns, and the angler worm can't use its Coils on another target.

6e848840-6647-5801-99ab-bff90d5abd66.name: Ethereal Lure
6e848840-6647-5801-99ab-bff90d5abd66.description: The angler worm creates an orb of faint, blue light on a point it can see within 20 feet of it. The light glows until the start of the worm's next turn. When a creature that isn't an angler worm starts its turn within 60 feet of the orb and can see the light, it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the start of its next turn. While charmed, the creature must take the Dash action and move toward the light by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the light. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, the creature can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the charmed creature enters the worm's snares, it has disadvantage on the saving throw to avoid being restrained.

f31cb4d3-faa5-53f5-acaa-4f5f711d0f62.name: Multiattack (Angler Worm)
f31cb4d3-faa5-53f5-acaa-4f5f711d0f62.description: The angler worm makes two Bite attacks or one Bite attack and one Coils attack.

The annelidast doesn’t require air.

c5b67d94-0999-5a4e-b869-2fbbc04ebcec.name: Primordial Aura
c5b67d94-0999-5a4e-b869-2fbbc04ebcec.description: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the annelidast must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) poison damage. A creature that finishes a long rest within 1,000 feet of the annelidast must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or develop tumors across its body and become poisoned until the tumors are removed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic.

A creature that finishes a long rest within 1,000 feet of the annelidast must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or develop tumors across its body and become poisoned until the tumors are removed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic.

e0005d23-bb93-57f3-b0bf-ee27f270ad83.name: Tunneler
e0005d23-bb93-57f3-b0bf-ee27f270ad83.description: The annelidast can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: The annelidast can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

41700229-ab00-5daf-bf6b-cab9833c85c0.name: Crush
41700229-ab00-5daf-bf6b-cab9833c85c0.description: The annelidast launches most of its massive bulk into the air and crashes down on the ground in a 20-foot line that is 10 feet wide. It then retracts itself into a space along that line and can occupy the space of one or more Large or smaller creatures. Each creature in the line must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 45 (7d12) bludgeoning damage, is knocked prone, and is restrained while it shares a space with the annelidast, as it is pinned beneath the annelidast's body. On a success, a creature takes half the damage, isn't knocked prone, and is pushed out of the annelidast's space into an unoccupied space of the creature's choice within 5 feet of the annelidast. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 17 Strength check. If the annelidast burrows along the surface of the earth at least 20 feet before using this action, creatures in the line have disadvantage on the saving throw.

709b4b7f-a4bf-5570-a690-c94cae274501.name: Defensive Recoil
709b4b7f-a4bf-5570-a690-c94cae274501.description: When the annelidast takes damage, it can make one Slam attack against a creature restrained by it.

717174b5-e465-5a33-862b-acb16aa68050.name: Slam (Annelidast)
717174b5-e465-5a33-862b-acb16aa68050.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (2d12 + 8) bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 15 feet away from the annelidast. A creature restrained by the annelidast automatically succeeds on this saving throw.

6510efe7-60a5-5d7f-a1a2-6267362b977c.name: Elemental Nature
6510efe7-60a5-5d7f-a1a2-6267362b977c.description: The anubian doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

b54c5a21-f0b9-5e32-bb7a-e5c5f88224ef.name: Sand Camouflage
b54c5a21-f0b9-5e32-bb7a-e5c5f88224ef.description: The anubian has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in sandy terrain.

attributes.description: The anubian has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in sandy terrain.

069ce2ed-44e5-5f19-9d6e-6f794bc75842.name: Sand Form
069ce2ed-44e5-5f19-9d6e-6f794bc75842.description: The anubian can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The anubian can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

cd3a2914-02cc-5945-85f9-f3842401df14.name: Vulnerability to Water
cd3a2914-02cc-5945-85f9-f3842401df14.description: For every 5 feet the anubian moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 2 (1d4) cold damage. An anubian completely immersed in water takes 10 (4d4) cold damage at the start of its turn.

6d3dcdb6-8c13-5f98-b674-c8e2af2775f1.name: Claw (Anubian)
6d3dcdb6-8c13-5f98-b674-c8e2af2775f1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage.

5f54c61e-d800-523f-ba2e-e3a5482f75b2.name: Haboob
5f54c61e-d800-523f-ba2e-e3a5482f75b2.description: A 30-foot-tall cylinder of sand forms in the anubian's space and moves with it for 10 minutes, until the anubian ends the storm as a bonus action, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). The area within 5 feet of the anubian is heavily obscured. A creature that starts its turn in that area or enters the area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be restrained by the storm. While restrained, the creature takes 3 (1d6) slashing damage at the start of each of its turns, and moves with the anubian when the anubian moves. A creature, including the restrained creature, can use its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check.

402cce06-dfa8-5463-8928-c120aa3b25c0.name: Sand Step
402cce06-dfa8-5463-8928-c120aa3b25c0.description: The anubian collapses into loose sand and teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, reforming in that space. If the destination space contains sand, the anubian can immediately Hide. The anubian can't use Sand Step while Haboob is active.

a15a93de-18b1-5e06-9799-259c21414ef8.name: Diseased Ichor
a15a93de-18b1-5e06-9799-259c21414ef8.description: When the apau perape takes piercing damage or slashing damage, a spray of caustic blood spurts from the wound. Each creature within 5 feet of the apau perape must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become infected with the Mechuiti’s ichor disease and be poisoned until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hp maximum by 5 (2d4) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. This reduction lasts until the disease is cured. The creature dies if the disease reduces its hp maximum to 0.

dd3ff228-6681-5fc7-b31c-bfd51c638063.name: Summon Demon
dd3ff228-6681-5fc7-b31c-bfd51c638063.description: The apau perape magically calls 1d4 apes that are Fiends with the apau perape's damage resistances and immunities. It has a 50 percent chance of calling one apau perape instead. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the apau perape and obeying its telepathic commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until the apau perape dies, or until the apau perape dismisses them as a bonus action.

86fbae73-4f78-53be-8b79-0bda0470016c.description: The target falls prone and is incapacitated with laughter until the end of its next turn.

595f4cd7-06eb-58de-8c58-9371cd113fb5.name: Multiattack (Aridni)
595f4cd7-06eb-58de-8c58-9371cd113fb5.description: The aridni makes three Shortsword or Pixie Bow attacks.

d7cd7e6e-fd4b-525f-81a4-6e882629b560.name: Shortsword
d7cd7e6e-fd4b-525f-81a4-6e882629b560.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage.

7508234f-bf44-5dca-9fe7-de9091af9712.name: Sleep
7508234f-bf44-5dca-9fe7-de9091af9712.description:
The target falls unconscious for 1 minute. It wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.




Aridni in Midgard

2c216c00-645f-527c-b6ba-a92de8ee57a8.name: Spellcasting (Aridni)
2c216c00-645f-527c-b6ba-a92de8ee57a8.description:
The aridni casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):

- **At Will:** dancing lights, detect magic, invisibility
- **3/Day Each:** charm person, faerie fire
1/day: spike growth

c3cb4204-d11b-5dc7-b399-8f7fc1d3a32d.name: Immutable Form (Arx)
c3cb4204-d11b-5dc7-b399-8f7fc1d3a32d.description: The arx is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

07450060-a946-521e-9e81-98900811d4f5.name: Spiky Hide
07450060-a946-521e-9e81-98900811d4f5.description: A creature that touches the arx or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) piercing damage. This trait also applies to the arx’s walls.

369aa29e-6762-5cdd-97e5-7805aa598c43.name: Claw (Arx)
369aa29e-6762-5cdd-97e5-7805aa598c43.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) slashing damage.

054b9d79-088e-5678-8837-f8d7b14b7139.name: Emplace Wall
054b9d79-088e-5678-8837-f8d7b14b7139.description: The arx extends its hardened elytra and casts them into the ground, creating a wall. The wall is 3 inches thick and is composed of two 10-foot-by-10-foot panels. The panels must connect perpendicular to each other, forming a corner behind the arx. If the wall falls in a creature's space when the arx places it, the creature must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage, and the arx determines to which side of the wall the creature is pushed. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and decides to which side of the wall it is pushed.

43698943-6cbd-5bf1-beca-642d73ed2fbd.description: The arx makes two Claw attacks and one Spear attack.

a4453edd-35ab-5f9b-9097-86c87f5321b4.name: Spear (Arx)
a4453edd-35ab-5f9b-9097-86c87f5321b4.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage, or 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage, or 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

f13c9db4-4875-5488-9ed6-feffcdb5bba3.name: Wall Smash
f13c9db4-4875-5488-9ed6-feffcdb5bba3.description: If the arx has its wall set up (see Emplace Wall), it can briefly close the panels of the wall in on each other. Each creature other than the arx between the panels in a 10-foot cone from the corner where the panels meet must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

bb72d97c-46d1-5503-8e97-4430459ba930.name: Spider Climb (Asanbosam)
bb72d97c-46d1-5503-8e97-4430459ba930.description: The asanbosam can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The asanbosam can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

caad5bb0-41ea-5fe7-9449-4a9503654ec9.name: Arboreal Escape
caad5bb0-41ea-5fe7-9449-4a9503654ec9.description: While in a tree, the asanbosam takes the Disengage or Hide action.

attributes.description: While in a tree, the asanbosam takes the Disengage or Hide action.

4bb7a8bd-cd15-5c32-9e1b-172a7064d3cb.name: Bite (Asanbosam)
4bb7a8bd-cd15-5c32-9e1b-172a7064d3cb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 11 (2d10) poison damage and contract a disease. Until the disease ends, the creature is poisoned. Every 24 hours that elapse, the infected creature must repeat the saving throw. On a success, the disease ends. On a failure, the creature's hp maximum is reduced by 5 (1d10). This reduction lasts until the disease ends. The target dies if its hp maximum is reduced to 0.

3612f67e-b6ff-5363-937a-a7ac0442ae6c.name: Claws
3612f67e-b6ff-5363-937a-a7ac0442ae6c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the asanbosam can't use its Claws on another target. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or contract the disease described in the Bite attack.

0ea59a1a-a31a-5a2f-a0f8-efbbe6fb6785.name: Firesight
0ea59a1a-a31a-5a2f-a0f8-efbbe6fb6785.description: The ash drake can see through areas obscured by fire, smoke, and fog without penalty.

attributes.description: The ash drake can see through areas obscured by fire, smoke, and fog without penalty.

12fcf817-8bc7-5129-9f71-994f2d21ad19.name: Ash Breath
12fcf817-8bc7-5129-9f71-994f2d21ad19.description: The ash drake spews blistering hot, choking ash in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) fire damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) fire damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

3cc6505c-77b7-58a0-b604-15219cfbf22e.name: Ash Cloud
3cc6505c-77b7-58a0-b604-15219cfbf22e.description: The ash drake beats its wings, filling the area within 10 feet of it with ash for 1 minute. The ash spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. Each creature that isn't an ash drake and that enters the cloud for the first time on its turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become blinded until the end of its next turn. The ash moves with the drake, remaining centered on it for the duration.

e5845ce6-a376-59c1-9ac8-7bb20b1a505c.description: The ashwalker has immunity to a type of damage based on the type of dragon that killed it: acid (black, copper), cold (silver, white), fire (brass, gold, red), lightning (blue, bronze), or poison (green).

cc9d1309-3fa1-55e4-b513-50fbe72d5799.description: A creature that touches the ashwalker or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) damage of the type noted in its Breath Born trait.

7c543741-886f-5b6a-942e-940ae5f2115d.name: Last Breath
7c543741-886f-5b6a-942e-940ae5f2115d.description: The first time the ashwalker is reduced to 0 hp, it drops to 1 hp instead and its Draconic Breath automatically recharges. The ashwalker transforms into raw energy of the type noted in its Breath Born trait. While in this energy form, it is immune to all damage and to being grappled or restrained. At the end of the ashwalker’s next turn, it is destroyed.

408905ed-e881-5a91-99fb-cc3bd96507e7.description: A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the automata devil must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the automata devil’s Fear Aura for 24 hours.

b6131337-a7f6-55c9-81ae-ee0ae6287c21.name: Shredding Maw
b6131337-a7f6-55c9-81ae-ee0ae6287c21.description: One creature grappled by the automata devil is pulled up to 10 feet toward the devil's central maw, which shreds the creature with churning gears, razor teeth, and whirling blades. The target must make a DC 17 Strength saving throw, taking 36 (8d8) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

ee035855-9201-5647-ba19-c266ba6e0b56.description: The automata devil magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

1dbc9e0b-56cc-523b-8f09-679e6300adf4.name: Whip
1dbc9e0b-56cc-523b-8f09-679e6300adf4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d4 + 7) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17). The automata devil has two whips, each of which can grapple only one target.

7cc136a1-20ed-5128-8c7c-349642eb8108.name: Contagious Lightning
7cc136a1-20ed-5128-8c7c-349642eb8108.description: A creature that touches the azza gremlin or hits it with a metal weapon while within 5 feet of it receives a discharge of lightning. The creature must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or attract lightning for 1 minute. For the duration, attacks that deal lightning damage have advantage against the affected creature, the creature has disadvantage on saving throws against spells and effects that deal lightning damage, and if the creature takes lightning damage, it is paralyzed until the end of its next turn. An affected creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

f4d16d8e-0240-5eda-a2dc-9783ff83378b.name: Lightning Jolt
f4d16d8e-0240-5eda-a2dc-9783ff83378b.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) lightning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be affected by Contagious Lightning.

9c49b3c2-53ce-55c2-80b3-d14264f38f0c.name: Ride the Bolt
9c49b3c2-53ce-55c2-80b3-d14264f38f0c.description: The azza gremlin can travel instantly along any bolt of lightning. When a bolt of lightning strikes or an effect deals lightning damage within 30 feet of the gremlin, it can teleport to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of where the lightning struck or dealt damage.

fe010626-798d-51df-a820-b7a54606e039.name: Enchanted Weapons
fe010626-798d-51df-a820-b7a54606e039.description: The horseman’s weapon attacks are magical. When the horseman hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d8 damage of a type depending on the horseman: cold (black night), fire (red sun), radiant (bright day).

1da010c2-0267-5e81-aaf7-bd1268cf6d91.name: Magic Resistance (Baba Yaga's Horsemen)

5848c4c7-b241-5bc6-be5a-89c0f45f5d86.name: Peerless Rider
5848c4c7-b241-5bc6-be5a-89c0f45f5d86.description: Any attacks directed at the horseman’s mount target the horseman instead, and the horseman confers his damage resistances and immunities and his condition immunities to his mount. In addition, if the horseman and mount are subjected to an effect that allows each to make a saving throw to take only half damage, the mount takes no damage if the horseman succeeds on the saving throw.

2d03ba9b-9949-53cb-bbeb-d8b2a5bec93d.name: Spellcasting (Baba Yaga's Horsemen)
2d03ba9b-9949-53cb-bbeb-d8b2a5bec93d.description:
The horseman casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
3/day: phantom steed (as an action)
- **2/Day Each:** darkness (black night horseman only), daylight (bright day and red sun horsemen only), dimension door, fire shield
1/day: plane shift (self and mount only)

a3bcf533-a2f0-5bb5-b8fe-43e2746448b8.name: Temporal Strike
a3bcf533-a2f0-5bb5-b8fe-43e2746448b8.description: One creature the horseman can see and that the horseman hit with a Horseman's Bolt or Longsword attack within the last minute must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or age 16 (3d10) years. A creature that ages this way has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws that use Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution until the aging is reversed. A creature that ages beyond its lifespan dies immediately. The aging lasts until the creature finishes a long rest, or until it is reversed by a greater restoration spell or similar magic. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the horseman's Temporal Strike for 24 hours.

d2983adc-7973-5fd4-93db-f5a27448ee7f.name: Acid Spray
d2983adc-7973-5fd4-93db-f5a27448ee7f.description: The bagiennik sprays acid on one creature it can see within 30 feet of it, creating a puddle of oil beneath the creature. The target must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 18 (4d8) acid damage and is knocked prone. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone. The slippery oil covers the ground in a 5-foot square centered on the point where the target was standing for 1 minute. A creature that enters the oily area or ends its turn there must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

bad92ad5-c1e2-596f-a2ed-a2c1c0293c2c.name: Healing Oil
bad92ad5-c1e2-596f-a2ed-a2c1c0293c2c.description: The bagiennik applies healing oil to a creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target magically regains 7 (2d6) hp and is freed from any disease or poison. The target must then succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or its speed is halved and it takes a -2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws for 1 minute.

da1a74c3-de87-5a7a-8f6a-87c03388f733.name: Pack Tactics (Bandit Lord)
da1a74c3-de87-5a7a-8f6a-87c03388f733.description: The bandit lord has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the bandit lord’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

c1e904d2-8335-5454-820e-996210f031aa.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, or 8 (2d4 + 3) piercing damage if used to make a melee attack.

5418efad-ea43-5b3b-8750-0f5282aada75.name: Leadership
5418efad-ea43-5b3b-8750-0f5282aada75.description: For 1 minute, the bandit lord can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 feet of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a d4 to its roll provided it can hear and understand the bandit lord. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the bandit lord is incapacitated.

3897e8f5-5e9b-5367-a24d-e7c03a025d76.description: The bandit lord adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the bandit lord must see the attacker and be wielding a weapon.

ca03b7fb-dc3b-59c5-827d-073b564d500e.name: Protect Me!
ca03b7fb-dc3b-59c5-827d-073b564d500e.description: When a creature the bandit lord can see targets it with an attack, the bandit lord can sidestep behind an ally within 5 feet of it, moving to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the ally. The chosen ally becomes the target of the attack instead.

e4c7543a-d0e7-5d32-b184-c01069fddb1e.name: Keen Smell

19ffce41-fd4f-52f4-b981-8eef6074ddc6.name: Priestly Purr
19ffce41-fd4f-52f4-b981-8eef6074ddc6.description: When a cleric or paladin who worships Bastet spends an hour preparing spells while a Bastet temple cat is within 5 feet of it, that spellcaster can choose two 1st-level spells and one 2nd-level spell that it is able to cast and imbue the temple cat with the spells. The spellcaster doesn’t expend spell slots to imbue the cat in this way. The cat can be imbued with no more than three spells at a time. The cat can use the Spellcasting action to cast each spell once, requiring no material components. Once the spells are expended, the temple cat must finish a long rest before it can be imbued with spells again.

8827d887-1df6-5ca8-be8a-fca34845ab57.name: Fascinating Purr
8827d887-1df6-5ca8-be8a-fca34845ab57.description: The temple cat purrs loudly at a Humanoid it can see within 30 feet of it and that can hear it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed. While charmed by the temple cat, the target is incapacitated and must move on its turn toward the cat by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the cat and pet or hold it. The target doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the cat, the target can repeat the saving throw. A charmed target can also repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to the temple cat's Fascinating Purr for the next 24 hours. The temple cat has advantage on attack rolls against any creature petting or holding it.

Any creature can take an action to remove the honey from the wound with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The honey dissolves if the target receives magical healing.

294916b0-1305-59f2-a121-ad0ee8a79e95.description: The ghoul requires no air or sleep.

34e61811-d663-55c8-ad84-10f8c3ae36b1.name: Pack Tactics (Beggar Ghoul)
34e61811-d663-55c8-ad84-10f8c3ae36b1.description: The beggar ghoul has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the beggar ghoul’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The beggar ghoul has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the beggar ghoul’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

9ba6d7c4-928e-5bb3-b8c2-dcda17a9079e.name: Savage Hunger
9ba6d7c4-928e-5bb3-b8c2-dcda17a9079e.description: Its Bite attack is a critical hit if the beggar ghoul bites a creature it has surprised.

attributes.description: Its Bite attack is a critical hit if the beggar ghoul bites a creature it has surprised.

8c39ef4b-f38a-5355-8f83-8cd56daa9a78.name: Bite (Beggar Ghoul)
8c39ef4b-f38a-5355-8f83-8cd56daa9a78.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage.

2b959e0a-b29f-50ca-b314-a095e0f084e8.name: Claws (Beggar Ghoul)
2b959e0a-b29f-50ca-b314-a095e0f084e8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an elf or Undead, it must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A paralyzed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

43783bda-1c9f-5494-91f6-a0805b303bd7.name: Angry Defiance
43783bda-1c9f-5494-91f6-a0805b303bd7.description: The vengeful spirit adds its Charisma modifier to its AC (included above).

346d7ba1-b1a6-5eba-a065-1cdef0ec6f42.name: Incorporeal Movement
346d7ba1-b1a6-5eba-a065-1cdef0ec6f42.description: The vengeful spirit can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The vengeful spirit can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

ddee279d-98d1-5d9f-88f6-b9f0ae813e36.name: Undead Nature (Beheaded Vengeful Spirit)
ddee279d-98d1-5d9f-88f6-b9f0ae813e36.description: The vengeful spirit doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The vengeful spirit doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

3ef579fa-2ed9-5136-88b7-5051f5b0f523.name: Decapitation
3ef579fa-2ed9-5136-88b7-5051f5b0f523.description: The vengeful spirit makes a quick, cutting gesture at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it that has a head and that is below half its hp maximum. The target must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A target that fails the saving throw also has one of its heads cut off. The creature dies if it can't survive without the lost head.

f9e0291a-876f-57ac-87a2-f117341eb0bc.name: Essence of Rage
f9e0291a-876f-57ac-87a2-f117341eb0bc.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft., one creature. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or be enraged until the end of its next turn. While enraged, the target has advantage on melee attack rolls and must move to and attack the nearest creature other than the spirit. In addition, attack rolls against the enraged target have advantage.

ecebef47-9029-524d-96e1-62725a397602.name: Bite (Behtu)
ecebef47-9029-524d-96e1-62725a397602.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

3e0cb8f1-05c9-5a15-ad95-65348f3e6242.name: Fire Breath (Behtu)
3e0cb8f1-05c9-5a15-ad95-65348f3e6242.description: The behtu exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The behtu exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

05b1ae6d-3948-50e9-98a4-1a2bcfb48486.name: Ichorous Infusion
05b1ae6d-3948-50e9-98a4-1a2bcfb48486.description: The behtu ingests an infusion made from Mechuiti's blood. For 1 minute, the behtu has advantage on saving throws and ability checks that use Strength and Constitution, and its walking and climbing speeds are doubled. In addition, it has disadvantage on saving throws and ability checks that use Intelligence and Wisdom for the duration. A non-behtu that ingests the infusion must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 10 (3d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. The behtu typically has 1d4 + 1 infusions in its possession.

08be1094-df2e-5e38-a36c-3468d95a8bf9.description: The behtu makes one Bite attack and one Spear attack.

21335d02-de72-5fbe-98d7-2a77cb6ec4c9.name: Spear (Behtu)
21335d02-de72-5fbe-98d7-2a77cb6ec4c9.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage, or 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

2b1f3d97-65fe-5de1-8114-19b5c1cd660d.name: Arctic Hunter
2b1f3d97-65fe-5de1-8114-19b5c1cd660d.description: The beli has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain. In addition, it has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight in snowy terrain.

attributes.description: The beli has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain. In addition, it has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight in snowy terrain.

620a0b49-dac9-5c7e-8024-3bb922132950.name: Cold Regeneration
620a0b49-dac9-5c7e-8024-3bb922132950.description: If it starts its turn in an area with below freezing temperature, the beli regains 3 hp. If the beli takes fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the beli’s next turn. The beli dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and it doesn’t regenerate.

6a1facf5-9eca-55dd-8ff5-e925c995f763.name: Flyby (Beli)
6a1facf5-9eca-55dd-8ff5-e925c995f763.description: The beli doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

b3be5e92-8b01-5cb5-9d3d-b885766f3a42.name: Ice Dagger
b3be5e92-8b01-5cb5-9d3d-b885766f3a42.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) cold damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) cold damage.

6aaffd29-ef6a-56a7-ba8b-33c960c4638e.name: Icy Shortbow
6aaffd29-ef6a-56a7-ba8b-33c960c4638e.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) cold damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion from the arrow's icy chill. On a success, the target can't suffer further levels of exhaustion from any beli's Icy Shortbow for 24 hours. If a creature would suffer a sixth level of exhaustion from this attack, it is reduced to 0 hp instead and must make death saving throws as normal. A creature reduced to 0 hp in this way can't suffer further levels of exhaustion from any beli's Icy Shortbow for 24 hours.

00a0284c-799b-5b21-8a9c-c36a9d4469c0.name: Invisibility
00a0284c-799b-5b21-8a9c-c36a9d4469c0.description: The beli magically turns invisible until it attacks or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the beli wears or carries is invisible with it.

348d28a5-b4c7-50c8-8413-a0f91bc4f853.name: Foul Form
348d28a5-b4c7-50c8-8413-a0f91bc4f853.description: The bereginyas’s semi-solid form emits poisonous gases. Any creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the bereginyas must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned. A creature that succeeds on this saving throw by 5 or more is immune to the bereginyas’s Foul Form for the next 24 hours.

cdd92470-d7a0-53c6-966e-9aa7f853d4f7.name: Claw (Bereginyas)
cdd92470-d7a0-53c6-966e-9aa7f853d4f7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.

7cbc945a-e390-543c-a2eb-d1ba1656e46e.name: Multiattack (Bereginyas)
7cbc945a-e390-543c-a2eb-d1ba1656e46e.description: The bereginyas makes two Claw attacks. If both attacks hit the same target, the bereginyas attaches to the target. While attached, the bereginyas can use only the Smother action, and it moves with the target whenever the target moves, requiring none of the bereginyas's movement. The bereginyas can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. A creature, including the target, can take its action to detach the bereginyas by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength check.

The bereginyas can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. A creature, including the target, can take its action to detach the bereginyas by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength check.

e3b75b17-a6b7-5576-ac93-ea76b9ce6299.name: Smother
e3b75b17-a6b7-5576-ac93-ea76b9ce6299.description: While attached to a creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, the bereginyas extends a tendril of poisonous gas down the creature's throat. The creature must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it takes 22 (5d8) poison damage, immediately runs out of breath, and begins suffocating. On a success, it takes half the damage, doesn't run out of breath, and isn't suffocating. Suffocation ends if the creature dies, if the bereginyas is removed from the creature, or if the bereginyas is killed. A suffocating creature that fails this saving throw reduces its remaining rounds of breath by 1.

912de4b6-2404-5b9a-a8d6-0abddcb1cd1e.name: False Presence
912de4b6-2404-5b9a-a8d6-0abddcb1cd1e.description: The berstuc detects as a Fey when sensed by spells and features, such as the detect evil and good spell or a paladin’s Divine Sense. However, it is still a Fiend and can be subjected to spells and features that affect Fiends, such as Divine Smite. Beasts and Plants find the berstuc’s presence soothing and don’t attack the berstuc unless ordered to or provoked.
