922b1c6e-35af-5f72-9053-3fb733e0bccb.name: Forest Camouflage
922b1c6e-35af-5f72-9053-3fb733e0bccb.description: The berstuc has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forest terrain.

attributes.description: The berstuc has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forest terrain.

e6987203-a605-5a79-bc13-10ddad0079d4.name: Magic Resistance (Berstuc)
e6987203-a605-5a79-bc13-10ddad0079d4.description: The berstuc has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The berstuc has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

23dc454a-eaa6-54a3-bb98-6e675738afcf.name: Twisted Path
23dc454a-eaa6-54a3-bb98-6e675738afcf.description: While in a nonmagical forest, the berstuc leaves no trail and can’t be tracked, except by magical means. Creatures of the berstuc’s choice within 30 feet of it that travel with it can’t retrace their own trails, and become hopelessly lost after 1 hour of travel with the berstuc. Creatures led astray by the berstuc have disadvantage on ability checks to discern their location or to navigate for 24 hours.

d7f5dded-6fa8-5aba-9484-55ad427852af.name: Verdant Nature
d7f5dded-6fa8-5aba-9484-55ad427852af.description: The berstuc doesn’t require food or sleep.

attributes.description: The berstuc doesn’t require food or sleep.

2ff5f369-8e45-57b2-96a5-91d4453587b3.name: Enclose
2ff5f369-8e45-57b2-96a5-91d4453587b3.description: The berstuc encloses a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it in a mossy growth on the berstuc's body, and the grapple ends. While enclosed in the berstuc's growth, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover from attacks and other effects outside the berstuc, and it takes 21 (6d6) poison damage at the start of each of the berstuc's turns. The berstuc can have only one creature enclosed at a time.

1378fa9f-5c5e-53cb-8330-f88ef9618d7b.name: Multiattack (Berstuc)
1378fa9f-5c5e-53cb-8330-f88ef9618d7b.description: The berstuc makes three Slam attacks. If two Slam attacks hit a Medium or smaller creature, the berstuc can use Enclose on it.

attributes.description: The berstuc makes three Slam attacks. If two Slam attacks hit a Medium or smaller creature, the berstuc can use Enclose on it.

ee1282d3-16e2-548b-854a-bfd24a3956c0.name: Slam (Berstuc)
ee1282d3-16e2-548b-854a-bfd24a3956c0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the berstuc doesn't have two other creatures grappled.

e298224b-34d9-5beb-b442-57dfba674b5b.name: Hateful Presence
e298224b-34d9-5beb-b442-57dfba674b5b.description: Each friendly creature within 10 feet of the black knight commander gains a +2 bonus on weapon damage rolls but can’t use the Help action.

attributes.description: Each friendly creature within 10 feet of the black knight commander gains a +2 bonus on weapon damage rolls but can’t use the Help action.

49423c9b-774f-5010-8307-3dae89a08092.name: Locked Saddle
49423c9b-774f-5010-8307-3dae89a08092.description: The black knight commander can’t be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

attributes.description: The black knight commander can’t be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

376dfefd-1935-5ced-b868-b87384b1d4c5.name: Mounted Charge
376dfefd-1935-5ced-b868-b87384b1d4c5.description: If the black knight commander moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits it with a Lance attack on the same turn, the commander can use a bonus action to command its mount to make one melee weapon attack against that creature as a reaction.

attributes.description: If the black knight commander moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits it with a Lance attack on the same turn, the commander can use a bonus action to command its mount to make one melee weapon attack against that creature as a reaction.

72866494-f27c-5f26-aaf1-c141cb58386a.name: Mounted Warrior
72866494-f27c-5f26-aaf1-c141cb58386a.description: The black knight commander is rarely seen without its warhorse mount. The warhorse wears custom barding that raises is Armor Class to 15, and mounting and dismounting the warhorse costs the commander only 5 feet of movement. While the commander is mounted, its mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

While the commander is mounted, its mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

ea267c78-e3d8-5924-ad1d-a9e0fbde5e7b.name: Frightful Charge
ea267c78-e3d8-5924-ad1d-a9e0fbde5e7b.description: While mounted, the black knight commander lets loose a terrifying cry. It then moves up to 30 feet in a straight line and can move through the space of any Large or smaller creature. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. The first time it enters a creature's space during this move, that creature must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 28 (8d6) bludgeoning damage and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't frightened. A frightened creature can make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

28e2fcf5-b639-5825-ac14-13ffd9698487.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) piercing damage.

7f75a2b6-deaf-5b42-9729-3a261d708f12.name: Mace

395d6b31-0844-5501-a7cf-01455d151066.name: Multiattack (Black Knight Commander)
395d6b31-0844-5501-a7cf-01455d151066.description: The black knight commander makes one Lance attack and two Mace attacks. If the commander is mounted, its mount can then make one Hooves attack. If both Mace attacks hit one creature, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage.

cf2fde90-70b5-5220-9bb3-3533fff94dc8.name: Carnivorous Compulsion
cf2fde90-70b5-5220-9bb3-3533fff94dc8.description: At the start of each of its turns, if the blemmyes can see an incapacitated creature, the blemmyes must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw or spend its next turn moving toward and attacking that creature.

5fc7d061-7b81-5c65-8c94-061dd90e2c80.name: Bite (Blemmyes)
5fc7d061-7b81-5c65-8c94-061dd90e2c80.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is incapacitated and a Medium or smaller creature, the target is swallowed. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the blemmyes, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the blemmyes' turns. The blemmyes can have only one target swallowed at a time.

24f4ff27-aa1d-5093-a017-1f02613b8dcd.name: Multiattack (Blemmyes)

8105362e-b117-5e4e-a495-9a421733d794.name: Rock
8105362e-b117-5e4e-a495-9a421733d794.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

f37d1a69-572f-55b0-94da-832135599de1.name: Slam (Blemmyes)

5277ddc0-f39b-5013-9e92-d4bbf3b56d06.name: Blood Sense
5277ddc0-f39b-5013-9e92-d4bbf3b56d06.description: The blood hag can pinpoint the location of creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead within 60 feet of her and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of her.

ca5408f2-a0d2-5680-88f2-61dea85a9e2b.name: Blood Bolt
ca5408f2-a0d2-5680-88f2-61dea85a9e2b.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature with blood, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature with blood, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

bf00e7ee-8970-5f17-a380-58507ecb3c63.name: Blood-Drinking Hair
bf00e7ee-8970-5f17-a380-58507ecb3c63.description: The hag drains blood from one creature grappled by her. The target must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The blood hag regains hp equal to half the necrotic damage taken.

c35c96ce-a450-56ba-9de1-ea12858dfda5.name: Claws (Blood Hag)
c35c96ce-a450-56ba-9de1-ea12858dfda5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Medium or smaller creature. The blood hag has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Medium or smaller creature. The blood hag has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

255dbade-d424-5dfa-86b7-96a7b2c23956.name: Face Peel
255dbade-d424-5dfa-86b7-96a7b2c23956.description: The blood hag peels the face off one creature grappled by her. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or take 14 (4d6) slashing damage and be stunned until the end of its next turn. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. While its hp maximum is reduced in this way, the target has disadvantage on all Charisma checks. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

b9625e61-ca81-5303-a8f8-3c0334606136.name: Multiattack (Blood Hag)
b9625e61-ca81-5303-a8f8-3c0334606136.description: The blood hag makes three Claw or Blood Bolt attacks and can use Blood-Drinking Hair or Face Peel. She can replace one attack with a use of Sanguine Curse.

attributes.description: The blood hag makes three Claw or Blood Bolt attacks and can use Blood-Drinking Hair or Face Peel. She can replace one attack with a use of Sanguine Curse.

b2483bf0-e70a-5c5c-b205-c8f767404db7.name: Sanguine Curse
b2483bf0-e70a-5c5c-b205-c8f767404db7.description: The blood hag curses one creature she can see or sense within 60 feet of her. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be cursed for 1 minute. A creature automatically succeeds on this saving throw if it doesn't have blood. While cursed, the target is incapacitated and takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns as its internal blood vessels rupture. The cursed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the curse on itself on a success.

15d8f16a-5991-5866-93e2-5f64bd17046e.name: Spellcasting (Blood Hag)
15d8f16a-5991-5866-93e2-5f64bd17046e.description:
The blood hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** disguise self, knock, tongues
- **3/Day Each:** modify memory, pass without trace

136812c7-8653-5109-9f92-4f20de437ae4.name: Amphibious (Boloti)
136812c7-8653-5109-9f92-4f20de437ae4.description: The boloti can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The boloti can breathe air and water.

b12e6f9a-7758-5f1a-ba37-0ed8ba3aff41.name: Water Camouflage
b12e6f9a-7758-5f1a-ba37-0ed8ba3aff41.description: The boloti has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide while at least half of its body is submerged in water.

attributes.description: The boloti has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide while at least half of its body is submerged in water.

c881742b-bf0e-521f-8961-4f398f7fb848.name: Water Mastery
c881742b-bf0e-521f-8961-4f398f7fb848.description: A boloti has advantage on attack rolls if both it and its target are touching the same body of water. If the target and the boloti are both on dry ground, the boloti has disadvantage on attack rolls.

attributes.description: A boloti has advantage on attack rolls if both it and its target are touching the same body of water. If the target and the boloti are both on dry ground, the boloti has disadvantage on attack rolls.

82d6ba48-0812-5165-9665-32a0b267feda.name: Watery Body (Vortex Form Only)
82d6ba48-0812-5165-9665-32a0b267feda.description: The boloti can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. A creature that starts its turn in the boloti’s space must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw or take 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage as it is buffeted by the swirl of water.

759ac11a-34af-5762-8ec8-0c8359a62f3e.name: Dagger (Boloti)

27f8d947-35f7-5b62-9392-fca3417616bc.name: Spellcasting (Boloti)
27f8d947-35f7-5b62-9392-fca3417616bc.description:
(True Form Only)The boloti casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 11):

- **At Will:** water breathing, water walk
- **3/Day Each:** create or destroy water, fog cloud, sleep
1/day: control water

649dbb65-c669-50c4-ad68-89bdd473c0ed.name: Vortex Form
649dbb65-c669-50c4-ad68-89bdd473c0ed.description: The boloti magically transforms into a Small vortex of swirling, churning water or back into its true form, which is Fey. The boloti can transform into its vortex form only while at least half of its body is submerged in water, and any creature it is grappling with Whirlpool is freed if the boloti transforms back to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

1a865137-e095-5668-8d24-76dd6ed68650.name: Whirlpool
1a865137-e095-5668-8d24-76dd6ed68650.description: One creature in the boloti's space must make a DC 12 Strength saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage, and if it is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and unable to breathe unless it can breathe water. If the saving throw is successful, the target takes half the damage and is pushed out of the boloti's space.

dc3f80fa-c9e8-53ca-b37d-90366dbdf606.name: Collective Mind
dc3f80fa-c9e8-53ca-b37d-90366dbdf606.description: The collective’s individual bones are connected via a hive mind. It can telepathically communicate with any of its individual bones within 50 miles of it, and it can’t be surprised. If the collective is reduced to half its hp or fewer, its Intelligence score is reduced to 1, it can’t cast spells, it immediately changes to its shapeless form, and it can’t take on a Humanoid form.

fb80a12c-5d3e-5e69-a88f-4a1cfb42d2f6.description: The bone collective can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny bone.

94f813ae-0f17-52d3-8a20-8c65eef2c3fe.description: The bone collective doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

9f83606f-ebbc-5a06-a2d1-d2e73fd0023e.description: When the bone collective hits a poisoned creature with a Bite or Piercing Bones attack, the target’s Charisma score is reduced by 1d4. The target is incapacitated if this reduces its Charisma to 0. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.

19f9202b-c4d8-5d1f-93ef-4e22342ef1d6.name: Piercing Bones
19f9202b-c4d8-5d1f-93ef-4e22342ef1d6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the collective's space. Hit: 52 (8d12) piercing damage, or 26 (4d12) piercing damage if the collective has half its hp or fewer.

4bae2a62-faef-54df-8c7f-198b2d34c275.name: Shape Swarm
4bae2a62-faef-54df-8c7f-198b2d34c275.description: The bone collective can shape itself into a Small Humanoid or back into a shapeless form of Tiny bones. Its statistics are the same in each form, and it can't regain hp or gain temporary hp. It can't take on a Humanoid form if it is occupying the space of another creature.

87e2309a-f352-5688-830b-f4afee833d75.name: Spellcasting (Bone Collective)
87e2309a-f352-5688-830b-f4afee833d75.description: (3/Day; Humanoid Form Only)The bone collective casts the animate dead spell as an action, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14).

60cd2f9c-7225-5ba0-9dba-87f7f70a07d2.name: Amphibious (Bone Crab)
60cd2f9c-7225-5ba0-9dba-87f7f70a07d2.description: The bone crab can breathe air and water.

d012605d-1d3a-5aa9-8688-02f3054d396f.description: The bone crab has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide among bones.

attributes.description: The bone crab has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide among bones.

2c768a20-ce28-5187-a27a-1efe8c46de23.name: Limited Telepathy
2c768a20-ce28-5187-a27a-1efe8c46de23.description: The bone crab can magically communicate simple ideas, emotions, and images telepathically with other bone crabs in its pack within 100 feet of it. While within 30 feet of another bone crab, the bone crab can’t be surprised and has advantage on initiative rolls.

67f9142b-b9f2-5805-bb82-5d010a9e76d7.name: Pack Tactics (Bone Crab)
67f9142b-b9f2-5805-bb82-5d010a9e76d7.description: The bone crab has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the crab’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

7c360e48-b00b-545a-accd-0706f27432ac.name: Standing Leap
7c360e48-b00b-545a-accd-0706f27432ac.description: The bone crab’s long jump is up to 20 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

attributes.description: The bone crab’s long jump is up to 20 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

3fb80456-f247-5564-b40d-e1b74c514c9f.name: White Ghost Shivers
3fb80456-f247-5564-b40d-e1b74c514c9f.description: A creature that eats the meat of the bone crab or that is bitten by a creature infected with the white ghost shivers disease must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or become infected with the disease. An infected creature develops the first symptoms after 24 hours. Symptoms include a mild chill that escalates to a fever and frightful hallucinations that give the disease its name. At the end of each long rest, the infected creature must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. The exhaustion lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. A creature that succeeds on two saving throws against the disease recovers from it. Alternatively, the disease can be removed by the lesser restoration spell or similar magic.

eb253543-2361-5260-9d2b-ef62c3ee4db9.name: Swarm

5348d860-ced8-5d7b-b631-45b262c0e5dd.name: Death's Embrace
5348d860-ced8-5d7b-b631-45b262c0e5dd.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: The target is grappled (escape DC 16) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained and any attack against the bone swarm has a 50 percent chance of hitting the grappled creature instead. The bone swarm can have only one creature grappled at a time. The grappled creature has advantage on ability checks made to escape the grapple when the bone swarm has half of its hp or fewer.

attributes.description: The bonepowder ghoul can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

7fddef96-d4aa-55d6-bba2-c6e6c91d009a.name: Turning Defiance
7fddef96-d4aa-55d6-bba2-c6e6c91d009a.description: The bonepowder ghoul and any ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn Undead.

attributes.description: The bonepowder ghoul and any ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn Undead.

549fd22d-957d-5fa4-b246-8299f37f8f5f.name: Bite (Bonepowder Ghoul)
549fd22d-957d-5fa4-b246-8299f37f8f5f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. If the target is a Humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or contract the darakhul fever disease (see the Darakhul Fever sidebar).

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. If the target is a Humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or contract the darakhul fever disease (see the Darakhul Fever sidebar).

e2e7f942-e9ce-58c9-b71e-017e1d32f2c6.name: Coalesce
e2e7f942-e9ce-58c9-b71e-017e1d32f2c6.description: When a bonepowder ghoul deals necrotic damage with Gravedust to at least one creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, it can magically transform from its dusty form into a coalesced form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except it can speak audibly only in its coalesced form. The coalesced form lasts for a number of minutes equal to the total necrotic damage it dealt with Gravedust to creatures that aren't Constructs or Undead or until the ghoul ends it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: When a bonepowder ghoul deals necrotic damage with Gravedust to at least one creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, it can magically transform from its dusty form into a coalesced form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except it can speak audibly only in its coalesced form. The coalesced form lasts for a number of minutes equal to the total necrotic damage it dealt with Gravedust to creatures that aren't Constructs or Undead or until the ghoul ends it as a bonus action.

9bee3ac1-810e-5343-82ff-b85b81938233.name: Gravedust
9bee3ac1-810e-5343-82ff-b85b81938233.description: The ghoul projects a 30-foot cone of grave dust. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or take 13 (3d8) necrotic damage. If a creature is a Humanoid, it must also succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or contract the darakhul fever disease (see the Darakhul Fever sidebar).

e426f069-b773-573e-92cb-200ca4673f27.name: Spellcasting (Bonepowder Ghoul)
e426f069-b773-573e-92cb-200ca4673f27.description:
(Coalesced Form Only)The bonepowder ghoul casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):

- **At Will:** dispel magic, mage hand, ray of enfeeblement
- **3/Day Each:** blindness/deafness, fear
1/day: phantasmal killer

1/day: phantasmal killer

29073c40-7b2f-5490-8537-95c941728d17.name: Whirlwind
29073c40-7b2f-5490-8537-95c941728d17.description: (Dust Form Only) The ghoul creates a whirlwind of bones and teeth in a 20-foot cube originating from it. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 55 (10d10) slashing damage, and its Strength score is reduced by 1d6. The creature dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and its Strength score isn't reduced.

089bf084-acdb-5aa0-92b6-76abec4bd1f1.name: Sense Consecrated
089bf084-acdb-5aa0-92b6-76abec4bd1f1.description: The bouda can pinpoint, by scent, the location of celestials, consecrated places or objects, and creatures wielding divine or celestial power, such as clerics, paladins, or aasimars, within 60 feet of it.

attributes.description: The bouda can pinpoint, by scent, the location of celestials, consecrated places or objects, and creatures wielding divine or celestial power, such as clerics, paladins, or aasimars, within 60 feet of it.

c3883650-7af0-591a-a516-7523bb81252d.name: Sense Magic
c3883650-7af0-591a-a516-7523bb81252d.description: The bouda senses magic within 30 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: The bouda senses magic within 30 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

4fede4f8-c668-5e85-9337-78d8865ccded.name: Bite (Bouda)
4fede4f8-c668-5e85-9337-78d8865ccded.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

44c0ba33-b775-580d-a0ef-174752f39c3b.name: Change Shape (Bouda)
44c0ba33-b775-580d-a0ef-174752f39c3b.description: The bouda transforms into a human, a hyena, or back into its true form, which is a hyena-human hybrid. Its statistics, other than its speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies, then crumbles to dust moments later.

attributes.description: The bouda transforms into a human, a hyena, or back into its true form, which is a hyena-human hybrid. Its statistics, other than its speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies, then crumbles to dust moments later.

b548ba9b-9a7e-56b9-aae7-af0e86fb7752.name: Defiling Smear
b548ba9b-9a7e-56b9-aae7-af0e86fb7752.description: The bouda secretes a disgusting whitish-yellow substance with the viscosity of tar and smears the substance on an object, unoccupied space, or creature within 5 feet of it. An unwilling creature must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw to avoid the smear. Each creature, other than a bouda or hyena, that starts its turn within 30 feet of the smeared target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to that source of Defiling Smear for the next 24 hours. The stench of a smear remains potent for 7 days or until removed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic.

60d60d80-2d46-5806-9ddc-ef7a0e192148.name: Mephitic Claw
60d60d80-2d46-5806-9ddc-ef7a0e192148.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned until the end of its next turn.

c868840b-2b0d-599a-950d-2266aa2c3579.name: Multiattack (Bouda)
c868840b-2b0d-599a-950d-2266aa2c3579.description: The bouda makes one Bite attack and one Mephitic Claw attack.

attributes.description: The bouda makes one Bite attack and one Mephitic Claw attack.

d8608f69-420d-5819-b858-b5e7f21525a9.name: Ravenous Gorge
d8608f69-420d-5819-b858-b5e7f21525a9.description: The bouda consumes the organs of a corpse within 5 feet of it that is less than 7 days old. It gains temporary hp equal to twice the dead creature's CR for 1 hour. The bouda can't use Ravenous Gorge on a corpse if it or another bouda has already use Ravenous Gorge on the corpse.

78e658bd-6867-5f6c-8e0d-9f2e0fc5258c.name: Construct Nature (Broodiken)
78e658bd-6867-5f6c-8e0d-9f2e0fc5258c.description: The broodiken doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The broodiken doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

6bdd8641-da0c-518e-b52c-30c24583bf94.name: Immutable Form (Broodiken)
6bdd8641-da0c-518e-b52c-30c24583bf94.description: The broodiken is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The broodiken is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

0caffeb2-af46-5265-872f-1b6d2b359bb1.name: Magic Resistance (Broodiken)
0caffeb2-af46-5265-872f-1b6d2b359bb1.description: The broodiken has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The broodiken has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

6a19b97a-6e03-57c3-84e4-b1eb1ca35796.name: Shared Rage
6a19b97a-6e03-57c3-84e4-b1eb1ca35796.description: The broodiken can’t speak with its creator telepathically, but it can magically receive simple ideas, emotions, and images telepathically from its creator while within 100 feet of its creator. The creator can send the broodiken an image of a creature and emotion or simple idea tied to it, such as anger or retrieval, and the broodiken will seek the creature to carry out the emotion or desire. As long as the broodiken is following such an order, it can be more than 100 feet away from its master without wailing.

db0ff9dc-8ea1-5fa2-97a8-319fc9fdbab0.name: Bite (Broodiken)
db0ff9dc-8ea1-5fa2-97a8-319fc9fdbab0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage, and the broodiken attaches to the target. While attached, the broodiken can't attack, and at the start of each of the broodiken's turns, the target takes 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage.

a94d7dc8-9c61-5e7e-8f3e-b977ad76a2d2.name: Flyby (Bucca)
a94d7dc8-9c61-5e7e-8f3e-b977ad76a2d2.description: The bucca doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

d030d841-578a-5b96-abc8-bab437793f55.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
d030d841-578a-5b96-abc8-bab437793f55.description: The bucca takes 1 radiant damage each minute it is exposed to sunlight. While in sunlight, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attributes.description: The bucca takes 1 radiant damage each minute it is exposed to sunlight. While in sunlight, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

315ecba6-1e3d-5175-90b6-7836a103e16f.name: Treasure Sense
315ecba6-1e3d-5175-90b6-7836a103e16f.description: The bucca can pinpoint, by scent, the location of precious metals and stones, such as coins and gems, within 60 feet of it.

attributes.description: The bucca can pinpoint, by scent, the location of precious metals and stones, such as coins and gems, within 60 feet of it.

9a5e98b6-bce8-507d-8cb4-117e14b965b7.name: Dagger (Bucca)
9a5e98b6-bce8-507d-8cb4-117e14b965b7.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. The poisoned target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

a221ead2-5acf-5d7c-b1c5-deb503b7ed4c.name: Invisibility (Bucca)
a221ead2-5acf-5d7c-b1c5-deb503b7ed4c.description: The bucca magically turns invisible until it attacks, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the bucca wears or carries is invisible with it.

4c087d0f-7716-5786-8db6-75cc828320ca.name: Hold Breath
4c087d0f-7716-5786-8db6-75cc828320ca.description: The bukavac can hold its breath for 20 minutes.

2a5f6f99-7db6-5371-b1e1-f9f013efcafa.name: Standing Leap (Bukavac)
2a5f6f99-7db6-5371-b1e1-f9f013efcafa.description: A bukavac’s long jump is up to 20 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

97970478-7fad-5f94-ab6f-a582b2824a82.name: Bite (Bukavac)
97970478-7fad-5f94-ab6f-a582b2824a82.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage.

0ba8410d-8d67-5ad2-bf18-c4854d220795.name: Claw (Bukavac)
0ba8410d-8d67-5ad2-bf18-c4854d220795.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (1d12 + 5) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16) if it is a Medium or smaller creature. The bukavac can have no more than two creatures grappled at a time.

774af9a2-deca-5fe1-80cf-a1a930a897e8.name: Croaking Blast
774af9a2-deca-5fe1-80cf-a1a930a897e8.description: A bukavac can emit a howling thunderclap in a 15-foot radius. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) thunder damage and is deafened until cured by the lesser restoration spell or similar magic. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't deafened.

fcec0e90-32af-532d-88b1-bb27d9b04c6d.name: Gore

fb4f7caf-ed03-5196-a4b4-8690e348c1e9.name: Angelic Weapons
fb4f7caf-ed03-5196-a4b4-8690e348c1e9.description: The buraq’s attacks are magical. When the buraq hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

c75ceb72-8487-5af4-b406-39286ffc7606.name: Magic Resistance (Buraq)
c75ceb72-8487-5af4-b406-39286ffc7606.description: The buraq has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

fd16c723-0229-5225-839c-501283246655.name: Night Journey
fd16c723-0229-5225-839c-501283246655.description: When outdoors at night, the distance of the buraq’s vision is not limited by nonmagical darkness. Once per month, the buraq can declare it is on a night journey, and for the next 24 hours, it can Teleport as a bonus action. When on a night journey, the buraq can teleport as often as it wants, and its destination must always be in an area of nonmagical darkness within its line of sight. At any point during the night journey, the buraq can use a bonus action to return itself and its rider to the location where it began the night journey.

74135aac-401a-56e2-8325-9107b7178bb3.name: Powerful Steed

748e65db-85b3-5a92-a875-505305fc8088.name: Hooves

e30eb6f5-064f-5618-afe2-bf07e0f56b3e.name: Spellcasting (Buraq)
e30eb6f5-064f-5618-afe2-bf07e0f56b3e.description:
The buraq casts one of the following spells, requiring no components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** comprehend languages, detect evil and good, holy aura, pass without trace
- **3/Day Each:** haste, longstrider
- **1/Day Each:** plane shift, wind walk
Teleport (1/Day)The buraq magically teleports itself and its rider, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, to a location the buraq is familiar with, up to 1 mile away.

faa70213-9b10-5241-9738-4f98ffda9a5d.description: A burrowling has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks if at least one other burrowling within 10 feet of it isn’t incapacitated.

c75d9e60-7314-57bb-a321-67e0c8de98c7.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

dfd1a97b-f123-57c2-a8b4-ac09e8c92f68.name: Hail of Needles
dfd1a97b-f123-57c2-a8b4-ac09e8c92f68.description: When reduced to below half its hp maximum, the cactid releases a hail of needles. Each creature within 15 feet of the cactid must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

2c520a37-bbe6-5920-b6db-92bc438c873a.name: Multiattack (Cactid)
2c520a37-bbe6-5920-b6db-92bc438c873a.description: The cactid makes two Tendril attacks and uses Reel.

attributes.description: The cactid makes two Tendril attacks and uses Reel.

813ee598-3e48-5b5c-a488-8e74e80c3254.name: Reel
813ee598-3e48-5b5c-a488-8e74e80c3254.description: The cactid pulls each creature grappled by it up to 10 feet straight toward it.

attributes.description: The cactid pulls each creature grappled by it up to 10 feet straight toward it.

74006348-b025-518e-8d80-87e5571e0406.name: Tendril
74006348-b025-518e-8d80-87e5571e0406.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13) if it is a Medium or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and if it isn't a Construct or Undead, the cactid begins draining fluid from the target's body. At the start of each of the grappled creature's turns, the creature must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, its hp maximum is reduced by 3 (1d6). This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after drinking at least one gallon of water. The grappled creature dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. The cactid has two tendrils, each of which can grapple only one target.

af808705-06a3-588b-b63a-d80c713e448f.name: Heated Body (Camazotz)
af808705-06a3-588b-b63a-d80c713e448f.description: A creature that touches Camazotz or hits him with a melee attack while within 5 feet of him takes 7 (2d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: A creature that touches Camazotz or hits him with a melee attack while within 5 feet of him takes 7 (2d6) fire damage.

4838a564-2203-5d2a-a087-1cba048eac7e.name: Keen Hearing
4838a564-2203-5d2a-a087-1cba048eac7e.description: Camazotz has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

attributes.description: Camazotz has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

949644cc-6424-5fc6-83e6-1b8ae84ff2db.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Camazotz)
949644cc-6424-5fc6-83e6-1b8ae84ff2db.description: If Camazotz fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If Camazotz fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

89d11229-b580-5466-8b1b-6fadcec7e009.name: Magic Resistance (Camazotz)
89d11229-b580-5466-8b1b-6fadcec7e009.description: Camazotz has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: Camazotz has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

73b89cc6-5d44-5ef7-9378-5c6426dfbe8c.name: Bite (Camazotz)
73b89cc6-5d44-5ef7-9378-5c6426dfbe8c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 38 (8d6 + 10) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 22 Constitution saving throw or its Strength score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. A Humanoid that dies from this reduction rises 1d4 days later as a vampire under Camazotz's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. Camazotz can have no more than five vampires under his control at a time.

b8fb3e7a-f43f-5fe3-b863-d50039288e07.name: Call Bats
b8fb3e7a-f43f-5fe3-b863-d50039288e07.description: Camazotz magically calls 4d6 giant bats or swarms of bats, or he magically calls 2d6 vrocks that have membranous instead of feathered wings. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of Camazotz and obeying his telepathic commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until Camazotz dies, or until Camazotz dismisses them as a bonus action. Camazotz can have no more than twenty four giant bats or swarms of bats, or twelve vrocks under his control at a time.

a8e28b48-d32d-5da3-a014-a0374b3ddfb6.name: Change Shape (Camazotz)
a8e28b48-d32d-5da3-a014-a0374b3ddfb6.description: Camazotz magically transforms into a Large giant bat covered in smoldering ashes, or back into his true form, which is a Fiend. His statistics, other than his size, are the same in each form. Any equipment he is wearing or carrying transforms with him. He turns into a pile of greasy ash if destroyed.

3c1b20ba-8615-5c9a-b7de-0c84163cca7c.description: Camazotz beats his wings, extinguishing mundane and magical light sources. Each creature within 10 feet of Camazotz must succeed on a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw or take 14 (4d6) fire damage and be knocked prone.

b27b7454-68ce-524a-b5cf-3651ce37832e.name: Fire Breath (Camazotz)
b27b7454-68ce-524a-b5cf-3651ce37832e.description: Camazotz exhales unholy fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw, taking 33 (6d10) fire damage and 33 (6d10) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

08d583f7-11d1-544c-bfd3-5f358e7b8a7a.name: Move (Camazotz)
08d583f7-11d1-544c-bfd3-5f358e7b8a7a.description: Camazotz moves up to his speed, or he flies up to half his speed. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

e0b4799b-80a4-5389-ac72-af4108045b8b.name: Move (Camazotz 2)

f02ab115-8287-5f05-bf3b-e567f200626e.description: Camazotz makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

48ea4481-03a9-558c-bbed-e882b8e0caf3.name: Spellcasting (Camazotz)
48ea4481-03a9-558c-bbed-e882b8e0caf3.description:
Camazotz casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 22):

- **At Will:** darkness, detect evil and good, dispel magic
- **3/Day Each:** dominate person, haste
1/day: incendiary cloud

e76d7bb5-41c1-5702-98a8-32586f2d94b5.name: Choleric Flux
e76d7bb5-41c1-5702-98a8-32586f2d94b5.description: The target becomes confused for 1 minute. This effect works as if the target failed a saving throw against the confusion spell, except the cambium doesn't have to maintain concentration.

attributes.description: The target becomes confused for 1 minute. This effect works as if the target failed a saving throw against the confusion spell, except the cambium doesn't have to maintain concentration.

45d7d33b-8f7a-5563-8dea-e11e62764f79.name: Damage Ability
45d7d33b-8f7a-5563-8dea-e11e62764f79.description: The cambium twists the bodily humors of a creature within 30 feet of it that isn't a Construct or Undead and that it hit with Needle Fingers in the past minute. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or its Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution score (the cambium's choice) is reduced by 1d4. The target falls unconscious if this reduces an ability score to 0. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.

8e38e2db-50f9-5b7a-a754-f74d1374ce18.name: Imbalance Humors
8e38e2db-50f9-5b7a-a754-f74d1374ce18.description: If the cambium has hit a creature that isn't a Construct or Undead with Needle Fingers in the past minute, it can cause a surge in one of the target's bodily humors, causing an imbalance. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or suffer one of the following effects of the cambium's choice. Unless noted otherwise, the target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7c1b781e-61d6-56e0-972f-e4f0a945ec63.name: Melancholic Flux

826fa837-c12e-5eeb-8dba-ec8c8a7c17e8.name: Needle Fingers
826fa837-c12e-5eeb-8dba-ec8c8a7c17e8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) piercing damage.

6291587c-b1f0-54aa-9126-fe8b2f43aedd.name: Phlegmatic Flux
6291587c-b1f0-54aa-9126-fe8b2f43aedd.description:
The target is poisoned for 1 minute.


Carrion Beetle

The beetles wore golden bridles and carried huge leather sacks of stone and guano. They marched without stopping; dozens, even hundreds, bringing fresh earth to the white-fungus trees of the great forests. Their claws skittered with a sound like horseshoes slipping on stone, but their multiple legs ensured they never fell. The air around them singed the nostrils with the taint of acid.

The target is poisoned for 1 minute.

6077d835-4c51-5a8c-a363-927c48062836.name: Poison Ray
6077d835-4c51-5a8c-a363-927c48062836.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned until the end of its next turn.

54081ba2-8a4f-5974-89b7-cadee7ff7ab1.name: Spellcasting (Cambium)
54081ba2-8a4f-5974-89b7-cadee7ff7ab1.description:
The cambium casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** alter self, detect thoughts, spare the dying
- **3/Day Each:** hold person, protection from poison, heal
1/day: plane shift (self only)

a6cf25af-d691-5ec1-af26-68b6c9b86b3d.description: The caustic charger can end its move in the space of a prone Large or smaller creature. A creature standing up from prone in the same space as the charger can move to a space within 5 feet of the charger as part of standing up.

6da73969-5e10-548d-8f65-e7d9db8bded6.name: Wastes Walk
6da73969-5e10-548d-8f65-e7d9db8bded6.description: Difficult terrain composed of rocks or sand doesn’t cost the caustic charger extra movement.

8cb8765c-4e6d-542b-bb42-b7c0070c92bd.description: The caustic charger makes two Ram attacks. It can replace one Ram attack with a Tentacles attack.

5d6c6ade-f214-5e7c-9720-cd2d8e70e970.name: Ram
5d6c6ade-f214-5e7c-9720-cd2d8e70e970.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the charger moved at least 10 feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target has disadvantage on the saving throw.

c1c93426-77d4-5ef0-a70c-c9b5275ba998.name: Slurp
c1c93426-77d4-5ef0-a70c-c9b5275ba998.description: The caustic charger feeds on a creature paralyzed by its Tentacles attack. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by half the amount of acid damage dealt by the Tentacles attack that caused the paralysis, and the charger regains hp equal to that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

02f48e53-4007-5d63-8845-e656d522d7f9.name: Tentacles
02f48e53-4007-5d63-8845-e656d522d7f9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) acid damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The paralyzed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the caustic charger attacks a target that is not in the charger's space, the target takes half the acid damage and has advantage on the saving throw.

781379c4-9e55-57b8-b0f8-84cff90c62a7.name: Darkness Shroud
781379c4-9e55-57b8-b0f8-84cff90c62a7.description: The cave dragon naturally suppresses light near it. Bright light within 15 feet of the dragon becomes dim light, and dim light within 15 feet becomes nonmagical darkness.

attributes.description: The cave dragon naturally suppresses light near it. Bright light within 15 feet of the dragon becomes dim light, and dim light within 15 feet becomes nonmagical darkness.

55fca8d9-5125-5161-8690-170b3abd5de0.name: Magical Tunneler (Cave Dragon Wyrmling)
55fca8d9-5125-5161-8690-170b3abd5de0.description: The cave dragon can burrow through nonmagical unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dragon can choose whether to leave the material it moves through undisturbed or leave a 5-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

87eb3054-56ed-588e-bdc4-5a56f4203906.name: Bite (Cave Dragon Wyrmling)
87eb3054-56ed-588e-bdc4-5a56f4203906.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

5c49363d-c95e-532e-9cbb-5e33f59eaeed.name: Poison Breath (Cave Dragon Wyrmling)
5c49363d-c95e-532e-9cbb-5e33f59eaeed.description: The dragon exhales a cone of black, poisonous gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) poison damage and is poisoned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned.

f7e7464e-83ff-5cd7-b974-5785a3758b4a.name: Variable Illumination
f7e7464e-83ff-5cd7-b974-5785a3758b4a.description: The cavelight moss sheds bright light in a 5- to 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of feet equal to the chosen radius. The moss can alter the radius as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The cavelight moss sheds bright light in a 5- to 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of feet equal to the chosen radius. The moss can alter the radius as a bonus action.

3a5f6bed-54b9-56d6-9e17-4a318a1875b7.name: Multiattack (Cavelight Moss)
3a5f6bed-54b9-56d6-9e17-4a318a1875b7.description: The cavelight moss makes two Tendrils attacks. If both attacks hit a Large or smaller creature, the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and at the start of each of the target's turns, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. The cavelight moss then gains 5 temporary hp. A creature that succeeds on the saving throw can't suffer further levels of exhaustion from the cavelight moss's grapple for the next 24 hours. The cavelight moss can have only one creature grappled at a time.

Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and at the start of each of the target's turns, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. The cavelight moss then gains 5 temporary hp. A creature that succeeds on the saving throw can't suffer further levels of exhaustion from the cavelight moss's grapple for the next 24 hours. The cavelight moss can have only one creature grappled at a time.

b42ddd9c-de8b-5b10-9692-784be49b463a.name: Immortal Nature
b42ddd9c-de8b-5b10-9692-784be49b463a.description: The chained angel doesn’t require food, drink, or sleep.

1df27280-06d0-595a-ae60-efe6a1850675.description: The chained angel has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The chained angel has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

1f0d5bad-45cc-518c-98e1-bf0a841d90e2.name: Redemption
1f0d5bad-45cc-518c-98e1-bf0a841d90e2.description: When a creature casts the knock spell on the chained angel’s chains, the chains release a blast of unholy flame. The spellcaster must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 16 (3d10) fire damage and 16 (3d10) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the spellcaster survives, the chained angel must immediately make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a success, the angel’s chains fall away. It is restored to its senses and the form it had before it was chained, typically a deva. On a failure, the chained angel remains chained for 7 days, and during that time, any further attempts to cast knock on the angel’s chains fail.

1f9cbf6e-7eb6-5b8b-bc3d-75b671e8028c.name: Fallen Glory

On a failure, a creature takes 19 (3d12) radiant damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

23d0d3c6-950b-583d-b2f5-c80d1be1ef8c.name: Fiendish Cunning

This works like the counterspell spell with a +5 spellcasting ability check, except the chained angel must make the ability check no matter the level of the spell.

a7e435eb-6392-574a-a0e3-9d8cc0490dd3.name: Bite (Chelicerae)
a7e435eb-6392-574a-a0e3-9d8cc0490dd3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the chelicerae doesn't have another creature grappled, the target is grappled (escape DC 15). A poisoned target is also unconscious while poisoned in this way. The poisoned target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the poisoned condition on itself on a success.

3aa6725c-93d4-5bc0-9772-75f5a97ecc02.description: The chelicerae releases some of its stored magical energy in a burst. Each creature within 15 feet of the chelicerae must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 (8d8) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. After using Magical Discharge, the chelicerae can't do so again until it successfully siphons magic from a creature or until it finishes a long rest.

A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

107ae1b9-93c9-5c6e-8b49-7ef6fe5aa03b.description: When the kobold chieftain is wielding its shield and is hit by a melee attack within 5 feet of it, the chieftain can fire one of its shield spikes at the attacker. The attacker takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage.

02db4d34-c298-5575-bd8f-582dca328db4.name: Entangle
02db4d34-c298-5575-bd8f-582dca328db4.description: While within 10 feet of at least one other child of the briar, this child can cast the entangle spell (spell save DC 13). Each friendly child of the briar within 30 feet of this child can use its reaction to join the casting. For each child beyond the first participating in the casting, the save DC increases by 1, to a maximum of DC 17, and the size increases by 5 feet, to a maximum of a 40-foot square. The entangled area must include at least one of the children involved in the casting. All participating children of the briar are immune to the spell's effects.

15669ead-7492-5d45-a4c4-8c564f80cbc9.description: The chort devil magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

1db62c49-ed04-5735-be6a-58b8cb0f2d0b.name: Elemental Nature (Chronalmental)
1db62c49-ed04-5735-be6a-58b8cb0f2d0b.description: The chronalmental doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The chronalmental doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

2aa0448c-7ae4-520d-af0d-abb02920c47e.name: Temporal Body
2aa0448c-7ae4-520d-af0d-abb02920c47e.description: When a chronalmental is subjected to a slow spell, haste spell, or similar effect, it automatically succeeds on any saving throws required by the spell or effect and regains 13 (3d8) hp.

79d624da-fe26-59bb-971b-624155e6dd4b.name: Displace
79d624da-fe26-59bb-971b-624155e6dd4b.description: The chronalmental sends one creature it can see within 30 feet of it outside of the flow of time, shunting the creature to a tiny demiplane. The target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned and magically shunted outside of time for 1 minute. The creature disappears for the duration, returning to the space it previously occupied, or the nearest unoccupied space, when the effect ends. At the end of each of its turns, the target can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success.

72c95e25-90f1-56fd-9708-37e1168b669c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

258db27d-948e-547b-85cf-50239ba2c011.name: Steal Time
258db27d-948e-547b-85cf-50239ba2c011.description: The chronalmental steals time from one creature it can see within 30 feet of it, drawing the stolen time into itself. The target must make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the target's speed is halved, and it can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, but not both for 1 minute. Then, the chronalmental's position in the initiative order increases by 10, its speed increases by 30 feet, and when it takes the Multiattack action, it can make one additional Slam attack. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effects on itself and the chronalmental on a success.

attributes.description: The chronalmental steals time from one creature it can see within 30 feet of it, drawing the stolen time into itself. The target must make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the target's speed is halved, and it can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, but not both for 1 minute. Then, the chronalmental's position in the initiative order increases by 10, its speed increases by 30 feet, and when it takes the Multiattack action, it can make one additional Slam attack. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effects on itself and the chronalmental on a success.

cbaa40e8-a2e3-5ea2-80c8-582afdd070d3.name: Step Between Seconds
cbaa40e8-a2e3-5ea2-80c8-582afdd070d3.description: When a creature the chronalmental can see moves within 5 feet of it, the chronalmental can teleport, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, to an unoccupied space within 60 feet that it occupied within the past minute.

attributes.description: When a creature the chronalmental can see moves within 5 feet of it, the chronalmental can teleport, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, to an unoccupied space within 60 feet that it occupied within the past minute.

9df56d50-d4f9-5dc0-83ac-3c0ff5de31c7.name: Limited Telepathy (Cikavak)
9df56d50-d4f9-5dc0-83ac-3c0ff5de31c7.description: The cikavak can magically communicate simple ideas, emotions, and images telepathically with any creature that touches it and that can understand a language.

attributes.description: The cikavak can magically communicate simple ideas, emotions, and images telepathically with any creature that touches it and that can understand a language.

cdcf820d-b414-538b-8b82-375a50589fb1.name: Speak with Beasts
cdcf820d-b414-538b-8b82-375a50589fb1.description: The cikavak can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The cikavak can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

af26bd1c-47db-5eee-9618-48f310ee5d8a.name: Beak
af26bd1c-47db-5eee-9618-48f310ee5d8a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

db4aa08c-5d48-5cb0-b200-e8ac2c2a3fa5.name: Silencing Squawk
db4aa08c-5d48-5cb0-b200-e8ac2c2a3fa5.description: The cikavak lets out a magical squawk in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be deafened and unable to speak for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

347f9050-9f1f-5cd6-a427-1ebf18a4bf8c.name: False Appearance
347f9050-9f1f-5cd6-a427-1ebf18a4bf8c.description: While the citrullus remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal melon plant.

attributes.description: While the citrullus remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal melon plant.

77ebee98-629d-5686-81b9-8c85da8c1dc2.name: Gush
77ebee98-629d-5686-81b9-8c85da8c1dc2.description: When the citrullus takes bludgeoning damage, sticky juice splashes out of it. If the attacker is within 30 feet of the citrullus, the attacker must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained by the sticky juice as if it had failed a saving throw against the plant’s Bile Spray action.

attributes.description: When the citrullus takes bludgeoning damage, sticky juice splashes out of it. If the attacker is within 30 feet of the citrullus, the attacker must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained by the sticky juice as if it had failed a saving throw against the plant’s Bile Spray action.

120ff0f9-3363-51f1-8e3f-9d622e0fc3d2.name: Bile Spray
120ff0f9-3363-51f1-8e3f-9d622e0fc3d2.description: The citrullus exhales pink bile in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 14 (4d6) acid damage and is restrained by the sticky seed-filled juice for 1 minute. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check.

d9425a4c-c203-59e3-8407-964e6f1f1942.name: Bite (Citrullus)

d0e08aaf-796c-5666-b620-9b7cb8d91199.name: Creeping Seedlings
d0e08aaf-796c-5666-b620-9b7cb8d91199.description: The seeds in the sticky juice grow viny tendrils and drag each creature restrained by Bile Spray and Gush up to 25 feet straight toward the citrullus.

a4fc35d3-3a92-503e-b678-23fd0a45b3de.name: Point Blank Fencer
a4fc35d3-3a92-503e-b678-23fd0a45b3de.description: A rapier deals one extra die of its damage when the city watch captain hits with it (included in the attack). In addition, the captain ignores the loading property of crossbows and doesn’t have disadvantage on the attack roll with a crossbow from being within 5 feet of a hostile creature. The captain may still have disadvantage on such an attack from other sources.

4fca5a53-add2-577b-a987-f3de33752230.name: Tactical Insight
4fca5a53-add2-577b-a987-f3de33752230.description: The city watch captain has advantage on initiative rolls, and friendly creatures within 30 feet of the captain and under the captain’s command can choose to take the captain’s initiative instead of their own when combat starts.

3e47e86a-d6f5-5c49-bcd0-7c8632fce8d6.description: The city watch captain shouts orders at up to two friendly creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target can do one of the following as a reaction:

7d7e8394-e244-5e14-a2da-f431b9d5d17f.name: Light Crossbow

efec5ef0-c76a-54fd-bcae-d0618e5af48b.name: Multiattack (City Watch Captain)
efec5ef0-c76a-54fd-bcae-d0618e5af48b.description: The city watch captain can use its Issue Orders. It then makes two Rapier attacks or three Light Crossbow attacks, or it makes one Rapier attack and two Light Crossbow attacks.

defebec2-aaac-509e-b881-1d879f9d9ee8.name: Rapier
defebec2-aaac-509e-b881-1d879f9d9ee8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the city watch captain can force the target to drop one weapon it is wielding or drop one item it is carrying. If the captain chooses to make the target drop an item, the item can't be wrapped around or firmly attached to the target, such as a shirt or armor. The item lands in a space of the captain's choice within 5 feet of the target.

03cd2151-3504-507e-b0f9-516ceb504c19.description: When a clockwork abomination is destroyed, its infernal battery explodes. Each creature within 10 feet of the abomination must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The explosion ignites flammable objects in the area that aren’t being worn or carried.

ea2eb570-d709-5140-9e1b-21299ad1abe4.description: The clockwork myrmidon is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

ee0690fc-2127-583f-97f1-34a5068d96e3.description: The clockwork myrmidon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

7b32e534-32ba-554c-87ed-349dc3ac8d1c.name: Alchemical Flame Jet
7b32e534-32ba-554c-87ed-349dc3ac8d1c.description: The clockwork myrmidon spews a jet of alchemical fire in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The clockwork myrmidon spews a jet of alchemical fire in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

59af12c6-29d4-5a3c-9faf-1f6ed4f3b940.name: Grease Spray
59af12c6-29d4-5a3c-9faf-1f6ed4f3b940.description: The clockwork myrmidon's chest fires a spray of alchemical grease on a point on the ground within 30 feet of it. The grease covers a 10-foot square centered on that point, and the area is difficult terrain. Each creature standing in the area must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

e5137782-ca12-586a-be12-5eafa00d8d28.name: Multiattack (Clockwork Myrmidon)
e5137782-ca12-586a-be12-5eafa00d8d28.description: The clockwork myrmidon makes one Slam attack and two Heavy Pick attacks. It can replace both Heavy Pick attacks with a use of its Alchemical Flame Jet.

f0623085-91e5-5cdc-a2e6-8066b8668fb7.name: Halberd

aa8a6648-1555-5ec8-8a41-5d6060f926e8.name: Net Cannon (Clockwork Watchman)
aa8a6648-1555-5ec8-8a41-5d6060f926e8.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 10/20 ft., one target. Hit: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is restrained. A mechanism within the clockwork watchman's chest can fire a net with a 20-foot trailing cable anchored within the watchman's chest. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 10 Strength check. Alternatively, dealing 5 slashing damage to the net (AC 10) frees the creature.

8ff1521b-5734-514b-9331-65dccd6d7ae9.name: Magic Resistance (Clockwork Weaving Spider)
8ff1521b-5734-514b-9331-65dccd6d7ae9.description: The weaving spider has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

d7f89739-faa5-5cd7-a097-07ba7fce445f.name: Unmaking
d7f89739-faa5-5cd7-a097-07ba7fce445f.description: The weaving spider’s speed and its slim, sharp blade can slice cloth, leather, and paper into scraps very quickly. Whenever a weaving spider’s Trimming Blade attack roll exceeds the target’s Armor Class by 5 or more, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or one nonmagical cloth, leather, or paper object on the target becomes damaged and unusable until repaired. This effect can deface or ruin clothing, backpacks, journals, and similar objects, but it can’t destroy armor.

71dfcd7c-c0b9-5359-b951-d825a8398d50.name: Poisoned Needle Shuttle

Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7ea297b9-3869-56cf-8c2a-520237da9704.name: Bawdy Remark
7ea297b9-3869-56cf-8c2a-520237da9704.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 30 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn as it doubles over in laughter or freezes up in embarrassment (the target's choice).

11709e85-8ddc-50a0-85aa-957f5b188ee5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

dfaa8189-bed7-53f8-bc29-4ea89e6fabb7.name: Spellcasting (Clurichaun)
dfaa8189-bed7-53f8-bc29-4ea89e6fabb7.description:
The clurichaun casts one of the following spells, requiring alcohol as the only material component and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):

- **At Will:** mending, purify food and drink
- **1/Day Each:** blur, heroism, suggestion

85d6b438-a272-5132-a327-0b7faf2577df.name: False Appearance (Cobbleswarm)
85d6b438-a272-5132-a327-0b7faf2577df.description: While the cobbleswarm remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from normal stones.

attributes.description: While the cobbleswarm remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from normal stones.

a0676b3f-1a71-57de-9d86-70975649c9c6.name: Shifting Floor
a0676b3f-1a71-57de-9d86-70975649c9c6.description: Whenever the cobbleswarm moves into a creature’s space or starts its turn in another creature’s space, the creature must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A prone creature must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check to stand up in a space occupied by the swarm.

70d6f381-77d4-591f-bcc2-53b901c20c30.name: Swarm (Cobbleswarm)
70d6f381-77d4-591f-bcc2-53b901c20c30.description: The cobbleswarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny stone. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

7b7e981e-d1ef-56dd-bf42-c6ce0e5d4c8a.description: The cobbleswarm pushes a prone creature in its space up to 5 feet away from it.

0ad2d1c5-73e5-5b79-ba8d-d9184ced6873.name: Stings
0ad2d1c5-73e5-5b79-ba8d-d9184ced6873.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 15 (6d4) piercing damage, or 7 (3d4) piercing damage if the swarm has half its hp or fewer.

3915b2e7-b62b-5bfb-821b-55e6ec528f6f.name: Underwater Camouflage
3915b2e7-b62b-5bfb-821b-55e6ec528f6f.description: The coral drake has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.

attributes.description: The coral drake has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.

ad6b7a2e-4080-51d7-9c8b-871b41b4eaad.name: Water Breathing
ad6b7a2e-4080-51d7-9c8b-871b41b4eaad.description: The coral drake can breathe only underwater.

cc12c56e-1431-551c-8d1b-c4b52d6212b3.name: Bite (Coral Drake)
cc12c56e-1431-551c-8d1b-c4b52d6212b3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.

995ed380-3242-5f1a-bfd2-5252381d7aee.name: Biting Breath
995ed380-3242-5f1a-bfd2-5252381d7aee.description: The coral drake pressurizes the throat sacs that contain its growing young and spews tiny, ravenous hatchling drakes in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) piercing damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

819da1ef-9e40-521b-8d4c-ad451c4231ae.name: Multiattack (Coral Drake)
819da1ef-9e40-521b-8d4c-ad451c4231ae.description: The coral drake makes one Bite attack and two Spined Fin attacks. It can replace its Bite attack with a Stinger attack.

3ae77ca4-c572-5ba7-a51b-d2852f262c20.name: Spined Fin
3ae77ca4-c572-5ba7-a51b-d2852f262c20.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage.

122b731c-f9bc-5229-aa32-c43954a57e97.name: Stinger (Coral Drake)
122b731c-f9bc-5229-aa32-c43954a57e97.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned, the target takes 5 (2d4) poison damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

ee881a12-479f-5a52-a727-187f6ef40388.name: Absorb the Dead
ee881a12-479f-5a52-a727-187f6ef40388.description: Whenever a Large or smaller creature that isn’t a Construct or Undead dies within 10 feet of the corpse mound, that creature’s remains join with the mound, and the mound regains hp equal to twice the CR or level of the absorbed creature. The absorbed creature can’t be returned to life by any spell or effect that requires a body, unless the body is retrieved from the corpse mound.

The absorbed creature can’t be returned to life by any spell or effect that requires a body, unless the body is retrieved from the corpse mound.

3e5a9953-537e-57a2-a448-34e82f18a403.name: Noxious Aura
3e5a9953-537e-57a2-a448-34e82f18a403.description: At the end of each of the corpse mound’s turns, each creature within 20 feet of it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned until the end of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the mound’s Noxious Aura for 24 hours.

019ae79b-bb0d-5b89-b0be-010cc3a1459e.name: Undead Nature (Corpse Mound)
019ae79b-bb0d-5b89-b0be-010cc3a1459e.description: The corpse mound doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The corpse mound doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

e8a2979e-e70d-5866-a1ce-9250476b4aee.name: Zombie Drop
e8a2979e-e70d-5866-a1ce-9250476b4aee.description: At the start of each of the corpse mound’s turns, it can choose to have one corpse fall from it and immediately rise as a zombie under its control. The mound can have no more than ten zombies under its control at one time. Zombies take their turns immediately after the corpse mound’s turn.

The mound can have no more than ten zombies under its control at one time. Zombies take their turns immediately after the corpse mound’s turn.

4e4fb25a-023f-5ff5-be2f-5a3c052993dd.name: Bone Shard
4e4fb25a-023f-5ff5-be2f-5a3c052993dd.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone and restrained as it is pinned to the ground by the shard. A creature, including the restrained target, can take its action to free the target by succeeding on a DC 17 Strength check.

8227a465-2e19-56d9-adcf-48cdbdbcb15b.name: Envelop
8227a465-2e19-56d9-adcf-48cdbdbcb15b.description: The corpse mound envelops a Large or smaller creature within 5 feet of it that is restrained by its Bone Shard or a Large or smaller creature grappled by it. The enveloped target is blinded, restrained, and unable to breathe, and it must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw at the start of each of the mound's turns or take 18 (2d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage. If the mound moves, the enveloped target moves with it. The mound can have no more than four creatures enveloped at a time.

5cf32cef-fb71-5c32-b104-ca2ee322e9dc.name: Multiattack (Corpse Mound)
5cf32cef-fb71-5c32-b104-ca2ee322e9dc.description: The corpse mound makes two Slam or Bone Shard attacks. If both Slam attacks hit a Large or smaller target, the corpse mound can immediately use Envelop on it.

8b0ce2da-ec38-5f84-8a26-b78a8323fe53.name: Slam (Corpse Mound)
8b0ce2da-ec38-5f84-8a26-b78a8323fe53.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained.

c2746977-97f5-5da1-be0f-dac7866ed475.name: Magic-Infused Weapons
c2746977-97f5-5da1-be0f-dac7866ed475.description: The power coursing through the corrupted chieftain’s veins flows into its weapons. The chieftain’s weapon attacks are magical. When the chieftain hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d8 force damage (included in the attack).

6c50c1c0-dedb-5bc4-9612-ab30de0eb443.name: Spiked Hide
6c50c1c0-dedb-5bc4-9612-ab30de0eb443.description: A creature that touches the ogre or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage.

6c21d829-5890-5fc9-a648-0eb7839ea749.name: Aggressive
6c21d829-5890-5fc9-a648-0eb7839ea749.description: The corrupted chieftain moves up to its speed toward a hostile creature it can see.

attributes.description: The corrupted chieftain moves up to its speed toward a hostile creature it can see.

585de945-84fc-50e4-8451-c937bb307c66.name: Chieftain's Command
585de945-84fc-50e4-8451-c937bb307c66.description: The corrupted chieftain barks an order to one Giant it can see within 30 feet of it, sharing a measure of its power with the target. The target has advantage on the next attack roll it makes before the start of the chieftain's next turn. In addition, the next attack roll against the target before the start of the chieftain's next turn has disadvantage.

attributes.description: The corrupted chieftain barks an order to one Giant it can see within 30 feet of it, sharing a measure of its power with the target. The target has advantage on the next attack roll it makes before the start of the chieftain's next turn. In addition, the next attack roll against the target before the start of the chieftain's next turn has disadvantage.

1bfd171f-9f9a-5660-bec7-e455b7b848e9.name: Chieftain's Might
1bfd171f-9f9a-5660-bec7-e455b7b848e9.description: The corrupted chieftain causes its eyes to glow, its muscles to swell, and the ground beneath its feet to rumble. Each creature within 15 feet of the chieftain must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The corrupted chieftain causes its eyes to glow, its muscles to swell, and the ground beneath its feet to rumble. Each creature within 15 feet of the chieftain must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

b26eabc3-e890-5652-a183-4a5110b8c46c.name: Greatclub
b26eabc3-e890-5652-a183-4a5110b8c46c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) force damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) force damage.

c3a966db-1d2e-5a79-8310-08ba10a66553.name: Javelin
c3a966db-1d2e-5a79-8310-08ba10a66553.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) force damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) force damage.

adfbc177-ca9e-579b-b545-12e17e616b7a.name: Multiattack (Corrupted Chieftain)
adfbc177-ca9e-579b-b545-12e17e616b7a.description: The corrupted ogre can use its Chieftain's Command or Chieftain's Might. It then makes two Greatclub or Javelin attacks.

attributes.description: The corrupted ogre can use its Chieftain's Command or Chieftain's Might. It then makes two Greatclub or Javelin attacks.

0fccee1b-26de-5330-a481-4f1b25085880.name: Necrotic Weapons
0fccee1b-26de-5330-a481-4f1b25085880.description: The ushabti’s weapon attacks are magical. When the ushabti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The ushabti’s weapon attacks are magical. When the ushabti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

c3dd1d35-0fca-5a03-bf6a-e3fce78ce449.name: Regeneration (Corrupted Ushabti)
c3dd1d35-0fca-5a03-bf6a-e3fce78ce449.description: The ushabti regains 5 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

attributes.description: The ushabti regains 5 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

e0598794-686a-5bf4-8342-377026a98bf1.name: Swarm Body
e0598794-686a-5bf4-8342-377026a98bf1.description: The corrupted ushabti is a spirit inhabiting a colony of scarabs around a Humanoid skeleton within funerary wrappings. It can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny scarab and Humanoid bones, and it can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp, except for its Regeneration trait.
