e86ba279-9ca1-5b67-826d-17048b02e9c0.name: Undead Nature (Corrupted Ushabti)
e86ba279-9ca1-5b67-826d-17048b02e9c0.description: The ushabti doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The ushabti doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

0513d3ed-e779-5233-a6f6-105ec2ee2fc2.name: Ceremonial Greatsword
0513d3ed-e779-5233-a6f6-105ec2ee2fc2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

4643bba2-ff04-5846-a05d-a6194e979f86.name: Multiattack (Corrupted Ushabti)
4643bba2-ff04-5846-a05d-a6194e979f86.description: The corrupted ushabti makes two Ceremonial Greatsword attacks.

attributes.description: The corrupted ushabti makes two Ceremonial Greatsword attacks.

159f4cc7-3c46-534d-8e80-558edc3ec231.name: Vomit Swarm
159f4cc7-3c46-534d-8e80-558edc3ec231.description: The corrupted ushabti exhales scarabs in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 25 (10d4) piercing damage and is covered in scarabs. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't covered in scarabs. A creature covered in scarabs takes 2 (1d4) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature, including the covered creature, can take its action to brush the scarabs off the covered creature by succeeding on a DC 15 Dexterity check.

attributes.description: The corrupted ushabti exhales scarabs in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 25 (10d4) piercing damage and is covered in scarabs. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't covered in scarabs. A creature covered in scarabs takes 2 (1d4) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature, including the covered creature, can take its action to brush the scarabs off the covered creature by succeeding on a DC 15 Dexterity check.
The ooze doesn’t require sleep.

8d0193c3-8bce-5a87-aa66-dd48b0c3bb03.name: Putrid Stench
8d0193c3-8bce-5a87-aa66-dd48b0c3bb03.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the corrupting ooze must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 3 (1d6) poison damage and be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the corrupting ooze must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 3 (1d6) poison damage and be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

598bfd9a-6ace-50fc-8515-0ed85af87018.name: Multiattack (Corrupting Ooze)
598bfd9a-6ace-50fc-8515-0ed85af87018.description: The corrupting ooze makes two Slam attacks. If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or one nonmagical leather, metal, or wooden item the creature is wearing or carrying is destroyed. This effect can't destroy armor or weapons.

If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or one nonmagical leather, metal, or wooden item the creature is wearing or carrying is destroyed. 8f042094-ff61-5eb6-ae0b-cf2a9617aa94.name: Reshape Body
8f042094-ff61-5eb6-ae0b-cf2a9617aa94.description: The corrupting ooze can reshape its mass into a vaguely Humanoid shape or back into its amorphous shape. It reverts to its amorphous shape if it dies. While in a Humanoid shape, it can take any action that requires hands, except it can't wield weapons or a shield or don armor.

e6d757f1-6a1c-5a83-abcc-9ee0e4ad4bec.name: Slam (Corrupting Ooze)
e6d757f1-6a1c-5a83-abcc-9ee0e4ad4bec.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

04fb575a-86a2-5b44-a7c2-15630792ae43.name: Magic Resistance (Crimson Drake)
04fb575a-86a2-5b44-a7c2-15630792ae43.description: The drake has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The drake has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

f7b1702e-1cb4-5543-8399-0d3de905522e.name: Bite (Crimson Drake)
f7b1702e-1cb4-5543-8399-0d3de905522e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

9e4631c0-bb61-55d9-a841-0d721461f2e6.name: Familiar
9e4631c0-bb61-55d9-a841-0d721461f2e6.description: The drake can serve another creature as a familiar, forming a magic, telepathic bond with that willing companion. While the two are bonded, the companion can sense what the drake senses as long as they are within 1 mile of each other. While the drake is within 10 feet of its companion, the companion shares the drake's Magic Resistance trait. At any time and for any reason, the drake can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.

e38d0fb8-5939-5756-892a-1771c9c756ff.name: Fire Breath (Crimson Drake)
e38d0fb8-5939-5756-892a-1771c9c756ff.description: The drake exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The drake exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

9ab9c917-8c8e-5d8a-89d7-828bc206e997.name: Multiattack (Crimson Drake)
9ab9c917-8c8e-5d8a-89d7-828bc206e997.description: The crimson drake makes one Bite attack and one Stinger attack.

attributes.description: The crimson drake makes one Bite attack and one Stinger attack.

c158eeb5-8c3c-5ec5-b8fe-bad1b5aab45a.name: Stinger (Crimson Drake)
c158eeb5-8c3c-5ec5-b8fe-bad1b5aab45a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target takes 2 (1d4) poison damage at the start of each of its turns while poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

44e27997-58c6-5d9a-a2dd-fce90fecbd5d.name: Devil’s Sight (Crystalline Devil)
44e27997-58c6-5d9a-a2dd-fce90fecbd5d.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the crystalline devil’s darkvision.

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the crystalline devil’s darkvision.

a79d6789-f95e-5f5d-b582-80bd37aaf258.name: False Appearance (Gemstone Form Only)
a79d6789-f95e-5f5d-b582-80bd37aaf258.description: While the devil remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary gemstone.

attributes.description: While the devil remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary gemstone.

7004eb78-0828-5466-8a48-324f5b842a03.name: Glittering Temptation (Gemstone Form Only)
7004eb78-0828-5466-8a48-324f5b842a03.description: The devil sheds dim light in a 5-foot radius. Each creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the devil and that can see it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed, a creature is incapacitated and must move on its turn toward the devil by the safest route, trying to get within 5 feet of the devil to hold it. The charmed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. On a success, a creature is also immune to this devil’s Glittering Temptation for the next 24 hours. A creature charmed by the devil has disadvantage on the saving throw against Crystalline Spray.

cf661be3-8ef2-5181-ad8c-a1751db605c5.name: Magic Resistance (Crystalline Devil)
cf661be3-8ef2-5181-ad8c-a1751db605c5.description: The crystalline devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The crystalline devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

0b0841b9-285f-5984-960c-fc282ddfeaf2.name: Betraying Carbuncle
0b0841b9-285f-5984-960c-fc282ddfeaf2.description: The crystalline devil magically transforms into a Small or smaller gemstone or back into its true form, which is a Fiend. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form, except it can't move or speak when in its gemstone form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true from if it dies.

b81d1b0b-887b-5c2e-853f-fa78456cf8bf.name: Crystalline Spray
b81d1b0b-887b-5c2e-853f-fa78456cf8bf.description: The crystalline devil sprays a burst of crystal shards. Each creature within 15 feet of the devil must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 27 (6d8) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

121e5743-c43d-5700-9eab-883a1fa6ba5c.name: Multiattack (Crystalline Devil)
121e5743-c43d-5700-9eab-883a1fa6ba5c.description: The devil makes three Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The devil makes three Claw attacks.

cd3b97c8-d41b-5188-a3b8-023dfe193f13.name: Shard Claw
cd3b97c8-d41b-5188-a3b8-023dfe193f13.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

024e050a-093d-5816-80bd-ab2887a18d1d.name: Summon Devil
024e050a-093d-5816-80bd-ab2887a18d1d.description: The crystalline devil magically calls one jewel-encrusted, fiendish animated armor that has the crystalline devil's damage resistances and immunities. The crystalline devil has a 25 percent chance of calling one crystalline devil instead. The called creature arrives in 1d4 rounds, acting as an ally of the devil and obeying its telepathic commands. The creature remains for 1 hour, until the devil dies, or until the devil dismisses it as a bonus action.

4a3d2fa7-40b4-51c7-a0dc-ee3cc0688f3b.name: Hungry Dead Nature (Darakhul)
4a3d2fa7-40b4-51c7-a0dc-ee3cc0688f3b.description: The darakhul requires no air or sleep.

attributes.description: The darakhul requires no air or sleep.

008382c1-9c0c-5513-abe5-a943b11ad1b4.name: Master of Disguise
008382c1-9c0c-5513-abe5-a943b11ad1b4.description: A darakhul in a prepared disguise has advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to pass as a living creature. While using this ability, it loses its Stench.

attributes.description: A darakhul in a prepared disguise has advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to pass as a living creature. While using this ability, it loses its Stench.

171592e3-e3c8-562c-b2d9-cb7dcf4356a1.name: Stench
171592e3-e3c8-562c-b2d9-cb7dcf4356a1.description: Any creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the darakhul must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the darakhul’s Stench for the next 24 hours. A darakhul using this ability can’t also benefit from Master of Disguise.

418f675f-18f9-56a6-9563-d6c849911a46.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Darakhul)
418f675f-18f9-56a6-9563-d6c849911a46.description: While in sunlight, the darakhul has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the darakhul has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

aa0fa762-4d70-5409-aead-1aaeefe40fac.name: Turning Defiance (Darakhul)
aa0fa762-4d70-5409-aead-1aaeefe40fac.description: The darakhul and any ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn Undead.

attributes.description: The darakhul and any ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn Undead.

19e119da-62ff-5e32-bbaa-60d39bfdd950.name: Bite (Darakhul)
19e119da-62ff-5e32-bbaa-60d39bfdd950.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage, and, if the target is a Humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or contract the darakhul fever disease (see the Darakhul Fever sidebar).

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage, and, if the target is a Humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or contract the darakhul fever disease (see the Darakhul Fever sidebar).

1c1f8ea8-8d80-5f37-ad08-22f76179d07e.name: Claw (Darakhul)
1c1f8ea8-8d80-5f37-ad08-22f76179d07e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an Undead, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A paralyzed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a Humanoid is paralyzed for more than 2 rounds, it contracts darakhul fever.

A paralyzed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a Humanoid is paralyzed for more than 2 rounds, it contracts darakhul fever.

ada6156f-4449-5ea8-a1da-fb563bb09379.name: Multiattack (Darakhul)
ada6156f-4449-5ea8-a1da-fb563bb09379.description: The darakhul makes one Bite attack, one Claw attack, and one War Pick attack. If the darakhul is using a shield, it instead makes one Bite attack and one Claw or War Pick attack.

attributes.description: The darakhul makes one Bite attack, one Claw attack, and one War Pick attack. If the darakhul is using a shield, it instead makes one Bite attack and one Claw or War Pick attack.

5327709f-fa4c-5b19-9456-0dc45f301131.name: War Pick (Darakhul)
5327709f-fa4c-5b19-9456-0dc45f301131.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.

90faf044-08cb-5ccd-8f1e-475694ffb8ef.name: Magic Resistance (Dau)
90faf044-08cb-5ccd-8f1e-475694ffb8ef.description: The dau has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The dau has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

5296c493-c768-585b-b9da-c1e6acfe40fc.name: Mirror Dodge
5296c493-c768-585b-b9da-c1e6acfe40fc.description: When a creature the dau can see within 30 feet of it attacks the dau or targets it with a spell, the dau replaces itself with an illusory duplicate and teleports to any unoccupied space that it can see within 30 feet. The dau isn't affected by the attack or spell, and the illusory duplicate is destroyed.

13a00d94-4fd2-5578-a5fd-edd31f707c6f.name: Multiattack (Dau)
13a00d94-4fd2-5578-a5fd-edd31f707c6f.description: The dau makes two Slam attacks.

837b524e-705f-50cd-9e14-b64a6b3e8734.name: Slam (Dau)
837b524e-705f-50cd-9e14-b64a6b3e8734.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage, and the dau regains hp equal to the necrotic damage dealt. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage dealt. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. The creature dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

62e78e9f-0292-5cb8-a733-1d93310c9c46.name: Spellcasting (Dau)
62e78e9f-0292-5cb8-a733-1d93310c9c46.description:
The dau casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):

- **At Will:** detect thoughts, minor illusion
- **3/Day Each:** invisibility, major image
- **1/Day Each:** programmed illusion, project image

9a11f045-4c58-5536-8f24-3d62a23b1254.name: Tangible Illusion
9a11f045-4c58-5536-8f24-3d62a23b1254.description: When the dau casts a spell that creates an illusion of an object, the dau temporarily transforms that illusion into a physical, nonmagical object. The temporary object lasts 10 minutes, after which it reverts to being an illusion (or vanishes, if the duration of the original illusion expires). During that time, the illusion has all the physical properties of the object it represents, but it doesn't have any of the object's magical properties. The dau must touch the illusion to trigger this transformation, and the object can be no larger than 5 cubic feet.

94f96bd2-4e31-529f-b070-16f90391edc2.name: Potent Poison
94f96bd2-4e31-529f-b070-16f90391edc2.description: Undead with resistance or immunity to poison damage or the poisoned condition can be affected by the swarm’s poison.

attributes.description: Undead with resistance or immunity to poison damage or the poisoned condition can be affected by the swarm’s poison.

de37e315-2bc4-57ca-942b-82d41bf3196e.name: Swarm (Death Butterfly Swarm)
de37e315-2bc4-57ca-942b-82d41bf3196e.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

88a354fc-9532-57cb-b70b-8e87af5985c8.name: Weight of Wings
88a354fc-9532-57cb-b70b-8e87af5985c8.description: A creature that starts its turn in the swarm’s space has its speed halved and must succeed on a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw or become blinded. Both effects end when the creature ends its turn outside the swarm’s space. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the blinding effect of Weight of Wings for the next 24 hours.

a7ad5ed8-88ff-51ed-81db-12a6c6153d7c.name: Bites (Death Butterfly Swarm)
a7ad5ed8-88ff-51ed-81db-12a6c6153d7c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) piercing damage, or 10 (3d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer. The target must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it takes 10 (3d6) poison damage and is poisoned until the end of its next turn. On a success, it takes half the damage and isn't poisoned.

635740cb-35e0-5d1b-80d1-457a9f38a422.name: Eject Spores
635740cb-35e0-5d1b-80d1-457a9f38a422.description: The myconid ejects one of the following types of spores at one creature it can see within 15 feet of it.

e99f7548-ca9e-5588-b4fd-1443543ba9fc.name: Multiattack (Deathcap Myconid)

2c5d5fc8-7255-5568-ae1c-e2feb9eb9261.name: Flicker
2c5d5fc8-7255-5568-ae1c-e2feb9eb9261.description: The deathwisp flickers in and out of sight. Ranged weapon attacks against it are made with disadvantage.

dc011a69-d39b-54ab-821d-b8ded1b1840d.name: Incorporeal Movement (Deathwisp)
dc011a69-d39b-54ab-821d-b8ded1b1840d.description: The deathwisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside a solid object.

09f522e5-7f81-5c20-9600-fdb7bec0ccce.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Deathwisp)
09f522e5-7f81-5c20-9600-fdb7bec0ccce.description: While in sunlight, the deathwisp has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

d01d7f11-bfe6-5e0e-910d-af34a65c1a47.name: Undead Nature (Deathwisp)
d01d7f11-bfe6-5e0e-910d-af34a65c1a47.description: The deathwisp doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The deathwisp doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

acc17ddb-88f4-5640-9316-6032aa3b0ac3.name: Create Specter
acc17ddb-88f4-5640-9316-6032aa3b0ac3.description: The deathwisp targets a Humanoid within 10 feet of it that has been dead for no longer than 1 minute and died violently. The target's spirit rises as a specter in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. This specter is under the deathwisp's control. The deathwisp can have no more than twelve specters under its control at one time.

5cf0b86d-4eb7-5cca-b9f2-ee36fae59950.name: Ghostly Pike
5cf0b86d-4eb7-5cca-b9f2-ee36fae59950.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) force damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

1848a4c7-3d40-5893-9393-ebfd64c7ed60.name: Life Drain
1848a4c7-3d40-5893-9393-ebfd64c7ed60.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

e98c59ae-28eb-5ecb-bbc6-5dd205f4bb95.name: Shadow Traveler
e98c59ae-28eb-5ecb-bbc6-5dd205f4bb95.description: While in shadows, dim light, or darkness, the deathwisp disappears into the darkness and reappears in an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet. A tendril of inky smoke appears at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

0d7d4329-1ccb-50b2-a590-6acca0e885be.name: Claw (Deep Drake)
0d7d4329-1ccb-50b2-a590-6acca0e885be.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft, one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage.

cd79d75d-ea8e-59c7-8576-8a91c74f0f21.name: Enervating Breath
cd79d75d-ea8e-59c7-8576-8a91c74f0f21.description: The deep drake exhales pain-inducing, purple-black energy in a 90-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) necrotic damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned.

365ff3e1-4f8c-5e6e-ac5d-83ba3637d737.name: Multiattack (Deep Drake)
365ff3e1-4f8c-5e6e-ac5d-83ba3637d737.description: The drake makes one Bite attack, two Claw attacks, and one Stinger attack.

c9e42923-a7a2-5d87-b65c-8bccf530dfd3.name: Stinger (Deep Drake)
c9e42923-a7a2-5d87-b65c-8bccf530dfd3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. A poisoned creature must repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. On a failure, the creature takes 7 (2d6) poison damage. On a success, the condition ends. When animate dead is cast on one or more creatures killed by this poison, the spellcaster requires no material components and can cast the spell as an action.

f2049059-6470-5574-889a-dccf60b43e84.name: Amphibious (Deep One Archimandrite)
f2049059-6470-5574-889a-dccf60b43e84.description: The deep one archimandrite can breathe air and water.

b80ca987-48f9-5df0-b2a5-55de55404d2c.name: Frenzied Rage (Deep One Archimandrite)
b80ca987-48f9-5df0-b2a5-55de55404d2c.description: If a deep one archimandrite takes 15 or more damage from a single attack, it has advantage on all attack rolls and gains a +4 bonus to all damage rolls until the end of its next turn. For the duration, it can make one Unholy Trident attack as a bonus action on its turn.

d2c7f59f-c76e-5ea7-8baf-b48214452033.name: Call of the Archimandrite
d2c7f59f-c76e-5ea7-8baf-b48214452033.description: With a ringing shout, the archimandrite magically calls 1d4 reef sharks or 1 swarm of quippers, provided the archimandrite is at least partially submerged in a body of water that can contain the creatures. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the archimandrite and obeying its spoken commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until the archimandrite dies, or until the archimandrite dismisses them as a bonus action. Each deep one within 1 mile of the archimandrite can hear this call, though these deep ones are under no magical compulsion to make their way toward the archimandrite.

The deep one archimandrite casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** bless, guidance, suggestion, thaumaturgy
- **3/Day Each:** charm person, command, sleep
- **1/Day Each:** augury, lightning bolt, spirit guardians

6dc3b71e-0314-5727-8044-112adefccba3.description: If a deep one priest takes 10 or more damage from a single attack, it has advantage on melee attack rolls and gains a +4 bonus to melee damage rolls until the end of its next turn.

1f9113db-14e6-547a-8549-6a48f6222015.name: Voice of the Deeps
1f9113db-14e6-547a-8549-6a48f6222015.description: The deep one priest can spend 5 minutes giving a speech in a rolling, droning voice that fascinates listeners. At the end of the speech, each creature that heard it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or forget the events of the past 10 minutes or keep no memory of the events of the next 5 minutes (the priest’s choice). On a successful saving throw, a creature is immune to the priest’s Voice of the Deeps for the next 24 hours.

11598908-b69b-5384-9396-60cabecf8669.name: Magic Resistance (Degenerate Titan)
11598908-b69b-5384-9396-60cabecf8669.description: The degenerate titan has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The degenerate titan has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

f684afed-9255-5ae3-9521-5f79217fc244.name: Earthstrike
f684afed-9255-5ae3-9521-5f79217fc244.description: The degenerate titan slams its fists onto the ground, creating a shockwave in a 60-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) force damage and is flung 20 feet away from the titan and knocked prone, as the earth buckles and tosses the creature. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't flung or knocked prone. If a flung creature strikes a solid surface, the creature takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was flung. If the creature is flung at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

ff3b0942-e3a4-50f6-8e0f-ff2065518a77.description: The degenerate titan utters a scream that vibrates the fabric of reality around one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The titan can attempt to end one magical effect of its choice of 3rd level or lower on the target. This effect works like the dispel magic spell, except the titan must always make an ability check. The titan's ability check for this is +4.

29a6f744-72ed-5d9c-a09b-f88f4cb71a3f.name: Sand Camouflage (Desert Giant)
29a6f744-72ed-5d9c-a09b-f88f4cb71a3f.description: The giant has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in sandy terrain.

76082689-bdfa-54be-865d-3cbff1c4b72b.name: Falchion
76082689-bdfa-54be-865d-3cbff1c4b72b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (6d4 + 8) slashing damage.

f132b871-b4fb-5d88-a4c9-31bef8d6d85b.name: Multiattack (Desert Giant)
f132b871-b4fb-5d88-a4c9-31bef8d6d85b.description: The giant makes two Falchion attacks.

de0f3f06-167e-5efe-98b3-a9dd22f4e7b2.name: Rock (Desert Giant)
de0f3f06-167e-5efe-98b3-a9dd22f4e7b2.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage.

fcc4135c-6186-5a6b-8592-ae8906e3d0ee.name: Infernal Blessing
fcc4135c-6186-5a6b-8592-ae8906e3d0ee.description: While the devilbound gnome is conscious and wearing no armor and wielding no shield, it adds its Charisma modifier to its AC (included above) and saving throws. In addition, magical darkness doesn’t impede the gnome’s darkvision.

attributes.description: While the devilbound gnome is conscious and wearing no armor and wielding no shield, it adds its Charisma modifier to its AC (included above) and saving throws. In addition, magical darkness doesn’t impede the gnome’s darkvision.

43a38e37-71ee-53ab-bc1a-2878d9a5b2d3.name: Infernal Bond
43a38e37-71ee-53ab-bc1a-2878d9a5b2d3.description: The devilbound gnome is magically bound to an imp. The imp acts as an ally of the gnome’s, obeying its spoken commands. The gnome can perceive through the imp’s senses, speak through its mouth, and communicate with it telepathically even if the two aren’t on the same plane of existence.

The gnome can perceive through the imp’s senses, speak through its mouth, and communicate with it telepathically even if the two aren’t on the same plane of existence.

a63dc42d-7ffa-5834-bcee-b80fb5b02656.name: Magic Resistance (Devilbound Gnome)
a63dc42d-7ffa-5834-bcee-b80fb5b02656.description: The devilbound gnome has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The devilbound gnome has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

9497c171-cf8f-57cc-a1e2-db27eaa21324.name: Fiendish Sacrifice
9497c171-cf8f-57cc-a1e2-db27eaa21324.description: When the devilbound gnome is reduced to 0 hp, it can sacrifice a Fiend called with the Hell's Servitor's action or sacrifice its bonded imp, preventing the damage and killing the chosen Fiend. If the gnome sacrifices its bonded imp, it loses its Infernal Blessing and Infernal Bond traits until it receives a new imp from its patron devil.

04d8ee64-98bc-51ef-9e39-235c808198d2.name: Hellish Blast
04d8ee64-98bc-51ef-9e39-235c808198d2.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) fire damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) fire damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.

452ab1dd-4b10-51c3-a09b-0dd27bb99b83.name: Hell's Servitors
452ab1dd-4b10-51c3-a09b-0dd27bb99b83.description: The devilbound gnome magically calls 1d4 devils with a challenge rating of 4 or lower, or it calls 1 devil with a challenge rating of 6 or lower. The called Fiends arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the gnome and obeying its spoken commands. The Fiends remain for 1 hour, until the gnome dies, or until the gnome dismisses them as a bonus action.

The called Fiends arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the gnome and obeying its spoken commands. The Fiends remain for 1 hour, until the gnome dies, or until the gnome dismisses them as a bonus action.

68a1087b-63db-552a-96a2-92910f9c8d9a.name: Spellcasting (Devilbound Gnome)
68a1087b-63db-552a-96a2-92910f9c8d9a.description:
The devilbound gnome casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** detect magic, minor illusion, prestidigitation
- **3/Day Each:** command, dimension door, invisibility
- **1/Day Each:** fly, haste, wall of fire

- **At Will:** detect magic, minor illusion, prestidigitation
- **3/Day Each:** command, dimension door, invisibility
- **1/Day Each:** fly, haste, wall of fire

a0508259-51fc-5790-b7f4-e3d35d63f019.name: To Hell and Back
a0508259-51fc-5790-b7f4-e3d35d63f019.description: The devilbound gnome sends one creature it can see within 60 feet of it hurling through Hell. The target must make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a success, the target takes 35 (10d6) fire damage as Hell pulls on the creature. On a failure, the target is incapacitated and disappears, as it takes a quick trip through the nightmarish landscapes of Hell. At the end of the gnome's next turn, the target reappears in the space it previously occupied, or the nearest unoccupied space, and takes 55 (10d10) psychic damage.

b7fcc62d-cba4-5ec1-b925-ab0a2233ce28.name: Amorphous
b7fcc62d-cba4-5ec1-b925-ab0a2233ce28.description: The dipsa can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The dipsa can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

93f18162-55c3-5ff5-b44c-f5803142ee7a.name: Discreet Bite
93f18162-55c3-5ff5-b44c-f5803142ee7a.description: The bite of a dipsa is barely perceptible and the wound is quickly anesthetized. When the dipsa hits with a Bite attack, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the dipsa and its attack. Each time the creature takes acid damage from an attached dipsa, it can repeat this check, noticing the dipsa on a success. A creature that takes acid damage from the dipsa while below half its hp maximum automatically succeeds on this check.

A creature that takes acid damage from the dipsa while below half its hp maximum automatically succeeds on this check.

e0d71645-f3d6-5018-bbbc-548b5bdee97d.name: Swamp Camouflage
e0d71645-f3d6-5018-bbbc-548b5bdee97d.description: The dipsa has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

93cac2cc-28df-5339-92ed-a4fba64b9c3e.name: Bite (Dipsa)
93cac2cc-28df-5339-92ed-a4fba64b9c3e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the dipsa attaches to the target. While attached, the dipsa can't attack, and at the start of each of the dipsa's turns, the target takes 3 (1d6) acid damage and must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or have its hp maximum reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

ce19cb9e-0c76-5d4f-9e90-35579ba20a22.name: Multiattack (Dissimortuum)
ce19cb9e-0c76-5d4f-9e90-35579ba20a22.description: The dissimortuum makes three Claw attacks. It can replace one Claw attack with a use of Terrifying Mask.

db5f44b6-9c03-5eb0-a313-b18307a5574c.name: Terrifying Mask
db5f44b6-9c03-5eb0-a313-b18307a5574c.description: Each non-Undead creature within 60 feet of the dissimortuum that can see it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target becomes immune to the dissimortuum's Terrifying Mask for the next 24 hours.

d07431b8-142a-533d-9f21-35035fefefe2.name: Burrowed Tunnels
d07431b8-142a-533d-9f21-35035fefefe2.description: If the dogmole burrows at half its burrowing speed, it can leave a 5-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

165e4725-3814-5dff-bca3-408deabb7047.name: Multiattack (Dogmole)
165e4725-3814-5dff-bca3-408deabb7047.description: The dogmole makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

eb5695fd-474c-58f4-9d4b-99616918290e.name: Wormkiller Rage
eb5695fd-474c-58f4-9d4b-99616918290e.description: When the dogmole takes damage from a Small or larger insectoid Beast, such as a giant centipede, or when it deals damage to such a creature, it enters a special rage for 3 rounds. While in this rage, it has advantage on attack rolls and Strength checks and deals an extra 2 (1d4) piercing damage with its Bite attack, but its Armor Class is reduced by 2. The dogmole can't end this rage willingly.

049b788d-2e1d-5315-847d-6cd041300dc8.description: If the juggernaut burrows at half its burrowing speed, it can leave a 10-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

21a370a7-d6ff-5c78-83e9-53067d1118c3.description: If the juggernaut takes 15 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hp, it is reduced to 1 hp instead.

The juggernaut can't end this rage willingly.

af848304-6683-5072-ac37-013d73ba3e5d.name: House Guardian
af848304-6683-5072-ac37-013d73ba3e5d.description: When the domovoi finishes a long rest in a structure with up to 2,500 square feet of floor space, the structure becomes magically protected. This works like the guards and wards spell, except the domovoi can choose only two effects from the spell to place in the warded area.

eeff25f3-6f48-525a-84ff-490e20b997b9.name: Invisibility (Domovoi)
eeff25f3-6f48-525a-84ff-490e20b997b9.description: The domovoi magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the domovoi wears or carries is invisible with it.

03d6509a-41b6-50ed-ab3b-c9452f54332a.name: Multiattack (Domovoi)
03d6509a-41b6-50ed-ab3b-c9452f54332a.description: The domovoi makes two Slam attacks.

d12b9556-ae68-596a-a810-bc9eae1984e2.name: Protector's Step
d12b9556-ae68-596a-a810-bc9eae1984e2.description: The domovoi magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space within a structure protected by its House Guardian trait or within 30 feet of the exterior of that structure. Swirls of golden light, sparkles of starlight, or tendrils of inky shadow (the domovoi's choice) appear at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

5a4223e6-832a-551d-9168-9ba0f6aa473f.name: Slam (Domovoi)
5a4223e6-832a-551d-9168-9ba0f6aa473f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

532a0da5-5afb-5488-a0ef-915405aa0f6a.name: Spellcasting (Domovoi)
532a0da5-5afb-5488-a0ef-915405aa0f6a.description:
The domovoi casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):

- **At Will:** alter self
- **3/Day Each:** darkness, haste

423e36c6-7c03-5cbc-aed1-0703aa0eb543.name: Arcane Doubling
423e36c6-7c03-5cbc-aed1-0703aa0eb543.description: While in combat, at the start of each of its turns, the doppelrat rapidly creates duplicates of itself as an automatic defense mechanism. These duplicates immediately form into a swarm of rats in the doppelrat’s space, acting as allies of the doppelrat and obeying its body language commands. The swarm acts on the doppelrat’s turn, and the doppelrat can use its reaction to move up to its speed with the swarm, provided it is in the swarm’s space when the swarm moves. The swarm remains for 1 minute, until the doppelrat dies, or until the doppelrat dismisses it as a bonus action. The doppelrat can have no more than two swarms of rats under its control at a time.

attributes.description: While in combat, at the start of each of its turns, the doppelrat rapidly creates duplicates of itself as an automatic defense mechanism. These duplicates immediately form into a swarm of rats in the doppelrat’s space, acting as allies of the doppelrat and obeying its body language commands. The swarm acts on the doppelrat’s turn, and the doppelrat can use its reaction to move up to its speed with the swarm, provided it is in the swarm’s space when the swarm moves. The swarm remains for 1 minute, until the doppelrat dies, or until the doppelrat dismisses it as a bonus action. The doppelrat can have no more than two swarms of rats under its control at a time.

b61e0d99-3fe6-526f-80dd-383b7019942a.name: Hidden Original
b61e0d99-3fe6-526f-80dd-383b7019942a.description: While the doppelrat is in the space of a swarm it created with Arcane Doubling, it is indiscernible from the other rats and has total cover. A creature must take an action to visually inspect the swarm and succeed on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check to find the doppelrat among its duplicates. Once a creature succeeds on this check, the doppelrat loses total cover against attacks and spells from that creature and that creature’s allies until the doppelrat starts its turn in the same space as one of its swarms.

attributes.description: While the doppelrat is in the space of a swarm it created with Arcane Doubling, it is indiscernible from the other rats and has total cover. Once a creature succeeds on this check, the doppelrat loses total cover against attacks and spells from that creature and that creature’s allies until the doppelrat starts its turn in the same space as one of its swarms.

b6f6b235-55cb-5ae5-9144-9c0bfcae1464.name: Horrific Doppeling
b6f6b235-55cb-5ae5-9144-9c0bfcae1464.description: Characterized by the growing and sloughing off of tumors shaped like the infected creature, horrific doppeling is a disease that infects creatures attacked by doppelrats. Until the disease is cured, the creature is poisoned. At the end of each long rest, the infected creature must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or shed a tumor that looks like a Tiny version of itself. Though disturbing, the tumor is merely a mass of shed skin and fat that decays as normal. The disease is cured after the creature succeeds on two saving throws.

92f8eb00-5405-5c67-977f-a5595c0f4496.name: Bite (Doppelrat)
92f8eb00-5405-5c67-977f-a5595c0f4496.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or contract the horrific doppeling disease (see the Horrific Doppeling trait).

0048a480-8e13-55a5-a6c5-e5bd90955b18.name: Void Warping
0048a480-8e13-55a5-a6c5-e5bd90955b18.description: The area around the dorreq is warped by its connection to the Void. A creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the dorreq must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or its speed is halved until the start of its next turn.

c3200301-f473-5a94-bd20-aa616b3a265a.description: The dorreq makes one Bite attack and two Tentacles attacks.

7298bb69-9eb4-5b87-bc99-bf15cdddbdd0.name: Stone Step
7298bb69-9eb4-5b87-bc99-bf15cdddbdd0.description: The dorreq teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain a stone or rocky surface, such as a cliff face or rocky terrain.

d5277dbb-0d07-53e6-8ff3-432414683c87.name: Tentacles (Dorreq)
d5277dbb-0d07-53e6-8ff3-432414683c87.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 14) and pulled up to 5 feet closer to the dorreq. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The dorreq can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 14) and pulled up to 5 feet closer to the dorreq. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The dorreq can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

0fa5fcbc-e945-59cf-ba4b-957fbf80a1e7.name: Void Thrum
0fa5fcbc-e945-59cf-ba4b-957fbf80a1e7.description: The dorreq emits a barely audible, vibrating thrum laced with Void energy. Each creature within 20 feet of the dorreq must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) thunder damage and 10 (3d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

36890cb4-cbab-5324-a41d-68f807da6135.name: Limited Amphibiousness
36890cb4-cbab-5324-a41d-68f807da6135.description: The dragon eel can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 6 hours to avoid suffocating.

attributes.description: The dragon eel can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 6 hours to avoid suffocating.

e0bd1cc9-1fa8-5d5c-8357-670e6c0e3550.name: Shocking Hide
e0bd1cc9-1fa8-5d5c-8357-670e6c0e3550.description: A creature that touches the dragon eel or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) lightning damage.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the dragon eel or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) lightning damage.

73b0825a-b351-5ffa-9a31-8bf7b5fe1ec6.name: Storm Glide
73b0825a-b351-5ffa-9a31-8bf7b5fe1ec6.description: During storms with ample rain or lightning, the dragon eel gains a flying speed equal to its swimming speed.

attributes.description: During storms with ample rain or lightning, the dragon eel gains a flying speed equal to its swimming speed.

307c6843-5224-5690-ac73-82b93dbae274.name: Bite (Dragon Eel)
307c6843-5224-5690-ac73-82b93dbae274.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (4d8 + 8) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or become paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

2371d38e-067e-585b-ac65-8d7c8e4eb446.name: Lightning Breath
2371d38e-067e-585b-ac65-8d7c8e4eb446.description: The dragon eel exhales lightning in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each target in that line must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

c97a070c-2fb4-5c21-87b0-3b6788c2457d.name: Multiattack (Dragon Eel)
c97a070c-2fb4-5c21-87b0-3b6788c2457d.description: The dragon eel makes one Bite attack and one Tail Slap attack.

795d5de3-557f-5194-9de5-8e3befc0611a.name: Tail Slap
795d5de3-557f-5194-9de5-8e3befc0611a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (5d8 + 8) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the eel. The dragon eel can choose to not push a target.

ce45d3cd-1329-5abb-b1f2-ca4928e37d52.name: Elemental Affinity
ce45d3cd-1329-5abb-b1f2-ca4928e37d52.description: The dragonleaf tree has immunity to a type of damage based on the type of dragon that grew it: acid ([black, copper), cold (silver, white), fire (brass, gold, red), lightning (blue, bronze), or poison (green).

attributes.description: The dragonleaf tree has immunity to a type of damage based on the type of dragon that grew it: acid ([black, copper), cold (silver, white), fire (brass, gold, red), lightning (blue, bronze), or poison (green).

c76a6e27-1063-51d6-a914-1ecf3d70034c.name: Eternally Loyal
c76a6e27-1063-51d6-a914-1ecf3d70034c.description: The dragonleaf tree has advantage on ability checks and saving throws against influence or effects that would encourage it or force it to act against its draconic master. If charmed or controlled and directed to act against its master, the tree can immediately repeat the effect’s saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success.

6b2fe24d-13d5-51b0-85db-2a74184d3dfb.name: Elemental Leaves
6b2fe24d-13d5-51b0-85db-2a74184d3dfb.description: The dragonleaf tree's leaves rain acid, shed bolts of lightning, shake loose icicles, or similarly emit the elemental energies of the dragon that grew the tree. Each creature within 20 feet of the dragonleaf tree must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) damage of the type noted in the Elemental Affinity trait.

a72ab1b4-0354-53ce-9d84-d7bda748525d.name: Multiattack (Dragonleaf Tree)
a72ab1b4-0354-53ce-9d84-d7bda748525d.description: The dragon leaf tree makes three Slam or Throw Leaves attacks.

76e47f5c-f8a3-543d-aa49-241271a305a7.name: Slam (Dragonleaf Tree)
76e47f5c-f8a3-543d-aa49-241271a305a7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type noted in the Elemental Affinity trait.

322c0086-37d4-5fbd-a23a-5b1e0003d3d6.name: Throw Leaves
322c0086-37d4-5fbd-a23a-5b1e0003d3d6.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (4d4 + 2) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type noted in the Elemental Affinity trait.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (4d4 + 2) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type noted in the Elemental Affinity trait.

b315e815-29ab-5b5b-98d9-248735f03526.name: Amphibious (Drakon)
b315e815-29ab-5b5b-98d9-248735f03526.description: The drakon can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The drakon can breathe air and water.

100f004d-d468-58ee-88f2-87f0eea92f19.name: Dissolving Gaze
100f004d-d468-58ee-88f2-87f0eea92f19.description: When a creature that can see the drakon’s eyes starts its turn within 30 feet of the drakon, the drakon can force it to make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw if the drakon isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed save, the creature takes 3 (1d6) acid damage, its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the acid damage it takes, and it is paralyzed until the start of its next turn. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. The creature dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

9f9fa475-5a2a-5b06-9903-52a8ac5c9d29.name: Acid Breath
9f9fa475-5a2a-5b06-9903-52a8ac5c9d29.description: The drakon exhales acidic vapors in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

8513c149-967f-5ad7-9a1f-7b19de04bfc7.name: Bite (Drakon)
8513c149-967f-5ad7-9a1f-7b19de04bfc7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 10 (4d4) acid damage.

c09846a0-62be-5dac-b620-a89dd6f12a56.name: Multiattack (Drakon)
c09846a0-62be-5dac-b620-a89dd6f12a56.description: The drakon makes one Bite attack and one Tail attack.

719636b5-3308-5f91-bfe1-489bea5fe0a7.name: Tail (Drakon)
719636b5-3308-5f91-bfe1-489bea5fe0a7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

e8bb595e-4a21-5967-81c5-fa610a57041a.name: Dream Eater’s Caress
e8bb595e-4a21-5967-81c5-fa610a57041a.description: A creature that starts its turn grappled by the dream eater must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or take 5 (2d4) psychic damage. The dream eater gains temporary hp equal to the psychic damage dealt.

b6ae0e84-756f-5c4b-87d5-e970cc02e8e5.name: Change Shape (Dream Eater)
b6ae0e84-756f-5c4b-87d5-e970cc02e8e5.description: The dream eater magically transforms into a Small or Medium humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form, which is a Fiend. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

c62ac68d-ea1f-5503-a671-22746d5b2998.name: Claw (Dream Eater)
c62ac68d-ea1f-5503-a671-22746d5b2998.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained. The dream eater has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained. The dream eater has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

b460aa4e-eec5-5314-a812-9d1dde1cf97e.name: Lotus Scent
b460aa4e-eec5-5314-a812-9d1dde1cf97e.description: The dream eater secretes an oily chemical that most creatures find intoxicating. Each creature that isn't a Construct or Undead within 15 feet of the dream eater must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned, the creature is charmed by the fiend. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dream eater's Lotus Scent for the next 24 hours.

0fd620f2-d5a0-5ead-bc5b-b67538fa2afa.name: Multiattack (Dream Eater)
0fd620f2-d5a0-5ead-bc5b-b67538fa2afa.description: The dream eater uses its Lotus Scent. It then makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

cdb5befe-dfdb-57f7-963d-599baed4542a.name: Waking Dreams
cdb5befe-dfdb-57f7-963d-599baed4542a.description: Each creature within 20 feet of the dream eater must make a DC 14 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) psychic damage and is incapacitated for 1 minute. When it moves, an incapacitated creature moves in a random direction. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

65812295-e3f6-5a45-924e-457cd494c9f9.name: Draining Kiss
65812295-e3f6-5a45-924e-457cd494c9f9.description: One creature within 5 feet of the maiden and that she is grappling must make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 10 (3d6) psychic damage, and its Strength is reduced by 1d6. On a success, the target takes half the damage, and its Strength isn't reduced. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if its Strength is reduced to 0.

280a4b91-2afd-57d0-95e5-3fb3c37bda20.name: Hair
280a4b91-2afd-57d0-95e5-3fb3c37bda20.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16) if it is a Large or smaller creature. She can grapple up to three creatures at a time. The hair holding a creature can be attacked and destroyed (AC 15; 15 hp; immunity to necrotic, poison, and psychic damage).

9aca721d-e677-5235-9a7f-50673998e2f3.name: Illusory Appearance
9aca721d-e677-5235-9a7f-50673998e2f3.description: The maiden covers herself and anything she is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes her look like another creature of her general size and Humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the maiden takes a bonus action to end it or if she dies. The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern that the maiden is disguised.

297e76d9-cf3a-5c88-a478-e45c445c6833.name: Reel (Drowned Maiden)
297e76d9-cf3a-5c88-a478-e45c445c6833.description: The drowned maiden pulls each creature grappled by her up to 15 feet straight toward her.

29cc91f6-deb0-5957-a597-2a879f4e3d2d.name: Duelist’s Mobility
29cc91f6-deb0-5957-a597-2a879f4e3d2d.description: Opportunity attacks made against the duelist have disadvantage. If the duelist is prone at the start of its turn, it can immediately stand without costing movement.

b40ca2a4-ec94-5f18-b9f4-0936db0298b3.name: Fey Ancestry
b40ca2a4-ec94-5f18-b9f4-0936db0298b3.description: The shadow fey has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put it to sleep.

attributes.description: The shadow fey has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put it to sleep.

26734ef3-dadd-58d4-ad6a-5d162d2451ef.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Duelist)
26734ef3-dadd-58d4-ad6a-5d162d2451ef.description: While in sunlight, the shadow fey has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

f3315c21-363d-558b-aa5b-ba216690aa0c.name: Dagger (Duelist)
f3315c21-363d-558b-aa5b-ba216690aa0c.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage, and if the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

05664226-5ae3-5f63-9679-e9c35d04d6ac.name: Parry (Duelist)
05664226-5ae3-5f63-9679-e9c35d04d6ac.description: The shadow fey duelist adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the duelist must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

914b6464-4ea7-5aca-992e-d9c92767d8bb.name: Rapier (Duelist)
914b6464-4ea7-5aca-992e-d9c92767d8bb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage.

edbd37ca-dce7-5bdb-bea5-75fd75a80c90.name: Shadow Traveler (Duelist)
edbd37ca-dce7-5bdb-bea5-75fd75a80c90.description: While in shadows, dim light, or darkness, the shadow fey disappears into the darkness and reappears in an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet. A tendril of inky smoke appears at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

attributes.description: While in shadows, dim light, or darkness, the shadow fey disappears into the darkness and reappears in an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet. A tendril of inky smoke appears at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

9ab994ab-b829-5a2b-8342-639b4c2b5028.name: Baleful Glare
9ab994ab-b829-5a2b-8342-639b4c2b5028.description: When a creature that can see the eyes of the dullahan’s severed head starts its turn within 30 feet of the dullahan, the dullahan can force it to make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw if the dullahan isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed save, the creature is frightened until the start of its next turn. While frightened in this way, the creature must take the Dash action and move away from the dullahan by the safest available route. A doomed creature that fails this saving throw is restrained while frightened instead.

15fd9566-4607-5cbb-be49-e7dc10ba3a0c.name: Relentless Advance
15fd9566-4607-5cbb-be49-e7dc10ba3a0c.description: Moving through difficult terrain doesn’t cost the dullahan extra movement, and the dullahan can move across the surface of water as if it were harmless, solid ground.

f8c25746-e9c7-54fa-b8f1-6d00002325b8.name: Relentless Nature
f8c25746-e9c7-54fa-b8f1-6d00002325b8.description: The dullahan doesn’t require food, drink, or sleep.

c9e7f5d4-2ad3-50c8-859e-600581557dd5.name: Deathly Doom
c9e7f5d4-2ad3-50c8-859e-600581557dd5.description: The dullahan magically dooms a creature for 1 hour. It can have only one creature doomed at a time. If it dooms another, the effect on the previous target ends. The dullahan knows the direction to the doomed creature as long as both are on the same plane of existence.

6206860c-16ed-58b1-b9e0-69dc731c9b66.name: Multiattack (Dullahan)
6206860c-16ed-58b1-b9e0-69dc731c9b66.description: The dullahan makes three Spine Whip or Necrotic Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Seal the Doom.

attributes.description: The dullahan makes three Spine Whip or Necrotic Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Seal the Doom.

fd9c4957-ea10-5ac7-ab8b-3e5d8419c218.name: Necrotic Bolt
fd9c4957-ea10-5ac7-ab8b-3e5d8419c218.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (4d8 + 3) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (4d8 + 3) necrotic damage.

1e4031ba-443b-57e8-b822-70423a34107f.name: Seal the Doom
1e4031ba-443b-57e8-b822-70423a34107f.description: The dullahan points at a creature doomed by Deathly Doom within 40 feet of it that it can see. The creature must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target immediately drops to 0 hp if it is below half its hp maximum. On a success, the target is immune to the dullahan's Seal the Doom for the next 24 hours.

On a failure, the target immediately drops to 0 hp if it is below half its hp maximum. On a success, the target is immune to the dullahan's Seal the Doom for the next 24 hours.

8ff953d3-ebda-58d4-afca-5a7480e61485.name: Spine Whip
8ff953d3-ebda-58d4-afca-5a7480e61485.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or fall prone as it is wracked with pain.

c9e79a46-2b8a-57ec-b865-05c0707f690f.name: Adhesive (Object or Terrain Form Only)
c9e79a46-2b8a-57ec-b865-05c0707f690f.description: The dune mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A creature adhered to the dune mimic is also grappled by it (escape DC 15). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage. The dune mimic can harden its outer surface, so only the creatures it chooses are affected by this trait.

Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage. The dune mimic can harden its outer surface, so only the creatures it chooses are affected by this trait.

83f66c3e-0585-5ae3-a7ee-cd69f5163a26.name: False Appearance (Object or Terrain Form Only)
83f66c3e-0585-5ae3-a7ee-cd69f5163a26.description: While the dune mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary sandy object or terrain feature.

attributes.description: While the dune mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary sandy object or terrain feature.

7cffc8e9-2b75-5ecf-bfa6-927cdd7e3a5d.name: Grappler
7cffc8e9-2b75-5ecf-bfa6-927cdd7e3a5d.description: The dune mimic has advantage on attack rolls against any creature grappled by it.

attributes.description: The dune mimic has advantage on attack rolls against any creature grappled by it.

a0af5318-ad60-5a71-8f17-6e67767cb91e.name: Change Shape (Dune Mimic)
a0af5318-ad60-5a71-8f17-6e67767cb91e.description: The dune mimic transforms into a Huge sand- or gravel-covered object, shapes itself into a sandy or rocky terrain feature no larger than a 20-foot cube or transforms back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

attributes.description: The dune mimic transforms into a Huge sand- or gravel-covered object, shapes itself into a sandy or rocky terrain feature no larger than a 20-foot cube or transforms back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

b11dc2cb-12a4-5972-84ab-9e32fd694add.name: Engulf
b11dc2cb-12a4-5972-84ab-9e32fd694add.description: The dune mimic engulfs a Large or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded, restrained, and unable to breathe, and it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the mimic's turns or take 10 (3d6) slashing damage, as the creature is lacerated by the mimic's sand-coated form. If the mimic moves, any engulfed creatures move with it. The mimic can have no more than two creatures engulfed at a time.

If the mimic moves, any engulfed creatures move with it. The mimic can have no more than two creatures engulfed at a time.

2af601e5-080e-5905-9a7e-406d45f379ed.name: Multiattack (Dune Mimic)

055d18f9-e98e-5459-b06c-042dba5c6886.name: Pseudopod
055d18f9-e98e-5459-b06c-042dba5c6886.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the dune mimic is in object or terrain form, the target is subjected to the mimic's Adhesive trait.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the dune mimic is in object or terrain form, the target is subjected to the mimic's Adhesive trait.

aa310ed1-3897-5656-ac39-3b3528f31ffc.name: Magic Resistance (Duskthorn Dryad)
aa310ed1-3897-5656-ac39-3b3528f31ffc.description: The dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

ccea1bf7-fa8d-52c0-9938-2fc6035dc5e7.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
ccea1bf7-fa8d-52c0-9938-2fc6035dc5e7.description: The dryad can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The dryad can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.

5061a398-17c3-5199-b6c3-b1f57c893ed3.name: Tree Stride
5061a398-17c3-5199-b6c3-b1f57c893ed3.description: Once on her turn, the dryad can use 10 feet of her movement to step magically into one dead tree within her reach and emerge from a second dead tree within 60 feet of the first tree, appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the second tree. Both trees must be Large or bigger.

Both trees must be Large or bigger.

e00d764e-3a2b-5fff-8117-099907d83042.name: Children of the Forest
e00d764e-3a2b-5fff-8117-099907d83042.description: The dryad magically calls 1d4 boars, constrictor snakes, or wolves, or it calls 1 child of the briar. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the dryad and obeying her spoken commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until the dryad dies, or until the dryad dismisses them as a bonus action.

7b97b518-8eb1-5798-b3c6-69537b971e6f.name: Multiattack (Duskthorn Dryad)

b3fa0150-c3e0-558a-9a20-e1ba1fb8d67f.name: Spellcasting (Duskthorn Dryad)
b3fa0150-c3e0-558a-9a20-e1ba1fb8d67f.description:
The dryad casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** druidcraft
- **3/Day Each:** charm person, entangle, invisibility
- **1/Day Each:** barkskin, spike growth, suggestion

a6afe4f2-d086-53f2-beb7-4fe9dfb0e59e.name: Twisted
a6afe4f2-d086-53f2-beb7-4fe9dfb0e59e.description: When the dust goblin attacks a creature from hiding, the target must succeed on a DC 10 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

e7a4203e-a971-52ea-af2d-ba93350d6ee9.description: The dwarven ringmage has advantage on saving throws against poison.

attributes.description: The dwarven ringmage has advantage on saving throws against poison.

c3474b2f-2436-55e7-bce7-4d6ae77f970a.name: Ring Magic
c3474b2f-2436-55e7-bce7-4d6ae77f970a.description: The dwarven ringmage draws circles of magic in the air and sends them toward one creature it can see within 30 feet of it, causing one of the following effects:

ab6066e4-5913-52f0-a778-c2c4cf04abfa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage (the ringmage's choice).

c3a8c759-7a28-5917-ae01-d853581d83b1.description:
The dwarven ringmage casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** color spray, mage hand, true strike
- **3/Day Each:** expeditious retreat, fly, haste
- **1/Day Each:** greater invisibility, wall of stone

98e0e367-5ecb-5b8c-a0ff-c97518d1c3f1.name: Fire Breath (Eala)
98e0e367-5ecb-5b8c-a0ff-c97518d1c3f1.description: The eala breathes fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The eala's fire breath ignites flammable objects and melts soft metals, such as gold and lead, in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

7f4812f2-b59c-538f-8be3-1147d0424c8e.name: Multiattack (Eala)
7f4812f2-b59c-538f-8be3-1147d0424c8e.description: The eala makes two Wing Blades attacks.

attributes.description: The eala makes two Wing Blades attacks.

61d15a1e-d0b8-5ca8-aa4a-43e1e569e8c7.name: Swan Song
61d15a1e-d0b8-5ca8-aa4a-43e1e569e8c7.description: When the eala is reduced to 0 hp, it can use its last breath to sing a plaintive and beautiful melody. Each creature within 20 feet of it that can hear the eala must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn. While incapacitated, the creature's speed is reduced to 0.

Each creature within 20 feet of it that can hear the eala must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn. 864e4801-aa13-5f1a-af14-27cc3850cee2.name: Magic Maw
864e4801-aa13-5f1a-af14-27cc3850cee2.description: The eater of dust’s Maw-Arm attacks are magical. When the eater hits with its Maw-Arm, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

3bbe78ed-4890-5d31-8b38-b3c806e5887d.name: Regeneration (Eater of Dust)
3bbe78ed-4890-5d31-8b38-b3c806e5887d.description: The eater of dust regains 5 hp at the start of its turn. If it takes fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of eater’s next turn. The eater dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

521b86aa-4557-5f4d-9c74-ea55c0bfcd46.name: Hungry Step
521b86aa-4557-5f4d-9c74-ea55c0bfcd46.description: The eater of dust magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space within 10 feet of a creature that isn't a Construct or Undead.

attributes.description: The eater of dust magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space within 10 feet of a creature that isn't a Construct or Undead.

8105d5f8-6e1c-5baa-9610-8379bde19a85.name: Maw-Arm
8105d5f8-6e1c-5baa-9610-8379bde19a85.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the eater regains hp equal to that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

7b9bf548-a961-5dc9-b57f-738142af3989.name: Necrotic Burst
7b9bf548-a961-5dc9-b57f-738142af3989.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) necrotic damage.

e210dfd2-51e9-5df1-aa69-8f311ee6b197.name: Incorporeal Movement (Edimmu)
e210dfd2-51e9-5df1-aa69-8f311ee6b197.description: The edimmu can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The edimmu can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

7b6d48db-ae13-5dda-97ff-9086b3beeee8.name: Rejuvenation
7b6d48db-ae13-5dda-97ff-9086b3beeee8.description: If destroyed, an edimmu rises again in 2d4 days, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. When the edimmu rises, it appears within 5 feet of its remains. Only burying its mortal remains in consecrated or hallowed ground prevents this trait from functioning.

94f3aa41-a29d-5145-84bf-e2ec73bced14.name: Undead Nature (Edimmu)
94f3aa41-a29d-5145-84bf-e2ec73bced14.description: The edimmu doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The edimmu doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

20f40708-3ed8-5b30-b702-05fe0471ddfc.name: Water Siphon
20f40708-3ed8-5b30-b702-05fe0471ddfc.description: The edimmu has advantage on attack rolls against creatures made of or gaining power from magical water, such as water elementals, water jinnborn, water genies, and sorcerers with water-based origins. In addition, such creatures have disadvantage on the saving throw against the edimmu’s Draining Touch and Multiattack.

attributes.description: The edimmu has advantage on attack rolls against creatures made of or gaining power from magical water, such as water elementals, water jinnborn, water genies, and sorcerers with water-based origins. In addition, such creatures have disadvantage on the saving throw against the edimmu’s Draining Touch and Multiattack.

8d68689a-6606-5cbd-be51-a5d42ab591c4.name: Draining Touch
8d68689a-6606-5cbd-be51-a5d42ab591c4.description: Melee Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after drinking 1 pint of water. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after drinking 1 pint of water. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

789e062b-9ecd-5c30-93d0-e2e01df70a6c.name: Multiattack (Edimmu)
789e062b-9ecd-5c30-93d0-e2e01df70a6c.description: The edimmu makes two Draining Touch attacks. If both attacks hit one creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. A creature that fails this saving throw by 5 or more is also stunned until the end of its next turn.

97be17fe-7acb-5f10-9131-fca57e223fb2.name: Amphibious (Eel Hound)
97be17fe-7acb-5f10-9131-fca57e223fb2.description: The eel hound can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The eel hound can breathe air and water.

52edcf21-5807-5ee3-a2f0-f69cef1244fc.name: Pack Tactics (Eel Hound)
52edcf21-5807-5ee3-a2f0-f69cef1244fc.description: The eel hound has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the hound’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The eel hound has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the hound’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

5cc1eae8-2747-575c-be06-2223b93fecb0.name: Bite (Eel Hound)
5cc1eae8-2747-575c-be06-2223b93fecb0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the hound can't Bite another target.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the hound can't Bite another target.

e86dfd12-b87e-536e-b410-430173a6c89e.name: Slick Spittle
e86dfd12-b87e-536e-b410-430173a6c89e.description: The eel hound covers the ground in a 5-foot square centered on a point it can see within 10 feet of it with its slippery spittle. Each creature standing in that area must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. The spittle remains on the ground for 1 minute.

Each creature standing in that area must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. The spittle remains on the ground for 1 minute.

5a8520f9-7788-53f8-a1bb-0e1aca8c4f05.name: Water Step
5a8520f9-7788-53f8-a1bb-0e1aca8c4f05.description: The eel hound teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain enough water to partially submerge the hound.

attributes.description: The eel hound teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain enough water to partially submerge the hound.

b15ae104-e0ad-5ed5-93e9-ba6c0f0455f2.name: Battle Frenzy
b15ae104-e0ad-5ed5-93e9-ba6c0f0455f2.description: The einherjar has advantage on all attack rolls it makes while it is below 30 hp.

attributes.description: The einherjar has advantage on all attack rolls it makes while it is below 30 hp.

d40982d1-cca2-5e07-a51f-232cbc04bd8c.name: Fearsome Gaze
d40982d1-cca2-5e07-a51f-232cbc04bd8c.description: The stare of an einherjar is especially piercing to Humanoids. It has advantage on any Charisma (Intimidation) check it makes against a Humanoid.

attributes.description: The stare of an einherjar is especially piercing to Humanoids. It has advantage on any Charisma (Intimidation) check it makes against a Humanoid.

eb2ed516-c8f7-5c1f-8297-1e1b8acd909d.description: The einherjar’s weapon attacks are magical. When the einherjar hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

fbcc4b69-a84c-5f7d-8cb9-6b8e9612818f.description: The einherjar makes two Battleaxe attacks, or it makes three Celestial Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with Celestial Blessing, if available.

94254e0e-6627-5741-8a5f-e223e57492bc.name: Shadow Sight
94254e0e-6627-5741-8a5f-e223e57492bc.description: The drake has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made while in dim light or darkness, and magical darkness doesn’t impede the drake’s darkvision.

9c133cc6-3cbb-5bf8-9659-f0a0377c6b7f.name: Bite (Elder Shadow Drake)
9c133cc6-3cbb-5bf8-9659-f0a0377c6b7f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage.

3792d95b-1741-5e7d-8a28-5b3101e9b940.name: Invisibility (Elder Shadow Drake)
3792d95b-1741-5e7d-8a28-5b3101e9b940.description: The drake magically turns invisible until it attacks, uses Shadow Step, or starts its turn in sunlight, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the drake wears or carries is invisible with it. The drake must be in dim light or darkness to use this action.

09a4ecf0-5646-519b-b16d-ba012ba13fb5.name: Multiattack (Elder Shadow Drake)
09a4ecf0-5646-519b-b16d-ba012ba13fb5.description: The elder shadow drake makes one Bite attack and two Tail Slap attacks.

fd19e0ce-ac93-5371-9bad-c7fdcda4e6b0.name: Shadow Step
fd19e0ce-ac93-5371-9bad-c7fdcda4e6b0.description: The drake teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The origin and destination spaces must be in dim light or darkness.

2bd1057a-7f5a-5c3a-b087-b964e974ef9e.name: Stygian Breath
2bd1057a-7f5a-5c3a-b087-b964e974ef9e.description: The elder shadow drake spits a ball of black liquid on a point the dragon can see within 60 feet of it. The ball bursts into a 20-foot-radius sphere of black mist centered on that point for 1 minute. Each creature in the mist when it appears must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The mist spreads around corners, and its area is magical darkness. No natural light can illuminate the mist. If any of the mist overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 1st level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled.

ba8b266b-c50e-501c-a75e-3473144c400c.name: Tail Slap (Elder Shadow Drake)
ba8b266b-c50e-501c-a75e-3473144c400c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
