36a7aea7-cf6f-5cef-ae8c-925f790fdf91.name: Elemental Nature (Elemental Locus)
36a7aea7-cf6f-5cef-ae8c-925f790fdf91.description: The elemental locus doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The elemental locus doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

7cda3e7a-8189-5e1a-8ecf-211d2fd69826.name: Immortal
7cda3e7a-8189-5e1a-8ecf-211d2fd69826.description: If the elemental locus dies, it returns to life in 1d12 months, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. The new body appears in a space of the locus’s choice within its bound land. Only a wish spell can prevent this trait from functioning.

attributes.description: If the elemental locus dies, it returns to life in 1d12 months, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. The new body appears in a space of the locus’s choice within its bound land. Only a wish spell can prevent this trait from functioning.

f20d2a88-2463-5c35-9e64-73de899bdec7.name: Land Bound
f20d2a88-2463-5c35-9e64-73de899bdec7.description: The elemental locus is bound to an area of land or ocean no larger than 100 square miles. If it leaves this region, it loses its Spawn Elemental action. If it remains outside the region, it automatically teleports back to the center of this area after 24 hours, regardless of distance.

7580eed1-f9a9-5158-9613-7bd74668bf0f.name: Magic Resistance (Elemental Locus)
7580eed1-f9a9-5158-9613-7bd74668bf0f.description: The elemental locus has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

73c97fa0-6c9f-57d2-a8e3-5d55b5e6f0f1.name: Siege Monster (Elemental Locus)
73c97fa0-6c9f-57d2-a8e3-5d55b5e6f0f1.description: The elemental locus deals double damage to objects and structures.

dc79be4c-6693-5bb1-9bea-277cf1115367.name: Unstoppable (Elemental Locus)
dc79be4c-6693-5bb1-9bea-277cf1115367.description: Moving through difficult terrain doesn’t cost the elemental locus extra movement, and its speed can’t be reduced.

attributes.description: Moving through difficult terrain doesn’t cost the elemental locus extra movement, and its speed can’t be reduced.

0191ef74-9736-5526-b43e-0be6a672083b.name: Multiattack (Elemental Locus)
0191ef74-9736-5526-b43e-0be6a672083b.description: The elemental locus makes three Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spawn Elemental.

attributes.description: The elemental locus makes three Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spawn Elemental.

e213b466-9562-5c26-821f-805b97923d97.name: Slam (Elemental Locus)
e213b466-9562-5c26-821f-805b97923d97.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (5d8 + 9) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

9b91d4de-8d52-5d1c-8e78-ac97784a76d0.name: Spawn Elemental
9b91d4de-8d52-5d1c-8e78-ac97784a76d0.description: The elemental locus magically creates up to 2d6 mephits or 1 Elemental with a challenge rating of 5 or lower. The Elementals arrive at the start of the locus's next turn, acting as allies of the locus and obeying its spoken commands. The locus can create only Elementals that share an element with a terrain feature comprising at least 100,000 square feet of the locus's bound land. For example, a desert-bound locus can't create a water-based Elemental, unless its bound desert contains an oasis or other source of water around the size of a small pond.

d63ded33-51f4-536e-a7c5-915da886fa77.description: The elvish veteran archer has advantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks to track Beasts and on Intelligence (Nature) checks to recall information about Beasts.

ee06dc04-65e0-5b03-b94b-9a0eaf9e7e49.name: Fey Ancestry (Elvish Veteran Archer)
ee06dc04-65e0-5b03-b94b-9a0eaf9e7e49.description: The elvish veteran archer has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put the archer to sleep.

attributes.description: The elvish veteran archer has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put the archer to sleep.

8f8b7b3e-0e52-565d-9702-cb247b228236.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
8f8b7b3e-0e52-565d-9702-cb247b228236.description: The elvish veteran archer has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.

8538472b-0198-5e84-b5ae-497a44d5f5bd.name: Point Blank Hunter
8538472b-0198-5e84-b5ae-497a44d5f5bd.description: A longbow deals one extra die of its damage when the archer hits with it (included in the attack). In addition, when the archer makes a ranged attack with a longbow, it doesn’t have disadvantage on the attack roll from being within 5 feet of a hostile creature, though it may still have disadvantage from other sources.

38768e99-6ae0-5639-8bbb-002049e35824.name: Arrow Spray
38768e99-6ae0-5639-8bbb-002049e35824.description: The elvish veteran archer fires a flurry of arrows in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the cone must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

815f00e6-320c-5a74-bdbc-8c2d5f919552.name: Longbow
815f00e6-320c-5a74-bdbc-8c2d5f919552.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the archer can pin part of the target's clothing or body to the ground or to a nearby wall or tree. If it does so, the target is restrained. A creature, including the target, can take its action to remove the arrow and free the restrained target by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength check.

695aab29-638a-51e2-b278-942579e4d022.name: Construct Nature (Emerald Eye)
695aab29-638a-51e2-b278-942579e4d022.description: The emerald eye doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The emerald eye doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

35d9851d-5acb-5303-8754-260e6636474e.name: Immutable Form (Emerald Eye)
35d9851d-5acb-5303-8754-260e6636474e.description: The emerald eye is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The emerald eye is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

7b5a5c2f-4502-5d37-b2f3-303bc758f2b6.name: Psychically Bound
7b5a5c2f-4502-5d37-b2f3-303bc758f2b6.description: The emerald eye must be psychically bound to a creature to survive. It loses 5 (2d4) hp for every hour it is not bound to a creature or every hour it is more than 30 feet away from its bound creature.

attributes.description: The emerald eye must be psychically bound to a creature to survive. It loses 5 (2d4) hp for every hour it is not bound to a creature or every hour it is more than 30 feet away from its bound creature.

a68c25a4-a752-5340-a660-b8537e49b6a0.name: Bind
a68c25a4-a752-5340-a660-b8537e49b6a0.description: The emerald eye chooses a creature it can see within 30 feet of it that has an Intelligence of 6 or higher. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or the eye psychically binds itself to the target. If the target succeeds on the saving throw by 5 or more, it knows the eye attempted to bind to it. Otherwise, the target is unaware of the attempt. While bound to the emerald eye, the creature has resistance to psychic damage, but it has disadvantage on saving throws against the eye's Compulsion. The eye can be bound to only one target at a time. If it binds to another, the effect on the previous target ends.

The target must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or the eye psychically binds itself to the target. If the target succeeds on the saving throw by 5 or more, it knows the eye attempted to bind to it. Otherwise, the target is unaware of the attempt. While bound to the emerald eye, the creature has resistance to psychic damage, but it has disadvantage on saving throws against the eye's Compulsion. The eye can be bound to only one target at a time. If it binds to another, the effect on the previous target ends.

69d1586f-b076-5d67-bbf6-3b58eb79b3a0.name: Compel
69d1586f-b076-5d67-bbf6-3b58eb79b3a0.description: The emerald eye magically compels one creature it can see within 30 feet of it to move. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be charmed by the eye for 1 minute. At the start of each of the charmed target's turns, the emerald eye chooses a direction horizontal to the eye, and the target must use as much of its movement as possible to move in that direction on its turn. The target can take its action before it moves. The target can't be compelled to move into an obviously deadly hazard, such as a fire or pit, but it will provoke opportunity attacks to move in the designated direction. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

4517e0e8-7161-5192-baab-e4595421bbc2.name: Blessed Weapons
4517e0e8-7161-5192-baab-e4595421bbc2.description: The cult leader’s weapons are blessed by its deity, and its weapon attacks are magical. When the cult leader hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

ba308e9f-e2a1-5a85-9a2e-47735b858456.name: Divine Blessing
ba308e9f-e2a1-5a85-9a2e-47735b858456.description: While the cult leader is conscious and wearing no armor and wielding no shield, it adds its Wisdom modifier to its Armor Class (included above). In addition, it has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.

c76b8672-6931-57ff-8c1b-a50819fad669.description: The cult leader has advantage on initiative rolls. In addition, at the start of each of the cult leader’s turns, one friendly creature within 30 feet of the cult leader has advantage on the first attack roll it makes before the start of the cult leader’s next turn.

d14ecb95-2f7b-5cb4-ad65-a7af47806d65.description: When a creature the cult leader can see within 30 feet of it hits it with an attack, the cult leader intonates a mind-bending arcane secret, and the attacker takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage.

e9e729aa-c566-593a-b66e-e4cb55b164eb.name: Spellcasting (Emerald Order Cult Leader)
e9e729aa-c566-593a-b66e-e4cb55b164eb.description:
The Emerald Order cult leader casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):

- **At Will:** command, light, thaumaturgy
- **3/Day Each:** detect thoughts, dimension door, silence, slow
- **1/Day Each:** divination, freedom of movement

ef7d4a63-505a-5fe9-8f3b-98b0c813df54.description: When a creature the cloak can see attacks a creature in the cloak's space, the cloak can briefly wrap itself around the creature in its space. The creature in its space takes only half the damage from the attack, and the cloak takes the other half.

608c83f2-9667-5843-8d93-942f23d4325f.name: Shadow Snare
608c83f2-9667-5843-8d93-942f23d4325f.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: The target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained by tendrils of shadow. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength check. The tendrils of shadow can be attack and destroyed (AC 12; hp 10; vulnerability to radiant damage; immunity to necrotic, poison, and psychic damage).

679aa02f-3c3a-5235-bc3a-7f09ace080b5.description: The enchantress has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put her to sleep.

a2b6222a-1f32-5d7c-b3e0-067011c78a88.name: Phrenic Weapons
a2b6222a-1f32-5d7c-b3e0-067011c78a88.description: The enchantress’s weapon attacks are magical. When she hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4d6 psychic damage (included in the attack).

977e2fc0-d2b7-5e74-a56d-d905690687f3.name: Beguiling Whispers
977e2fc0-d2b7-5e74-a56d-d905690687f3.description: The enchantress speaks sweet words to a creature she can see within 60 feet of her and that can hear her. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed in this way, the creature has disadvantage on Wisdom and Charisma saving throws against spells cast by the enchantress.

The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed in this way, the creature has disadvantage on Wisdom and Charisma saving throws against spells cast by the enchantress.

12ac3ef8-a836-5763-8985-bbcfa67e3d3a.name: Leadership (Enchantress)
12ac3ef8-a836-5763-8985-bbcfa67e3d3a.description: For 1 minute, the enchantress can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that she can see within 30 feet of her makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a d4 to its roll, provided it can hear and understand the enchantress. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the enchantress is incapacitated.

bab46c13-ce1a-552d-a714-139a80e562c5.name: Spellcasting (Enchantress)
bab46c13-ce1a-552d-a714-139a80e562c5.description:
The enchantress casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** command, message
3/day: charm person, enthrall, fear, hold person, hypnotic pattern
1/day: confusion, dominate person, greater invisibility, hold monster, phantasmal killer

91dc240a-e243-5622-a34b-77503d1bd066.name: Call to the Future
91dc240a-e243-5622-a34b-77503d1bd066.description: The eonic drifter calls to a future version of itself, which appears in an unoccupied space the drifter can see within 30 feet of it. The drifter's future self acts on the drifter's turn, and each turn it makes one Time-Warping Staff attack against a creature of the drifter's choice or uses the Help action to aid the drifter. The future self can be attacked and destroyed (AC 13; hp 30; resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage; immunity to poison and psychic damage), otherwise it remains until the drifter dismisses it as a bonus action or the drifter finishes a long rest. If the drifter's future self is destroyed, the drifter must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

If the drifter's future self is destroyed, the drifter must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

22a62398-6746-52f0-8a98-907fae74433e.name: Drift Forward
22a62398-6746-52f0-8a98-907fae74433e.description: The drifter chooses one creature it can see within 5 feet of its future self. The target must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage and is pulled forward in time. On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't pulled forward in time. A target pulled forward in time disappears, along with the drifter's future self, as the future self pulls the target with it. At the end of the drifter's next turn, the target and the drifter's future self reappear in the spaces they previously occupied, or the nearest unoccupied spaces. When the target reappears, it has disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn as it recovers from the disorienting experience.

b13211d3-9873-52dd-b389-9365d75b4de9.name: Gaze of Ancient Light
b13211d3-9873-52dd-b389-9365d75b4de9.description: The golem opens all of its eyes and emits a burst of blinding light. Each creature within 30 feet of it must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) radiant damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is also stunned until the end of its next turn. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

The frightened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7633a5cc-be5d-5690-add7-ecb49ecf98b0.name: Woodland Friends
7633a5cc-be5d-5690-add7-ecb49ecf98b0.description: The far darrig magically calls 1d4 elk or giant weasels. The called Beasts arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the far darrig and obeying its spoken commands. The Beasts remain for 1 hour, until the far darrig dies, or until the far darrig dismisses them as a bonus action.

e7355b05-ffb6-5fc7-8f9c-4b09081c632b.name: Visionary Flesh
e7355b05-ffb6-5fc7-8f9c-4b09081c632b.description: A creature that eats the flesh of a fate eater must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature is poisoned for 1 hour. On a success, the creature gains the benefits of the divination spell.

d75784c7-39c9-5221-b681-584348a4298d.name: Alter Fate
d75784c7-39c9-5221-b681-584348a4298d.description: The fate eater alters the fate of one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The creature must make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 36 (8d8) psychic damage, and its fate is altered. Roll a d6 to determine which of the following alterations affects the creature. On a success, the creature takes half the damage, and its fate isn't altered. A creature with an altered fate for 1 minute or less can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, a creature with an altered fate can repeat the saving throw at the end of each long rest, ending the effect on itself on a success.

eb74a284-7418-506c-a29e-ef08d84049a8.name: Distortion Gaze
eb74a284-7418-506c-a29e-ef08d84049a8.description: Those who meet the gaze of the fear smith experience the world seeming to twist at unnatural angles beneath their feet. When a creature that can see the fear smith’s eye starts its turn within 30 feet of the fear smith, the fear smith can force the creature to make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw if the fear smith isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed save, the creature is disoriented until the start of its next turn. While disoriented, a creature can’t take the Dash or Disengage action, and when it moves for the first time on its turn, it must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

116ea76d-7ef3-5b6d-bd10-94522714f429.name: Inhabiting Spirit
116ea76d-7ef3-5b6d-bd10-94522714f429.description: The fellforged is inhabited and animated by a specter. If the fellforged fails a saving throw against an effect that turns undead, the specter is expelled into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the fellforged with the hp total it had before it was expelled. The specter otherwise uses the statistics of a specter.

attributes.description: The fellforged is inhabited and animated by a specter. If the fellforged fails a saving throw against an effect that turns undead, the specter is expelled into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the fellforged with the hp total it had before it was expelled. The specter otherwise uses the statistics of a specter.

de91cef3-8924-5c97-a5e6-78f7df1a106f.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Fellforged)
de91cef3-8924-5c97-a5e6-78f7df1a106f.description: While in sunlight, the fellforged has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the fellforged has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

289553f0-6af2-5407-bbb5-5f92eb311036.name: Burst Gears
289553f0-6af2-5407-bbb5-5f92eb311036.description: The specter within the fellforged strains the construct's body, sending broken springs and gears flying. Each creature within 5 feet of the fellforged must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Each time the fellforged uses this bonus action, its speed is reduced by 5 feet, and it can't use this bonus action if its speed is 0. Its speed returns to normal when it finishes a long rest.

a59d929a-3124-5115-a843-6c9c7c133fbe.name: Multiattack (Fellforged)

5554a99f-55bc-5ef1-a8c0-57d6195f0fe2.name: Necrotic Slam
5554a99f-55bc-5ef1-a8c0-57d6195f0fe2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

9a318bdb-ed79-551a-b6f7-dd42e39e3b0c.name: Enchanted Cage
9a318bdb-ed79-551a-b6f7-dd42e39e3b0c.description: The savant is immune to damage and can’t be the target of spells or effects as long as its cage exists. The cage has a flying speed of 30 feet while the savant is inside of it, moving at the mental command of the savant. When the cage is destroyed, the savant floats gently to the ground. The cage has AC 19, 75 hp, and is immune to piercing, poison, and psychic damage. A non-derro that touches the cage or hits it with a melee weapon attack while within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 7 (2d6) psychic damage and be frightened until the end of its next turn. The cage disintegrates if exposed to sunlight for 1 hour.

932f9bab-620d-54b6-874c-ce6736e7fa55.name: Maddening Babble
932f9bab-620d-54b6-874c-ce6736e7fa55.description: The savant constantly babbles eldritch nonsense while it can see any non-derro creatures and isn’t incapacitated. Each non-derro creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the savant and can hear the babbling must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated until the start of its next turn.

3fe7b257-8376-5ad8-82a0-82923185439e.name: Multiattack (Fetal Savant)
3fe7b257-8376-5ad8-82a0-82923185439e.description: The fetal savant makes two Psychic Burst attacks.

265690a0-3718-5cc1-b03f-fb23104239c9.name: Psychic Burst
265690a0-3718-5cc1-b03f-fb23104239c9.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) psychic damage.

4776f7a7-a8ab-529e-a49a-11732de66258.name: Soul Exchange
4776f7a7-a8ab-529e-a49a-11732de66258.description: The savant exchanges its soul with one Humanoid it can see within 20 feet of it. Its body becomes paralyzed, the target's soul inhabits the savant's paralyzed body, and the savant inhabits the target's body, taking full control of it. The savant retains its alignment, its Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores, its Psychic Burst action, and its immunity to being charmed and frightened. It otherwise uses the target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

7d60ca0c-f587-55c1-bdb0-8845533c9e94.name: Patron's Might
7d60ca0c-f587-55c1-bdb0-8845533c9e94.description: The fext channels its patron's awe-inspiring presence, terrifying those nearby. Each creature within 10 feet of the fext must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) psychic damage and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't frightened. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

05456847-5211-5f52-80aa-632ce7d9f961.description: A creature within 15 feet of a feyward tree that moves away from it provokes an opportunity attack even if the creature takes the Disengage action.

736aa2d1-a9d3-56e0-90c0-fc2951cae297.name: Flaying Leaves
736aa2d1-a9d3-56e0-90c0-fc2951cae297.description: The feyward tree launches a barrage of razor-sharp cold iron leaves from its branches. Each creature within 20 feet of the tree must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

1d7f21e2-4ab6-5b45-829c-c7c34172f242.name: Ever Connected
1d7f21e2-4ab6-5b45-829c-c7c34172f242.description: Fidele angels are magically connected. Damage taken by the fidele angel is split evenly between the fidele angel and its paired fidele angel. The angel that was the original target of the attack takes any damage that won’t divide evenly. All other effects, such as reducing ability scores or being the target of a bless spell, affect only the target.

0077250f-3d9a-5a88-b785-2130650d7b65.name: Unshakeable Fidelity
0077250f-3d9a-5a88-b785-2130650d7b65.description: No spell, feature, trait, magic, or other effect can cause a fidele angel to act against or harm its mate or change its love or loyalty toward its mate.

20ba5f9f-276a-5364-ae0e-dd9a8f4bbe44.name: Change Shape (Fidele Angel)
20ba5f9f-276a-5364-ae0e-dd9a8f4bbe44.description: The fidele angel transforms into a Medium or smaller Humanoid, a Large or smaller birdlike Beast, or back into its true form, which is a winged Celestial. Without wings, it loses its flying speed. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

22216385-df99-57f4-95d4-b3d10e81f3a8.name: Spellcasting (Fidele Angel)
22216385-df99-57f4-95d4-b3d10e81f3a8.description:
The angel casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as its spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** detect evil and good, purify food and drink, spare the dying
- **3/Day Each:** bless, cure wounds, daylight

f0157fce-29cd-58d9-a13d-bd248bc31a4f.name: To My Lover's Side
f0157fce-29cd-58d9-a13d-bd248bc31a4f.description: If its mate is more than 1 mile away from it, the fidele angel can magically teleport, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, to an unoccupied space within 10 feet of its mate. The angel can use this action even if its mate is on another plane of existence.

3e401c8c-fb95-5673-9bc8-8bc76f8694ee.name: Enforce Good Deeds
3e401c8c-fb95-5673-9bc8-8bc76f8694ee.description: A creature that has received assistance, such as healing or a glowing feather, from the firebird must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be affected by the geas spell for 30 days. While under the geas, the affected creature must assist nonhostile creatures suffering from starvation or thirst by alleviating the starvation or thirst.

bafb4ec1-4a77-55ab-a272-0d9833fc7f73.name: Fiery Weapons
bafb4ec1-4a77-55ab-a272-0d9833fc7f73.description: The firebird’s weapon attacks are magical. When the firebird hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 fire damage (included in the attack).

c7e9efdb-ea68-5040-a6f7-ceac03cd72da.name: Glowing Feathers
c7e9efdb-ea68-5040-a6f7-ceac03cd72da.description: The firebird sheds bright light in a 5- to 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of feet equal to the chosen radius. The firebird can alter the radius as a bonus action. If the firebird willingly gifts a feather to a creature, the feather sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet indefinitely.

0c7bae49-5440-5872-b34d-9247a42ae9f2.name: Warming Presence
0c7bae49-5440-5872-b34d-9247a42ae9f2.description: The firebird and each creature within 5 feet of it are immune to the effects of cold environments, provided the cold is caused by naturally occurring weather and climate. When the firebird is inside a structure, it can choose for this trait to affect all creatures within the structure (no action required), regardless of how close they are to it.

f6fe6523-8d1e-56bb-a0b4-ac4e2ee06712.name: Beak (Firebird)
f6fe6523-8d1e-56bb-a0b4-ac4e2ee06712.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

a159b98b-8d94-5583-9ea1-c7960cdc2efa.name: Blinding Ray
a159b98b-8d94-5583-9ea1-c7960cdc2efa.description: The firebird fires a burning ray of light from its tail feathers in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 17 (5d6) fire damage and is blinded until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded.

1fca821a-22e7-5a4b-87e6-642642d6a57f.name: Healing Feathers
1fca821a-22e7-5a4b-87e6-642642d6a57f.description: The firebird touches another creature, brushing its wings against the creature. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) hp and is freed from any disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.

attributes.description: The firebird touches another creature, brushing its wings against the creature. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) hp and is freed from any disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.

34241bb7-8174-574b-afa5-030355d0407d.name: Multiattack (Firebird)
34241bb7-8174-574b-afa5-030355d0407d.description: The firebird makes one Beak attack and one Talon attack.

63e241b7-bcd6-56ab-ab59-91ed56ca6dd5.name: Talon
63e241b7-bcd6-56ab-ab59-91ed56ca6dd5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

ce93f895-78e0-5947-a46b-0e020bc3bda8.name: Elemental Nature (Firegeist)
ce93f895-78e0-5947-a46b-0e020bc3bda8.description: The firegeist doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The firegeist doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

10244e9a-1699-5170-abf0-f9003c0e5ce4.name: Hide By Firelight
10244e9a-1699-5170-abf0-f9003c0e5ce4.description: The firegeist has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in fire or in areas lit by nonmagical fire.

attributes.description: The firegeist has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in fire or in areas lit by nonmagical fire.

c514d249-c078-5cff-9178-033dd657b4df.name: Magical Light Sensitivity
c514d249-c078-5cff-9178-033dd657b4df.description: While in an area of light created by a spell or other magical effect, the firegeist has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attributes.description: While in an area of light created by a spell or other magical effect, the firegeist has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

99b5fba0-16c1-5b0b-b6be-ed8b9617a0a0.name: Variable Illumination (Firegeist)
99b5fba0-16c1-5b0b-b6be-ed8b9617a0a0.description: The firegeist sheds dim light in a 5- to 20-foot radius. It can alter the radius as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The firegeist sheds dim light in a 5- to 20-foot radius. It can alter the radius as a bonus action.

ac4837de-3831-5dd6-9f93-58f598b66b41.name: Water Susceptibility
ac4837de-3831-5dd6-9f93-58f598b66b41.description: For every 5 feet the firegeist moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 1 cold damage.

attributes.description: For every 5 feet the firegeist moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 1 cold damage.

9b0e06ff-6648-595f-ad6d-125292307dcd.name: Burning Slam
9b0e06ff-6648-595f-ad6d-125292307dcd.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage. If the target is a flammable object, it ignites. If the target is a creature, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or ignite. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

cb4eed8e-f45b-55b0-b8d0-2233b6a9d34b.name: Burning Terror
cb4eed8e-f45b-55b0-b8d0-2233b6a9d34b.description: The firegeist assaults the mind of one creature it can see within 30 feet of it with the painful, humiliating memory of the firegeist's first death. The target must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 14 (4d6) fire damage and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't frightened. While frightened, the creature takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

5a313288-e750-5612-bb05-8e2d5ffbe39f.name: Massive Bulk
5a313288-e750-5612-bb05-8e2d5ffbe39f.description: A flab giant can’t take the Dash action. In addition, a creature attempting to grapple, push, or knock the giant prone has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks to do so.

b1128e1e-ad52-538d-9b62-27f04f297e50.name: Multiattack (Flab Giant)
b1128e1e-ad52-538d-9b62-27f04f297e50.description: The giant makes two Slam attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller creature, the target is grappled (escape DC 15).

19439df8-2735-5eae-bd7b-fe2eee89434a.name: Slam (Flab Giant)
19439df8-2735-5eae-bd7b-fe2eee89434a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

802fbf25-49c8-5353-bcb7-5ae2e21c8271.name: Squatting Pin
802fbf25-49c8-5353-bcb7-5ae2e21c8271.description: One creature grappled by the flab giant must make a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 22 (5d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage and is restrained until the grapple ends. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained, but it remains grappled until it escapes. While restrained, a creature takes 8 (1d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the giant's turns. If the flab giant moves, the target is no longer restrained or grappled.

cda7668f-66c1-5f25-94b6-ca62c6962aa9.name: Heated Body (Flame Dragon Wyrmling)
cda7668f-66c1-5f25-94b6-ca62c6962aa9.description: A creature that touches the flame dragon or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) fire damage.

9cf2dfbb-74d4-5ad0-8a40-079fd8a38e1a.name: Bite (Flame Dragon Wyrmling)

718ae5e9-9a47-5ec9-85c2-69e27caf498c.description: The dragon exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 17 (5d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

ba8b663d-24e8-5920-9ed7-912fb27a9bbb.name: Merciful Exchange
ba8b663d-24e8-5920-9ed7-912fb27a9bbb.description: If the flutterflesh reduces a creature to 0 hp with a melee attack, it can cut off one of the creature’s limbs. If it does so, the target is reduced to 1 hp instead.

3d0fe666-e64c-5c09-b54c-850881292013.name: Necrotic Weapons (Flutterflesh)
3d0fe666-e64c-5c09-b54c-850881292013.description: The flutterflesh’s weapon attacks are magical. When the flutterflesh hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d8 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

b07ba414-18e8-576c-b1af-f8cc7f774bcd.name: Regeneration (Flutterflesh)
b07ba414-18e8-576c-b1af-f8cc7f774bcd.description: The flutterflesh regains 10 hp at the start of its turn. If the flutterflesh takes fire or radiant damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the flutterflesh’s next turn. The flutterflesh dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

6dddb2f0-1c88-5735-9d28-cdaa09282798.name: Undead Nature (Flutterflesh)

268f3589-605f-5662-9de2-7ee45ade323a.name: Bone Spur
268f3589-605f-5662-9de2-7ee45ade323a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage, and the flutterflesh impales the target on one of its bone spurs, grappling the target (escape DC 16). The flutterflesh can have no more than two creatures impaled at a time.

a819f844-9d61-508c-ab98-f08eb35fad21.name: Creeping Death
a819f844-9d61-508c-ab98-f08eb35fad21.description: The flutterflesh emits a wave of necromantic energy, hastening the journey toward death. Each creature within 20 feet of the flutterflesh must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature below half its hp maximum has disadvantage on this saving throw.

eb1ef5fa-024e-55b7-a748-b4b04ca998fb.description: The flutterflesh makes three Bone Spur or Tormenting Gaze attacks. If two Tormenting Gaze attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A paralyzed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

76390eed-6a95-5295-bca0-87a38ce5d468.name: Ethereal Sight
76390eed-6a95-5295-bca0-87a38ce5d468.description: The folk of Leng can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.

attributes.description: The folk of Leng can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.

85dd673c-8711-529c-a52f-9910969567ba.name: Leng Rejuvenation
85dd673c-8711-529c-a52f-9910969567ba.description: If the folk of Leng dies on the Material Plane, it gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hp and becoming active again, unless it is killed with radiant damage wielded by a good-aligned creature or its remains are sprinkled with holy water within 24 hours of its death. The folk’s new body appears in its family’s crypt in Leng.

c0adbcf9-3bc1-555d-bd74-f55e9f47baa8.name: Regeneration (Folk of Leng)
c0adbcf9-3bc1-555d-bd74-f55e9f47baa8.description: The folk of Leng regains 2 hp at the start of its turn. If the folk of Leng takes fire or radiant damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the folk’s next turn. The folk of Leng dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

c8edbde6-9d7a-5097-8a31-9714a7526d0a.name: Etherealness
c8edbde6-9d7a-5097-8a31-9714a7526d0a.description: The folk of Leng enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. It is visible on the Material Plane while it is in the Border Ethereal, and vice versa, yet it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

7a842abf-ef86-5928-b1ad-e3b71a63d274.name: Hooked Spider Net
7a842abf-ef86-5928-b1ad-e3b71a63d274.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 10/30 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) psychic damage, and the target is restrained. While restrained, the target takes 5 (1d10) poison damage at the start of each of its turns. Any creature, including the restrained target, can take an action to remove the net by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength check. If the check succeeds by 5 or more, the creature breaks the net instead, and the folk of Leng can't use the broken net again until it finishes a long rest.

- **3/Day Each:** disguise self, suggestion

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

b56ea2c4-9f49-5778-a6ac-b65cc936a031.name: Dagger (Fraughashar)
b56ea2c4-9f49-5778-a6ac-b65cc936a031.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

0ac15ff2-b918-5061-abfd-748a9a084366.name: Frost Bolt
0ac15ff2-b918-5061-abfd-748a9a084366.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +4 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) cold damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +4 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) cold damage.

002ca08a-ab86-54d3-8b6d-c41e927fed7c.name: Multiattack (Fraughashar)
002ca08a-ab86-54d3-8b6d-c41e927fed7c.description: The fraughashar makes one Bite attack and one Dagger attack.

attributes.description: The fraughashar makes one Bite attack and one Dagger attack.

b7c971ad-fc15-5cbc-ba2b-9f886989d831.name: Chilling Acidic Body
b7c971ad-fc15-5cbc-ba2b-9f886989d831.description: A creature that touches the frostveil or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the frostveil or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage.

602a0c0b-d4c7-5944-bf47-5990bf760298.name: Damage Transfer
602a0c0b-d4c7-5944-bf47-5990bf760298.description: While engulfing a creature, the frostveil takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down), and the engulfed creature takes the other half.

attributes.description: While engulfing a creature, the frostveil takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down), and the engulfed creature takes the other half.

de67cc78-f976-57f2-b439-79e72a6bc465.name: False Appearance (Frostveil)
de67cc78-f976-57f2-b439-79e72a6bc465.description: While the frostveil remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a formation of frost and ice.

attributes.description: While the frostveil remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a formation of frost and ice.

213315ce-5fe3-5e97-9b46-ad967318602d.name: Windborne
213315ce-5fe3-5e97-9b46-ad967318602d.description: In windy conditions, the frostveil’s flying speed increases to 30 feet. In a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour), its flying speed increases to 60 feet.

attributes.description: In windy conditions, the frostveil’s flying speed increases to 30 feet. In a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour), its flying speed increases to 60 feet.

6c36ca7b-6617-55d6-8bd1-68f080a21187.name: Frozen Tendril
6c36ca7b-6617-55d6-8bd1-68f080a21187.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) cold damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) cold damage.

8517c5ab-bb65-5723-ad43-2eaa0207b7b6.name: Multiattack (Frostveil)
8517c5ab-bb65-5723-ad43-2eaa0207b7b6.description: The frostveil makes two Frozen Tendril attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 15), and the frostveil uses Snowy Engulf on it.

attributes.description: The frostveil makes two Frozen Tendril attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 15), and the frostveil uses Snowy Engulf on it.

aa19673a-1a8d-5916-aaf0-8927ac30a86e.name: Snowy Engulf
aa19673a-1a8d-5916-aaf0-8927ac30a86e.description: The frostveil engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded and restrained, and it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the frostveil's turns or take 4 (1d8) acid damage and 3 (1d6) cold damage. If the frostveil moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The frostveil can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

attributes.description: The frostveil engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded and restrained, and it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the frostveil's turns or take 4 (1d8) acid damage and 3 (1d6) cold damage. If the frostveil moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The frostveil can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

dab2d3ad-2cc5-53f7-87e5-2871de45d07e.name: Spirit Spores
dab2d3ad-2cc5-53f7-87e5-2871de45d07e.description: The frostveil releases a puff of psychotropic spores around itself. Each creature within 10 feet of the frostveil must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) cold damage and is incapacitated for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated. When an incapacitated creature moves, it moves in a random direction. An incapacitated creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

When an incapacitated creature moves, it moves in a random direction. An incapacitated creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

702ce656-7ab5-5291-a04d-ae7a21c9868f.name: Amphibious (Garroter Crab)
702ce656-7ab5-5291-a04d-ae7a21c9868f.description: The garroter crab can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The garroter crab can breathe air and water.

c389d3cf-4e54-544d-acad-2f8f5ab53810.name: Strangling Divination
c389d3cf-4e54-544d-acad-2f8f5ab53810.description: A Humanoid reduced to 0 hp while grappled by the garroter crab experiences a brief vision of the future. This effect works like the divination spell, except the reply is only as a mental vision and it can be about any specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 30 days. Once a creature has received a vision in this way, it can’t do so again for 30 days.

39e9b990-b870-5c6d-916c-f140f30051e3.name: Whip-Claw
39e9b990-b870-5c6d-916c-f140f30051e3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target can't speak or cast spells with verbal components, and the crab can't use its Whip Claw on another target.

5ce148dc-516f-5882-8e33-4611562eaaf9.name: Shifting Camouflage
5ce148dc-516f-5882-8e33-4611562eaaf9.description: The gbahali’s hide adapts to its current surroundings. The gbahali has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in nonmagical, natural terrain.

attributes.description: The gbahali’s hide adapts to its current surroundings. The gbahali has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in nonmagical, natural terrain.

4afcc68f-67fd-5577-adf7-5e2c9ee5ee69.name: Bite (Gbahali)
4afcc68f-67fd-5577-adf7-5e2c9ee5ee69.description: Melee Weapon Attack:+7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the gbahali can't Bite another target.

f06e4adc-8dcc-544c-8a5d-c8639ef0d42c.name: Construct Nature (Gearforged Templar)
f06e4adc-8dcc-544c-8a5d-c8639ef0d42c.description: The gearforged templar doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

5f1f413f-97d2-5eb2-aaa3-e94ba79b5c41.description: When a creature enters the gearforged templar's reach, the templar makes one Greatsword attack against the creature.

ca7219b6-d516-52d8-9907-b9bfee394141.name: Javelin (Gearforged Templar)
ca7219b6-d516-52d8-9907-b9bfee394141.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

11c5309e-3da5-5e54-9344-dc6c1d2a7a19.name: Multiattack (Gearforged Templar)
11c5309e-3da5-5e54-9344-dc6c1d2a7a19.description: The gearforged templar makes four Greatsword or Javelin attacks. If two Greatsword attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the templar. The templar can choose not to push a creature.

4cded3aa-1055-5b5e-96e1-a5b167d0437d.name: Parry (Gearforged Templar)
4cded3aa-1055-5b5e-96e1-a5b167d0437d.description: The gearforged templar adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the templar must be able to see the attacker and must be wielding a melee weapon.

0c3a7c54-fe1d-59ca-956f-2617595fc5f9.name: Whirlwind (Gearforged Templar)
0c3a7c54-fe1d-59ca-956f-2617595fc5f9.description: The gearforged templar whirls its greatsword in a great arc. Each creature within 10 feet of the gearforged must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 27 (5d10) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

9021a493-370e-5b86-852a-ef781f3c855f.name: Bred to the Saddle
9021a493-370e-5b86-852a-ef781f3c855f.description: The gerridae can’t be charmed or frightened while it has a rider.

attributes.description: The gerridae can’t be charmed or frightened while it has a rider.

7aee850d-f250-5766-8314-5a851a98e71e.name: Water Bound
7aee850d-f250-5766-8314-5a851a98e71e.description: For every hour the gerridae spends on dry land, its hp maximum is reduced by 2 (1d4).

attributes.description: For every hour the gerridae spends on dry land, its hp maximum is reduced by 2 (1d4).

1c54128e-47e4-5711-b90d-a0556e1d6b04.name: Water Walker
1c54128e-47e4-5711-b90d-a0556e1d6b04.description: The gerridae can move across the surface of water as if it were harmless, solid ground. This trait works like the water walk spell.

attributes.description: The gerridae can move across the surface of water as if it were harmless, solid ground. This trait works like the water walk spell.

761af07e-fa9e-5bd4-b463-dd1dfefc944f.name: Multiattack (Gerridae)
761af07e-fa9e-5bd4-b463-dd1dfefc944f.description: The gerridae makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

attributes.description: The gerridae makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

54c17cdf-907e-5b42-84d5-c1797464739f.name: Locked Saddle (Ghost Knight)
54c17cdf-907e-5b42-84d5-c1797464739f.description: The ghost knight can’t be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

attributes.description: The ghost knight can’t be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

d6d72f4c-c2ef-528f-86be-6e9b3ca53ff7.name: Mounted Warrior (Ghost Knight)
d6d72f4c-c2ef-528f-86be-6e9b3ca53ff7.description: The ghost knight is rarely seen without its warhorse skeleton mount. The warhorse skeleton wears custom barding that raises its Armor Class to 15, and it has immunity to necrotic damage. While the ghost knight is mounted, its mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

attributes.description: The ghost knight is rarely seen without its warhorse skeleton mount. The warhorse skeleton wears custom barding that raises its Armor Class to 15, and it has immunity to necrotic damage. While the ghost knight is mounted, its mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

9d0a73c6-de6d-514f-b4e7-6cc76086ad11.name: Necrotic Weapons (Ghost Knight)
9d0a73c6-de6d-514f-b4e7-6cc76086ad11.description: The ghost knight’s weapon attacks are magical. When the knight hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The ghost knight’s weapon attacks are magical. When the knight hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

a0bb11a9-ff35-5788-98e9-8bee70703b73.name: Spirited Charge
a0bb11a9-ff35-5788-98e9-8bee70703b73.description: If the ghost knight moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits with a Lance attack on the same turn, the ghost knight can use a bonus action to command its mount to make one melee weapon attack against that creature as a reaction.

attributes.description: If the ghost knight moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits with a Lance attack on the same turn, the ghost knight can use a bonus action to command its mount to make one melee weapon attack against that creature as a reaction.

32d487f3-e303-5de5-92c0-8690c5f0ed68.name: Turning Defiance (Ghost Knight)
32d487f3-e303-5de5-92c0-8690c5f0ed68.description: The ghost knight and any undead within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

attributes.description: The ghost knight and any undead within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

b79640d3-2c27-589a-b1a6-5548623b0fed.name: Undead Nature (Ghost Knight)
b79640d3-2c27-589a-b1a6-5548623b0fed.description: The ghost knight doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

867b3c11-a877-536c-a59c-a9fbe5e1f42c.name: Battleaxe (Ghost Knight)
867b3c11-a877-536c-a59c-a9fbe5e1f42c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

ad1a1b4c-dfaf-5f6f-8568-e243883baa0a.name: Lance (Ghost Knight)
ad1a1b4c-dfaf-5f6f-8568-e243883baa0a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

8e07b02d-4fce-5b14-a3cc-17a0c5ce0f65.name: Multiattack (Ghost Knight)
8e07b02d-4fce-5b14-a3cc-17a0c5ce0f65.description: The ghost knight makes three Battleaxe or Lance attacks. If the ghost knight is mounted, it can make two Battleaxe or Lance attacks, and its mount can make one melee weapon attack.

attributes.description: The ghost knight makes three Battleaxe or Lance attacks. If the ghost knight is mounted, it can make two Battleaxe or Lance attacks, and its mount can make one melee weapon attack.

e1f7004e-4be6-5a26-bab0-13c721bc33d8.name: Ghostly Body (Ghostwalk Form Only)
e1f7004e-4be6-5a26-bab0-13c721bc33d8.description: The ghostwalk spider has resistance to acid, cold, fire, lightning, and thunder damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks, and it has immunity to the grappled, paralyzed, petrified, and restrained conditions.

attributes.description: The ghostwalk spider has resistance to acid, cold, fire, lightning, and thunder damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks, and it has immunity to the grappled, paralyzed, petrified, and restrained conditions.

5661dc73-985f-56a9-baff-dec9eff2c2aa.name: Incorporeal Movement (Ghostwalk Form Only)
5661dc73-985f-56a9-baff-dec9eff2c2aa.description: The ghostwalk spider can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The ghostwalk spider can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

5b736982-1582-5b17-99f0-d5418b554e0d.name: Spider Climb (Ghostwalk Spider)
5b736982-1582-5b17-99f0-d5418b554e0d.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

726cab8a-8d3c-5446-9196-1c44bc39d8ef.name: Web Walker
726cab8a-8d3c-5446-9196-1c44bc39d8ef.description: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

attributes.description: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

1a76de73-78e0-5df1-89fd-523757584891.name: Bite (Ghostwalk Spider)
1a76de73-78e0-5df1-89fd-523757584891.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) piercing damage. If the ghostwalk spider is in its true form, the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 13 (3d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

If the ghostwalk spider is in its true form, the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 13 (3d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. 752c5a0a-8cfd-5734-8783-02f28bb3794d.name: Ghostly Snare
752c5a0a-8cfd-5734-8783-02f28bb3794d.description: (Ghostwalk Form Only) Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. Hit: The target is restrained by invisible webbing. While restrained in this way, the target is invisible. As an action, the restrained target can make a DC 15 Strength check, bursting the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 12; hp 15; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

c1da316c-394d-5e46-ab1e-e1edd486da06.name: Ghostwalk
c1da316c-394d-5e46-ab1e-e1edd486da06.description: The ghostwalk spider magically takes on a ghostly form or returns to its true, tangible form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying becomes ghostly with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

5bed799b-1f12-5085-91cd-33ccdcd9a085.description: The giant ant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

8a8e687c-3589-5f32-aa44-cc943973ecbc.description: The giant ant makes one Bite attack and one Sting attack.

5a33b13f-472d-5b03-b83c-7f1d689137de.name: Sting

2ab8e0a1-bc85-5482-95c5-4a27de673d10.name: Keen Smell (Giant Ant Queen)
2ab8e0a1-bc85-5482-95c5-4a27de673d10.description: The giant ant queen has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

b9d444c9-6886-58ca-bd70-77cd1d8b8aba.name: Queen’s Scent
b9d444c9-6886-58ca-bd70-77cd1d8b8aba.description: Giant ants within 30 feet of the queen have advantage on attack rolls against any creature that attacked the queen within the last minute.

18818ef4-4262-5901-a0a6-c561eeee2f2e.name: Bite (Giant Ant Queen)
18818ef4-4262-5901-a0a6-c561eeee2f2e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the giant ant queen can't Bite a different target.

82cfe791-0a6b-5750-8e0a-44e32d299e19.name: Multiattack (Giant Ant Queen)
82cfe791-0a6b-5750-8e0a-44e32d299e19.description: The giant ant queen makes two Bite attacks and one Sting attack.

0b4fff10-7428-5018-93cb-3624f50302f9.name: Sting (Giant Ant Queen)
0b4fff10-7428-5018-93cb-3624f50302f9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage. The target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

962bf632-d150-5e10-b25c-5587b8163148.name: Devil’s Sight (Gilded Devil)
962bf632-d150-5e10-b25c-5587b8163148.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the gilded devil’s darkvision.

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the gilded devil’s darkvision.

a99454c9-99a9-5ac7-8d4f-fd0535f3d576.name: Golden Flail
a99454c9-99a9-5ac7-8d4f-fd0535f3d576.description: The gilded devil’s Golden Flail attacks are magical. When the devil hits with the Golden Flail, the flail deals an extra 4d6 fire damage (included in the attack). In addition, the devil can transform the flail into gold jewelry or back into a weapon as a bonus action.

6dac006d-1ef1-576d-abe2-1a2c66b662a0.name: Liar’s Largesse
6dac006d-1ef1-576d-abe2-1a2c66b662a0.description: If a creature accepts a gift of jewelry from the gilded devil, the creature becomes cursed until cured by a remove curse spell or similar magic. While cursed, the creature has disadvantage on saving throws against the devil’s spells and abilities.

attributes.description: If a creature accepts a gift of jewelry from the gilded devil, the creature becomes cursed until cured by a remove curse spell or similar magic. While cursed, the creature has disadvantage on saving throws against the devil’s spells and abilities.

4d7d0e89-f27c-5d4e-b19f-743d32e6c5d9.name: Magic Resistance (Gilded Devil)
4d7d0e89-f27c-5d4e-b19f-743d32e6c5d9.description: The gilded devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The gilded devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

94311800-9237-58da-886e-e5951a06bd1a.name: Betrayal of Riches
94311800-9237-58da-886e-e5951a06bd1a.description: One creature wearing jewelry (an object made of precious material and worth at least 100 gp) the gilded devil can see within 60 feet of it must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 13 (3d8) bludgeoning damage and suffers an effect until it finishes a short rest. The effect is based on the location of the worn jewelry (devil's choice if worn in multiple locations): on upper limbs, its melee damage is halved; on lower limbs, its speed is halved; on head, it is blinded or deafened (devil's choice); on body, it has vulnerability to bludgeoning damage. On a success, the target takes half the damage and doesn't suffer an additional effect.

3d182af4-4a19-56e6-991c-da51bddd3336.name: Golden Flail
3d182af4-4a19-56e6-991c-da51bddd3336.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) fire damage.

505916e1-27de-5f95-9f74-65d2e93fd563.name: Hurl Flame (Gilded Devil)
505916e1-27de-5f95-9f74-65d2e93fd563.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) fire damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) fire damage.

f7fdd4e7-55a3-538d-a31a-8e97a884a653.name: Multiattack (Gilded Devil)
f7fdd4e7-55a3-538d-a31a-8e97a884a653.description: The gilded devil makes two Golden Flail attacks or three Hurl Flame attacks.

attributes.description: The gilded devil makes two Golden Flail attacks or three Hurl Flame attacks.

16d932d8-b2b7-5f0e-b554-7c058f3ceab2.name: Spellcasting (Gilded Devil)
16d932d8-b2b7-5f0e-b554-7c058f3ceab2.description:
The gilded devil casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** alter self, detect thoughts, suggestion
- **3/Day Each:** charm person, scrying

fe895ac5-b404-5a86-8fef-acb5cd3b1836.name: Teleport (Gilded Devil)
fe895ac5-b404-5a86-8fef-acb5cd3b1836.description: The gilded devil magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attributes.description: The gilded devil magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

3e5dd759-ada7-57ea-b3bd-687d1e0b3b37.name: Voracious Greed
3e5dd759-ada7-57ea-b3bd-687d1e0b3b37.description: The gilded devil magically consumes up to 1 cubic foot of nonmagical jewelry or coins made of precious material within 5 feet of it. It regains 5 hp for every 200 gp of the consumed objects' value. If the jewelry or coins are being worn or carried by a creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw to prevent the consumption.

It regains 5 hp for every 200 gp of the consumed objects' value. If the jewelry or coins are being worn or carried by a creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw to prevent the consumption.

e277fe2c-a8b1-5d37-a120-235b5afc812e.name: Amphibious (Glass Gator)
e277fe2c-a8b1-5d37-a120-235b5afc812e.description: The glass gator can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The glass gator can breathe air and water.

fcd6e788-3e19-5ce7-ae37-d0eaa16189d6.name: Constricting Lunge
fcd6e788-3e19-5ce7-ae37-d0eaa16189d6.description: If the glass gator jumps at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a Claw attack on the same turn, the target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the gator can make one Constrict attack against it as a bonus action.

c123c762-10bb-5ff5-ba88-befc58c9c091.name: Standing Leap (Glass Gator)
c123c762-10bb-5ff5-ba88-befc58c9c091.description: The glass gator’s long jump is up to 15 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

118b00bc-c939-5ab4-bea1-c0644e1c34e9.name: Transparent
118b00bc-c939-5ab4-bea1-c0644e1c34e9.description: The glass gator has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide while underwater or in dim light.

attributes.description: The glass gator has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide while underwater or in dim light.

423c13da-3ed8-547a-82b4-52fd532b8be0.name: Constrict
423c13da-3ed8-547a-82b4-52fd532b8be0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 5 (2d4) poison damage at the start of each of its turns, and the glass gator can't use Constrict on another target.

621b2cb3-78e6-5395-8dd1-5ef69128324a.name: Silt Cloud
621b2cb3-78e6-5395-8dd1-5ef69128324a.description: When it takes damage while underwater and within 5 feet of the bottom of a body of water, the glass gator stirs up a 10-foot-radius sphere of silt centered on it. The silt spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for 1 minute or until a strong current disperses it. The glass gator can then swim up to half its speed. The cloud of silt doesn't move with the glass gator.

ddff0498-444c-51a8-8483-ce83e49cf981.name: Construct Nature (Gnarljak)
ddff0498-444c-51a8-8483-ce83e49cf981.description: The gnarljak doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

83166484-1ddf-5918-87bf-d078df2f8e44.name: False Appearance (Gnarljak)
83166484-1ddf-5918-87bf-d078df2f8e44.description: While the gnarljak remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal bear trap.

attributes.description: While the gnarljak remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal bear trap.

7aa15710-f6bb-5b23-ad4c-06e6602b26c9.name: Chain Tail
7aa15710-f6bb-5b23-ad4c-06e6602b26c9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

1e5ad1f5-69ff-568f-b655-6782bdd4efaa.name: Gnawing Bite
1e5ad1f5-69ff-568f-b655-6782bdd4efaa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage, and the gnarljak attaches to the target. While attached, the gnarljak can't make Gnawing Bite attacks, and at the start of each of the gnarljak's turns, the target takes 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage.

ec4b50fa-cc02-5adb-98db-e264df0a0419.name: Multiattack (Gnarljak)
ec4b50fa-cc02-5adb-98db-e264df0a0419.description: The gnarljak makes one Gnawing Bite attack and two Chain Tail attacks, or it makes three Chain Tail attacks.

attributes.description: The gnarljak makes one Gnawing Bite attack and two Chain Tail attacks, or it makes three Chain Tail attacks.

6aad3530-6c00-5af2-a7fe-18bce181932e.name: Secure Tail
6aad3530-6c00-5af2-a7fe-18bce181932e.description: When within 10 feet of the ground, structure, wall, or other solid surface, the gnarljak can secure its tail spike on a point in the surface within 10 feet of it. While secured, the gnarljak can't be knocked prone, it can't move more than 10 feet from that point, and its Chain Tail attack's reach is reduced to 5 feet. If the gnarljak is attached to a creature while its tail is secured, the creature is restrained until the gnarljak is no longer attached to it.

84cd84e1-e6e7-53e5-8f5e-0a0d79f33751.name: Harrying Attacks
84cd84e1-e6e7-53e5-8f5e-0a0d79f33751.description: If the gnoll attacks more than one creature in the same turn, the first target has disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: If the gnoll attacks more than one creature in the same turn, the first target has disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

2422ed50-0a72-5c49-b703-802bf81c078b.name: Pack Tactics (Gnoll Havoc Runner)
2422ed50-0a72-5c49-b703-802bf81c078b.description: The gnoll has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the gnoll’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

5116051d-9b2a-562a-84f4-623468acf596.name: Battleaxe (Gnoll Havoc Runner)
5116051d-9b2a-562a-84f4-623468acf596.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.

c88f834d-f32b-574c-8ed7-5e3fa4109d0e.name: Lightning Lope
c88f834d-f32b-574c-8ed7-5e3fa4109d0e.description: The gnoll takes the Dash or Disengage action.

346eabc9-6129-55ef-8b8e-b818c85e19d5.name: Multiattack (Gnoll Havoc Runner)
346eabc9-6129-55ef-8b8e-b818c85e19d5.description: The gnoll makes one Bite attack and two Battleaxe attacks.

attributes.description: The gnoll makes one Bite attack and two Battleaxe attacks.

48f84f94-40ab-58ea-adec-ffe16cae2392.name: Charge
48f84f94-40ab-58ea-adec-ffe16cae2392.description: If the goat-man moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a Slam attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

b82c9a25-aafa-56e4-bb2e-24ca0a74e639.name: Bite (Goat-Man)
b82c9a25-aafa-56e4-bb2e-24ca0a74e639.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

c2c96e7b-8afa-5325-bc5f-f1f2d521145d.name: Multiattack (Goat-Man)
c2c96e7b-8afa-5325-bc5f-f1f2d521145d.description: The goat-man makes one Bite attack and two Slam attacks. If both Slam attacks hit the same target, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

fc8b71c1-eedb-5f55-bfd1-e6444e5f695d.name: Slam (Goat-Man)
fc8b71c1-eedb-5f55-bfd1-e6444e5f695d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

3739aa18-a4b5-5927-93d3-b4202aeb5a00.name: Thirst Aura
3739aa18-a4b5-5927-93d3-b4202aeb5a00.description: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the gray thirster must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the gray thirster’s Thirst Aura for the next 24 hours.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the gray thirster must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the gray thirster’s Thirst Aura for the next 24 hours.

4c51069e-f3a3-5412-a813-15ba6ef1c956.name: Thirsting Dead Nature
4c51069e-f3a3-5412-a813-15ba6ef1c956.description: The gray thirster doesn’t require air, food, or sleep.

attributes.description: The gray thirster doesn’t require air, food, or sleep.

f987708c-1cf6-583a-9363-14541f6ede36.name: Drought
f987708c-1cf6-583a-9363-14541f6ede36.description: The gray thirster draws the moisture from containers and creatures around it. Nonmagical water and other liquids within 20 feet of the thirster that aren't being worn or carried turn to dust. Each creature within 20 feet of the thirster that isn't a Construct or Undead must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage and up to 5 gallons of nonmagical liquid it is wearing or carrying turn to dust. On a success, a creature takes half the damage, and nonmagical liquids it is wearing or carrying don't turn to dust. Plants, Oozes, creatures with the Amphibious or Water Breathing trait, and creatures made mostly of water, such as water elementals or steam mephits, have disadvantage on the saving throw.

791febf5-89d1-53ba-8416-3e5f8b5db35f.description: The gray thirster makes two Claw attacks, or it makes one Claw attack and one Withering Turban attack.

f6bfc4d7-2e25-5ef0-a02d-3dde93cad5bb.name: Withering Turban
f6bfc4d7-2e25-5ef0-a02d-3dde93cad5bb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. The target has disadvantage on this saving throw if it failed the saving throw against the thirster's Thirst Aura. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest with no levels of exhaustion. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

716199d7-a1ba-549b-83f6-06d32c7ee448.name: Weight of Wings (Greater Death Butterfly Swarm)
716199d7-a1ba-549b-83f6-06d32c7ee448.description: A creature that starts its turn in the swarm’s space has its speed halved and must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or become blinded. Both effects end when the creature ends its turn outside the swarm’s space. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the blinding effect of Weight of Wings for the next 24 hours.

7e4ef88d-bbff-5162-ae4a-ba4540589617.name: Bites (Greater Death Butterfly Swarm)
7e4ef88d-bbff-5162-ae4a-ba4540589617.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) piercing damage, or 10 (3d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it takes 10 (3d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, it takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7f65ddcb-a9a8-5b52-90c8-1121d10cd699.name: Multiattack (Greater Death Butterfly Swarm)
7f65ddcb-a9a8-5b52-90c8-1121d10cd699.description: The swarm makes two Bites attacks.

attributes.description: The swarm makes two Bites attacks.

8a1251d8-ef1c-578b-8636-63a0dcf6e08e.name: Glide
8a1251d8-ef1c-578b-8636-63a0dcf6e08e.description: The lemurfolk has membranes between its fore and hind limbs that expand when falling to slow its rate of descent to 60 feet per round, landing on its feet and taking no falling damage. It can move up to 5 feet horizontally for every 1 foot it falls. The lemurfolk can’t gain height with its gliding membranes alone. If subjected to a strong wind or lift of any kind, it can use the updraft to glide farther.

e4731e98-1210-58c0-a287-17f09ff1a832.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) force damage.

25aacf57-c4ff-5839-9453-25be2249dafb.name: Greyfur's Staff
25aacf57-c4ff-5839-9453-25be2249dafb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) force damage.

68fd5ddf-fdd8-5b15-9c92-7ab0faa08725.description:
The greyfur casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):

- **At Will:** light, mage hand, prestidigitation
- **3/Day Each:** color spray, sleep

884f341c-b600-5385-84fd-17f8597434df.name: Last Laugh
884f341c-b600-5385-84fd-17f8597434df.description: Unless it is destroyed in a manner amusing to the god of death that created it, the grim jester gains a new body in 1d20 days, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. The new body appears in a place of the god’s choosing.

00ccae49-550e-5d09-8841-94309e006a48.name: Mock the Dying
00ccae49-550e-5d09-8841-94309e006a48.description: Death saving throws made within 60 feet of the grim jester have disadvantage.

attributes.description: Death saving throws made within 60 feet of the grim jester have disadvantage.

15cb04a0-2abd-555a-9ec7-f84425ec932d.name: Turn Resistance (Grim Jester)
15cb04a0-2abd-555a-9ec7-f84425ec932d.description: The grim jester has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

attributes.description: The grim jester has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

d732f58c-530a-5c09-84bd-aae331c5b67a.name: Undead Nature (Grim Jester)
d732f58c-530a-5c09-84bd-aae331c5b67a.description: The grim jester doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The grim jester doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

0164289b-ee12-5831-a29a-ec7e11f0a534.name: Joker's Shuffle
0164289b-ee12-5831-a29a-ec7e11f0a534.description: The grim jester exchanges locations with a Medium or smaller creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The jester and target each teleport to the other's space, and each becomes covered in a magical illusion to look and sound like the other. A creature must take an action to visually inspect an illusion and succeed on a DC 19 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern that the jester and target are disguised. The illusions last for 1 minute, until the jester dies, or until the jester dismisses them as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The grim jester exchanges locations with a Medium or smaller creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The jester and target each teleport to the other's space, and each becomes covered in a magical illusion to look and sound like the other. The illusions last for 1 minute, until the jester dies, or until the jester dismisses them as a bonus action.

8757829d-d7c2-5aee-8e58-dfa68024fc25.name: Killing Joke
8757829d-d7c2-5aee-8e58-dfa68024fc25.description: The grim jester tells an ancient, nihilistic joke to one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or fall prone in a fit of laughter, becoming incapacitated and unable to stand up for 1 minute. A creature that fails this saving throw by 5 or more is reduced to 0 hp instead. The incapacitated target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, taking 14 (4d6) necrotic damage on a failed save or ending the effect on itself on a success.

987c64fd-bf33-5766-bfb4-78e2308cf383.name: Necrotic Claw
987c64fd-bf33-5766-bfb4-78e2308cf383.description: Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage plus 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

d2595007-052e-5a40-aaf0-c9cfca6bc03d.name: Spellcasting (Grim Jester)
d2595007-052e-5a40-aaf0-c9cfca6bc03d.description:
The grim jester casts one of the following spells, requiring no components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** disguise self, grease
- **3/Day Each:** magic mouth (as an action), mirror image
- **1/Day Each:** mislead, seeming

0495e40f-e4cd-529d-bdd7-fb59f506e2eb.description: The shadow fey guardian has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put it to sleep.

attributes.description: The shadow fey guardian has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put it to sleep.

5aee4280-c7d2-58a5-83ea-d387b182a4de.name: Shadow’s Vigil
5aee4280-c7d2-58a5-83ea-d387b182a4de.description: The guardian has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks, and magical darkness doesn’t impede the guardian’s darkvision.

attributes.description: The guardian has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks, and magical darkness doesn’t impede the guardian’s darkvision.

ee7a9e8c-5fe7-5078-badc-3f47bf3fb89d.name: Javelin (Guardian)
ee7a9e8c-5fe7-5078-badc-3f47bf3fb89d.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.

adb5647e-eef0-5f09-8b79-78f79df13f98.name: Multiattack (Guardian)
adb5647e-eef0-5f09-8b79-78f79df13f98.description: The shadow fey guardian makes two Pike or Javelin attacks.

attributes.description: The shadow fey guardian makes two Pike or Javelin attacks.

135b219d-ca23-5f3b-821f-02c2078dcc01.name: Pike
135b219d-ca23-5f3b-821f-02c2078dcc01.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.

aab75613-b13b-51f1-b984-25949d1e3267.name: Protective Interference (Guardian)
aab75613-b13b-51f1-b984-25949d1e3267.description: When a friendly creature the shadow fey guardian can see within 5 feet of it is the target of an attack, the guardian can impose disadvantage on the attack roll. To do so, the guardian must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
