0a90d49a-1ff9-514c-b92a-dc8ed4edc941.name: Shadow Traveler (Guardian)
0a90d49a-1ff9-514c-b92a-dc8ed4edc941.description: While in shadows, dim light, or darkness, the shadow fey disappears into the darkness and reappears in an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet. A tendril of inky smoke appears at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

attributes.description: While in shadows, dim light, or darkness, the shadow fey disappears into the darkness and reappears in an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet. A tendril of inky smoke appears at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

2bf88e9f-c865-51aa-8a71-875fa5888c21.name: Towering Strength
2bf88e9f-c865-51aa-8a71-875fa5888c21.description: The gug is considered to be a Gargantuan giant for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

attributes.description: The gug is considered to be a Gargantuan giant for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

f2caec28-95b0-5245-8969-229931aefc88.name: Fling
f2caec28-95b0-5245-8969-229931aefc88.description: One Large or smaller object held or creature grappled by the gug is thrown up to 60 feet in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

abbbafeb-cb9d-5bbe-ab36-820e982f61ab.name: Grasping Claw
abbbafeb-cb9d-5bbe-ab36-820e982f61ab.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature. The gug has four Grasping Claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

c8c51f44-3c09-5469-98f5-d57bdf724326.name: Multiattack (Gug)
c8c51f44-3c09-5469-98f5-d57bdf724326.description: The gug makes two four Grasping Claw attacks, or it makes two Grasping Claw attacks and two Stomp attacks. It can replace one Grasping Claw attack with a use of Fling or Swallow.

attributes.description: The gug makes two four Grasping Claw attacks, or it makes two Grasping Claw attacks and two Stomp attacks. It can replace one Grasping Claw attack with a use of Fling or Swallow.

7e45876c-9a74-53aa-8034-6ffd14245e69.name: Stomp
7e45876c-9a74-53aa-8034-6ffd14245e69.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 20 (2d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 20 (2d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

6cd34358-00f8-5763-9c30-436787ac240a.name: Swallow
6cd34358-00f8-5763-9c30-436787ac240a.description: The gug makes one Grasping Claw attack against a Large or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the gug, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the gug's turns. A gug can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

c465672a-f0b7-504b-8225-15597959b61a.name: Death Sense
c465672a-f0b7-504b-8225-15597959b61a.description: The sphinx can pinpoint, by scent, the location of each creature below half its hp maximum within 60 feet of it, and it can sense the general direction of creatures that don’t have all of their hp within 1 mile of it. In addition, the sphinx can foretell the age and manner of a creature’s death by looking at it. This effect doesn’t take into account possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of powerful spells or the creature making a radical change in its life’s path.

This effect doesn’t take into account possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of powerful spells or the creature making a radical change in its life’s path.

587003ad-3ba0-56b1-a49b-94e519f0e1c5.name: Inscrutable
587003ad-3ba0-56b1-a49b-94e519f0e1c5.description: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx’s intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

5f0c0e23-8cfa-5657-9ac4-09bbb4945287.name: Magic Weapons (Gypsosphinx)
5f0c0e23-8cfa-5657-9ac4-09bbb4945287.description: The sphinx’s weapon attacks are magical.

attributes.description: The sphinx’s weapon attacks are magical.

aacc8b27-8dc7-57f7-9e1f-1379a82e1c6b.name: Beak (Gypsosphinx)
aacc8b27-8dc7-57f7-9e1f-1379a82e1c6b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.

d012a464-9532-50ab-bea1-65ef93ce14ca.name: Beak Attack
d012a464-9532-50ab-bea1-65ef93ce14ca.description: The sphinx makes one Beak attack.

attributes.description: The sphinx makes one Beak attack.

60722a1b-c7f1-5162-b9b5-90b2df7df15a.name: Carrion Breath
60722a1b-c7f1-5162-b9b5-90b2df7df15a.description: The gypsosphinx exhales rotting breath in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) poison damage and 27 (6d8) necrotic damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. While poisoned in this way, a creature has disadvantage on death saving throws. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

ebe19fdc-11ee-525a-b385-d756d65d8c16.name: Claw (Gypsosphinx)
ebe19fdc-11ee-525a-b385-d756d65d8c16.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) slashing damage.

406ce109-bd1b-57d8-bd39-ffb287b3b063.name: Multiattack (Gypsosphinx)
406ce109-bd1b-57d8-bd39-ffb287b3b063.description: The sphinx makes one Beak attack and two Claw attacks. If both Claw attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or take 14 (4d6) slashing damage and be knocked prone.

dd3acd3a-b0c7-579d-ae59-36cbc047b9e2.name: Spellcasting (Gypsosphinx)
dd3acd3a-b0c7-579d-ae59-36cbc047b9e2.description:
The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** comprehend languages, detect magic, mage hand
- **3/Day Each:** blur, dispel magic, locate object
- **1/Day Each:** major image, greater invisibility

78810202-e5ae-5788-b2cd-63b54ba06dfc.name: Teleport (Gypsosphinx)
78810202-e5ae-5788-b2cd-63b54ba06dfc.description: The sphinx magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attributes.description: The sphinx magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

b05b3c3c-a2b3-50f3-81bc-16436fe7a818.name: Incorporeal Movement (Haugbui)
b05b3c3c-a2b3-50f3-81bc-16436fe7a818.description: The haugbui can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The haugbui can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

e4e281b1-ace0-578a-a2c1-5863445cad85.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Haugbui)
e4e281b1-ace0-578a-a2c1-5863445cad85.description: While in sunlight, the haugbui has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the haugbui has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

908e5a97-7b18-57a3-a920-8545548bae51.name: Turn Resistance (Haugbui)
908e5a97-7b18-57a3-a920-8545548bae51.description: The haugbui has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

attributes.description: The haugbui has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

ed98b888-06ca-5de3-9c19-a9b58c3ff1eb.name: Undead Nature (Haugbui)
ed98b888-06ca-5de3-9c19-a9b58c3ff1eb.description: The hangbui doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The hangbui doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

650f3d26-1565-53f8-85dc-cde87bef9082.name: Invisibility (Haugbui)
650f3d26-1565-53f8-85dc-cde87bef9082.description: The haugbui magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the haugbui wears or carries is invisible with it.

attributes.description: The haugbui magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the haugbui wears or carries is invisible with it.

3c97fafa-fe98-53fb-9e98-b3ab51bf62ec.name: Multiattack (Haugbui)
3c97fafa-fe98-53fb-9e98-b3ab51bf62ec.description: The haugbui makes three Psychic Blast attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

attributes.description: The haugbui makes three Psychic Blast attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

8fba1156-ec60-52d3-a192-4ee1db90139c.name: Psychic Blast
8fba1156-ec60-52d3-a192-4ee1db90139c.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) psychic damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) psychic damage.

4c932c6d-d15d-59e8-8bc8-a91f625b0ff9.name: Sepulchral Scrying
4c932c6d-d15d-59e8-8bc8-a91f625b0ff9.description: While within 1 mile of its burial mound, the haugbui creates an invisible sensor within 5 miles of the mound for 1 minute. When it uses this bonus action and as a bonus action on each of its turns for the duration, the haugbui can switch between using its own senses and projecting its senses through the sensor. While projecting its senses through the sensor, it can see, hear, telepathically communicate, and cast spells as if it was in the sensor's space, and it is blinded and deafened with regard to its own senses. The sensor can be dispelled (DC 14).

a1ec61be-feba-595a-8b99-dc846307699a.name: Spellcasting (Haugbui)
a1ec61be-feba-595a-8b99-dc846307699a.description:
The haugbui casts one of the following spells, requiring no components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):

- **At Will:** dancing lights, mending, purify food and drink, spare the dying
- **3/Day Each:** gust of wind, telekinesis
- **1/Day Each:** dispel magic, remove curse

3d008606-7f63-5da1-bd50-c3bdad147dac.name: Blood Armor
3d008606-7f63-5da1-bd50-c3bdad147dac.description: Each time a creature with blood hits the herald with a melee attack while within 10 feet of the herald, the creature takes 4 (1d8) necrotic damage, and the herald’s AC increases by 1 until the end of its next turn. The herald’s AC can’t be increased to more than 20 from this trait.

attributes.description: Each time a creature with blood hits the herald with a melee attack while within 10 feet of the herald, the creature takes 4 (1d8) necrotic damage, and the herald’s AC increases by 1 until the end of its next turn. The herald’s AC can’t be increased to more than 20 from this trait.

b48dcbdd-bd39-57a2-963a-f46000237cd5.name: Blood Bolt (Herald of Blood)
b48dcbdd-bd39-57a2-963a-f46000237cd5.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (5d8 + 3) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature with blood, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (5d8 + 3) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature with blood, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

e991e7ab-1db2-548c-a58d-66599ef69b0e.name: Call Blood
e991e7ab-1db2-548c-a58d-66599ef69b0e.description: Each creature with blood within 10 feet of the herald must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The herald then gains temporary hp equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more also suffers one level of exhaustion.

attributes.description: Each creature with blood within 10 feet of the herald must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The herald then gains temporary hp equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more also suffers one level of exhaustion.

06614d8c-34b1-54cf-bf6a-e21d03407b8e.name: Grant Blood Rage
06614d8c-34b1-54cf-bf6a-e21d03407b8e.description: The herald of blood infuses reckless rage in one creature it can see within 60 feet of it that isn't a Construct or Undead. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be enraged for a number of rounds equal to the target's Constitution modifier. While enraged, the target has advantage on all melee attack rolls, and attack rolls against it have advantage. When the rage ends, the target takes 13 (3d8) necrotic damage and suffers one level of exhaustion. A creature with any levels of exhaustion automatically succeeds on this saving throw.

98f670b3-4b92-5beb-bf2f-c245719003d0.name: Grasping Slam
98f670b3-4b92-5beb-bf2f-c245719003d0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns, and the herald can't use its Grasping Slam on another target.

1eb4d1c0-be71-5448-8f67-2746fc2ca814.name: Multiattack (Herald of Blood)
1eb4d1c0-be71-5448-8f67-2746fc2ca814.description: The herald makes three Herald's Staff or Blood Bolt attacks, or it makes two Herald's Staff attacks and one Grasping Slam attack.

attributes.description: The herald makes three Herald's Staff or Blood Bolt attacks, or it makes two Herald's Staff attacks and one Grasping Slam attack.

b0ee6f95-05ae-5003-88d2-36d06c2cc989.name: Made of Shadows (Shadow Form Only)
b0ee6f95-05ae-5003-88d2-36d06c2cc989.description: The herald of darkness has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage and can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. In addition, it can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

947d5fba-8b2c-5848-b3c9-45771ade50d7.name: Shadow’s Sight
947d5fba-8b2c-5848-b3c9-45771ade50d7.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the herald’s darkvision.

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the herald’s darkvision.

ad0789eb-1612-529e-8f28-81ce4240205e.name: Embrace Darkness
ad0789eb-1612-529e-8f28-81ce4240205e.description: Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the herald's space. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the herald's space. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn.

fa8644a4-7597-5c05-8675-ada790dfc671.name: Majesty of the Abyss
fa8644a4-7597-5c05-8675-ada790dfc671.description: The herald of darkness emits a sinister burst of infernal power. Each creature within 15 feet of the herald and that can see it must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 27 (6d8) necrotic damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is also paralyzed until the end of its next turn. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

c7919f3e-05a1-5f5c-a845-07ac77350c98.name: Multiattack (Herald of Darkness)
c7919f3e-05a1-5f5c-a845-07ac77350c98.description: The herald of darkness makes two Embrace Darkness or Shadow Sword attacks.

c1bf3029-a5ac-571f-a139-29bc237e2253.name: Shadow Shape
c1bf3029-a5ac-571f-a139-29bc237e2253.description: The herald magically transforms into a Large shadow or back into its true form, which is a Fiend. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

d88217fc-5f76-5ab6-85e0-30abaf7c35db.name: Enchanted Weapons (Hoard Golem)
d88217fc-5f76-5ab6-85e0-30abaf7c35db.description: The golem’s weapon attacks are magical. When the golem hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4d8 force damage (included in the attack).

8beb1c0c-d175-58ef-9c5c-ad6ceff3abf4.name: Strike with Awe
8beb1c0c-d175-58ef-9c5c-ad6ceff3abf4.description: A creature that enters a space within 120 feet of the hoard golem or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks while it remains within 120 feet of the golem.

e4e9eb7b-1909-557a-9e23-d5ff06817fe8.name: Multiattack (Hoard Golem)
e4e9eb7b-1909-557a-9e23-d5ff06817fe8.description: The hoard golem makes two Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The hoard golem makes two Slam attacks.

398c5571-a3ce-53f8-8e04-8d83be064df3.name: Slam (Hoard Golem)
398c5571-a3ce-53f8-8e04-8d83be064df3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) force damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) force damage.

52206995-9012-55d7-b588-80fe8d3ed49a.name: Thieving Whirlwind
52206995-9012-55d7-b588-80fe8d3ed49a.description: The hoard golem partially disperses into a whirlwind of coins, gemstones, and other valuables then recoalesces. Each creature within 20 feet of the golem must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 44 (8d10) bludgeoning damage and loses one object it is wearing or carrying. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't lose an object. Each object the golem steals must weigh no more than 20 pounds and not be wrapped around or firmly attached to a creature. For example, the golem could steal a belt pouch full of coins or a creature's jewel-encrusted dagger, but it can't steal a creature's shirt or armor. The hoard golem steals objects of high value over those of minimal value. The stolen object becomes part of the golem's body and can't be retrieved until the golem dies.

61dd43e1-1404-520a-a402-b106d732f7be.name: Implant Egg
61dd43e1-1404-520a-a402-b106d732f7be.description: If the horakh reduces a creature to 0 hp with a Bite attack or as a bonus action while within 5 feet of a creature with 0 hp, the horakh can implant an egg in the creature. The implanted egg rests in the creature’s eye socket for 14 days while it incubates. A host creature can carry only one horakh egg to term at a time. While the egg is implanted, the host can’t use its eye and has disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. Exactly 24 hours before the egg hatches, the host becomes blinded. When the egg hatches, the young horakh erupts from the host’s head, killing the host in the process.

523d1f13-a401-5edd-accd-d8b7deec9825.name: Standing Leap (Horakh)
523d1f13-a401-5edd-accd-d8b7deec9825.description: The horakh’s long jump is up to 30 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

9e66b9b7-5e8e-54d5-9a09-0b800bd364fa.name: Bite (Horakh)
9e66b9b7-5e8e-54d5-9a09-0b800bd364fa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) piercing damage. If the horakh scores a critical hit, it removes one of the target's eyes, provided the target has eyes, and places the eye in a fluid sac on its thorax. While missing half or less of its total number of eyes, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. While missing more than half its total number of eyes, the target is blinded until its sight is restored.

06a2352f-e2c4-510c-9ff5-6ff3c534f071.description: While in dim light or darkness, the horakh takes the Hide action.

3ed8e00f-f7a8-5522-b310-6b78988a5166.name: Fey Scent
3ed8e00f-f7a8-5522-b310-6b78988a5166.description: The hound of the night has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell. If it is tracking a Fey, Giant, or Humanoid whose scent it knows, the hound can continue tracking that creature if the creature moves into the Border Ethereal or teleports, provided the creature isn’t in the Border Ethereal for more than 1 minute or that the creature doesn’t teleport more than 100 feet at a time.

74a41abb-1fae-5605-9180-9bf5c41ff4c3.description: The hound exhales frost in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 27 (6d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

4b3fe5ff-92ac-5436-8ba0-a5e612a6a938.description: The hound magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Before or after teleporting, the hound can make one Bite attack.

76d07e85-25a9-505f-8f3e-b4a18972f71a.name: Influence Weather
76d07e85-25a9-505f-8f3e-b4a18972f71a.description: Nearby weather responds to Hraesvelgr’s desires. At the start of each minute, Hraesvelgr can choose to change the precipitation and wind within 3 miles of him by one stage, up or down (no action required). This effect works like the changing weather conditions aspect of the control weather spell, except Hraesvelgr can’t change the temperature and the conditions change immediately.

873fa0f9-5767-5457-b3a5-f31038dc7360.description: Hraesvelgr makes one Beak attack and two Talon attacks, or he makes three Fist attacks. Alternatively, he can make three Gale Blast attacks. If two Fist attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

6cffa1d9-2e46-561b-a2f2-d2df382a9d85.name: Sudden Gust
6cffa1d9-2e46-561b-a2f2-d2df382a9d85.description: Hraesvelgr unleashes a powerful gust of wind in a 60-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 63 (18d6) bludgeoning damage and is pushed up to 15 feet away from Hraesvelgr. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed.

d68e45af-4625-5aee-8a89-7bd68c4593b1.name: Swallow (Hraesvelgr)
d68e45af-4625-5aee-8a89-7bd68c4593b1.description: Hraesvelgr makes one Beak attack against a Large or smaller creature he is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside Hraesvelgr, and it takes 17 (5d6) acid damage at the start of each of Hraesvelgr's turns. Hraesvelgr can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

0df326a6-83af-5104-8e88-d486288c3e85.name: Frightened Anger (Hulking Form Only)
0df326a6-83af-5104-8e88-d486288c3e85.description: The hulking whelp has disadvantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects that reduce strong emotions, such as the calm emotions spell.

attributes.description: The hulking whelp has disadvantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects that reduce strong emotions, such as the calm emotions spell.

a317cd88-0dd7-5cc8-a11c-c416121c00f3.name: Pacify (Hulking Form Only)
a317cd88-0dd7-5cc8-a11c-c416121c00f3.description: A friendly creature that has interacted peacefully with the hulking whelp in its whelp form can try to calm it by speaking firmly and persuasively. The hulking whelp must be able to hear the creature, who must take an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check. If the check succeeds, the hulking whelp transforms back into its whelp form on its next turn and stops attacking. If the hulking whelp takes damage before then, it remains in its hulking form and continues attacking.

The hulking whelp must be able to hear the creature, who must take an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check. If the check succeeds, the hulking whelp transforms back into its whelp form on its next turn and stops attacking. If the hulking whelp takes damage before then, it remains in its hulking form and continues attacking.

307f60c8-0871-560d-9c35-e1f5b8c31746.name: Unleashed Emotion (Hulking Form Only)
307f60c8-0871-560d-9c35-e1f5b8c31746.description: On each of the hulking whelp’s turns, it attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the hulking whelp attacks an object, with preference for an object smaller than itself. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack for two turns in a row, the hulking whelp uses Change Shape to return to its whelp form and stops attacking.

If no creature is near enough to move to and attack for two turns in a row, the hulking whelp uses Change Shape to return to its whelp form and stops attacking.

23027b85-b7f7-563d-b8fa-d6b8315e7831.name: Change Shape (Hulking Whelp)
23027b85-b7f7-563d-b8fa-d6b8315e7831.description: The hulking whelp transforms into a Huge, hulking canine or back into its true whelp form, which is Fey. Its statistics, other than its size and creature type, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

907804b1-9b42-5341-b46e-871c4f46c397.name: Defensive Transformation
907804b1-9b42-5341-b46e-871c4f46c397.description: When the hulking whelp is hit with an attack or when a creature it can see or hear within 30 feet of it threatens to harm it, it must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or transform into its hulking canine form (see the Change Shape bonus action).

29933841-358c-55e7-bf35-54aeda415912.name: Multiattack (Hulking Whelp)
29933841-358c-55e7-bf35-54aeda415912.description: The hulking whelp makes two Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The hulking whelp makes two Slam attacks.

b3af260e-c5ad-516a-840b-c5f118faba8c.name: Slam (Hulking Whelp)
b3af260e-c5ad-516a-840b-c5f118faba8c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

2f1d4450-aa75-5b8b-8f4c-f45618ef76e8.name: Inscrutable (Hundun)
2f1d4450-aa75-5b8b-8f4c-f45618ef76e8.description: The hundun is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the hundun’s intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

f26852ac-72a7-551b-ae35-27ab8b7025a9.name: Magic Resistance (Hundun)
f26852ac-72a7-551b-ae35-27ab8b7025a9.description: The hundun has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The hundun has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

faab4056-beb4-5e59-bc56-fa2bb3937ec0.name: Radiant Fists
faab4056-beb4-5e59-bc56-fa2bb3937ec0.description: The hundun’s Slam attacks are magical. When the hundun hits with a Slam attack, the attack deals an extra 2d6 radiant damage (included in the attack).

2795f26e-a365-5f7f-9e3c-f9b0668c46da.name: Motivating Babble
2795f26e-a365-5f7f-9e3c-f9b0668c46da.description: The hundun babbles incoherently at one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or suffer one of the following effects until the end of its next turn. Roll a d4 to determine which effect happens.

eb0fbfff-f179-5152-8612-4c64a25972f0.name: Multiattack (Hundun)
eb0fbfff-f179-5152-8612-4c64a25972f0.description: The hundun can use its Motivating Babble. It then makes four Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The hundun can use its Motivating Babble. It then makes four Slam attacks.

986935a3-9823-5721-92a1-8de127e818cc.name: Slam (Hundun)
986935a3-9823-5721-92a1-8de127e818cc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) radiant damage.

c1a344d1-38e5-5229-9056-ddf8435855d9.name: Spellcasting (Hundun)
c1a344d1-38e5-5229-9056-ddf8435855d9.description:
The hundun casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** create or destroy water, dancing lights, minor illusion, prestidigitation
- **3/Day Each:** black tentacles, fabricate (as an action), irresistible dance
- **1/Day Each:** creation (as an action), plant growth

bcdc0838-9b9b-5876-b96f-67dc45f4563b.name: Collective Mind (Ia'Affrat)
bcdc0838-9b9b-5876-b96f-67dc45f4563b.description: Ia’Affrat’s individual Fiends are connected via a hive mind. He can telepathically communicate with any of his individual Fiends within 50 miles of him, and he can’t be surprised. If he is reduced to half his hp or lower, his Intelligence score is reduced to 10, he immediately changes into his shapeless form, and he can’t take on a Humanoid form again until he regains hp to be above half his hp or he finishes a long rest.

1616a357-7fef-5152-9c7f-2a753535eeac.name: Devil’s Sight (Ia'Affrat)
1616a357-7fef-5152-9c7f-2a753535eeac.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede Ia’Affrat’s darkvision.

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede Ia’Affrat’s darkvision.

2bdefda9-1c52-5753-867f-6d63c5d4e83e.name: Grasping Limbs (Humanoid Form Only) (Ia'Affrat)
2bdefda9-1c52-5753-867f-6d63c5d4e83e.description: Ia’Affrat can wield weapons and hold, grasp, push, pull, or interact with objects that might otherwise require a more Humanoid form to accomplish.

attributes.description: Ia’Affrat can wield weapons and hold, grasp, push, pull, or interact with objects that might otherwise require a more Humanoid form to accomplish.

5dd1beac-22db-5bfc-9a25-5d7c6fb4c8a2.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Ia'Affrat)
5dd1beac-22db-5bfc-9a25-5d7c6fb4c8a2.description: If Ia’Affrat fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If Ia’Affrat fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

99b7b8b1-86e1-5b7c-8e2d-35dfc69abf92.name: Magic Resistance (Ia'Affrat)
99b7b8b1-86e1-5b7c-8e2d-35dfc69abf92.description: Ia’Affrat has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: Ia’Affrat has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

6e3f112b-9894-519b-a237-4a15c89553be.name: Smoke Shroud
6e3f112b-9894-519b-a237-4a15c89553be.description: Ia’Affrat emits a cloud of dark smoke within 5 feet of himself. The area is lightly obscured to all except Ia’Affrat, and each non-devil creature that starts its turn in the smoke must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its turn. At the start of each of his turns, Ia’Affrat chooses whether this shroud is active.

d5244390-a989-5241-9af6-88b9aa679b9b.name: Swarm (Shapeless Form Only) (Ia'Affrat)
d5244390-a989-5241-9af6-88b9aa679b9b.description: Ia’Affrat can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect, but he can’t grapple or be grappled.

attributes.description: Ia’Affrat can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect, but he can’t grapple or be grappled.

ed08964f-c49c-5bc6-add8-00a9be884967.name: Bite (Ia'Affrat)
ed08964f-c49c-5bc6-add8-00a9be884967.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage, or 10 (3d6) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage if Ia'Affrat has half of its hp or fewer. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

92534273-8683-57a5-bc7d-286fd37b83e2.name: Burning Claw
92534273-8683-57a5-bc7d-286fd37b83e2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) fire damage.

f29008e8-9b2b-54a6-b78f-0b4bf3d20686.name: Consume Host
f29008e8-9b2b-54a6-b78f-0b4bf3d20686.description: While inhabiting a Humanoid, Ia'Affrat consumes the host from the inside. The host takes 18 (4d8) necrotic damage, and Ia'Affrat regains hp equal to that amount.

attributes.description: While inhabiting a Humanoid, Ia'Affrat consumes the host from the inside. The host takes 18 (4d8) necrotic damage, and Ia'Affrat regains hp equal to that amount.

851cfa62-574b-51ea-9831-a19713c4c717.name: Flaming Insect Bolt
851cfa62-574b-51ea-9831-a19713c4c717.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +11 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d6 + 6) fire damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +11 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d6 + 6) fire damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

09dbcbeb-bf7b-5f4f-8336-ce06af84253f.name: Inhabit
09dbcbeb-bf7b-5f4f-8336-ce06af84253f.description: Ia'Affrat crawls into the body of a Humanoid, or a Humanoid corpse that has been dead no more than 7 days, that he can see within 5 feet of him. If the target is unwilling, the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or the target loses control of its body, and Ia'Affrat takes control of the body. Ia'Affrat controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. Ia'Affrat can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, and he retains his alignment, his Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores, his Hurl Flame action and Teleport and Consume Host legendary actions, and his condition immunities. He otherwise uses the target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies. If the target was a Humanoid corpse, he uses the statistics it had before it died.

4b1409c8-9516-5b14-bd4b-22b5e99d14e3.name: Teleport (Ia'Affrat)
4b1409c8-9516-5b14-bd4b-22b5e99d14e3.description: Ia'Affrat teleports, along with any equipment he is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space he can see.

attributes.description: Ia'Affrat teleports, along with any equipment he is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space he can see.

51136ee3-485b-516a-8f7d-f3d5ad0ec80d.name: Vermin Breath
51136ee3-485b-516a-8f7d-f3d5ad0ec80d.description: Ia'Affrat exhales 1d4 swarms of insects in spaces he can see within 30 feet. The swarms take their turns immediately after Ia'Affrat, and they are allies of Ia'Affrat, obeying his telepathic commands. They remain for 1 minute, until Ia'Affrat dies, or until Ia'Affrat dismisses them as a bonus action. Ia'Affrat can have no more than five swarms of insects under his control at a time.

799e81d6-1992-5136-b8e7-1df87b66df6f.name: Multiattack (Ia'Affrat)
799e81d6-1992-5136-b8e7-1df87b66df6f.description: Ia'Affrat makes three Bite or Burning Claw attacks, or he makes four Flaming Insect Bolt attacks.

attributes.description: Ia'Affrat makes three Bite or Burning Claw attacks, or he makes four Flaming Insect Bolt attacks.

dec400f8-398a-55d4-afb1-f49a047bf7ee.name: Shape Swarm (Ia'Affrat)
dec400f8-398a-55d4-afb1-f49a047bf7ee.description: Ia'Affrat can shape himself into a Large or smaller Humanoid or back into a shapeless mass of Tiny insectoid Fiends. His statistics, other than his size, are the same in each form, and he can't regain hp or gain temporary hp, except for the Consume Host legendary action. He can't take on a Humanoid form if he is occupying the space of another creature.

190bf7f0-f4c5-5e99-a205-ee49f08b81a6.name: Chilling Presence
190bf7f0-f4c5-5e99-a205-ee49f08b81a6.description: A creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the ice maiden must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or take 3 (1d6) cold damage. Unprotected, nonmagical flames within 15 feet of the maiden are extinguished, and water freezes if it remains within 15 feet of the maiden for at least 1 minute.

4d03b7dd-63bb-5788-973a-78f884b6a135.name: Ice Walk
4d03b7dd-63bb-5788-973a-78f884b6a135.description: The ice maiden can move across icy and snowy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost her extra movement.

attributes.description: The ice maiden can move across icy and snowy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost her extra movement.

5d64d6f0-d996-55b6-a062-7445f1861d95.name: Magic Resistance (Ice Maiden)
5d64d6f0-d996-55b6-a062-7445f1861d95.description: The ice maiden has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ice maiden has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

1e711152-0ab0-5451-be2a-45031f71a5c0.name: Snow Sight
1e711152-0ab0-5451-be2a-45031f71a5c0.description: The ice maiden can see through areas obscured by snow or fog without penalty.

attributes.description: The ice maiden can see through areas obscured by snow or fog without penalty.

fdf0de6f-3aa9-5c84-a3cd-e83b84bc2628.name: Ice Blade
fdf0de6f-3aa9-5c84-a3cd-e83b84bc2628.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage plus 14 (4d6) cold damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage plus 14 (4d6) cold damage.

3ff1b13c-f05e-5438-9e50-3a181575c7ea.name: Ice Bolt
3ff1b13c-f05e-5438-9e50-3a181575c7ea.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) cold damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) cold damage.

eaf5fe92-b7e2-5aac-81ec-0ae1ceb1600f.name: Icy Embrace
eaf5fe92-b7e2-5aac-81ec-0ae1ceb1600f.description: The ice maiden blasts wintry weather on a point she can see within 60 feet of her. Each creature within 15 feet of that point must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 28 (8d6) cold damage and is restrained by ice until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained. The area then becomes icy, difficult terrain for 1 minute.

attributes.description: The ice maiden blasts wintry weather on a point she can see within 60 feet of her. Each creature within 15 feet of that point must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 28 (8d6) cold damage and is restrained by ice until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained. The area then becomes icy, difficult terrain for 1 minute.

d4c406a2-03d2-51a4-bfce-391094caa992.name: Kiss of the Frozen Heart
d4c406a2-03d2-51a4-bfce-391094caa992.description: The ice maiden kisses a willing Humanoid, freezing the target's heart. The target has immunity to cold damage, but it is charmed by the ice maiden until the maiden ends the effect (no action required) or until the target is kissed by a creature that loves it. The charmed target obeys the maiden's verbal commands. If the target suffers any harm from the maiden or her allies, or if it receives a suicidal command, it can make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. The maiden can have no more than three Humanoids charmed at a time.

ba976502-1797-5b70-8587-9983094609ee.name: Multiattack (Ice Maiden)
ba976502-1797-5b70-8587-9983094609ee.description: The ice maiden makes two Ice Blade or Ice Bolt attacks.

attributes.description: The ice maiden makes two Ice Blade or Ice Bolt attacks.

b54c3542-539e-5ce8-aa07-091980cd92d2.name: Snow Step
b54c3542-539e-5ce8-aa07-091980cd92d2.description: The ice maiden teleports, along with any equipment she is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space she can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain snow or ice.

attributes.description: The ice maiden teleports, along with any equipment she is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space she can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain snow or ice.

0c0dde58-de2b-5fa3-bd6e-fc94dcce8283.name: Apostasy Aura
0c0dde58-de2b-5fa3-bd6e-fc94dcce8283.description: The idolic deity’s presence causes devout followers to doubt their faith. When a creature attempts to use divine or celestial power, such as a cleric casting a spell or a paladin using Divine Smite, it must make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the spell, class feature, or other divine or celestial power is expended, but it has no effect.

640664fb-95fe-5f30-9350-5e88fc64b3dd.name: Construct Nature (Idolic Deity)
640664fb-95fe-5f30-9350-5e88fc64b3dd.description: The idolic deity doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

0f532979-82cc-58f1-905d-cbbf447e9a9a.name: False Appearance (Idolic Deity)
0f532979-82cc-58f1-905d-cbbf447e9a9a.description: While the idolic deity remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal statue.

attributes.description: While the idolic deity remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal statue.

051d8f2b-6415-5bda-99f7-5b076dae2443.name: Incorporeal Movement (Idolic Deity)
051d8f2b-6415-5bda-99f7-5b076dae2443.description: The idolic deity can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The idolic deity can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

29bae8be-0797-50bd-a167-60e030082fc4.name: Multiattack (Idolic Deity)
29bae8be-0797-50bd-a167-60e030082fc4.description: The idolic deity can use its Seduce the Righteous. It then makes two Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The idolic deity can use its Seduce the Righteous. It then makes two Slam attacks.

328bb972-61e3-5bf0-b098-bac3ffd44eb4.name: Seduce the Righteous
328bb972-61e3-5bf0-b098-bac3ffd44eb4.description: The idolic deity corrupts one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, or saving throws (the idolic deity's choice) until the end of its next turn. Creatures that wield divine or celestial power, such as clerics, paladins, or aasimars, have disadvantage on the saving throw.

1aad388d-5d25-58c9-8a85-dac5adf3046d.name: Shadow Stealth (Idolic Deity)
1aad388d-5d25-58c9-8a85-dac5adf3046d.description: While in dim light or darkness, the idolic deity takes the Hide action.

8afba88c-a3a6-539b-ad1a-5b86afe97132.name: Slam (Idolic Deity)

962d5d6f-f700-5f99-9e55-8e6da7ca55c5.name: Turning Defiance (Imperial Ghoul)
962d5d6f-f700-5f99-9e55-8e6da7ca55c5.description: The ghoul and any ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn Undead.

attributes.description: The ghoul and any ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn Undead.

ac7fad29-9c16-5d50-b3d1-2a096285f402.name: Claw (Imperial Ghoul)
ac7fad29-9c16-5d50-b3d1-2a096285f402.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach, one target. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an elf or Undead, it must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

1111a4ee-fee8-5579-b5bb-6007d44501e7.name: Corrupt Scroll
1111a4ee-fee8-5579-b5bb-6007d44501e7.description: The ink devil touches a scroll, corrupting it. A creature using the scroll must succeed a DC 13 Intelligence saving throw or the spell harms the caster (if an offensive spell), helps the nearest devil (if beneficial), or fails, consuming the scroll (if not offensive or if no devils are in range to benefit from the magic).

0483a5f2-0ba3-5241-875c-e860c7218226.name: Devil's Ink
0483a5f2-0ba3-5241-875c-e860c7218226.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be marked with a small, fiendish tattoo for 24 hours. Devils have advantage on attack rolls against the marked target, and the target has disadvantage on saving throws against the spells and abilities of devils.

a8b8f79e-83a0-5e7e-aaea-cbdb55937ca6.name: Invisibility (Ink Devil)
a8b8f79e-83a0-5e7e-aaea-cbdb55937ca6.description: The ink devil magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Disrupt Concentration, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the ink devil wears or carries is invisible with it.

- **At Will:** detect magic, illusory script (as an action)
1/day: glyph of warding

b24fc71e-e758-5133-9c66-cf63f702410b.name: Influence Weather (Isonade)
b24fc71e-e758-5133-9c66-cf63f702410b.description: Nearby weather responds to the isonade’s desires. At the start of each minute, the isonade can choose to change the precipitation and wind within 1 mile of it by one stage, up or down (no action required). This effect works like the changing weather conditions aspect of the control weather spell, except the isonade can’t change the temperature and the conditions change immediately.

75c8fb65-d97d-51f9-bef6-23539e6219a4.name: Siege Monster (Isonade)
75c8fb65-d97d-51f9-bef6-23539e6219a4.description: The isonade deals double damage to objects and structures.

043b58dd-9051-5ecd-857d-1fac50f95ad3.name: Water Breathing (Isonade)
043b58dd-9051-5ecd-857d-1fac50f95ad3.description: The isonade can breathe only underwater.

attributes.description: The isonade can breathe only underwater.

b5962310-8cc3-5026-a4b8-d81c5ae6a661.name: Bite (Isonade)
b5962310-8cc3-5026-a4b8-d81c5ae6a661.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (4d12 + 10) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the isonade. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the isonade, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the isonade's turns. An isonade can have no more than four creatures swallowed at a time. If the isonade takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, it must succeed on a DC 23 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the isonade. If the isonade dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (4d12 + 10) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the isonade. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the isonade, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the isonade's turns. An isonade can have no more than four creatures swallowed at a time. If the isonade takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, it must succeed on a DC 23 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the isonade. If the isonade dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

0b1a3936-bf87-5100-b9e7-bf7619c9c110.name: Breach
0b1a3936-bf87-5100-b9e7-bf7619c9c110.description: If the isonade swims at least 20 feet as part of its movement, it can use this action to emerge in a space on the surface of the water that contains one or more other creatures. Each of those creatures and each creature within 10 of the isonade's space must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 49 (14d6) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and is pushed up to 10 feet out of the isonade's space into an unoccupied space of the creature's choice. If no unoccupied space is within range, the creature instead falls prone in the isonade's space.

1e1f89bd-db06-5ca0-9aa4-55a20ebf97c5.description: If the jaculus moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a Bite attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 4 (1d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

800016e1-95db-5fbb-9347-614f72832ed5.description: The jaculus’s long jump is up to 20 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

726b0090-e97d-533f-82fb-cd37e8b1ed19.name: Multiattack (Jaculus)

7aba1439-8942-5b10-abfe-fc7b60259d28.name: Camouflaged Webs
7aba1439-8942-5b10-abfe-fc7b60259d28.description: With 10 minutes of work, the j’ba fofi can create a camouflaged web in a 10-foot cube. The web must be anchored between two solid mases or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling. A camouflaged web layered over a flat surface has a depth of 5 feet. The web is camouflaged to match its surroundings, requiring a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice them. Each creature that starts its turn in the camouflaged web or that enters it during the creature’s turn must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to break the webbing and free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 5; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

bb7e3844-bc07-5edd-8315-e828162f546d.name: Spider Passivism
bb7e3844-bc07-5edd-8315-e828162f546d.description: No spider can willingly attack the j’ba fofi, unless attacked first. A spider can be forced to do so through magical means.

c8b36dac-b805-5b48-b069-e002bb68974f.description: While in contact with a web, the j’ba fofi knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

8710f362-1284-599d-b44c-302be8001632.name: Web Walker (J'ba Fofi Spider)
8710f362-1284-599d-b44c-302be8001632.description: The j’ba fofi ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

attributes.description: The j’ba fofi ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

ea9173c8-c756-5405-b688-290a786c5533.name: Bite (J'ba Fofi Spider)
ea9173c8-c756-5405-b688-290a786c5533.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

c82905ac-3361-5495-b9c4-2e92c0362f14.name: Call Spiderlings
c82905ac-3361-5495-b9c4-2e92c0362f14.description: The j'ba fofi releases pheromones and calls 1 swarm of spiders. The spiders arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the j'ba fofi and obeying its pheromone commands. The spiders remain for 1 hour, until the j'ba fofi dies, or until the j'ba fofi dismisses them as a bonus action.

38cff5ab-5a0e-5f4a-8bd3-c2ea2c851818.name: Demigod’s Vitality
38cff5ab-5a0e-5f4a-8bd3-c2ea2c851818.description: The jotun’s ability scores and hp maximum can’t be reduced except by means of a wish spell.

attributes.description: The jotun’s ability scores and hp maximum can’t be reduced except by means of a wish spell.

0f99f609-9282-5ea7-b185-7b0393635dc5.name: Icy Weapons
0f99f609-9282-5ea7-b185-7b0393635dc5.description: The jotun’s weapon attacks are magical. When the jotun hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 6d8 cold damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The jotun’s weapon attacks are magical. When the jotun hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 6d8 cold damage (included in the attack).

9b712b94-ff65-577a-8faf-b8b90a72684f.name: Magic Resistance (Jotun)
9b712b94-ff65-577a-8faf-b8b90a72684f.description: The jotun has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

7246096f-6106-5615-a11f-602d26375a31.name: Material Bound
7246096f-6106-5615-a11f-602d26375a31.description: The jotun is immune to any spell or effect that would force it to leave the Material Plane, unless the jotun wants to leave. It has disadvantage on saving throws against effects that would return it to the Material Plane from another plane of existence.

b983ae5b-d16b-5aa5-a39a-9f13836a20bb.name: Too Big to Notice
b983ae5b-d16b-5aa5-a39a-9f13836a20bb.description: While the jotun remains motionless in nonmagical, natural terrain, it has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

attributes.description: While the jotun remains motionless in nonmagical, natural terrain, it has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

26aa0cf0-38db-59ac-94cd-cd6bcfbebcbd.name: Frightful Presence (Jotun)
26aa0cf0-38db-59ac-94cd-cd6bcfbebcbd.description: Each creature of the jotun's choice within 120 feet of the jotun and aware of it must succeed on a DC 20 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the jotun's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

58ba05fc-96ca-5ba2-a228-b2c1857002b8.name: Greatclub (Jotun)
58ba05fc-96ca-5ba2-a228-b2c1857002b8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d8 + 10) bludgeoning damage plus 27 (6d8) cold damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d8 + 10) bludgeoning damage plus 27 (6d8) cold damage.

dbd2d7d7-c28a-5042-b1a2-1e2ee35c2b6b.name: Icy Sweep
dbd2d7d7-c28a-5042-b1a2-1e2ee35c2b6b.description: The jotun swings its ice-coated greatclub in a wide arc. Each creature within 20 feet of the jotun must make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage and 54 (12d8) cold damage and is pushed up to 15 feet away from the jotun and knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

f61e0e01-96c4-5e0c-85de-9f638ac42715.name: Multiattack (Jotun)
f61e0e01-96c4-5e0c-85de-9f638ac42715.description: The jotun can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three Greatclub or Rock attacks.

04574022-01fb-570b-9589-36d4a5bcc0b3.name: Rock (Jotun)
04574022-01fb-570b-9589-36d4a5bcc0b3.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (4d10 + 10) bludgeoning damage plus 27 (6d8) cold damage.

00c4f778-a8e7-5e33-bfdf-5897e213268e.name: Rock Catching
00c4f778-a8e7-5e33-bfdf-5897e213268e.description: If a rock or similar object is hurled at the jotun, the jotun can, with a successful DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, catch the missile and take no bludgeoning damage from it.

b08832b0-1e9b-556a-a05b-631dc7de2e4d.name: Spellcasting (Jotun)
b08832b0-1e9b-556a-a05b-631dc7de2e4d.description:
The jotun casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):

- **At Will:** earthquake, speak with animals
3/day: bestow curse, gust of wind
1/day: divination

a92ea2c6-7454-55e2-a91a-dba5172a3d5a.name: Magic Resistance (Kalke)
a92ea2c6-7454-55e2-a91a-dba5172a3d5a.description: The kalke has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

833e0e04-59ae-5e09-aa63-0cb4ba92a503.name: Sense Magic (Kalke)
833e0e04-59ae-5e09-aa63-0cb4ba92a503.description: The kalke senses magic within 120 feet of it at will and can sense the general direction of spells being cast within 1 mile of it. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: The kalke senses magic within 120 feet of it at will and can sense the general direction of spells being cast within 1 mile of it. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

a7d78bd0-2cdd-5207-ac4f-cc76977955f4.name: Nimble Escape
a7d78bd0-2cdd-5207-ac4f-cc76977955f4.description: The kalke takes the Disengage or Hide action.

attributes.description: The kalke takes the Disengage or Hide action.

c97d3dd0-464f-56ff-a1bc-24d12e431301.name: Slam (Kalke)
c97d3dd0-464f-56ff-a1bc-24d12e431301.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

4aca2ef8-dd51-5529-85fe-f4335ea0d557.name: Use Magic Item
4aca2ef8-dd51-5529-85fe-f4335ea0d557.description: The kalke activates a magic item in its possession and can ignore all class, race, and level requirements on the item. The kalke must make a DC 11 Intelligence saving throw. On a success, the item activates normally. On a failure, the item doesn't activate and can't be used again until the next dawn. If the kalke fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it causes a magical backlash. Each creature within 5 feet of the kalke, including the kalke, must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 5 (2d4) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The kalke activates a magic item in its possession and can ignore all class, race, and level requirements on the item. The kalke must make a DC 11 Intelligence saving throw. If the kalke fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it causes a magical backlash. Each creature within 5 feet of the kalke, including the kalke, must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 5 (2d4) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

63929109-43a7-54b3-a923-93349152d6e8.name: Hidden Home
63929109-43a7-54b3-a923-93349152d6e8.description: The kikimora can spend 1 minute scribing a magical symbol on a wall, baseboard, cupboard, or other semi-permanent object within a structure. The symbol remains until the kikimora inscribes another symbol elsewhere. While within 5 feet of the surface where the symbol is inscribed, the kikimora can use an action to touch the symbol and be transported to an extradimensional space just large enough to hold the kikimora and up to 50 pounds of nonmagical objects. Only the kikimora can enter this space, along with any nonmagical objects it is wearing or carrying, up to the extradimensional space’s limits. While inside the extradimensional space, the kikimora can see out as if through a 2-foot-by-2-foot window centered on the symbol and can exit the space as an action, appearing in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of the surface where the symbol is inscribed.

34f6a3fc-8c15-5b4d-87d7-3ac63213004d.name: Domestic Magic
34f6a3fc-8c15-5b4d-87d7-3ac63213004d.description: The kikimora can cast the mending, minor illusion, and prestidigitation cantrips at will, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

97be8d58-ec56-5812-807e-b55342e0bf9f.description: While within a structure containing its hidden home (see the Hidden Home trait), the kikimora magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, to an unoccupied space within 15 feet of the hidden home's symbol.

e94f0b22-0d42-5bdd-ad40-02fea7fa82d1.name: House Pests
e94f0b22-0d42-5bdd-ad40-02fea7fa82d1.description: The kikimora magically calls 1 swarm of bats, insects, or rats. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the kikimora and obeying its spoken commands. The Beasts remain for 1 hour, until the kikimora dies, or until the kikimora dismisses them as a bonus action.

c3ca1658-1c7b-504b-8bbf-83a8a9f21d12.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack, plus 9 (2d8) cold damage.

The kishi casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

- **At Will:** detect evil and good, detect magic, suggestion
3/day: glibness
1/day: dominate person

1fb307d4-d427-5178-bb1e-c4eaad3b9b49.name: Summon Demon (Kishi)
1fb307d4-d427-5178-bb1e-c4eaad3b9b49.description: The kishi demon magically calls 1d4 giant hyenas that are Fiends with the kishi's damage resistances and immunities. It has a 50 percent chance of calling one kishi demon instead. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the kishi and obeying its telepathic commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until the kishi dies, or until the kishi dismisses them as a bonus action.

c1b06acb-f0e9-54b9-93eb-884e8278cf40.description: The kishi absorbs some of the essence of a creature it killed since the end of its previous turn and magically creates a grisly trophy of the creature on its shield or spear. For 1 hour, its Armor Class becomes 20, and creatures of the same type as the slain creature have disadvantage on attack rolls against the kishi.

c1c38fe9-f601-55eb-a7c0-e5a6f5bf3300.name: Terrifying Screech
c1c38fe9-f601-55eb-a7c0-e5a6f5bf3300.description: The kongamato releases a screech in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 28 (8d6) thunder damage and is frightened until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't frightened.

05a329fe-c165-5c72-a7f8-1d9dc57fb494.name: Devil’s Sight (Koralk)
05a329fe-c165-5c72-a7f8-1d9dc57fb494.description: Magical darkness does not impair the koralk’s darkvision.

6e7e2056-864e-51c2-918e-a38f3bda14b2.name: Harvester Venom
6e7e2056-864e-51c2-918e-a38f3bda14b2.description: The koralk produces a potent poison that liquefies the innards of those affected by it. Every hour that elapses after a creature succumbs to this poison, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) poison damage, and its hp maximum is reduced by that amount. Creatures with resistance or immunity to poison or the poisoned condition can be affected by this poison. Such creatures have advantage on the saving throw.

ee9f954f-9d2a-5164-9fc2-73b993620744.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the devil can't use its Vestigial Arms on another target.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the devil can't use its Vestigial Arms on another target.

ca3eaf67-e285-5df3-9c5d-d597dafafd97.name: Healing Purr
ca3eaf67-e285-5df3-9c5d-d597dafafd97.description: The kot bayun purrs at a creature it can see within 15 feet of it. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) hp and is freed from any disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.

attributes.description: The kot bayun purrs at a creature it can see within 15 feet of it. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) hp and is freed from any disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.

cd2bbcdd-52cf-5076-98c4-213c733c8f8e.name: Invisibility (Kot Bayun)
cd2bbcdd-52cf-5076-98c4-213c733c8f8e.description: The kot bayun magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Slumbering Song, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the kot bayun wears or carries is invisible with it.

attributes.description: The kot bayun magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Slumbering Song, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the kot bayun wears or carries is invisible with it.

77be88dd-2b0c-5bb3-b8a2-4a474e3f022e.name: Multiattack (Kot Bayun)
77be88dd-2b0c-5bb3-b8a2-4a474e3f022e.description: The kot bayun can use its Slumbering Song. It then makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The kot bayun can use its Slumbering Song. It then makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

8997a3d5-3870-5bb1-b0cf-38539d20446b.name: Slumbering Song
8997a3d5-3870-5bb1-b0cf-38539d20446b.description: The kot bayun sings a magical song to one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw on fall unconscious for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the kot bayun uses a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue singing, the target has disadvantage on this saving throw. Otherwise, the effect ends for a target if the target takes damage while below half its hp maximum.

cacf54d2-1ac8-552c-998f-54e76c243025.name: Amphibious (Krake Spawn)
cacf54d2-1ac8-552c-998f-54e76c243025.description: The krake spawn can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The krake spawn can breathe air and water.

62d36d9f-d7f7-5f4e-8e01-6afe2834f86c.name: Bite (Krake Spawn)
62d36d9f-d7f7-5f4e-8e01-6afe2834f86c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft, one target. Hit: 12 (1d10 + 7) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft, one target. Hit: 12 (1d10 + 7) slashing damage.

9247c712-de2a-53a7-88b0-746e838a909c.name: Freezing Water Bolt
9247c712-de2a-53a7-88b0-746e838a909c.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.

f1bae00d-84ff-59ae-b0a1-9f0d05e2038b.name: Ink Cloud
f1bae00d-84ff-59ae-b0a1-9f0d05e2038b.description: While underwater, the krake spawn emits a 20-foot-radius cloud of ink all around itself. Each creature in the cloud must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink.

The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink.

9285a91e-b53c-5af3-8596-4dc36eb0369d.name: Multiattack (Krake Spawn)
9285a91e-b53c-5af3-8596-4dc36eb0369d.description: The krake spawn makes one Bite attack and eight Tentacle attacks, or it makes four Freezing Water Bolt attacks.

592f8f2b-93f7-5c3f-a52b-83226f929d32.name: Tentacle (Krake Spawn)
592f8f2b-93f7-5c3f-a52b-83226f929d32.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d6 + 7) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The krake spawn has eight tentacles, each of which can grapple only one target.

84b2b8fe-d693-527e-9f40-3560753236f3.name: Vomit Forth the Deeps
84b2b8fe-d693-527e-9f40-3560753236f3.description: The krake spawn sprays half-digested food from its maw in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 27 (6d8) acid damage plus 27 (5d10) poison damage and is incapacitated. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.

57385875-0546-5426-963f-63740cfc952f.name: Water Jet
57385875-0546-5426-963f-63740cfc952f.description: Each creature within 5 feet of the krake spawn must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone. The spawn then swims up to half its swimming speed without provoking opportunity attacks. The spawn must be underwater to use this bonus action.

85a15f6d-19a9-5a64-8f1e-ce979213f49e.name: Amphibious (Lake Troll)
85a15f6d-19a9-5a64-8f1e-ce979213f49e.description: The lake troll can breathe air and water.

1bff7986-d63a-5cb8-96a6-929567579c06.name: Keen Smell (Lake Troll)
1bff7986-d63a-5cb8-96a6-929567579c06.description: The lake troll has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

attributes.description: The lake troll has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

b14e1312-af98-595b-8d64-48a40b58a8c2.name: Regeneration (Lake Troll)
b14e1312-af98-595b-8d64-48a40b58a8c2.description: The lake troll regains 10 hp at the start of its turn. If the lake troll takes cold or fire damage, it regains only 5 hp at the start of its next turn. If the lake troll takes both cold and fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the lake troll’s next turn. The lake troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

41162af7-4e4e-5e1f-9430-d98df4a38162.name: Bite (Lake Troll)

e73910af-6b92-5e2c-b082-7f244ad7b872.name: Claw (Lake Troll)
e73910af-6b92-5e2c-b082-7f244ad7b872.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.

bf90837a-e273-5b2a-9917-809142daaae7.name: Multiattack (Lake Troll)
bf90837a-e273-5b2a-9917-809142daaae7.description: The lake troll makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. If both Claw attacks hit one creature that is wielding a weapon, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or the target's weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If the weapon's penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. If the target is wielding more than one weapon, the troll chooses which weapon to affect.

62d8b3f1-d204-5365-80a1-4b236ce4abaa.name: Magical Darkness Hypersensitivity
62d8b3f1-d204-5365-80a1-4b236ce4abaa.description: While in an area of magical darkness, the lantern dragonette can’t fly or use Lantern Belly, and it takes 3 (1d6) necrotic damage each minute.

attributes.description: While in an area of magical darkness, the lantern dragonette can’t fly or use Lantern Belly, and it takes 3 (1d6) necrotic damage each minute.

f832ad0c-4627-5ff7-9b2d-6e763a90785b.name: Fire Breath (Lantern Dragonette)
f832ad0c-4627-5ff7-9b2d-6e763a90785b.description: The lantern dragonette breathes fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half the damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The lantern dragonette breathes fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half the damage on a successful one.

c039fd20-6d17-56b4-ab55-e9dce2f40c96.name: Lantern Belly
c039fd20-6d17-56b4-ab55-e9dce2f40c96.description: The dragonette sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet or stops shedding light. To shed light, it must have eaten at least 4 ounces of candle wax in the past 24 hours. It can shed light for up to 1 hour for every 4 ounces of candle wax it has eaten in the past 24 hours, to a maximum of 4 hours every 24 hours.

5053ad7b-311a-5da8-a2a4-590cc212582f.name: Blowgun
5053ad7b-311a-5da8-a2a4-590cc212582f.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 25/100 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 hour. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is also unconscious while poisoned in this way. The target wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.

9e4ed052-a70d-5111-b5ea-142d51f320f6.name: Mimicry
9e4ed052-a70d-5111-b5ea-142d51f320f6.description: The leshy can mimic animal sounds and Humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Insight) check.

6ad6a8c2-0fe1-51ac-a8e6-78fa07d0a23f.name: Plant Camouflage
6ad6a8c2-0fe1-51ac-a8e6-78fa07d0a23f.description: The leshy has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

attributes.description: The leshy has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

8f56602a-1994-5315-b486-6d01c10afaf2.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants (Leshy)
8f56602a-1994-5315-b486-6d01c10afaf2.description: The leshy can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The leshy can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

971afd70-ae82-5d0e-ab1b-958333c9e40c.name: Vine-Wrapped Weapons
971afd70-ae82-5d0e-ab1b-958333c9e40c.description: The poisonous vines growing from the leshy entwine around its weapon. When the leshy hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d4 poison damage (included in the attack).

2dfd3938-0fcb-5eca-a8b7-d4557f402677.name: Woodland Stride
2dfd3938-0fcb-5eca-a8b7-d4557f402677.description: Difficult terrain composed of magical or nonmagical plants doesn’t cost the leshy extra movement.

attributes.description: Difficult terrain composed of magical or nonmagical plants doesn’t cost the leshy extra movement.

3e98795c-735d-5e38-a5fc-bfc9e1ba013c.name: Club
3e98795c-735d-5e38-a5fc-bfc9e1ba013c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) poison damage.

fb5b335b-286e-57af-8031-4cccf9412328.name: Encourage Growth
fb5b335b-286e-57af-8031-4cccf9412328.description: The leshy whispers magical words of growth to nonmagical plants on a point it can see within 30 feet of it. The plants burst with life and spread rapidly. The area within 20 feet of that point becomes difficult terrain for 24 hours.

attributes.description: The leshy whispers magical words of growth to nonmagical plants on a point it can see within 30 feet of it. The plants burst with life and spread rapidly. The area within 20 feet of that point becomes difficult terrain for 24 hours.

bdee730b-b7e7-5158-b71f-557ee09d5010.name: Familiar (Leshy)
bdee730b-b7e7-5158-b71f-557ee09d5010.description: The library automaton can serve another creature as a familiar, forming a magic, telepathic bond with that willing companion. While the two are bonded, the companion can sense what the automaton senses as long as they are within 1 mile of each other. While the automaton is within 10 feet of its companion, the companion has resistance to psychic damage. At any time and for any reason, the automaton can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.

At any time and for any reason, the automaton can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.

42cdea4b-098e-5303-b10a-b853d83d48e3.name: Frightening Mien
42cdea4b-098e-5303-b10a-b853d83d48e3.description: The leshy briefly appears to grow to an enormous size, taking on a malicious mien before returning to normal. Each creature within 15 feet of the leshy and that can see it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature is immune to Frightening Mien if it can see through illusions.

0b498a55-435d-5bd0-a114-01b406413950.name: Bibliophile
0b498a55-435d-5bd0-a114-01b406413950.description: The library automaton understands any written language it can see, provided it is touching the surface on which the words are written.

attributes.description: The library automaton understands any written language it can see, provided it is touching the surface on which the words are written.

6dfa6775-063f-53ed-9a2a-0aa6628d9c4f.name: Bibliotelekinesis
6dfa6775-063f-53ed-9a2a-0aa6628d9c4f.description: The library automaton is surrounded by an invisible, shapeless, magical force that can perform simple tasks at the automaton’s command. This force has a Strength equal to the automaton’s Strength, and it can interact with objects up to 15 feet away from the automaton. The automaton can use this force to perform simple tasks that a Small humanoid with two hands could do, such as opening a door, moving a bookshelf’s ladder, picking up and organizing books, and similar tasks. The automaton can’t use this force to make attacks or wield a weapon or shield.

The automaton can’t use this force to make attacks or wield a weapon or shield.

fe3ef660-5d9d-562e-9a5f-b5756b06b25d.name: Book Safekeeper
fe3ef660-5d9d-562e-9a5f-b5756b06b25d.description: The library automaton’s body contains a small, extradimensional space. This space can hold up to 100 pounds of Small or smaller objects. This space can hold only books, scrolls, parchment, or other written works on paper or other paper- or wood-like materials. The automaton is the only creature capable of retrieving items from this space while it is alive. If the automaton is destroyed, the objects within its extradimensional space are ejected into an unoccupied space nearest it.

086be020-f832-5af2-833c-f65f1e6ef3e6.name: Piston-Powered Kick
086be020-f832-5af2-833c-f65f1e6ef3e6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

c38b13fa-6136-5f5e-9b3c-9fc5a2a6e961.name: Blood Sense (Lich Hound)
c38b13fa-6136-5f5e-9b3c-9fc5a2a6e961.description: The lich hound can pinpoint the location of creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

37e9b669-18f6-5d11-b914-8fa6acad6a08.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
37e9b669-18f6-5d11-b914-8fa6acad6a08.description: The lich hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
