77ed29c3-fef8-5da8-a5bb-d44ad36159cc.name: Undead Nature (Lich Hound)
77ed29c3-fef8-5da8-a5bb-d44ad36159cc.description: The lich hound doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The lich hound doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

41f2a54e-9afa-5a7f-a90b-ade09bab71cc.name: Bite (Lich Hound)
41f2a54e-9afa-5a7f-a90b-ade09bab71cc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

53b2be6e-68f5-5243-a481-03a15d170fb6.name: Eerie Howl
53b2be6e-68f5-5243-a481-03a15d170fb6.description: The lich hound releases an eerie howl that fades in and out and echoes strangely. Each creature within 30 feet of the lich hound must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the lich hound's Eerie Howl for the next 24 hours.

d87525e7-04c7-51ec-bcab-9d5b8dfb2193.description: The lich hound magically shifts from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.

d751098d-17b6-524e-b877-2ba640067115.name: Multiattack (Lich Hound)

If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) slashing damage and be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The lich hound can use its Eerie Howl. It then makes two Bite attacks. If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) slashing damage and be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

4f984666-e79f-5699-95e8-7cf7f0b0dd2a.name: Limited Telepathy (Likho)
4f984666-e79f-5699-95e8-7cf7f0b0dd2a.description: The likho can magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120 feet of it that can understand a language. This form of telepathy doesn’t allow the receiving creature to telepathically respond.

attributes.description: The likho can magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120 feet of it that can understand a language. This form of telepathy doesn’t allow the receiving creature to telepathically respond.

72711a7b-3392-5af0-9e6b-797afcfd6a41.name: Magic Resistance (Likho)
72711a7b-3392-5af0-9e6b-797afcfd6a41.description: The likho has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The likho has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

f1cc5868-a24e-5a02-bbc8-be765528115a.name: Pounce
f1cc5868-a24e-5a02-bbc8-be765528115a.description: If the likho moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the likho can make one Claw attack against it as a bonus action.

ab462e6a-115a-5df0-ac93-0013ae160d15.name: Claw (Likho)
ab462e6a-115a-5df0-ac93-0013ae160d15.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.

a250611a-ad9b-51b0-9984-49401d992e9e.name: Disruptive Gaze
a250611a-ad9b-51b0-9984-49401d992e9e.description: One creature the likho can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: One creature the likho can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws until the end of its next turn.

15635707-898e-5e87-860c-5574b4a07d5e.name: Multiattack (Likho)
15635707-898e-5e87-860c-5574b4a07d5e.description: The likho can use its Disruptive Gaze. It then makes four Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The likho can use its Disruptive Gaze. It then makes four Claw attacks.

97b33259-ba59-579d-a7b7-ce4d1ef7da91.name: Ice Walk (Lindwurm)
97b33259-ba59-579d-a7b7-ce4d1ef7da91.description: The lindwurm can move across icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

attributes.description: The lindwurm can move across icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

724d620e-e81c-5e1a-961f-7a58fdcc7739.name: Sure-Footed Skater
724d620e-e81c-5e1a-961f-7a58fdcc7739.description: While the lindwurm is on snow or ice, it has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.

attributes.description: While the lindwurm is on snow or ice, it has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.

ef9fd811-d8b8-5aac-a908-082bbf5eb32c.name: Bite (Lindwurm)
ef9fd811-d8b8-5aac-a908-082bbf5eb32c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or contract a disease and be poisoned until the disease is cured. At the end of each long rest, the diseased creature must repeat the saving throw. On a failure, the creature suffers one level of exhaustion and doesn't regain expended Hit Dice from the rest. On a success, the creature's exhaustion level decreases by one, and it regains expended Hit Dice as normal from the rest. If a successful saving throw reduces the diseased creature's level of exhaustion below 1, the creature recovers from the disease, ending it.

230d32f4-a24a-5c10-9245-ffea83b29899.name: Constrict (Lindwurm)
230d32f4-a24a-5c10-9245-ffea83b29899.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the lindwurm can't Constrict another target.

9e69b98f-f453-5181-88df-164678fff0f8.name: Multiattack (Lindwurm)
9e69b98f-f453-5181-88df-164678fff0f8.description: The lindwurm makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. It can replace its Bite attack with one Constrict attack.

attributes.description: The lindwurm makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. It can replace its Bite attack with one Constrict attack.

233479a2-f137-50ab-8cf7-7ecc1358b8c2.name: Darkness Hypersensitivity
233479a2-f137-50ab-8cf7-7ecc1358b8c2.description: The liosalfar takes 15 necrotic damage when it starts its turn in magical darkness. While in magical darkness, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attributes.description: The liosalfar takes 15 necrotic damage when it starts its turn in magical darkness. While in magical darkness, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

baae3ce3-73a4-5ab7-a355-b45c6825adcd.name: Elemental Nature (Liosalfar)
baae3ce3-73a4-5ab7-a355-b45c6825adcd.description: The liosalfar doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The liosalfar doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

f6d8667f-ac6c-57fd-9914-771877eef50a.name: Inscrutable (Liosalfar)
f6d8667f-ac6c-57fd-9914-771877eef50a.description: The liosalfar is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the liosalfar’s intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

attributes.description: The liosalfar is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the liosalfar’s intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

29c580d9-c488-59bb-b2eb-b534b0c3f1e8.name: Light Form
29c580d9-c488-59bb-b2eb-b534b0c3f1e8.description: The liosalfar can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. In addition, it sheds bright light in a 10- to 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of feet equal to the chosen radius. The liosalfar can alter the radius as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The liosalfar can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. In addition, it sheds bright light in a 10- to 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of feet equal to the chosen radius. The liosalfar can alter the radius as a bonus action.

d2c2db9a-2ca9-57fe-af0c-0f1f39a4faf0.name: Mesmerizing Radiance
d2c2db9a-2ca9-57fe-af0c-0f1f39a4faf0.description: The liosalfar causes the light radiating from its body to shift color and pattern in a spellbinding display. Each creature within 60 feet of the liosalfar and that can see it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the display ends. The liosalfar must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue the display. It can stop the display at any time, and the display ends if the liosalfar is incapacitated. While charmed by the liosalfar's display, a creature is also incapacitated, and its speed is reduced to 0, as it is transfixed by the display. The effect ends for a charmed creature if it takes any damage or if someone uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.

c2c545ec-5576-524f-9374-68159252a5df.name: Multiattack (Liosalfar)
c2c545ec-5576-524f-9374-68159252a5df.description: The liosalfar makes two Radiant Touch or Ray of Light attacks. If both Radiant Touch attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

e31df77e-2fe5-5ae6-bb2b-074ba1919bb9.name: Radiant Touch
e31df77e-2fe5-5ae6-bb2b-074ba1919bb9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) radiant damage.

fa507391-b414-568e-b786-19f568944dc8.name: Ray of Light
fa507391-b414-568e-b786-19f568944dc8.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (6d8 + 4) radiant damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (6d8 + 4) radiant damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

e9c3cbae-708d-50a4-95b1-56a2b167f16f.name: Construct Nature (Living Wick)
e9c3cbae-708d-50a4-95b1-56a2b167f16f.description: The living wick doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The living wick doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

d5aec409-6537-5b90-93b4-8eb8d2e010b4.name: Wick-Powered
d5aec409-6537-5b90-93b4-8eb8d2e010b4.description: The living wick is inactive and unconscious while its wick is unlit. When its wick is lit, it obeys the commands of the creature that lit the wick, and it sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. The living wick’s hp maximum is reduced by 2 (1d4) for every 24 hours it remains lit and active, and no effect short of a wish spell can remove this reduction. The living wick dies when its hp maximum is reduced to 0.

The living wick’s hp maximum is reduced by 2 (1d4) for every 24 hours it remains lit and active, and no effect short of a wish spell can remove this reduction. The living wick dies when its hp maximum is reduced to 0.

57fbd155-99ab-5f75-9527-c666b2f8489d.name: Consuming Inferno
57fbd155-99ab-5f75-9527-c666b2f8489d.description: The living wick's controller can command the living wick to rapidly burn through the remains of its wick, creating a devastating ball of fire. Each creature within 20 feet of the living wick must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Flammable objects in the area and that aren't being worn or carried ignite. The living wick then dies, becoming a lifeless puddle of wax.

cd52a038-4cf7-5d5c-9cac-22722e184810.name: Huntsman’s Weapons
cd52a038-4cf7-5d5c-9cac-22722e184810.description: The Lord of the Hunt’s weapon attacks are magical. When he hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 14 (4d6) poison damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The Lord of the Hunt’s weapon attacks are magical. When he hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 14 (4d6) poison damage (included in the attack).

21fc8b89-b90a-5ec5-831a-712f474656a5.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Lord of the Hunt)
21fc8b89-b90a-5ec5-831a-712f474656a5.description: If the Lord of the Hunt fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the Lord of the Hunt fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

401f0994-98db-507f-81e2-ed78c099a134.name: Sure Seat
401f0994-98db-507f-81e2-ed78c099a134.description: While mounted and not incapacitated, the Lord of the Hunt can’t be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against his will.

attributes.description: While mounted and not incapacitated, the Lord of the Hunt can’t be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against his will.

193f30a9-fc8d-5125-a2c0-dbdcd940538d.name: Attack (Lord of the Hunt)
193f30a9-fc8d-5125-a2c0-dbdcd940538d.description: The Lord of the Hunt makes one Spear or Longbow attack.

attributes.description: The Lord of the Hunt makes one Spear or Longbow attack.

ebc15996-6c1a-5f43-8a60-71ec96920e11.name: Call to the Hunt
ebc15996-6c1a-5f43-8a60-71ec96920e11.description: The Lord of the Hunt blows his hunting horn and chooses one creature he can see within 60 feet. If the creature can hear the horn, it must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be charmed by the Lord of the Hunt for 8 hours. The charmed target obeys the Lord's verbal commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. If the target successfully saves against the effect, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to the Lord's Call to the Hunt for the next 24 hours. The Lord can have only one target charmed at a time. If he charms another, the effect on the previous target ends.

If the creature can hear the horn, it must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be charmed by the Lord of the Hunt for 8 hours. The charmed target obeys the Lord's verbal commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. If the target successfully saves against the effect, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to the Lord's Call to the Hunt for the next 24 hours. The Lord can have only one target charmed at a time. If he charms another, the effect on the previous target ends.

996d57b0-3d70-5d07-a3f5-2fd9e9276f0d.name: Fey Mount
996d57b0-3d70-5d07-a3f5-2fd9e9276f0d.description: The Lord of the Hunt can summon or dismiss a magical Fey mount, mounting or dismounting it as part of this bonus action without spending movement. The mount uses the statistics of a warhorse, except it has 40 hp, is a Fey, has the same damage and condition resistances and immunities as the Lord of the Hunt, and uses the Lord's saving throw bonuses in place of its own. If the mount is slain, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form, and the Lord of the Hunt must wait 1 hour before summoning the mount again.

If the mount is slain, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form, and the Lord of the Hunt must wait 1 hour before summoning the mount again.

7db8eb27-70b0-5b56-8367-bdca905e1d29.name: Hunter's Quarry
7db8eb27-70b0-5b56-8367-bdca905e1d29.description: The Lord of the Hunt magically calls 3d6 elk or boars, 1d4 giant boars or giant elk, or 1 elephant. The called Beasts arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the Lord and obeying its spoken commands. The Beasts remain for 1 hour, until the Lord dies, or until the Lord dismisses them as a bonus action. The Lord can have any number of Beasts under its control at one time provided the combined total CR of the Beasts is no higher than 8.

9a035756-0398-56c5-a4f4-52b058eb7206.name: Longbow (Lord of the Hunt)
9a035756-0398-56c5-a4f4-52b058eb7206.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage.

ea608042-4172-5ded-b11e-6330278a0bfd.name: Multiattack (Lord of the Hunt)
ea608042-4172-5ded-b11e-6330278a0bfd.description: The Lord of the Hunt makes three Spear or Longbow attacks.

attributes.description: The Lord of the Hunt makes three Spear or Longbow attacks.

defb4448-0ad0-5c3d-a297-f9ca6e04ab23.name: Parry (Lord of the Hunt)
defb4448-0ad0-5c3d-a297-f9ca6e04ab23.description: The Lord of the Hunt increases his AC by 6 against one attack that would hit him. To do so, he must see the attacker and must be wielding a melee weapon.

attributes.description: The Lord of the Hunt increases his AC by 6 against one attack that would hit him. To do so, he must see the attacker and must be wielding a melee weapon.

a22d615f-64ef-5e67-89d7-2355208bbcaf.name: Spear (Lord of the Hunt)
a22d615f-64ef-5e67-89d7-2355208bbcaf.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage, or 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage if used in two hands, plus 14 (4d6) poison damage. If the Lord of the Hunt throws the spear, the spear teleports up to 120 feet to the Lord of the Hunt's hand at the start of his next turn. If he has no hand free, the spear teleports to the ground at his feet.

66274d9a-ea11-516b-9546-9f8cd60914a5.name: Tenacious Stride
66274d9a-ea11-516b-9546-9f8cd60914a5.description: The Lord of the Hunt moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks. If he is mounted, he can force the mount to move up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks instead.

attributes.description: The Lord of the Hunt moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks. If he is mounted, he can force the mount to move up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks instead.

6c0163b5-747e-5652-af36-6a9be6a4bffe.name: Alluring Presence
6c0163b5-747e-5652-af36-6a9be6a4bffe.description: When a Humanoid that can see the lorelei starts its turn within 30 feet of the lorelei, the lorelei can force it to make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw if the lorelei isn't incapacitated and can see the Humanoid. On a failed save, the Humanoid is charmed until the start if its next turn. While charmed, the target is incapacitated and must move on its turn toward the lorelei by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the lorelei for a kiss from her. The Humanoid doesn’t avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage, the Humanoid can repeat the saving throw. If the saving throw is successful, the effect ends for it, and it regains its senses for the remainder of its turn.

c4df145c-ad1d-5848-84d3-1a563e451138.description: The lorelei can breathe air and water.

66bbe944-98f5-5c14-97be-49b53e7d5aee.name: Free Water Spirit
66bbe944-98f5-5c14-97be-49b53e7d5aee.description: While in contact with water, the lorelei ignores difficult terrain, and magical effects can’t reduce her speed or cause her to be restrained. In addition, she can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or being grappled.

c66bfe76-0908-5072-ac16-80adf6d70504.name: Corrupted Kiss
c66bfe76-0908-5072-ac16-80adf6d70504.description: Melee Spell Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is incapacitated or restrained. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) necrotic damage, and the lorelei regains hp equal to that amount.

attributes.description: Melee Spell Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is incapacitated or restrained. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) necrotic damage, and the lorelei regains hp equal to that amount.

37a7cc4c-d45f-5c4f-adb8-8f1cf3840772.name: Multiattack (Lorelei)
37a7cc4c-d45f-5c4f-adb8-8f1cf3840772.description: The lorelei can use her Stunning Glance. She then makes three Psychic Blast attacks. She can replace one attack with a use of Corrupted Kiss.

864b635e-040c-5d7c-b29a-0738d861b7f6.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) psychic damage.

04d260a9-b426-5fcd-ba37-d615abe3e8d1.name: Stunning Glance
04d260a9-b426-5fcd-ba37-d615abe3e8d1.description: The lorelei sends a seductive glance at a creature she can see within 30 feet of her. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, a creature is immune to this lorelei's Stunning Glance for the next 24 hours.

325cedba-06bf-50bc-b1f0-d373cd25d765.name: Multiattack (Loxoda)
325cedba-06bf-50bc-b1f0-d373cd25d765.description: The loxoda makes one Slam attack and one Spear attack.

b76facae-a6fc-5131-a28e-354f31d833de.name: Slam (Loxoda)

5100ccad-612d-56d3-a894-e5c760724e72.name: Spear (Loxoda)
5100ccad-612d-56d3-a894-e5c760724e72.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 17 (3d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

7c34f355-90b0-5e0c-9969-1ebabd26ed50.name: Stomp (Loxoda)
7c34f355-90b0-5e0c-9969-1ebabd26ed50.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

640dfb6f-4897-50ad-81d5-61c38cd3ff9a.name: Tooth-Rattling Pound
640dfb6f-4897-50ad-81d5-61c38cd3ff9a.description: The loxoda rears up and lands heavily, rattling the land and creatures around it. Each creature in contact with the ground within 20 feet of the loxoda must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage and takes an extra 10 (3d6) thunder damage at the end of its next turn as the shockwaves from the Tooth-Rattling Pound continue up through its body. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't take extra thunder damage from shockwaves.

9cdc9aaa-6cc3-5895-b1a4-93ef9db5700c.name: Devil’s Sight (Lunar Devil)
9cdc9aaa-6cc3-5895-b1a4-93ef9db5700c.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the lunar devil’s darkvision.

eaf64f1f-906a-51b8-a1a7-c334ebb72624.name: Light Incorporeality
eaf64f1f-906a-51b8-a1a7-c334ebb72624.description: The lunar devil is translucent when standing in moonlight and is immune to damage from all nonmagical weapons in such conditions.

attributes.description: The lunar devil is translucent when standing in moonlight and is immune to damage from all nonmagical weapons in such conditions.

c93f225b-95ee-5381-8f6e-f4d784a405d9.name: Lightwalking
c93f225b-95ee-5381-8f6e-f4d784a405d9.description: Once on its turn, the lunar devil can use half its movement to step magically into one area of moonlight within its reach and emerge from a second area of moonlight within 80 feet of the first, appearing in an unoccupied space within that second area.

56098cf1-0c6b-5651-99b9-edf936f0500e.name: Hurl Moonlight

e82ab3a8-95e0-5e50-b8a0-dcbbdc33c8a8.name: Multiattack (Lunar Devil)
e82ab3a8-95e0-5e50-b8a0-dcbbdc33c8a8.description: The lunar devil makes one Bite attack, one Claw attack, and one Tail attack, or it makes three Hurl Moonlight attacks.

4f06c95b-aa5c-536f-ae21-41710fb62026.name: Spellcasting (Lunar Devil)
4f06c95b-aa5c-536f-ae21-41710fb62026.description:
The lunar devil casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** fly, major image
3/day: greater invisibility
1/day: wall of ice

9cc2c5c8-95a7-599f-895f-2dd22b9fa4a0.name: Summon Devil (Lunar Devil)
9cc2c5c8-95a7-599f-895f-2dd22b9fa4a0.description: The lunar devil magically calls 1d4 giant owls that are Fiends with the lunar devil's damage resistances and immunities (but not its Light Incorporeality trait). The lunar devil has a 25 percent chance of calling one lunar devil instead. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the devil and obeying its telepathic commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until the devil dies, or until the devil dismisses them as a bonus action.

fa890c3e-f56e-5011-8bf6-84ebb490d727.name: Amphibious (Mahoru)

e4ee82d6-5042-5337-b8e7-9df8e5f80c10.description: The mahoru has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all of its hp.

b819c2b2-789b-598b-a322-f3c64114e696.name: Keen Sight and Smell
b819c2b2-789b-598b-a322-f3c64114e696.description: The mahoru has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.

99f1a271-6877-5a38-a9a1-eba7fa659c53.name: Pack Tactics (Mahoru)
99f1a271-6877-5a38-a9a1-eba7fa659c53.description: The mahoru has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mahoru’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The mahoru has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mahoru’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

7fb1a7bc-7c79-5d9c-9088-a00df4400cd3.name: Bite (Mahoru)
7fb1a7bc-7c79-5d9c-9088-a00df4400cd3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) slashing damage. If the mahoru scores a critical hit, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or the mahoru bites off one of the target's limbs. A creature is immune to this effect if it is immune to slashing damage.

a222886c-e5fe-5604-bd2f-0f330fe79202.name: Roar
a222886c-e5fe-5604-bd2f-0f330fe79202.description: The mahoru roars while above water or emits a loud, low thrum while underwater. Each creature within 30 feet of the mahoru that can hear the roar or thrum must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is also paralyzed until the end of its next turn. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the Roar of all mahoru for the next 24 hours.

f466edaa-1c5d-5c51-847b-3dd290ab9398.name: Blistering Radiance
f466edaa-1c5d-5c51-847b-3dd290ab9398.description: The malakbel sheds searing, bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. At the start of each of the malakbel’s turns, each creature in the bright light shed by the malakbel takes 11 (2d10) radiant damage. If any of the bright light overlaps with an area of darkness created by a spell of 3rd level or lower, the spell creating the darkness is dispelled.

e026bb93-40ca-5aa2-a2c3-c4f212d28166.name: Scorching Blast

2234ce07-41e6-574b-9c1b-68c0b0c6a3ae.name: Searing Flare
2234ce07-41e6-574b-9c1b-68c0b0c6a3ae.description: The malakbel intensifies the heat and light it sheds to withering levels. Each creature in the bright light shed by the malakbel's Blistering Radiance trait must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 13 (3d8) fire damage and 22 (4d10) radiant damage and suffers one level of exhaustion. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't suffer exhaustion.

bd7793a0-c045-55e7-b221-0ae4df59d6d6.name: Regeneration (Mallqui)
bd7793a0-c045-55e7-b221-0ae4df59d6d6.description: The mallqui regains 10 hp at the start of its turn. If the mallqui takes radiant damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the mallqui’s next turn. The mallqui dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

08842051-fd22-5115-bb8d-64bf70c1721e.name: Undead Nature (Mallqui)
08842051-fd22-5115-bb8d-64bf70c1721e.description: The mallqui doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

8fa312e2-f9dd-57fb-9474-dd46b5b81bb9.name: Water Hypersusceptibility
8fa312e2-f9dd-57fb-9474-dd46b5b81bb9.description: For every 5 feet the mallqui moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 2 (1d4) radiant damage. In addition, the mallqui takes 10 radiant damage when it starts its turn at least partially submerged in water.

73679256-5085-5d00-b185-5b29bb502613.description:
The mallqui casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** druidcraft
- **3/Day Each:** create or destroy water, entangle
- **1/Day Each:** locate animals or plants, wind wall

66dd245e-c7d0-5688-8808-4933ee8c31e9.description: Each creature within 20 feet of the mallqui must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion, as moisture is drained from its body. If a creature's saving throw is successful, it is immune to the mallqui's Xeric Aura for the next 24 hours.

cf180848-1d31-578d-95f0-f9e1d314a29a.description: The malphas makes two Longsword attacks or three Shadow Bolt attacks. If both Longsword attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn, as shadows fill its eyes. A creature that can see through magical darkness has advantage on this saving throw.

c3829651-b8df-567c-a2cd-b46d677fcad8.name: Shadow Call
c3829651-b8df-567c-a2cd-b46d677fcad8.description: When the malphas is hit by a ranged attack, it can make one Shadow Bolt attack against the attacker. The malphas doesn't have disadvantage on this attack from being within 5 feet of a hostile creature, though it may still have disadvantage from other sources.

c506c59a-c8f2-5e34-bc4e-1273b71adb63.name: Distracting Babble
c506c59a-c8f2-5e34-bc4e-1273b71adb63.description: When a spellcaster that is concentrating on a spell starts its turn within 20 feet of the mamura, the spellcaster must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or lose concentration on the spell. In addition, if a spellcaster within 20 feet of the mamura casts a spell, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or the spell fails to cast, using the action, bonus action, or reaction to cast the spell but not expending the spell slot.

58839f9b-504c-5682-9bc5-04895d1c6094.name: False Appearance (Object Form Only)
58839f9b-504c-5682-9bc5-04895d1c6094.description: While the mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

attributes.description: While the mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

7836ef5d-3546-54bb-83df-7820a3da9e63.name: Life Path
7836ef5d-3546-54bb-83df-7820a3da9e63.description: Regardless of the form it takes, the map mimic can make a map on its surface (no action required) that shows the route it has traveled since it left its parent mimic. The map shows terrain features and landmarks of where it has been, but doesn’t show the names of those places.

The map shows terrain features and landmarks of where it has been, but doesn’t show the names of those places.

7a204078-281c-51bb-9c6c-425567881942.name: Change Shape (Map Mimic)
7a204078-281c-51bb-9c6c-425567881942.description: The mimic transforms into a Tiny object or back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

45e7a6fa-a2a4-537f-a4a7-b79c8d54730c.name: Pseudopod (Map Mimic)
45e7a6fa-a2a4-537f-a4a7-b79c8d54730c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and it attaches to the target. While attached, the mimic can't attack, the target is blinded, and at the start of each of the mimic's turns, the target takes 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

a6642c43-895d-5a33-b7d9-b2feccb59c87.name: Necrotic Weapons (Mask Wight)

dbe6bfb7-ea97-5bed-acc6-e8d0ef0ca054.name: Single-Minded Purpose
dbe6bfb7-ea97-5bed-acc6-e8d0ef0ca054.description: The mask wight has advantage on attack rolls against fiends and creatures wielding fiendish power, such as tieflings or some sorcerers and warlocks.

fe6d6e37-4d6e-5b15-a568-0cea3c310f49.name: Undead Nature (Mask Wight)
fe6d6e37-4d6e-5b15-a568-0cea3c310f49.description: The mask wight doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

5a2d8590-1570-5da9-8151-fe0d73da86cc.name: Khopesh of Oblivion
5a2d8590-1570-5da9-8151-fe0d73da86cc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage.

4aae4f12-f1d8-56e6-b334-99f287d0728a.name: Multiattack (Mask Wight)
4aae4f12-f1d8-56e6-b334-99f287d0728a.description: The mask wight makes two Khopesh of Oblivion attacks and one Spiked Gauntlet attack. If both Khopesh of Oblivion attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or forget cherished memories of one object or location until it interacts with that object or location again. The object or location can't be an object on the target or a location within its sight when it fails this saving throw.

d5591350-c41b-5482-be99-db970f8439ad.name: Spiked Gauntlet
d5591350-c41b-5482-be99-db970f8439ad.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

f4df9833-3fe0-5114-9a9c-3a385b168d60.name: Wail of the Forgotten
f4df9833-3fe0-5114-9a9c-3a385b168d60.description: The mask wight emits an ear-piercing wail. Each creature within 30 feet of the mask wight must make a DC 17 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) thunder damage and 27 (6d8) psychic damage and is deafened for 1 hour. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't deafened. A creature killed by this wail is erased from the memories of every creature in the planes that ever saw or interacted with it, all written or pictorial references to the target fade away, and its body is obliterated. Only divine beings and creatures that saw the creature die are unaffected by this memory erasure. The slain creature can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell.

995f78ec-7753-5b3c-b21e-88552ad6f9c7.name: Mounted Warrior (Mavka)
995f78ec-7753-5b3c-b21e-88552ad6f9c7.description: While the mavka is mounted, her mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

50bc6e49-6108-5b70-83a0-c004dedd2e79.name: Nightmare Mount
50bc6e49-6108-5b70-83a0-c004dedd2e79.description: The mavka has formed a bond with a nightmare. The nightmare acts as a controlled mount while carrying the mavka, obeying the mavka’s spoken commands. Mounting and dismounting the nightmare costs the mavka only 5 feet of movement.

7ac2966a-4939-5a4f-b849-6ddda77719e5.description: The mavka takes 20 radiant damage when she starts her turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, she has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

57cca0c0-3264-5d77-897c-cee30e719c9e.name: Undead Nature (Mavka)

f83d5c1b-3f74-56db-87b0-1bf663e67245.name: Enervating Slam
f83d5c1b-3f74-56db-87b0-1bf663e67245.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 16 (3d10) necrotic damage.

f524da66-9054-50f3-8780-077d015689e7.name: Flame Burst
f524da66-9054-50f3-8780-077d015689e7.description: While riding a nightmare, the mavka channels her power into her mount, causing its fiery light to burn those nearby. Each creature within 20 feet of the mavka must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

2ea83044-1a11-5bc9-a6b7-117796716510.name: Multiattack (Mavka)

If both Enervating Slam attacks hit one creature, the mavka regains hp equal to the total necrotic damage dealt by both attacks.

- **At Will:** create or destroy water, dancing lights
- **3/Day Each:** darkness, hold person, silence
- **1/Day Each:** bestow curse, dispel magic

f407c3d7-c09a-5a10-9e7b-b170d8e1f4ac.description: The mbielu can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

attributes.description: The mbielu can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

54d3d4ad-5e63-527a-a228-c3c16279e1c2.name: Toxic Skin
54d3d4ad-5e63-527a-a228-c3c16279e1c2.description: A creature that touches the mbielu or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 2 (1d4) poison damage and must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, a creature has disadvantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws as it experiences mild hallucinations. The poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

c3092307-8b45-5e7e-a92f-db5bcf8b0fa4.name: Rumbling Bellow
c3092307-8b45-5e7e-a92f-db5bcf8b0fa4.description: The mbielu releases a deep bellow that vibrates within the bodies of those nearby. Each creature within 15 feet of the mbielu must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If a creature poisoned by the mbielu's Toxic Skin fails this saving throw, it is also incapacitated until the end of its next turn as the combined vibrations and hallucinations disorient it.

158162e8-a2cb-5821-8f3d-fe0a8c10eafa.name: Demon Lord’s Ichor
158162e8-a2cb-5821-8f3d-fe0a8c10eafa.description: When Mechuiti is subjected to piercing damage or slashing damage, a spray of caustic blood spurts from his hide. Each creature within 10 feet of Mechuiti must succeed on a DC 24 Constitution saving throw or becoming infected with the Mechuiti’s deadly ichor disease and be poisoned until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hp maximum by 14 (4d6) on a failure. This reduction lasts until the disease is cured. The creature dies if the disease reduces its hp maximum to 0. The disease can be cured by the greater restoration spell or similar magic or when the creature succeeds on three saving throws.

cf35513f-54a8-5028-b3ee-712078387e0e.description: Mechuiti’s weapon attacks are magical. When Mechuiti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 6d6 fire damage (included in the attack).

53c2a8a6-aaa3-5176-85cc-5b7e1143e7f2.name: Immolating Corona
53c2a8a6-aaa3-5176-85cc-5b7e1143e7f2.description: At the start of each of Mechuiti’s turns, each creature within 10 feet of him takes 10 (3d6) fire damage and must succeed on a DC 24 Constitution saving throw or catch fire. A creature that touches Mechuiti or hits him with a melee attack while within 5 feet of him takes 10 (3d6) fire damage and must succeed on a DC 24 Constitution saving throw or catch fire. Until a creature uses an action to douse the fire, the creature on fire takes 7 (2d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

On a success, the target takes half the damage and doesn't catch fire. Until a creature uses an action to douse the fire, the target takes 7 (2d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

64fa850e-344a-558e-bb3e-fb8653c2dc84.name: Frightful Presence (Mechuiti)
64fa850e-344a-558e-bb3e-fb8653c2dc84.description: Each creature of Mechuiti's choice that is within 120 feet of Mechuiti and aware of him must succeed on a DC 24 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to Mechuiti's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

62715489-f999-54c3-92cb-9b6280a28c1f.name: Spore Burst
62715489-f999-54c3-92cb-9b6280a28c1f.description: The mi-go releases hallucinogenic spores in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) poison damage and is incapacitated until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: The mi-go releases hallucinogenic spores in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) poison damage and is incapacitated until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.

17660300-64b0-5b46-9733-f1ca6be01b9d.name: Handaxe
17660300-64b0-5b46-9733-f1ca6be01b9d.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

c7ff1303-1c5f-5b1a-bd18-f45db57fa85e.name: Healing Tonic
c7ff1303-1c5f-5b1a-bd18-f45db57fa85e.description: The millitaur administers a healing tonic to a willing creature within 5 feet of it. The target magically regains 7 (2d6) hp and is freed from any disease or poison.

attributes.description: The millitaur administers a healing tonic to a willing creature within 5 feet of it. The target magically regains 7 (2d6) hp and is freed from any disease or poison.

479c06c8-9759-5111-a5e5-7de5aa3b6d18.name: Multiattack (Millitaur)
479c06c8-9759-5111-a5e5-7de5aa3b6d18.description: The millitaur makes two Handaxe attacks.

attributes.description: The millitaur makes two Handaxe attacks.

3453cb06-f369-5d08-a9e2-d6a3261075cb.name: Poisonous Flask
3453cb06-f369-5d08-a9e2-d6a3261075cb.description: The millitaur hastily combines alchemical substances into a poisonous concoction and throws it at a point the millitaur can see within 30 feet. Each creature within 15 feet of that point must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned creature can make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

61862eed-f504-5393-b753-f1ced960f694.name: Fungal Aura
61862eed-f504-5393-b753-f1ced960f694.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of a mindrot thrall must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become infected with the mindrot disease.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of a mindrot thrall must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become infected with the mindrot disease.

6ab71056-b499-5ec9-8133-6b87d47033cd.name: Mindrot
6ab71056-b499-5ec9-8133-6b87d47033cd.description: A creature infected with this disease manifests symptoms in 1d4 days after infection, which include migraines and muscle weakness. Until the disease is cured, at the end of each long rest, the infected creature must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or take 9 (2d8) acid damage, and its hp maximum is reduced by that amount. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. The creature dies if the disease reduces its hp maximum to 0. One day after the creature dies, it rises as a mindrot thrall. A creature that succeeds on two saving throws recovers from the disease.

This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. The creature dies if the disease reduces its hp maximum to 0. bb065e05-0ede-50ae-94d9-a33e9f68dadf.name: Multiattack (Mindrot Thrall)
bb065e05-0ede-50ae-94d9-a33e9f68dadf.description: The mindrot thrall makes two Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The mindrot thrall makes two Claw attacks.

9e4b44af-7072-55ed-87c4-fd477b5a6e9b.name: Spore Breath
9e4b44af-7072-55ed-87c4-fd477b5a6e9b.description: The thrall exhales a blast of acidic spores from its rotten lungs in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 18 (4d8) acid damage and is infected with the mindrot disease (see the Mindrot trait). On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't infected.

2ff5c7ac-d195-567b-94e6-8f190cca2709.name: Sensuous Grace
2ff5c7ac-d195-567b-94e6-8f190cca2709.description: The mirager moves with a flowing grace that Humanoids find appealing. If the mirager moves at least 10 feet on its turn, each Humanoid within 30 feet of it that can see it must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or be charmed until the end of its next turn.

6d2db6ca-fc80-50ec-8747-4a10ba7c52ed.name: Blow Kiss
6d2db6ca-fc80-50ec-8747-4a10ba7c52ed.description: The mirager blows a kiss at a creature charmed by it. The target must make a DC 14 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 17 (5d6) psychic damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and the charmed condition immediately ends on it.

56d4423e-0246-5b56-95aa-429d07eb141e.name: Illusory Appearance (Mirager)
56d4423e-0246-5b56-95aa-429d07eb141e.description: The mirager covers itself and anything it is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes it look like another creature of its general size and Humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the mirager takes a bonus action to end it or if the mirager dies.

c250c01e-f610-51c7-b8d0-f01949066243.name: Multiattack (Mirager)
c250c01e-f610-51c7-b8d0-f01949066243.description: The mirager makes two Slam attacks. If both Slam attacks hit a Medium or smaller creature, the target is also grappled (escape DC 13). The mirager can grapple only one creature at a time.

98c597b2-b25d-5916-8d57-89e6e3cd4428.name: Sand Dancer
98c597b2-b25d-5916-8d57-89e6e3cd4428.description: While in sandy terrain, the mirager takes the Dash or Disengage action.

attributes.description: While in sandy terrain, the mirager takes the Dash or Disengage action.

fa8f6578-c598-58e4-96ee-1308b34ad64a.name: Spellcasting (Mirager)
fa8f6578-c598-58e4-96ee-1308b34ad64a.description:
The mirager casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
3/day: charm person
- **1/Day Each:** hallucinatory terrain (as an action), suggestion

4c38e906-b6c5-5628-aa94-4f5e83bc18d2.name: Thirsting Kiss
4c38e906-b6c5-5628-aa94-4f5e83bc18d2.description: Melee Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled by the mirager, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) necrotic damage, and the mirager gains temporary hp equal to half that amount.

238d1fdf-d6ef-56d1-98f7-42d0db544285.name: Amphibious (Miremal)
238d1fdf-d6ef-56d1-98f7-42d0db544285.description: The miremal can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The miremal can breathe air and water.

14c94f1d-14e7-50c5-bd44-50d806b06ebf.name: Muddled Escape (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
14c94f1d-14e7-50c5-bd44-50d806b06ebf.description: If the miremal takes 7 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hp, it is reduced to 1 hp instead and becomes a puddle of filthy swamp water. At the start of the miremal’s next turn, it can move up to 15 feet as a puddle. Then it returns to its normal form.

0e542b52-1099-5150-ba21-1a668003bd32.name: Swamp Camouflage (Miremal)
0e542b52-1099-5150-ba21-1a668003bd32.description: The miremal has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

2ab35156-5464-5923-a150-5570078783ae.name: Bog Spew
2ab35156-5464-5923-a150-5570078783ae.description: The miremal spews a noxious stream of bog filth mixed with stomach acid at one creature it can see within 20 feet of it. The target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 7 (2d6) acid damage and is blinded until the end of its next turn. On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't blinded.

ac3fa410-354c-5792-909a-23c22d4f518a.name: Confounding Ugliness
ac3fa410-354c-5792-909a-23c22d4f518a.description: Any Humanoid that starts its turn within 60 feet of the hag and can see the hag’s true form must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated until the start of its next turn. If the Humanoid’s saving throw is successful, it is immune to the hag’s Confounding Ugliness for the next 24 hours.

9bac7bd4-a806-56c2-a2f3-bdb786e41527.description: The mirror hag curses one creature she can see within 60 feet of her, corrupting its form. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a success, the target is immune to the hag's Reconfiguring Curse for the next 24 hours. On a failure, the target is cursed, suffering one of the following effects of the hag's choice:

2d22a111-78ec-5c3e-99c3-293ddcf95e4f.name: Bite (Mithral Dragon Wyrmling)
2d22a111-78ec-5c3e-99c3-293ddcf95e4f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the dragon can attempt to end one magical effect of its choice of 2nd level or lower on the target. This effect works like the dispel magic spell, except the dragon must always make an ability check. Its ability check for this is +4.

bb791121-7b0b-5c86-928e-3e84d33d5a24.name: Shard Breath (Mithral Dragon Wyrmling)
bb791121-7b0b-5c86-928e-3e84d33d5a24.description: The mithral dragon spits metallic shards in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The area becomes difficult terrain until the start of the dragon's next turn, then the shards dissolve into wisps of silvery smoke.

575e4f96-c332-5742-9204-94c7f0ede7fa.description: The mngwa’s AC includes its Charisma modifier (included above).

2ed45a8d-1c4c-559f-9cc7-6dc7561afced.description: The mngwa can see 30 feet into the Ethereal Plane when on the Material Plane and vice versa.

63b127fb-edf8-5eec-86e3-21450735ec46.name: Feline Passivism
63b127fb-edf8-5eec-86e3-21450735ec46.description: No felines or weretigers can willingly attack the mngwa. They can be forced to do so through magical means.

c3306be5-22d5-5f5c-9c0d-7e9a3d2102a2.name: Keen Smell (Mngwa)

fa00377b-f605-505a-888d-184a44aa7a7a.description: The mngwa has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mngwa’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

b6343757-a28f-5ca0-8d50-ce7eec53a2d8.description: With a 10-foot running start, the mngwa can long jump up to 25 feet.

b13b34ff-3594-5185-8bf9-a190a43ce39e.description: The mngwa can communicate with felines as if they shared a language.

f1c1d91a-10b4-5e1f-b2a3-8ac77df2c7e6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) force damage.

bc151691-b8c8-51c6-bc65-a5f4d70db840.description: The mngwa magically shifts from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa. When it leaves or enters the Material Plane, a puff of gray smoke briefly appears in the space on the Material Plane it leaves or enters.

f3aa7a6f-f9a1-5758-905b-6571d5736ffc.description: The monolith champion’s weapon attacks are imbued with blue fey fire and magical. When the champion hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 cold damage or fire damage (included in the attack), the champion’s choice.

c9056382-eb00-593d-b531-51c2a880365c.name: Construct Nature (Monolith Champion)
c9056382-eb00-593d-b531-51c2a880365c.description: The monolith champion doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

b81ba9bc-b3d8-56a6-96d0-78233701d5f2.name: Greatsword (Monolith Champion)
b81ba9bc-b3d8-56a6-96d0-78233701d5f2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) cold damage or fire damage (the champion's choice). If the target is within a fey court or castle, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or become invisible, silent, and paralyzed for 1 minute, while an illusory version of the target under the champion's control remains visible and audible. The illusion shouts to the target's allies for a retreat or similar action. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself and destroying the illusory double on a success.

9b68dad0-c787-5893-8821-05831cc6ee45.description: The footman makes two Shortsword attacks.

attributes.description: The footman makes two Shortsword attacks.

40ec2b03-af39-5470-8068-623895e20c5e.name: Shortsword (Monolith Footman)
40ec2b03-af39-5470-8068-623895e20c5e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) cold damage or fire damage (the footman's choice). If the target is within a fey court or castle, the target must succeed on a DC 12 Charisma saving throw or become invisible, silent, and paralyzed for 1 minute, while an illusory version of the target under the footman's control remains visible and audible. The illusion shouts to the target's allies for a retreat or similar action. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself and destroying the illusory double on a success.

a291f257-07e8-5566-87a7-c238b5d839ba.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Moonlit King)
a291f257-07e8-5566-87a7-c238b5d839ba.description: If the Moonlit King fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the Moonlit King fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

ade76b01-b961-5dc4-977b-4c13fa9c8194.name: Moonlit Weapons
ade76b01-b961-5dc4-977b-4c13fa9c8194.description: The Moonlit King’s weapon attacks are magical. When he hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 14 (4d6) radiant damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The Moonlit King’s weapon attacks are magical. When he hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 14 (4d6) radiant damage (included in the attack).

396ffc7c-a24c-528d-aa23-f749078377d9.name: Animate Shadows
396ffc7c-a24c-528d-aa23-f749078377d9.description: The Moonlit King causes the shadows of up to three creatures he can see within 60 feet of him to animate and attack their owners. Each target must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 49 (14d6) necrotic damage, and its Strength score is reduced by 1d4. On a success, a creature takes half the damage, and its Strength score isn't reduced. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. The creature dies if this effect reduces its Strength to 0.

The creature dies if this effect reduces its Strength to 0.

6ff36afd-080d-5c8b-a69c-a1a72c78ab61.name: Attack (Moonlit King)
6ff36afd-080d-5c8b-a69c-a1a72c78ab61.description: The Moonlit King makes a Crystal Staff or Moon Bolt attack.

attributes.description: The Moonlit King makes a Crystal Staff or Moon Bolt attack.

291c82e5-b079-59b5-9f1a-5ec3cf100d81.name: Crystal Staff
291c82e5-b079-59b5-9f1a-5ec3cf100d81.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) radiant damage.

fda76783-7718-51de-93eb-03f0b9d2c82a.name: Moon Bolt
fda76783-7718-51de-93eb-03f0b9d2c82a.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +11 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) radiant damage, and the target sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius until the end of its next turn. If the target is a creature in a form other than its true form, it takes an extra 11 (2d10) radiant damage and must succeed on a DC 19 Charisma saving throw or revert to its true form.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +11 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) radiant damage, and the target sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius until the end of its next turn. If the target is a creature in a form other than its true form, it takes an extra 11 (2d10) radiant damage and must succeed on a DC 19 Charisma saving throw or revert to its true form.

84f8bce3-47c8-5424-81ab-608fc472e861.name: Moonlight Step
84f8bce3-47c8-5424-81ab-608fc472e861.description: The Moonlit King teleports, along with any equipment he is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space he can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain moonlight.

attributes.description: The Moonlit King teleports, along with any equipment he is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space he can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain moonlight.

44d87767-1a3f-5996-b3ae-e101b440dab2.name: Move (Moonlit King)
44d87767-1a3f-5996-b3ae-e101b440dab2.description: The Moonlit King moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: The Moonlit King moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

7912fdc4-a816-5150-8e17-40c66e7a690d.name: Shadow Slip
7912fdc4-a816-5150-8e17-40c66e7a690d.description: When a creature the Moonlit King can see within 30 feet of him attacks him, he takes on the quality of his manifest delusions, temporarily becoming ghostly. The attack roll has disadvantage, and if it hits, the Moonlit King takes only half the damage from the attack.

attributes.description: When a creature the Moonlit King can see within 30 feet of him attacks him, he takes on the quality of his manifest delusions, temporarily becoming ghostly. The attack roll has disadvantage, and if it hits, the Moonlit King takes only half the damage from the attack.

b910c152-0f86-5b7e-a0c4-ea9f9c537b8b.name: Shift Moonlight
b910c152-0f86-5b7e-a0c4-ea9f9c537b8b.description: The Moonlit King changes the brightness of each area of moonlight he can see within 120 feet of him from dim light to bright light or vice versa.

attributes.description: The Moonlit King changes the brightness of each area of moonlight he can see within 120 feet of him from dim light to bright light or vice versa.

73c766c2-94b6-5d48-ad36-cfa71e85308e.name: Spellcasting (Moonlit King)
73c766c2-94b6-5d48-ad36-cfa71e85308e.description:
The Moonlit King casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (save DC 19):

- **At Will:** continual flame, invisibility (self only), moonbeam, zone of truth
- **3/Day Each:** dispel evil and good, dispel magic, major image
- **1/Day Each:** heal, project image

- **At Will:** continual flame, invisibility (self only), moonbeam, zone of truth

- **1/Day Each:** heal, project image

ed3daa35-732d-5361-87f8-e33131a090a2.name: Spread Madness
ed3daa35-732d-5361-87f8-e33131a090a2.description: Each creature within 30 feet of the Moonlit King must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or suffer short-term madness. The Moonlit King can use this legendary action only when he is in moonlight.

attributes.description: Each creature within 30 feet of the Moonlit King must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or suffer short-term madness. The Moonlit King can use this legendary action only when he is in moonlight.

6df1f69f-e5c4-5f6f-b7aa-13be5933eece.name: Summon Devil (Moonlit King)
6df1f69f-e5c4-5f6f-b7aa-13be5933eece.description: The Moonlit King magically calls a lunar devil to aid him. The devil arrives in 1d4 rounds, acting as ally of the Moonlit King and obeying his spoken commands. The devil remains for 1 hour, until the Moonlit King dies, or until the King dismisses it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The Moonlit King magically calls a lunar devil to aid him. The devil arrives in 1d4 rounds, acting as ally of the Moonlit King and obeying his spoken commands. The devil remains for 1 hour, until the Moonlit King dies, or until the King dismisses it as a bonus action.

3e7c4844-7c59-57a8-a41e-db4fda01a18b.name: Magic Resistance (Mordant Snare)
3e7c4844-7c59-57a8-a41e-db4fda01a18b.description: The mordant snare has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The mordant snare has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

d840b06c-49ef-5983-bd53-1bafb8728013.name: Mordant Puppets
d840b06c-49ef-5983-bd53-1bafb8728013.description: A mordant snare can spend 8 hours draining a dead Humanoid of its fluids and internal organs, replacing them with the snare’s acid and filaments. The Humanoid’s body then becomes a puppet controlled by the snare. Mordant puppets share a telepathic link with the snare, and each puppet uses the statistics of a zombie. The puppets can’t move more than 30 feet away from the snare. The mordant snare can have no more than twelve puppets under its control at one time.

The Humanoid’s body then becomes a puppet controlled by the snare. Mordant puppets share a telepathic link with the snare, and each puppet uses the statistics of a zombie. The puppets can’t move more than 30 feet away from the snare. The mordant snare can have no more than twelve puppets under its control at one time.

7d1a0ae6-4f8f-5ea1-9600-7cc246b58195.name: Acid Spike
7d1a0ae6-4f8f-5ea1-9600-7cc246b58195.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) acid damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) acid damage.

8f554758-db2d-573a-acc5-78faf9588dc6.name: Bite (Mordant Snare)
8f554758-db2d-573a-acc5-78faf9588dc6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 18 (4d8) acid damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 18 (4d8) acid damage.

3ee4876a-0d38-5fa6-bf0f-d9b9a6b250df.name: Hidden Trap
3ee4876a-0d38-5fa6-bf0f-d9b9a6b250df.description: While underground, the mordant snare covers itself in dirt, sand, or other material and lurks just below the surface. The mordant snare is indistinguishable from the ground around it while motionless and covered in this way. When a creature enters the mordant snare's space, the snare can make one Tentacle attack against the creature as a reaction, removing the covering material.

The mordant snare is indistinguishable from the ground around it while motionless and covered in this way. 06dde410-eeca-593c-9abe-e998fa30c178.name: Multiattack (Mordant Snare)
06dde410-eeca-593c-9abe-e998fa30c178.description: The mordant snare makes one Bite attack and four Tentacle attacks, or it makes four Acid Spike attacks.

attributes.description: The mordant snare makes one Bite attack and four Tentacle attacks, or it makes four Acid Spike attacks.

bc4d02eb-615e-5e71-9518-48cd40f8680f.name: Tentacle (Mordant Snare)
bc4d02eb-615e-5e71-9518-48cd40f8680f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18) if it is a Large or smaller creature. The mordant snare has eleven tentacles, each of which can grapple only one target.

7c7e2a30-a923-5588-9142-784a27e8d796.name: Amphibious (Morphoi)
7c7e2a30-a923-5588-9142-784a27e8d796.description: The morphoi can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The morphoi can breathe air and water.

60163ab5-02b7-5a49-becd-734de9fab5cc.name: Change Shape (Morphoi)
60163ab5-02b7-5a49-becd-734de9fab5cc.description: The morphoi transforms into a Medium Humanoid or back into its true form, which is a Plant. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form when it dies.

attributes.description: The morphoi transforms into a Medium Humanoid or back into its true form, which is a Plant. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form when it dies.

9b64437b-ceb7-563b-9b9b-3dc1439dfc28.name: Trident
9b64437b-ceb7-563b-9b9b-3dc1439dfc28.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

64a7fdac-7bdc-55e8-a07d-a65c39afcd97.name: Forest Camouflage (Moss Lurker)
64a7fdac-7bdc-55e8-a07d-a65c39afcd97.description: A moss lurker has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

attributes.description: A moss lurker has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

38284ba4-9e96-5308-aabb-55ccbf852e6f.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Moss Lurker)
38284ba4-9e96-5308-aabb-55ccbf852e6f.description: The moss lurker has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

attributes.description: The moss lurker has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

a02de7be-f779-55e8-91ca-5607c51e521d.name: Poisoned Gifts
a02de7be-f779-55e8-91ca-5607c51e521d.description: A moss lurker can spend 1 minute stirring one of its red claws in a drink or cooked meal, contaminating the food or drink. A creature that eats or drinks the contaminated food or drink must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 hour. A creature that fails this saving throw by 5 or more is also unconscious while poisoned in this way. The creature wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.

The creature wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.

8228a7bb-db85-5e15-acd1-a3c3746ff325.name: Poisoned Claw
8228a7bb-db85-5e15-acd1-a3c3746ff325.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

c13c9a53-d9ee-5323-8e72-18a560bfcccf.name: Throw Stone
c13c9a53-d9ee-5323-8e72-18a560bfcccf.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage. If the target is at least 10 feet below the moss lurker, such as at the base of a cliff where the moss lurker stands, the target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw or take 1d4 bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet the rock fell before hitting the target, to a maximum of 10d4.

dbc477fe-f30c-5e50-a9a5-38dcd83c6c49.name: Enfeebling Attacks
dbc477fe-f30c-5e50-a9a5-38dcd83c6c49.description: Each time the myling deals necrotic damage to a creature that is below half its hp maximum, the target’s Strength score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest.

92cc0a89-b9d6-572e-8cd5-0510fd39d3c9.name: Undead Nature (Myling)
92cc0a89-b9d6-572e-8cd5-0510fd39d3c9.description: The myling doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The myling doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

cb8b2be7-c229-537b-8140-0d840219bc59.name: Bury Alive
cb8b2be7-c229-537b-8140-0d840219bc59.description: The creature to which the myling is attached is knocked prone, dragged into the ground, and buried just below the surface, ending the attachment. The buried creature is restrained and unable to breathe or stand up. A creature, including the buried creature, can take its action to free the buried creature by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check.

a1c361b5-982e-522b-8b8d-62a14e6dc247.name: Claw (Myling)

While attached, the myling sinks its teeth into the target and can't attack, and at the start of each of the myling's turns, the target takes 17 (5d6) necrotic damage.

d606fb0d-0364-5ad3-b584-acccfb886d8f.name: Sense Magic (Naina)
d606fb0d-0364-5ad3-b584-acccfb886d8f.description: The naina senses magic within 120 feet of her at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

Her statistics, other than her size, are the same in each form. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true from if she dies.

06408b95-f9bb-579e-a5eb-580950bdaed7.description: The naina exhales paralyzing breath in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

fa430936-9c32-5205-8363-3f7a7b98a6c0.description: The naina exhales sleep gas around it. Each creature within 20 feet of the naina must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 10 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or another creature uses an action to wake it.

- **1/Day Each:** dimension door, dominate person

3b2da533-00a5-50a7-81f1-f1e54b439012.name: Multiple Heads
3b2da533-00a5-50a7-81f1-f1e54b439012.description: The necrohydra has five fleshy heads. While it has more than one head, the necrohydra has advantage on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious. Whenever the necrohydra takes 25 or more damage in a single turn, one of its fleshy heads dies. If all its fleshy heads die, the necrohydra can’t use Unnerving Faces and can’t use or maintain Dreadful Dirge.

65a159d4-bcaa-5d57-8337-8ce27baeab10.name: Reactive Heads
65a159d4-bcaa-5d57-8337-8ce27baeab10.description: For each head the necrohydra has beyond one, it gets an extra reaction that can be used only for opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: For each head the necrohydra has beyond one, it gets an extra reaction that can be used only for opportunity attacks.

46eb7a0c-f319-5c5d-8323-5e3564f50042.name: Undead Nature (Necrohydra)
46eb7a0c-f319-5c5d-8323-5e3564f50042.description: The necrohydra doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The necrohydra doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

f66fa0ba-902f-558e-ae04-366f19fb3d12.name: Bite (Necrohydra)
f66fa0ba-902f-558e-ae04-366f19fb3d12.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) necrotic damage.

14c4e940-5c8c-55ea-a8b6-eae8e4318479.name: Dreadful Dirge
14c4e940-5c8c-55ea-a8b6-eae8e4318479.description: The necrohydra's heads emit a cacophonous, moaning wail. Each creature that isn't a Construct or Undead within 30 feet of the necrohydra that can hear the wail must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the wail ends. The necrohydra must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue wailing. It can stop wailing at any time. The wail ends if the necrohydra is incapacitated. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

625abbf3-9dee-5963-b511-ad9f8adcf8d5.name: Multiattack (Necrohydra)
625abbf3-9dee-5963-b511-ad9f8adcf8d5.description: The necrohydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads.

attributes.description: The necrohydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads.

7902c978-f935-57e5-8aaf-7ae179101ed3.name: Necrotic Bile
7902c978-f935-57e5-8aaf-7ae179101ed3.description: The necrohydra spews rotten bile soaked in necrotic energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) poison damage and 18 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

132a891d-a1fa-59c4-84c7-338330f83dde.name: Elephants’ Bane
132a891d-a1fa-59c4-84c7-338330f83dde.description: The ngobou has advantage on attack rolls against elephants. It can pinpoint, by scent, the location of any elephant or elephant material no older than 48 hours within 120 feet of it.

6c84394c-b949-548b-9bfa-39ce73c1b8b5.name: Jagged Hide
6c84394c-b949-548b-9bfa-39ce73c1b8b5.description: At the start of each of its turns, the ngobou deals 4 (1d8) piercing damage to any creature grappling it.

attributes.description: At the start of each of its turns, the ngobou deals 4 (1d8) piercing damage to any creature grappling it.

322c8456-86ed-5ac6-8145-777196797cd9.name: Reckless
322c8456-86ed-5ac6-8145-777196797cd9.description: At the start of its turn, the ngobou can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls it makes during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn. If the ngobou detects an elephant within 120 feet of it, this trait is always active, and the ngobou can’t choose to end it until it starts its turn more than 120 feet from an elephant.

197a1d71-4d80-5534-b3e7-446fb9aa3df0.name: Trampling Charge
197a1d71-4d80-5534-b3e7-446fb9aa3df0.description: If the ngobou moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the ngobou can make one Stomp attack against it as a bonus action.

d306d39c-437d-5bf7-a2d3-78ed260fde24.name: Gore (Ngobou)
d306d39c-437d-5bf7-a2d3-78ed260fde24.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) piercing damage.

a4a8b5e6-5d46-50fa-9344-1aa9f3504272.name: Stomp (Ngobou)
a4a8b5e6-5d46-50fa-9344-1aa9f3504272.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

df699877-5090-5884-8c01-84b6706c2287.name: Aura of Luck
df699877-5090-5884-8c01-84b6706c2287.description: The nichny is surrounded by an aura that manipulates the luck of those near the nichny. Each friendly creature, other than the nichny, within 10 feet of the nichny has a +1 bonus to attack rolls and saving throws. Each hostile creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the nichny must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the end of its turn.

c37b8ecb-4342-5e78-aeb3-22dc33041010.name: Magic Resistance (Nichny)
c37b8ecb-4342-5e78-aeb3-22dc33041010.description: The nichny has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The nichny has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

96c76d92-a1e6-57b9-ba55-0098fb5dae4d.name: Soothsaying (1/Day)
96c76d92-a1e6-57b9-ba55-0098fb5dae4d.description: The nichny can spend 1 minute conversing with a creature it can see within 30 feet of it. During this time, the creature can ask up to three questions about the past, present, or future. At the end of the minute, the nichny then offers two truthful answers and one false answer, each in the form of a paradox, riddle, or cryptic rhyme.

b39634fa-14a0-56d6-a9bc-860415f7e03d.name: Claw (Nichny)
b39634fa-14a0-56d6-a9bc-860415f7e03d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) force damage.

3f50086f-0d2b-510a-8beb-e5a66a7ce40d.name: Create Lucky Stone
3f50086f-0d2b-510a-8beb-e5a66a7ce40d.description: The nichny magically imbues a small stone with good luck. A creature, other than the nichny, wearing or carrying the stone has a +1 bonus to saving throws. The nichny can have no more than three such stones actively imbued at a time. If it imbues a fourth, the effect on the oldest imbued stone ends. The nichny can end the magic on any of the stones at any time (no action required).

372d918e-1c45-532f-a30f-916026be5fc3.name: Luck-Stealing Bolt

7983c259-81c2-5e5f-aca6-ccbbcc4a9c19.name: Teleport (Nichny)
7983c259-81c2-5e5f-aca6-ccbbcc4a9c19.description: The nichny magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attributes.description: The nichny magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

1bae0908-049b-5076-bda7-ed22d156d0d8.name: Claw (Night Scorpion)
1bae0908-049b-5076-bda7-ed22d156d0d8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). The scorpion has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

b0805946-c5a5-55ae-9e11-f262afb0e2cc.name: Multiattack (Night Scorpion)
b0805946-c5a5-55ae-9e11-f262afb0e2cc.description: The scorpion makes two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

attributes.description: The scorpion makes two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

0e4d2496-5603-546e-903d-2a8776381ac3.name: Sting (Night Scorpion)
0e4d2496-5603-546e-903d-2a8776381ac3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 7 (2d6) poison damage and is blinded for 1 hour. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it is also poisoned for 1 minute, and it is paralyzed while poisoned in this way. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

62f42558-2f5e-5298-8918-f4a446fb6e2e.name: Telepathic Bond
62f42558-2f5e-5298-8918-f4a446fb6e2e.description: The nightgarm ignores the range restriction on its telepathy when communicating with a falseheart it has birthed. The nightgarm and its falseheart don’t need to be on the same plane of existence.

attributes.description: The nightgarm ignores the range restriction on its telepathy when communicating with a falseheart it has birthed. The nightgarm and its falseheart don’t need to be on the same plane of existence.

2bbbc07d-2116-55b1-96a3-15d8a49a3696.name: Bite (Nightgarm)
2bbbc07d-2116-55b1-96a3-15d8a49a3696.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be swallowed. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the nightgarm, and it takes 10 (3d6) acid damage at the start of each of the nightgarm's turns. The nightgarm can have only one creature swallowed at a time.
