da354693-4ef7-53ab-ab75-ed25f12dc92e.name: Lupine Howl
da354693-4ef7-53ab-ab75-ed25f12dc92e.description: The nightgarm magically calls 2d4 wolves or 2 dire wolves. The wolves arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the nightgarm and obeying her telepathic commands. The wolves remain for 1 hour, until the nightgarm dies, or until the nightgarm dismisses them as a bonus action.

dd8d6664-5981-5392-880e-e8f6a8571644.name: Multiattack (Nightgarm)
dd8d6664-5981-5392-880e-e8f6a8571644.description: The nightgarm makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The nightgarm makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

3f4bfe11-3abd-503b-962d-5f78da95b122.name: Ghostly Body (Void Ghost Form Only)
3f4bfe11-3abd-503b-962d-5f78da95b122.description: The nihileth has resistance to acid, fire, lightning, and thunder damage, it has immunity to the prone condition, and it has immunity to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, the nihileth can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

4147ba16-119a-56bc-841f-8c5c737fbafb.name: Infecting Telepathy
4147ba16-119a-56bc-841f-8c5c737fbafb.description: If a creature communicates telepathically with the nihileth, or deals psychic damage to it, the creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become infected with the nihilethic rot disease.

attributes.description: If a creature communicates telepathically with the nihileth, or deals psychic damage to it, the creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become infected with the nihilethic rot disease.

bf560b60-79fa-5046-8941-8d50ab23b0f0.name: Nihilethic Rot
bf560b60-79fa-5046-8941-8d50ab23b0f0.description: This disease takes 1 minute to manifest in an infected creature, during which time the disease can be removed with the lesser restoration spell. After 1 minute, the creature’s flesh becomes slimy and translucent, and the disease can be cured only by the heal spell or similar magic. Until this disease is cured, the creature can’t regain hp unless it is submerged in water, and it can breathe air and water. The creature must be submerged in water at least once every 2 hours to avoid suffocating, and if it is outside a body of water, it takes 7 (2d6) acid damage every 10 minutes, unless moisture is applied to its skin before 10 minutes have passed. If a Humanoid dies while infected with this disease, it rises 1 minute later as a nihilethic zombie under the nihileth’s control. If a Large giant or monstrosity dies while infected with this disease, it rises 1 minute later as a nihilethic dominator under the nihileth’s control.

02d9f1e2-53a3-5dbd-a8f5-6d02494b14df.name: Undead Fortitude
02d9f1e2-53a3-5dbd-a8f5-6d02494b14df.description: If damage reduces the nihileth to 0 hp, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the nihileth drops to 1 hp instead.

d19ebceb-126f-57e8-b993-d7d3002d8a75.name: Void Aura
d19ebceb-126f-57e8-b993-d7d3002d8a75.description: The nihileth is surrounded by a chilling cloud. A creature that isn’t a construct or undead and that starts its turn within 5 feet of the nihileth must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or its speed is halved until the start of its next turn. In addition, a creature infected with nihilethic rot takes 7 (2d6) cold damage when it starts its turn within this aura.

0eec958e-1208-5c55-bf30-75ec4c825cc4.name: Detect (Nihileth)
0eec958e-1208-5c55-bf30-75ec4c825cc4.description: The nihileth makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.

cd296c10-39af-51fd-a4f7-8ca23037491e.name: Rotten Drain

bee70ee2-ed14-5731-96c1-4758f13325de.name: Tail (Nihileth)
bee70ee2-ed14-5731-96c1-4758f13325de.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft. one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

0c313c8e-d9e1-5db9-bef4-a3bfe4b34083.name: Tail Swipe
0c313c8e-d9e1-5db9-bef4-a3bfe4b34083.description: The nihileth makes one Tail attack.

ca8cebab-8b03-50c3-adbc-248351a34994.name: Tentacle (Nihileth)

b48ec9cf-f6fd-5779-b5a7-e7fbe2d61325.name: Void Body
b48ec9cf-f6fd-5779-b5a7-e7fbe2d61325.description: When the nihileth takes damage, it can reduce the damage to 0. Radiant damage can be reduced by only half.

0e81300d-4f61-559d-8b7c-0e9cb34cdfa8.name: Void Shape
0e81300d-4f61-559d-8b7c-0e9cb34cdfa8.description: The nihileth magically transforms into a dark purple, Void ghost form or back into its Undead form. Its statistics, other than its speed, resistances, and immunities, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying changes with it. It reverts to its Undead form if it dies.

7c73d221-0dd8-5ba0-876b-509fd7537e6d.name: Ghostly Body (Void Ghost Form Only) (Nihilethic Dominator)

3fe8825b-6a3b-5256-afc0-31b685c1ed18.name: Sacrifice Life
3fe8825b-6a3b-5256-afc0-31b685c1ed18.description: When the nihilethic zombie's controlling nihileth takes damage while within 30 feet of the zombie, the zombie can send its life force to the nihileth. The zombie's hp is reduced by up to the amount of damage the nihileth took, preventing that amount of damage to the nihileth. If this damage reduces the zombie to 0 hp, it is immediately destroyed. A nihileth can benefit from only one zombie's Sacrifice Life for each source of damage it takes.

6bc68c69-843f-5e20-9255-edbf8f878efc.name: Hundreds of Eyes
6bc68c69-843f-5e20-9255-edbf8f878efc.description: The oculo swarm has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight and on saving throws against being blinded. In addition, if the swarm isn’t blinded, creatures attacking it can’t benefit from traits and features that rely on a creature’s allies distracting or surrounding the swarm, such as the Pack Tactics trait or Sneak Attack class feature.

47920eb9-c28d-5eb6-b4fc-a27c772399cf.name: Swarm (Oculo Swarm)
47920eb9-c28d-5eb6-b4fc-a27c772399cf.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny eyeball. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny eyeball. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

ab9b4d84-bf5b-59a3-8687-30334b1a39ca.name: Disorienting Gaze
ab9b4d84-bf5b-59a3-8687-30334b1a39ca.description: The swarm's many eyes suddenly turn in different directions. Each creature within 10 feet of the oculo swarm must make a DC 13 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) psychic damage and is disoriented until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't disoriented. A disoriented creature is incapacitated and moves in a random direction when it moves.

5658a38b-9fff-5b82-be57-da0919cf62c8.name: Extract Eye
5658a38b-9fff-5b82-be57-da0919cf62c8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 18 (4d8) piercing damage, or 9 (2d8) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 18 (4d8) piercing damage, or 9 (2d8) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer.

a93d08f5-3147-59c1-8d4a-09cdca8e42ef.name: Multiattack (Oculo Swarm)
a93d08f5-3147-59c1-8d4a-09cdca8e42ef.description: The oculo swarm makes two Extract Eye attacks. If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or the swarm removes one of its eyes. While missing half or fewer of its total number of eyes, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. While missing more than half its total number of eyes, the target is blinded until its sight is restored. If the target's eye is recovered from the defeated swarm, it can be reattached with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check, provided the eye is reattached within 1 hour of the target losing the eye.

3533c3ae-65dc-5b9a-a6a2-4c80c6a0b37c.name: Amorphous (Oozasis)
3533c3ae-65dc-5b9a-a6a2-4c80c6a0b37c.description: The oozasis can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The oozasis can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide without squeezing.

bb7fd8b4-8bec-54fc-ae17-401d8e584b2d.name: Oasis Appearance
bb7fd8b4-8bec-54fc-ae17-401d8e584b2d.description: While the oozasis remains motionless and partially submerged on the surface of sand or soil, it is indistinguishable from a small oasis or pond. The oozasis’s body provides enough water for plants to grow around it, provided the oozasis remains in the area for an extended period of time. A creature that eats a fruit from a plant growing in the oozasis’s water is affected by the Waters of Unfathomable Compulsion trait as if it drank the water.

attributes.description: While the oozasis remains motionless and partially submerged on the surface of sand or soil, it is indistinguishable from a small oasis or pond. The oozasis’s body provides enough water for plants to grow around it, provided the oozasis remains in the area for an extended period of time. A creature that eats a fruit from a plant growing in the oozasis’s water is affected by the Waters of Unfathomable Compulsion trait as if it drank the water.
The oozasis doesn’t require sleep.

16315530-816b-59d3-9844-c1841bc35eb5.name: Waters of Unfathomable Compulsion
16315530-816b-59d3-9844-c1841bc35eb5.description: A creature that drinks the water of an oozasis experiences a cryptic dream the next time it sleeps. When it wakes, it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be affected by the geas spell for 30 days. While under the geas, the affected creature must perform a specific, seemingly minor task that furthers the decades-long goals of the oozasis. Such a task could be planting a white rose in a specific garden, rescuing the next endangered young animal the target encounters, or standing in a specific spot at a certain time each day for three days.

attributes.description: A creature that drinks the water of an oozasis experiences a cryptic dream the next time it sleeps. When it wakes, it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be affected by the geas spell for 30 days. While under the geas, the affected creature must perform a specific, seemingly minor task that furthers the decades-long goals of the oozasis. Such a task could be planting a white rose in a specific garden, rescuing the next endangered young animal the target encounters, or standing in a specific spot at a certain time each day for three days.

6218c0f4-8924-5cfa-93c4-2d3530056a07.name: Compelling Vapors
6218c0f4-8924-5cfa-93c4-2d3530056a07.description: The oozasis emits mind-altering vapors. Each creature within 20 feet of the oozasis must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 45 (10d8) psychic damage and suffers either tranquility or turmoil for minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't suffer tranquility or turmoil. A creature suffering tranquility is charmed and can't attack. A creature suffering turmoil is unable to distinguish friend from foe and must move to and attack the nearest creature other than the oozasis on each of its turns, stalking off in a random direction if no creature is in range. A creature suffering tranquility or turmoil can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The oozasis can have up to two creatures grappled at a time.

210470b4-a13a-5919-aaaa-c91aa8afe3a0.name: Magic Resistance (Orobas Devil)
210470b4-a13a-5919-aaaa-c91aa8afe3a0.description: The orobas has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

f9a978ff-5503-51b2-b410-9e9714d5cda1.name: Sense Consecrated (Orobas Devil)
f9a978ff-5503-51b2-b410-9e9714d5cda1.description: The orobas can pinpoint the location of Celestials, consecrated places or objects, and creatures wielding divine or celestial power, such as clerics, paladins, or aasimars, within 60 feet of it.

de18d85e-248f-5822-b73a-12504ec886ab.name: Bite (Orobas Devil)
de18d85e-248f-5822-b73a-12504ec886ab.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) fire damage and 10 (3d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

d9e1033e-f4f7-5383-b2cd-b601d9d9cc70.name: Prediction

46eb8515-51ec-52af-92ef-f173539d2d60.name: Spellcasting (Orobas Devil)
46eb8515-51ec-52af-92ef-f173539d2d60.description:
The orobas casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):

- **At Will:** augury, detect thoughts, guidance
- **3/Day Each:** locate creature, nondetection
- **1/Day Each:** contact other plane (as an action), legend lore (as an action)

181da221-8e79-5985-98d3-0779a427c4ca.name: Teleport (Orobas Devil)
181da221-8e79-5985-98d3-0779a427c4ca.description: The orobas magically teleports, along with any equipment, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attributes.description: The orobas magically teleports, along with any equipment, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

cddb0a46-c4d5-50fc-834b-13359a2ed466.name: Incorporeal Movement (Ostinato)
cddb0a46-c4d5-50fc-834b-13359a2ed466.description: The ostinato can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The ostinato can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
The ostinato is invisible.

2fc00b38-8ff2-5bcd-9d59-65cb0ad02e99.name: Magic Resistance (Ostinato)
2fc00b38-8ff2-5bcd-9d59-65cb0ad02e99.description: The ostinato has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ostinato has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

bd6fa788-0562-53a8-8a51-a0bfba113325.name: Aural Symbiosis
bd6fa788-0562-53a8-8a51-a0bfba113325.description: One Humanoid that the ostinato can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or the ostinato merges with the target, becoming an enjoyable, repetitive tune in its host's mind. The ostinato can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, and it can't attack. The host retains control of its body and is aware of the ostinato's presence only as a melody, not as a living entity. The host no longer needs to eat or drink, gains the ostinato's Magic Resistance trait, and has advantage on Charisma checks. In addition, the host has disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws, and it can't maintain concentration on spells or other effects. At the end of each long rest, the host can make a DC 13 Wisdom (Insight) check, realizing that the music it hears comes from an external entity on a success.

595919d5-683a-5a13-852e-2db9de2be70e.name: Cacophony Burst
595919d5-683a-5a13-852e-2db9de2be70e.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) thunder damage.

6b938065-f1eb-51bb-872f-569e11be6dfa.name: Contagious Tune
6b938065-f1eb-51bb-872f-569e11be6dfa.description: While merged with a Humanoid host, the ostinato fills the minds of nearby creatures with the same catchy tune playing in its host's mind. Each creature within 30 feet of the ostinato's host must make a DC 13 Charisma saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The ostinato then gains temporary hp equal to the single highest amount of psychic damage dealt. A deafened creature is immune to Contagious Tune.

1b82f083-fc61-5256-8e86-0ab303f97fcf.name: Hypersensitive Hearing
1b82f083-fc61-5256-8e86-0ab303f97fcf.description: The owl harpy has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing, and it can’t use its blindsight while deafened.

9187b14a-94b1-5e8d-8093-f408a7500cc6.name: Quiet Wings
9187b14a-94b1-5e8d-8093-f408a7500cc6.description: The owl harpy has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide while flying.

1f20018a-17fa-51b2-b989-33a0bd76ebab.name: Claw (Owl Harpy)
1f20018a-17fa-51b2-b989-33a0bd76ebab.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) slashing damage.

bcbca26f-bd58-5cde-8048-0d23495f1241.name: Hovering Darkness
bcbca26f-bd58-5cde-8048-0d23495f1241.description: While flying, the owl harpy shakes a fine, magical dander from her wings, and a 15-foot radius of magical darkness extends out from her, moves with her, and spreads around corners. The darkness lasts as long as the owl harpy flies and maintains concentration, up to 10 minutes (as if concentrating on a spell). Darkvision can't penetrate this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled.

be7f99cb-4ed1-51b2-aaff-785cf8a1b32a.name: Sleeping Song
be7f99cb-4ed1-51b2-aaff-785cf8a1b32a.description: The owl harpy sings a magical melody. Every Humanoid and Giant within 300 feet of the harpy that can hear the song must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or fall unconscious until the song ends. The harpy must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue singing. It can stop singing at any time. The song ends if the harpy is incapacitated. An unconscious target wakes if it takes damage or if another creature uses an action to wake it. A target that successfully saves is immune to this harpy's song for the next 24 hours.

43e47958-9fb9-576e-9300-dc94f06c3af0.description: The pact vampire can pinpoint the location of creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

0a4b88c1-3d42-5671-9721-a1a137138076.description: The pact vampire regains 25 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp and isn’t in sunlight. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the vampire’s next turn.

2a9d8f02-3afe-548b-996f-e65e156e9fd9.description: One Humanoid the vampire can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or be magically charmed for 1 day. The charmed target obeys the vampire's verbal commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to this vampire's Charm for the next 24 hours.

1d79cacb-eec8-5539-92fb-d392264653a3.name: Children of the Lower Planes

The called Fiends arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the vampire and obeying its spoken commands. The Fiends remain for 1 hour, until the vampire dies, or until the vampire dismisses them as a bonus action.

499d3278-2c7e-5c0c-99d3-faff408a27b9.description: The pact vampire's blood briefly turns into a mist around it. Each creature within 15 feet of the vampire must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) poison damage and be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

8bee41d0-adfa-5e36-8d87-c190c5fd4f7f.name: Bibliophile (Paper Drake)
8bee41d0-adfa-5e36-8d87-c190c5fd4f7f.description: The paper drake understands any written language it can see, provided it is touching the surface on which the words are written.

b24d8cc4-a0a3-57ed-9d91-9cbaef8041d4.description: While the drake remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary book.

f37d5e97-cf6e-5e7e-a26b-d5b5424aadcf.name: Bite (Paper Drake)

e7566070-fbac-5808-b68e-591d7c4a62f7.name: Book Flap
e7566070-fbac-5808-b68e-591d7c4a62f7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the drake can fly up to 15 feet without provoking opportunity attacks, as it flaps its pages.

d2a4843d-da01-5c3f-906e-603a4e4cc50f.name: Fold
d2a4843d-da01-5c3f-906e-603a4e4cc50f.description: The paper drake can fold and reshape its papery body to change its size between Tiny, Small, and Medium. It can also use this bonus action to fold itself into the shape of a book, which doesn't have wings, or back into its Small form. Without wings, it loses its flying speed. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. It reverts to its Small form if it dies.

b0fcf2ce-ba78-5597-9ae0-d26165f602a8.name: Shredded Breath
b0fcf2ce-ba78-5597-9ae0-d26165f602a8.description: (Dragon Form Only) The drake exhales sharp shreds of paper in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 10 (4d4) slashing damage and is blinded until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded.

fcfc1eaa-d55c-5c5d-94d7-e106e8506034.name: Planar Sense
fcfc1eaa-d55c-5c5d-94d7-e106e8506034.description: The planewatcher can pinpoint the location of creatures not native to the plane the planewatcher currently occupies and planar portals within 60 feet of it, and the planewatcher can sense the general direction of such creatures and portals within 1 mile of it.

80d79eed-1847-55e9-995e-1481bae8d484.description: The planewatcher is immune to any spell or effect that would force it to leave its current plane, unless it wants to leave.

2c7fe454-7344-5ab5-bfa1-dde62eaa7b48.name: Word-Bound
2c7fe454-7344-5ab5-bfa1-dde62eaa7b48.description: The planewatcher always knows the direction and distance to any creature that dispels, breaks, or otherwise avoids the geas of the promise it made via Planar Ultimatum, provided the planewatcher and the creature are on the same plane of existence. While grappling such a creature, it can cast the banishment spell as a bonus action (spell save DC 17) on that creature.

e984a110-cb4c-594f-81fc-384ccde4fc34.name: Multiattack (Planewatcher)
e984a110-cb4c-594f-81fc-384ccde4fc34.description: The planewatcher makes one Radiant Lasso attack and two Enervating Blast attacks, or it makes three Enervating Blast attacks. It can replace two attacks with a use of Planar Ultimatum.

attributes.description: The planewatcher makes one Radiant Lasso attack and two Enervating Blast attacks, or it makes three Enervating Blast attacks. It can replace two attacks with a use of Planar Ultimatum.

caf4321d-349b-56f3-87a4-e27d1bde7d58.name: Planar Ultimatum
caf4321d-349b-56f3-87a4-e27d1bde7d58.description: The planewatcher demands one creature grappled by it to return to the creature's home plane within 24 hours. If the creature doesn't swear to do so, it must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one If the creature swears to return, it becomes affected by the geas spell for 30 days, which compels the creature to return to its home plane as soon as possible.

attributes.description: The planewatcher demands one creature grappled by it to return to the creature's home plane within 24 hours. If the creature doesn't swear to do so, it must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one If the creature swears to return, it becomes affected by the geas spell for 30 days, which compels the creature to return to its home plane as soon as possible.

f9cc6052-860a-535e-beac-3e90e3fc353f.name: Radiant Lasso
f9cc6052-860a-535e-beac-3e90e3fc353f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d6 + 4) radiant damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16) if the planewatcher isn't already grappling a creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, can't tell a lie, and can't teleport or be transported to another plane of existence unless the planewatcher wills it.

129bb0ab-7097-55fc-ab59-3da9ba54888c.name: Reel (Planewatcher)
129bb0ab-7097-55fc-ab59-3da9ba54888c.description: The planewatcher pulls a creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

attributes.description: The planewatcher pulls a creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

5172d6a2-dd47-55c8-9914-bab829376da7.name: Contortionist
5172d6a2-dd47-55c8-9914-bab829376da7.description: The pombero can contort its body into unnatural positions, allowing it to easily move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The pombero’s destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

attributes.description: The pombero can contort its body into unnatural positions, allowing it to easily move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The pombero’s destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

3b0c8357-3b53-5eaa-9d03-c8b2ab51c9a6.name: Forest Camouflage (Pombero)
3b0c8357-3b53-5eaa-9d03-c8b2ab51c9a6.description: The pombero has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

attributes.description: The pombero has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

81561627-2cf4-58ad-aa89-79dc7d72e8b9.name: Speak with Beasts (Pombero)
81561627-2cf4-58ad-aa89-79dc7d72e8b9.description: The pombero can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The pombero can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

153faf9d-59cc-51e9-9012-02877f37fe15.name: Charming Touch
153faf9d-59cc-51e9-9012-02877f37fe15.description: One creature the pombero can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 10 minutes. If the target suffers any harm, the effect ends. Otherwise, the target can repeat the saving throw at the end of every minute, ending the effect on itself on a success. The pombero can have only one creature charmed at a time. If it charms another, the effect on the previous creature ends.

ee14397c-f11a-5ac8-b761-31065205027b.name: Invisibility (Pombero)
ee14397c-f11a-5ac8-b761-31065205027b.description: The pombero magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Charming Touch, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the pombero wears or carries is invisible with it.

cf554d4f-19f7-5430-96ac-a45494217a0e.description: The pombero makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Charming Touch, if available.

3ac0933f-67d8-5a70-b4c0-a6194f5df528.name: Slam (Pombero)
3ac0933f-67d8-5a70-b4c0-a6194f5df528.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

def8b061-8273-5cbc-9214-f6d6caa2b129.name: Construct Nature (Possessed Pillar)
def8b061-8273-5cbc-9214-f6d6caa2b129.description: The possessed pillar doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The possessed pillar doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

c1f9d3ba-7bbf-52b3-93f6-d852aaa03430.name: Divine Fists
c1f9d3ba-7bbf-52b3-93f6-d852aaa03430.description: The possessed pillar’s weapon attacks are magical. When the pillar hits with a Slam attack, the Slam deals an extra 2d8 necrotic damage or radiant damage (included in the attack), the pillar’s choice.

1fa4dfec-f647-5c80-b829-8595d758c1cb.name: False Appearance (Possessed Pillar)
1fa4dfec-f647-5c80-b829-8595d758c1cb.description: While the pillar remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a statue or a carved column.

attributes.description: While the pillar remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a statue or a carved column.

da061efa-eee4-5b9b-9a0d-a043a4cec337.name: Immutable Form (Possessed Pillar)
da061efa-eee4-5b9b-9a0d-a043a4cec337.description: The pillar is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The pillar is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

38f145f2-252b-51d8-b337-35d98fd04083.name: Magic Resistance (Possessed Pillar)
38f145f2-252b-51d8-b337-35d98fd04083.description: The pillar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The pillar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

4c5b4bc6-74b7-5fdf-b512-c39be6e91cb5.name: Magnetic Body
4c5b4bc6-74b7-5fdf-b512-c39be6e91cb5.description: The eldritch magic powering the possessed pillar causes the pillar’s body to produce a minor magnetic field. When a creature hits the pillar with a weapon made of metal, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or the weapon sticks to the pillar. If the creature can’t or won’t let go of the weapon, it is also stuck to the pillar and restrained. A stuck weapon can’t be used. A creature can take its action to remove one metal object from the pillar by succeeding on a DC 15 Strength check. The pillar can release one creature or metal object stuck to it as a bonus action. If the pillar dies, all creatures and metal objects stuck to it are released.

ffb446b0-3a8a-5226-a4b7-86bea3f776e4.name: Invisibility (Psoglav)
ffb446b0-3a8a-5226-a4b7-86bea3f776e4.description: The psoglav magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Shadow-Stealing Ray, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the psoglav wears or carries is invisible with it.

6a378f5f-d60d-5c1c-b870-407e48310fd7.name: Multiattack (Psoglav)
6a378f5f-d60d-5c1c-b870-407e48310fd7.description: The psoglav makes three Bite attacks.

7fc63e3a-9dd2-510d-9086-6c0cf9db6753.name: Shadow Jump
7fc63e3a-9dd2-510d-9086-6c0cf9db6753.description: While in shadows, dim light, or darkness, the psoglav disappears into the darkness and reappears in an unoccupied space it can see within 60 feet.

attributes.description: While in shadows, dim light, or darkness, the psoglav disappears into the darkness and reappears in an unoccupied space it can see within 60 feet.

f93dd4d2-1834-5d65-b447-460e499296f9.name: Shadow-Stealing Ray
f93dd4d2-1834-5d65-b447-460e499296f9.description: The psoglav emits a beam from its single eye at one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target is pushed up to 20 feet away from the psoglav, and its shadow becomes a creature under the psoglav's control for 24 hours or until the shadow is reduced to 0 hp. On a success, the target is pushed up to 10 feet away from the psoglav and its shadow isn't stolen. Each controlled shadow uses the statistics of a shadow, except it can't create shadows from killing Humanoids. The psoglav can have no more than five shadows under its control at a time. The shadow becomes permanently under the psoglav's control if the shadow's original owner dies.

3ed11d15-d1d8-50c6-9e0e-c9ecb9d3f9ff.name: False Appearance (Putrid Haunt)
3ed11d15-d1d8-50c6-9e0e-c9ecb9d3f9ff.description: While the putrid haunt remains motionless and prone in swampy terrain, it is indistinguishable from a pile of muck and moss.

03931168-f5af-52a5-80da-ebb4e80ca212.name: Swamp Walk
03931168-f5af-52a5-80da-ebb4e80ca212.description: Difficult terrain composed of mud, shallow water, and water plants doesn’t cost the putrid haunt extra movement.

9731362d-1d41-572a-ae6b-d0e7a2ed935a.name: Undead Nature (Putrid Haunt)
9731362d-1d41-572a-ae6b-d0e7a2ed935a.description: The putrid haunt doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The putrid haunt doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

3ffb9179-b40f-51a2-be97-1ed3d69fde51.name: Expel Vermin
3ffb9179-b40f-51a2-be97-1ed3d69fde51.description: The putrid haunt vomits forth the leeches, stinging insects, and other swamp vermin infesting its innards in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage and 7 (2d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

d5742ceb-a158-5ff9-a9a7-198c6ef8503c.name: Tunneler (Qorgeth)
d5742ceb-a158-5ff9-a9a7-198c6ef8503c.description: Qorgeth can burrow through solid rock and leaves a 15-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

5e09d1d7-701c-5ca1-9662-f32523bb39f4.name: Bite (Qorgeth)
5e09d1d7-701c-5ca1-9662-f32523bb39f4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (2d12 + 9) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by Qorgeth. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the worm, and it takes 16 (3d10) necrotic damage at the start of each of Qorgeth's turns.

29362e6e-2476-51a0-a430-a84327722aa8.description: Qorgeth moves up to half its speed straight toward a creature and makes one Crush attack against the creature. Each object and structure between Qorgeth and the target takes 33 (6d10) bludgeoning damage.

2e21d808-6cfd-57c6-aeeb-5ada1f643323.description:
Qorgeth casts one of the following spells, requiring no material or somatic components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 19):

- **At Will:** black tentacles, detect magic
- **3/Day Each:** dispel magic, insect plague (biting worms)
- **1/Day Each:** earthquake, teleport (self only)

On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A creature that fails the saving throw by 10 or more is also paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

a1f073d1-128b-5925-8812-064fb7da9782.name: Shadow Rift
a1f073d1-128b-5925-8812-064fb7da9782.description: The Queen of Night and Magic creates a shadowy rift on a point she can see within 120 feet. Each creature within the 20 feet of the rift must make a DC 23 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) cold damage and 36 (8d8) necrotic damage and is restrained by wisps of icy shadow for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained. A restrained creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Each creature within the 20 feet of the rift must make a DC 23 Constitution saving throw. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained. A restrained creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7332a361-e2ba-5bf1-944f-11d24d8fcea4.name: Spellcasting (Queen of Night and Magic)
7332a361-e2ba-5bf1-944f-11d24d8fcea4.description:
The Queen of Night and Magic casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 23):

- **At Will:** command, dancing lights, darkness, mage hand, suggestion
- **3/Day Each:** confusion, fear, greater invisibility, mirror image
- **1/Day Each:** dominate monster, plane shift, power word stun

- **At Will:** command, dancing lights, darkness, mage hand, suggestion
- **3/Day Each:** confusion, fear, greater invisibility, mirror image
- **1/Day Each:** dominate monster, plane shift, power word stun

dac19f50-4598-50c0-abe1-adfacb6d9d6a.name: Star Strike
dac19f50-4598-50c0-abe1-adfacb6d9d6a.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +15 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d8 + 8) fire damage plus 9 (2d8) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +15 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d8 + 8) fire damage plus 9 (2d8) radiant damage.

4419d5ba-f8ea-5db0-8376-cf841b6ea34e.name: Sudden Fraying
4419d5ba-f8ea-5db0-8376-cf841b6ea34e.description: When the Queen of Night and Magic is targeted by a spell or included in a spell's area and the spell doesn't have an instantaneous duration, she can use Unravel on the spell, dispelling it after it is cast. She doesn't need to see a spell to target it with this reaction, but she must be able to see at least some portion of an area or object affected by the spell.

1116e469-21f7-57f2-8874-424c7a78b514.name: Swirling Stars
1116e469-21f7-57f2-8874-424c7a78b514.description: The stars on the Queen's gown pulse with brilliant starlight. Each creature within 15 feet of her must succeed on a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The stars on the Queen's gown pulse with brilliant starlight. Each creature within 15 feet of her must succeed on a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

a207091f-4255-54d7-9bc7-038c2ebd478a.name: Unravel
a207091f-4255-54d7-9bc7-038c2ebd478a.description: The Queen of Night and Magic ends one magical effect she can see within 60 feet of her. To do so, she must succeed on a Charisma check against a DC of 10 + the spell's level or the magical effect's DC, whichever is higher.

attributes.description: The Queen of Night and Magic ends one magical effect she can see within 60 feet of her. To do so, she must succeed on a Charisma check against a DC of 10 + the spell's level or the magical effect's DC, whichever is higher.

ae3cd1d8-04bb-503b-8836-634acc79a719.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Queen of Witches)
ae3cd1d8-04bb-503b-8836-634acc79a719.description: If the Queen of Witches fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the Queen of Witches fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

b1e1417c-886b-5891-8dbf-eb0efd99a957.name: Magic Resistance (Queen of Witches)
b1e1417c-886b-5891-8dbf-eb0efd99a957.description: The Queen of Witches has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The Queen of Witches has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

e30e51e8-7813-5737-a4c9-ddb7bab791e9.name: Moonlit Weapons (Queen of Witches)
e30e51e8-7813-5737-a4c9-ddb7bab791e9.description: The Queen of Witches’s weapon attacks are magical. When she hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 7 (2d6) radiant damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The Queen of Witches’s weapon attacks are magical. When she hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 7 (2d6) radiant damage (included in the attack).

dd47e5f5-3460-517e-a333-f7e99ab1aada.name: Token of Favor
dd47e5f5-3460-517e-a333-f7e99ab1aada.description: The Queen of Witches can spend 1 minute cutting and tying a lock of her hair into a small token of her favor. A creature that is wearing or carrying the favor gains the benefits of the Magic Resistance trait. The Queen can revoke this magic at any time (no action required). If she does so, the creature has disadvantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects for 24 hours.

attributes.description: The Queen of Witches can spend 1 minute cutting and tying a lock of her hair into a small token of her favor. A creature that is wearing or carrying the favor gains the benefits of the Magic Resistance trait. The Queen can revoke this magic at any time (no action required). If she does so, the creature has disadvantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects for 24 hours.

c4755a8f-2c5a-5f1e-a13f-5876167abecc.name: Absorb Spell
c4755a8f-2c5a-5f1e-a13f-5876167abecc.description: When a creature the Queen of Witches can see within 30 feet of her casts a spell, the Queen can absorb the spell's energy, countering it. This works like the counterspell spell, except the Queen must always make a spellcasting ability check, no matter the spell's level. Her ability check for this is +10. If she successfully counters the spell, she regains 5 hp for each level of the spell.

This works like the counterspell spell, except the Queen must always make a spellcasting ability check, no matter the spell's level. Her ability check for this is +10. If she successfully counters the spell, she regains 5 hp for each level of the spell.

ba74c796-86ac-5066-997a-5437b008236d.name: Cast a Spell (Queen of Witches)
ba74c796-86ac-5066-997a-5437b008236d.description: The Queen of Witches uses Spellcasting.

attributes.description: The Queen of Witches uses Spellcasting.

e2fcc19f-39de-53a4-9a6b-4a579d4290ca.name: Moonsilver Ring
e2fcc19f-39de-53a4-9a6b-4a579d4290ca.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) radiant damage.

8ca9be34-5ecc-5562-801b-eee7d902f7c9.name: Multiattack (Queen of Witches)
8ca9be34-5ecc-5562-801b-eee7d902f7c9.description: The Queen of Witches makes three Moonsilver Ring attacks or four Mystical Blast attacks. She can replace one attack with a use of spellcasting. If she hits one creature with two Mystical Blast attacks, the target must succeed on a DC 20 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from her.

If she hits one creature with two Mystical Blast attacks, the target must succeed on a DC 20 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from her.

3be01989-729b-555f-911f-f5414b4273e5.name: Mystical Blast
3be01989-729b-555f-911f-f5414b4273e5.description: The Queen makes one Mystical Blast attack.

attributes.description: The Queen makes one Mystical Blast attack.

07146098-3c63-51f4-a057-61b3efb09fc5.name: Spellcasting (Queen of Witches)
07146098-3c63-51f4-a057-61b3efb09fc5.description:
The Queen of Witches casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (save DC 20):

- **At Will:** faerie fire, silent image, tongues
- **3/Day Each:** dispel magic, hypnotic pattern, teleportation circle (as an action)
- **2/Day Each:** bestow curse, mass suggestion, flesh to stone
- **1/Day Each:** power word kill, sleep (as a 9th level spell), true polymorph

attributes.description:
The Queen of Witches casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (save DC 20):

- **At Will:** faerie fire, silent image, tongues
- **3/Day Each:** dispel magic, hypnotic pattern, teleportation circle (as an action)
- **2/Day Each:** bestow curse, mass suggestion, flesh to stone
- **1/Day Each:** power word kill, sleep (as a 9th level spell), true polymorph

d5ecc930-ac9a-5cbe-be2d-8276d00d7ea9.name: Spray of Moonlight
d5ecc930-ac9a-5cbe-be2d-8276d00d7ea9.description: The Queen of Witches sends moonlight flooding out from her. Each creature within 15 feet of her must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the Queen is standing in an area of moonlight when she uses this action, each creature in the area has disadvantage on the saving throw. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is blinded until the end of its next turn.

3950372e-c180-5911-bf90-a5f473c15e5a.name: Teleport (Queen of Witches)
3950372e-c180-5911-bf90-a5f473c15e5a.description: The Queen magically teleports, along with any equipment she is wearing or carrying, to an unoccupied space she can see within 60 feet.

attributes.description: The Queen magically teleports, along with any equipment she is wearing or carrying, to an unoccupied space she can see within 60 feet.

71c971f8-86f6-5b6f-b028-3af2daad0ce8.name: Bludgeoning Bounce (Orb Form Only)
71c971f8-86f6-5b6f-b028-3af2daad0ce8.description: Whenever the quicksilver siege orb is subjected to bludgeoning damage, it takes no damage and instead is pushed up to 15 feet away from the source of the bludgeoning damage. If the damage is from a critical hit, the orb is pushed up to 30 feet.

attributes.description: Whenever the quicksilver siege orb is subjected to bludgeoning damage, it takes no damage and instead is pushed up to 15 feet away from the source of the bludgeoning damage. If the damage is from a critical hit, the orb is pushed up to 30 feet.

54bbbda6-ed20-564d-ad05-09d78c8576d7.name: Construct Nature (Quicksilver Siege Orb)
54bbbda6-ed20-564d-ad05-09d78c8576d7.description: The quicksilver siege orb doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The quicksilver siege orb doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

3d07c13a-4be2-5c3a-bdef-252135d50599.name: Flyby (Quicksilver Siege Orb)
3d07c13a-4be2-5c3a-bdef-252135d50599.description: The quicksilver siege orb doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

attributes.description: The quicksilver siege orb doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

64338015-ee34-55f3-8bf1-57cf0620d2a6.name: Immutable Form (Quicksilver Siege Orb)
64338015-ee34-55f3-8bf1-57cf0620d2a6.description: The quicksilver siege orb is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The quicksilver siege orb is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

a3b09cca-0c85-5d4c-8f73-d0d14f79e04d.name: Observant (Orb Form Only)
a3b09cca-0c85-5d4c-8f73-d0d14f79e04d.description: The quicksilver siege orb has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) and Wisdom (Insight) checks. In addition, if the orb observes a creature for at least 1 minute, it has advantage on the first three attack rolls it makes against the creature.

attributes.description: The quicksilver siege orb has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) and Wisdom (Insight) checks. In addition, if the orb observes a creature for at least 1 minute, it has advantage on the first three attack rolls it makes against the creature.

593f3a88-bbf4-58c5-94a4-71b42ad3103d.name: Slippery
593f3a88-bbf4-58c5-94a4-71b42ad3103d.description: The quicksilver siege orb has advantage on saving throws and ability checks made to escape a grapple.

attributes.description: The quicksilver siege orb has advantage on saving throws and ability checks made to escape a grapple.

ceddc84c-15b2-5036-b5c3-db3201a80693.name: Multiattack (Quicksilver Siege Orb)
ceddc84c-15b2-5036-b5c3-db3201a80693.description: The quicksilver siege orb makes three Disk Blade or Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The quicksilver siege orb makes three Disk Blade or Slam attacks.

2086cb0b-55e8-58f1-ab0f-c0ad95bbe130.name: Shape Quicksilver
2086cb0b-55e8-58f1-ab0f-c0ad95bbe130.description: The quicksilver siege orb flattens itself into a razor-sharp, whirling disk or back into its orb form. Its statistics are the same in each form. It becomes a puddle of quicksilver if it dies.

attributes.description: The quicksilver siege orb flattens itself into a razor-sharp, whirling disk or back into its orb form. Its statistics are the same in each form. It becomes a puddle of quicksilver if it dies.

442b8583-bfb2-5bad-bb3a-a5f34c935e6c.name: Slam (Quicksilver Siege Orb)
442b8583-bfb2-5bad-bb3a-a5f34c935e6c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

e0cda100-e718-5b71-b182-07352469dfab.name: Slashing Run
e0cda100-e718-5b71-b182-07352469dfab.description: (Disk Form Only) The quicksilver siege orb flies up to 20 feet in a straight line, then it flies up to 20 feet in a straight line in a different direction. During this move, it can move through the space of any Large or smaller creature. The first time it enters a creature's space during this move, that creature must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

During this move, it can move through the space of any Large or smaller creature. 86839874-861c-5750-94ee-3473f8f1c183.name: Nauseating Stench
86839874-861c-5750-94ee-3473f8f1c183.description: A creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the qwyllion must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. A poisoned creature that fails this saving throw is also incapacitated while poisoned in this way. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the qwyllion’s Nauseating Stench for the next 24 hours.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the qwyllion must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. A poisoned creature that fails this saving throw is also incapacitated while poisoned in this way. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the qwyllion’s Nauseating Stench for the next 24 hours.

e141a8f6-5091-5101-be11-2473728efc82.name: Charm (Qwyllion)
e141a8f6-5091-5101-be11-2473728efc82.description: One Humanoid or Beast the qwyllion can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be magically charmed for 1 day. The charmed target obeys the qwyllion's verbal commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. If the target successfully saves against the effect, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to the qwyllion's Charm for the next 24 hours.

If the target successfully saves against the effect, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to the qwyllion's Charm for the next 24 hours.

b6e7b39c-67c9-57bc-a3a9-882539f3a33e.name: Deadly Gaze
b6e7b39c-67c9-57bc-a3a9-882539f3a33e.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) psychic damage. A Humanoid slain by this attack rises 8 hours later as a specter under the qwyllion's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life. The qwyllion can have no more than ten specters under its control at one time.

The qwyllion can have no more than ten specters under its control at one time.

3043f2fe-17de-5b05-a646-6b6addafce0b.name: Multiattack (Qwyllion)
3043f2fe-17de-5b05-a646-6b6addafce0b.description: The qwyllion makes three Claw or Deadly Gaze attacks. If two Deadly Gaze attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The qwyllion makes three Claw or Deadly Gaze attacks. If two Deadly Gaze attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

0048dbea-312e-56ff-b498-8e9ec5344ad5.name: Magic Resistance (Ramag)
0048dbea-312e-56ff-b498-8e9ec5344ad5.description: The ramag has advantage on saving throws against spells or other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ramag has advantage on saving throws against spells or other magical effects.

a75ea3da-d0dc-53e2-b27c-57079bf1cbf3.name: Portal Sense
a75ea3da-d0dc-53e2-b27c-57079bf1cbf3.description: The ramag can pinpoint the location of planar portals within 100 feet of it and can sense the general direction of planar portals within 1 mile of it. In addition, if the ramag spends 10 minutes studying a portal, it can determine the portal’s destination and any requirements to use or activate it.

attributes.description: The ramag can pinpoint the location of planar portals within 100 feet of it and can sense the general direction of planar portals within 1 mile of it. In addition, if the ramag spends 10 minutes studying a portal, it can determine the portal’s destination and any requirements to use or activate it.

d9a5840d-78dd-50bd-8d8d-1ea0ce43d44f.name: Portal Traveler
d9a5840d-78dd-50bd-8d8d-1ea0ce43d44f.description: The ramag creates and steps into a small portal and out of an identical portal in a space it can see within 60 feet of it. If a creature is in the destination space, the creature must make a DC 13 Intelligence saving throw. On a failure, the ramag trades spaces with the creature. On a success, the ramag fails to teleport. Whatever the result, the portal disappears.

d2326308-aff3-5e6f-ab60-3296f32a2c98.name: Scimitar (Ramag)
d2326308-aff3-5e6f-ab60-3296f32a2c98.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.

4c0e1e40-8f1f-57b3-963e-053fb439461a.name: Keen Smell (Rat King)
4c0e1e40-8f1f-57b3-963e-053fb439461a.description: The rat king has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

attributes.description: The rat king has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

3a6d5eba-a7b3-516e-ae20-f68a776660fa.name: Plague of Ill Omen
3a6d5eba-a7b3-516e-ae20-f68a776660fa.description: The rat king radiates a magical aura of misfortune. A creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the rat king must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the start of its next turn.

attributes.description: The rat king radiates a magical aura of misfortune. A creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the rat king must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the start of its next turn.

c29fe241-388b-5d07-a640-fd3bc88ac48c.name: Absorption
c29fe241-388b-5d07-a640-fd3bc88ac48c.description: When a friendly rat, giant rat, or swarm of rats starts its turn within 5 feet of the rat king, the rat king can absorb it. If the rat king does so, the target dies, and the rat king gains temporary hp equal to the target's remaining hp.

attributes.description: When a friendly rat, giant rat, or swarm of rats starts its turn within 5 feet of the rat king, the rat king can absorb it. If the rat king does so, the target dies, and the rat king gains temporary hp equal to the target's remaining hp.

3b3b13ee-c7e4-54db-8797-0e74cea4319c.name: Bite (Rat King)
3b3b13ee-c7e4-54db-8797-0e74cea4319c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion and become infected with a disease. Until the disease is cured, at the end of each long rest, the creature must repeat the saving throw. On a failure, the creature suffers another level of exhaustion. The exhaustion lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. A creature that succeeds on two saving throws recovers from the disease.

If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion and become infected with a disease. Until the disease is cured, at the end of each long rest, the creature must repeat the saving throw. On a failure, the creature suffers another level of exhaustion. The exhaustion lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. A creature that succeeds on two saving throws recovers from the disease.

b7956850-4e99-5b02-b40b-c90918f4431d.name: Call Rats
b7956850-4e99-5b02-b40b-c90918f4431d.description: The rat king magically calls 2d4 rats, 1d4 giant rats, or 1 swarm of rats. The rats arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the rat king and obeying its spoken commands. The rats remain for 1 hour, until the rat king dies, or until the rat king dismisses them as a bonus action.

7adf93a9-922d-5d2d-9e7e-d4df7b5090ae.name: Multiattack (Rat King)
7adf93a9-922d-5d2d-9e7e-d4df7b5090ae.description: The rat king makes two Bite attacks.

69e30ed3-250c-51ba-ae27-aea4801de873.name: Magic Resistance (Ratatosk)
69e30ed3-250c-51ba-ae27-aea4801de873.description: The ratatosk has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ratatosk has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

1bd01abb-a193-5b59-96f8-94aa090b71d0.name: Annoying Chitter
1bd01abb-a193-5b59-96f8-94aa090b71d0.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) psychic damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) psychic damage.

3231358e-c241-5403-938d-f53914147177.name: Desperate Lies
3231358e-c241-5403-938d-f53914147177.description: When a creature the ratatosk can see targets it with an attack, the ratatosk tells a lie while pointing to another creature within 5 feet of it. The attacker must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or believe the lie and attack the other creature instead.

attributes.description: When a creature the ratatosk can see targets it with an attack, the ratatosk tells a lie while pointing to another creature within 5 feet of it. The attacker must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or believe the lie and attack the other creature instead.

bb5be3ba-9b0a-5fa3-9982-afff395e5e9d.name: Divisive Chatter
bb5be3ba-9b0a-5fa3-9982-afff395e5e9d.description: The ratatosk causes division and strife in up to four creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or be irritated for 1 minute. While irritated, a creature must spend its action on each of its turns arguing with, complaining about, or otherwise expressing unhappiness toward one of its allies over a trivial matter. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

91856f4f-32c3-5632-b1b3-09536b5f4a37.name: Multiattack (Ratatosk)
91856f4f-32c3-5632-b1b3-09536b5f4a37.description: The ratatosk makes two Gore or Annoying Chitter attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Divisive Chatter, if available.

f01196ec-89d1-535a-8bae-a158967fe65f.name: Skitter (Ratatosk)
f01196ec-89d1-535a-8bae-a158967fe65f.description: The ratatosk takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

3170d611-e75e-5105-aedf-c7a8619a03ca.name: Spellcasting (Ratatosk)
3170d611-e75e-5105-aedf-c7a8619a03ca.description:
The ratatosk casts one of the following spells, requiring no material or somatic components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (save DC 14):

- **At Will:** animal messenger, message
- **3/Day Each:** sending, suggestion
1/day: commune (as an action)

340b947f-fa44-567e-a907-dc46da623a68.name: Nimbleness
340b947f-fa44-567e-a907-dc46da623a68.description: The ratfolk can move through the space of any Medium or larger hostile creature, and such a space isn’t difficult terrain for the ratfolk.

48db66a0-dfc8-529d-bae0-72fca9f2e2b2.name: Pack Tactics (Ratfolk)
48db66a0-dfc8-529d-bae0-72fca9f2e2b2.description: The ratfolk has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the ratfolk’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

d8ba35a4-4d06-5863-947a-e0780e9ed154.name: Magic Resistance (Ravenala)
d8ba35a4-4d06-5863-947a-e0780e9ed154.description: The ravenala has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ravenala has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

8bffda19-6880-56d4-8140-49f47e0aaa5d.name: Woodland Stride (Ravenala)
8bffda19-6880-56d4-8140-49f47e0aaa5d.description: Difficult terrain composed of magical or nonmagical plants doesn’t cost the ravenala extra movement. In addition, it can pass through magical or nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

d18d467e-894e-5ac6-9ebf-b8db98cab29f.name: Bursting Pod
d18d467e-894e-5ac6-9ebf-b8db98cab29f.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage, and each creature within 5 feet of the target, including the target, must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 5 (2d4) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

57bfbd24-59e2-5c45-93af-e9da822c8e52.name: Encourage Growth (Ravenala)
57bfbd24-59e2-5c45-93af-e9da822c8e52.description: The ravenala whispers magical words of growth to nonmagical plants on a point it can see within 30 feet of it. The plants burst with life and spread rapidly. The area within 20 feet of that point becomes difficult terrain for 24 hours.

attributes.description: The ravenala whispers magical words of growth to nonmagical plants on a point it can see within 30 feet of it. The plants burst with life and spread rapidly. The area within 20 feet of that point becomes difficult terrain for 24 hours.

007276ab-132a-5955-a46d-788f285990f8.name: Healing Leaves
007276ab-132a-5955-a46d-788f285990f8.description: The ravenala removes a leaf from its head and wraps the leaf around the wounds of one creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) hp and is freed from any disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.

attributes.description: The ravenala removes a leaf from its head and wraps the leaf around the wounds of one creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) hp and is freed from any disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.

31004615-79e1-5d90-adcb-06afadd6bc00.name: Lamenting Engulfment
31004615-79e1-5d90-adcb-06afadd6bc00.description: The ravenala engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the ravenala, and it must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw at the start of each of the ravenala's turns or sing a lament of the mistakes and misdeeds it has performed in its lifetime. While singing, the engulfed creature can still act, but it can't otherwise speak, including casting spells with verbal components. If the ravenala moves, the engulfed creature moves with it. The ravenala can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

While singing, the engulfed creature can still act, but it can't otherwise speak, including casting spells with verbal components. If the ravenala moves, the engulfed creature moves with it. The ravenala can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

eef7167d-b7d4-55e2-afed-3addd8c7a306.name: Multiattack (Ravenala)
eef7167d-b7d4-55e2-afed-3addd8c7a306.description: The ravenala makes two Bursting Pod or Slam attacks. If both Slam attacks hit a Medium or smaller creature, the target is grappled (escape DC 14), and the ravenala uses its Lamenting Engulfment on the target.

c9c5ec44-728e-581f-a916-13b6f2b3985e.description: The ravenfolk doom croaker can mimic animal sounds and Humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Insight) check.

1aaeffb5-17a2-59ac-9f38-30d216d546f4.description: The ravenfolk’s weapon attacks are magical. When the ravenfolk hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

e180b233-b2d0-59e6-bdaa-fb456a4a7807.name: Ghost Wings

e5f6830d-bda9-5e4f-8f46-2e81fbd985af.description: The doom croaker makes one Peck attack and one Runestaff attack, or it makes two Rune Blast attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Ghost Wings or Prophetic Call, if available.

5691367b-7301-505b-8601-1c662a864e00.name: Peck
5691367b-7301-505b-8601-1c662a864e00.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) radiant damage.

8bc6e650-626a-59fb-8362-5d1527370ff7.name: Prophetic Caw
8bc6e650-626a-59fb-8362-5d1527370ff7.description: The ravenfolk doom croaker caws a prophecy that sounds different to each listener. Each creature within 30 feet of the ravenfolk that can hear it must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. Ravenfolk have advantage on the saving throw. On a failure, a creature hears a prophecy of its doom and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature hears a prophecy of its greatness and has advantage on the first attack roll it makes on each of its turns for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

440a2f4e-1b1e-58c3-8327-0672e3ffd826.description: When the ravenfolk warrior takes damage while below half its hp maximum, it moves up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

03d0b836-2779-5a8f-aac9-7766313ce254.description: If the spider deals poison damage to a creature that is poisoned, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) poison damage.

3a8517b1-29fd-5531-847b-c0234fb478ca.name: Spider Climb (Red-Banded Line Spider)
3a8517b1-29fd-5531-847b-c0234fb478ca.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down and on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down and on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

9e7a1fef-3ec9-526d-9887-2b657b8d26c1.name: Bite (Red-Banded Line Spider)
9e7a1fef-3ec9-526d-9887-2b657b8d26c1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

586c70b9-26e4-5e79-a7db-6be78f08299a.name: Swingline
586c70b9-26e4-5e79-a7db-6be78f08299a.description: The spider throws a length of webbing at a point on a surface, such as the ground or wall, it can see within 30 feet of it, attaching one end of the webbing to that point. It then reels in the webbing, pulling itself to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of that point. When the spider moves in this way, opportunity attacks against it have disadvantage. If the spider pulled itself at least 15 feet straight toward a creature, it has advantage on the next Bite attack it makes against that creature before the start of its next turn.

66b2c63c-210c-5403-9eff-70de6e2b4735.name: Speak with Beasts (Red Hag)
66b2c63c-210c-5403-9eff-70de6e2b4735.description: The red hag can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

86a7b61e-d5e3-5a8c-9696-69aed2d0bda3.name: Blood Bolt (Red Hag)
86a7b61e-d5e3-5a8c-9696-69aed2d0bda3.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature with blood, it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

57d84459-6299-54bd-82ff-f2efabcde1bd.name: Claw (Red Hag)
57d84459-6299-54bd-82ff-f2efabcde1bd.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

3d8a7340-eca5-504d-8a11-b1764cbdb982.name: Siphon Blood
3d8a7340-eca5-504d-8a11-b1764cbdb982.description: The red hag drains blood from nearby creatures. Each creature that isn't a Construct or Undead within 20 feet of the red hag must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If at least one creature fails the saving throw, the next spell the red hag casts is cast as if the spell used a spell slot two levels higher than the spell's lowest level.

a62e3b97-3a18-5e6c-bc65-7f7cdbf1cff3.name: Spellcasting (Red Hag)
a62e3b97-3a18-5e6c-bc65-7f7cdbf1cff3.description:
The red hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):

- **At Will:** animal friendship, druidcraft, entangle
3/day: cure wounds, dispel magic, lesser restoration
1/day: control water, freedom of movement

3/day: cure wounds, dispel magic, lesser restoration

148b53d4-7864-5e54-9d41-c8e471f2aa26.name: Red Cap
148b53d4-7864-5e54-9d41-c8e471f2aa26.description: The redcap must soak its cap in the blood of a Humanoid that has been dead for no more than 1 hour at least once every 3 days. Every 24 hours past the third day that it goes without soaking its cap in blood in this way, it suffers one level of exhaustion. This exhaustion can be reduced only when the redcap finishes a long rest after soaking its cap in fresh Humanoid blood, which reduces its exhaustion level to 0. If the redcap dies as a result of this exhaustion, it crumbles to dust.

635ac0d6-edaf-5fca-b2bf-c6792646c09e.name: Bleeding Bite
635ac0d6-edaf-5fca-b2bf-c6792646c09e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is a creature other than a Construct or Undead, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or lose 7 (2d6) hp at the start of each of its turns due to a bleeding wound. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 13 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

dfcc3fb3-164c-55bf-a2d9-8f6469455963.description: The redcap kicks a Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

725e3bfd-cae3-5d8b-9bc4-722f432ede64.name: Chaos Mutations
725e3bfd-cae3-5d8b-9bc4-722f432ede64.description: At the start of each of its turns, the rift swine’s body experiences a mutation. Choose an option or roll a d6 to determine the type of mutation. The mutation lasts until the start of the rift swine’s next turn.

5049ae15-44eb-55c3-b8a4-adaf7af02df6.name: Dozens of Eyes
5049ae15-44eb-55c3-b8a4-adaf7af02df6.description: The rift swine has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight and on saving throws against being blinded. In addition, if the rift swine isn’t blinded, creatures attacking it can’t benefit from traits and features that rely on a creature’s allies distracting or surrounding the rift swine, such as the Pack Tactics trait or Sneak Attack class feature.

6f11dc7a-fdb5-5d9b-ad50-93a5aac79b53.name: Multiattack (Rift Swine)
6f11dc7a-fdb5-5d9b-ad50-93a5aac79b53.description: The rift swine makes one Tusk attack and two Tentacle attacks, or it makes three Warping Bolt attacks.

1f271b46-b7d8-513c-a43a-25a065d1208d.name: Tentacle (Rift Swine)
1f271b46-b7d8-513c-a43a-25a065d1208d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The rift swine has two tentacles, each of which can grapple only one target.

720f57de-d057-5b71-a507-03bcb28a32f0.name: Warping Bolt

Hit: 11 (3d6 + 1) force damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls as reality-warping energies temporarily distort its body.

150c3974-5466-5b87-969f-feaab4f97569.description: The rime worm has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain.

ed028d75-7aa7-5a16-acfe-16ae89d7b4f0.description: The rime worm can burrow through nonmagical snow and ice in addition to sand, earth, and mud. In addition, difficult terrain composed of snow or ice doesn’t cost it extra movement.

76f8c882-8543-5c6c-8dd6-3c9bdf999265.name: Black Ice Spray
76f8c882-8543-5c6c-8dd6-3c9bdf999265.description: The rime worm sprays slivers of ice in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 36 (8d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The area then becomes icy, difficult terrain for 1 minute.

6f394a2f-5e48-5661-9568-72cbaebcd8af.name: Freeze Prey
6f394a2f-5e48-5661-9568-72cbaebcd8af.description: One creature grappled by the rime worm must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be petrified in ice for 1 minute. c8aaabd5-0b60-5a99-a5b5-d832fcbd51b0.name: Blood Sense (Risen Reaver)
c8aaabd5-0b60-5a99-a5b5-d832fcbd51b0.description: The risen reaver can pinpoint the location of creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

039d87ee-8529-57ca-b809-56b42c6d9da9.description: The risen reaver doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

b6b6ac5e-052a-5938-9aff-74ac2e9de159.name: Bladed Fist
b6b6ac5e-052a-5938-9aff-74ac2e9de159.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) slashing damage.

7522f0a4-6508-5659-946e-fab15319dc7c.name: Infused Arsenal
7522f0a4-6508-5659-946e-fab15319dc7c.description: When the risen reaver is hit with a nonmagical melee weapon or when it starts its turn in the same space as a nonmagical melee weapon that isn't being worn or carried, it absorbs the weapon into its body. If the weapon is being wielded by an attacker, the attacker must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or lose its weapon. For 1 minute, the reaver has resistance to the type of damage dealt by that weapon, and when it hits with its Bladed Fist, the fist deals an extra 2 (1d4) damage of the type dealt by the weapon. The reaver can absorb no more than three weapons in this way every 24 hours.

ee4e5bb2-9f9d-5986-bf78-d8810e4ca429.description: If the River King fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

69215e8b-d38c-5150-b292-82c652ac68f0.name: Riparian Weapons

d53fc5b4-cd67-5175-8f5f-64fb20dbd7ef.name: Attack (River King)
d53fc5b4-cd67-5175-8f5f-64fb20dbd7ef.description: The River King makes a Longsword or Flood Blast attack.

30cfe9ef-912d-53b9-ac1f-2017407399b7.name: Blade Current
30cfe9ef-912d-53b9-ac1f-2017407399b7.description: When a creature within 5 feet of the River King stands up from prone, he can make one Longsword attack against that creature.

06fbeb10-5cc5-5907-b8a8-6038da720670.name: Flood Blast
06fbeb10-5cc5-5907-b8a8-6038da720670.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (4d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 30 feet away from the River King and knocked prone.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (4d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 30 feet away from the River King and knocked prone.

8bae2fdf-9a5e-5e9f-b22c-50fb507e1b2a.name: Flow
8bae2fdf-9a5e-5e9f-b22c-50fb507e1b2a.description: The River King moves up to his walking speed, or swims up to half his swimming speed, without provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: The River King moves up to his walking speed, or swims up to half his swimming speed, without provoking opportunity attacks.

f3c0ba3d-5440-52ff-a79e-465871a7fd3e.name: Grasping Whirlpool
f3c0ba3d-5440-52ff-a79e-465871a7fd3e.description: The River King magically creates a swirling vortex of water centered on a point he can see within 60 feet. The vortex appears in the shape of a cylinder that is 15 feet tall with a 10-foot radius. Each creature in the area must make a DC 18 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage and is restrained. On a success, a creature takes half the damage, isn't restrained, and can choose to be pushed out of the whirlpool's space. A creature that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed saving throw. While restrained, a creature is unable to breathe unless it can breathe water, and it must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw at the end of each of its turns or take 18 (4d8) bludgeoning damage. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take an action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 18 Strength check. A creature with a swimming speed has advantage on the saving throw and on the Strength check to escape.

The River King casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (save DC 16):

- **At Will:** create or destroy water, water breathing
- **3/Day Each:** freedom of movement, control water
1/day: control weather (as an action)

a8a856e1-73e6-5ffe-8127-c1ff17a0c97a.name: Unpleasant Scent
a8a856e1-73e6-5ffe-8127-c1ff17a0c97a.description: The roachling has disadvantage on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks when interacting with Beasts and on Charisma checks when interacting with Humanoids. If the roachling bathes meticulously, it loses this trait for 24 hours.

54bb46fc-9eca-5fd2-9d3a-5992ea13d845.name: Air Form
54bb46fc-9eca-5fd2-9d3a-5992ea13d845.description: The rotting wind can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The rotting wind can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
The rotting wind is invisible.

01dd615c-b5d9-58b2-8ab9-f3f516a1e991.name: Poisonous Aura
01dd615c-b5d9-58b2-8ab9-f3f516a1e991.description: The rotting wind radiates an aura of poison and decay that slowly pollutes the area within 30 feet of it. Each hour the rotting wind stays in a place, nonmagical plants in the aura begin to wither, and water in the aura becomes poisoned. Nonmagical plants in the aura for 24 hours die. A creature that drinks water poisoned by the aura must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or contract the tomb rot disease (see the Tomb Rot trait). Creatures immune to the poisoned condition are immune to this disease.

A creature that drinks water poisoned by the aura must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or contract the tomb rot disease (see the Tomb Rot trait). Creatures immune to the poisoned condition are immune to this disease.

c6eaedfc-8ce3-5c3f-83ad-5a8d33697a72.name: Tomb Rot
c6eaedfc-8ce3-5c3f-83ad-5a8d33697a72.description: A creature infested with this disease manifests symptoms 1d4 days after infection, which include muscle weakness and rotten-smelling breath as its body rots from the inside out. Until the disease is cured, at the end of each long rest, the infected creature must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 10 (3d6) necrotic damage and suffer one level of exhaustion. This exhaustion lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. A creature that succeeds on two saving throws recovers from the disease.

This exhaustion lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. A creature that succeeds on two saving throws recovers from the disease.

537cba7b-403c-5c08-8632-798d36cfdcf2.name: Undead Nature (Rotting Wind)
537cba7b-403c-5c08-8632-798d36cfdcf2.description: The rotting wind doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.
