fa137ecf-dc3b-5d69-878d-a5b8d47fac87.name: Multiattack (Rotting Wind)
fa137ecf-dc3b-5d69-878d-a5b8d47fac87.description: The rotting wind makes two Wind of Decay attacks. If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or contract the tomb rot disease (see the Tomb Rot trait).

94823fb4-3a71-5ded-9d7c-81305a879131.name: Wind of Decay
94823fb4-3a71-5ded-9d7c-81305a879131.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the rotting wind's space. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

1d984c77-9d5d-54d0-a04d-b3a4dfb04843.name: Counting Compulsion
1d984c77-9d5d-54d0-a04d-b3a4dfb04843.description: If a creature uses an action to point out an ordered group of objects that the rubezahl can see, such as a pile of gravel, the demon is compelled to count the entire group. Until the end of its next turn, the rubezahl has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks, and it can’t take reactions. Once it has counted a given group of objects, it can’t be compelled to count those objects again.

e09a0976-43e8-59bb-8112-e41f1c122fee.name: False Tongue
e09a0976-43e8-59bb-8112-e41f1c122fee.description: The rubezahl has advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks. In addition, magical attempts to discern lies always report that the rubezahl’s words are true, and it can’t be magically forced to tell the truth.

1a91b824-25e1-5b88-bd3c-13fb2b1e1ec2.name: Spellcasting (Rubezahl)
1a91b824-25e1-5b88-bd3c-13fb2b1e1ec2.description:
The rubezahl casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):

- **At Will:** disguise self, fog cloud
- **3/Day Each:** gust of wind, sleet storm
1/day: control weather (as an action)

c6bd0675-c0ca-5ed9-94e2-afca33552ed9.name: Thunderstrike
c6bd0675-c0ca-5ed9-94e2-afca33552ed9.description: The rubezahl calls a sizzling bolt of lightning out of the sky, or from the air if underground or indoors, to strike a point the rubezahl can see within 150 feet of it. Each creature within 20 feet of that point must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 36 (8d8) lightning damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned.

776a1635-fa1e-5e35-ba07-652ded3cafdd.name: Aura of Drunkenness
776a1635-fa1e-5e35-ba07-652ded3cafdd.description: The rum gremlin radiates an aura of drunkenness to a radius of 20 feet. Each creature that starts its turn in the aura must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 hour. A creature that has consumed alcohol within the past hour has disadvantage on the saving throw. While poisoned, a creature falls prone if it tries to move more than half its speed during a turn. A creature that succeeds on the saving throw is immune to the rum gremlin’s Aura of Drunkenness for 24 hours.

aa32e73b-cec7-5a71-97aa-cd19ab1a34d4.name: Rust Drake Lockjaw
aa32e73b-cec7-5a71-97aa-cd19ab1a34d4.description: A creature infected with this disease manifests symptoms 1d4 days after infection, which include painful muscle spasms, particularly in the jaw. At the end of each long rest, the infected creature must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 hour and have its Dexterity score reduced by 1d4. This reduction lasts until the disease is cured. If the disease reduces the creature’s Dexterity to 0, the creature dies. A creature that succeeds on two saving throws recovers from the disease.

77bccf0d-056b-5168-803b-dee7a93042d6.name: Vomit Scrap
77bccf0d-056b-5168-803b-dee7a93042d6.description: The rust drake vomits forth a 15-foot cone of rusted metal. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (5d8) slashing damage and 22 (5d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. In addition, each creature that failed the saving throw must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or contract the rust drake lockjaw disease (see the Rust Drake Lockjaw trait).

69f38912-ca73-5e2c-908f-9ee829a9469b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

25e3356f-4423-5c73-88eb-c139f63d8d70.name: Summon Devil (Salt Devil)
25e3356f-4423-5c73-88eb-c139f63d8d70.description: The salt devil magically calls 1d4 gnolls that are Fiends with the salt devil's damage resistances and immunities. The salt devil has a 25 percent chance of calling one salt devil instead. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the devil and obeying its telepathic commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until the devil dies, or until the devil dismisses them as a bonus action.

767712d3-86f0-5cdb-a319-2310348faa31.name: Teleport (Salt Devil)
767712d3-86f0-5cdb-a319-2310348faa31.description: The salt devil magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

89c2e14b-ced4-5402-ad78-f6f9b1471168.name: Water-Draining Claw
89c2e14b-ced4-5402-ad78-f6f9b1471168.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, it must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Plants, Oozes, and creatures with the Amphibious, Water Breathing, or Water Form traits have disadvantage on this saving throw. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target also suffers one level of exhaustion.

eaef41d1-43ff-53ae-bcc1-10c44a3731d2.description: The sand hag has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

4e8d505d-60bb-51bd-85ef-566012d3ea89.name: Mimicry (Sand Hag)
4e8d505d-60bb-51bd-85ef-566012d3ea89.description: The sand hag can mimic animal sounds and Humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 16 Wisdom (Insight) check.

78b78716-b086-5960-b6da-5fc245e2054e.name: Scorpion Walk
78b78716-b086-5960-b6da-5fc245e2054e.description: Difficult terrain composed of sand or gravel doesn’t cost the hag extra movement. In addition, while in sandy terrain, she doesn’t leave tracks and has tremorsense out to a range of 30 feet.

28a401ad-95e8-526b-97e3-a83c16983286.name: Illusory Appearance (Sand Hag)
28a401ad-95e8-526b-97e3-a83c16983286.description: The sand hag covers herself and anything she is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes her look like another creature of her general size and Humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the hag takes a bonus action to end it or if she dies.

203f20a7-30a4-5f80-936d-29e6df1e0902.name: Multiattack (Sand Hag)
203f20a7-30a4-5f80-936d-29e6df1e0902.description: The hag makes three Claw attacks. If two Claw attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. A creature can't suffer more than two levels of exhaustion from this effect.

attributes.description: The hag makes three Claw attacks. If two Claw attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion. A creature can't suffer more than two levels of exhaustion from this effect.

16d49148-2dec-50de-8f77-54b63de32651.name: Scouring Sirocco
16d49148-2dec-50de-8f77-54b63de32651.description: The sand hag generates a blast of hot wind and sand in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) slashing damage and 9 (2d8) fire damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The area is heavily obscured by airborne sand until the start of the sand hag's next turn.

attributes.description: The sand hag generates a blast of hot wind and sand in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) slashing damage and 9 (2d8) fire damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The area is heavily obscured by airborne sand until the start of the sand hag's next turn.

742d2601-6775-53ed-9c40-3bc509c9df7a.description:
The sand hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):

- **At Will:** silent image
- **3/Day Each:** hallucinatory terrain (as an action), major image

796f517f-99d7-5227-9c5f-772a4606ac16.description: The sand silhouette can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

c229192e-5fbc-527b-ae26-0fdb9505660c.description: The sand silhouette can burrow through nonmagical, loose sand without disturbing the material it is moving through.

7dcd7229-8631-53fe-bc48-8cd3c4d4499f.name: Undead Nature (Sand Silhouette)
7dcd7229-8631-53fe-bc48-8cd3c4d4499f.description: The sand silhouette doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The sand silhouette doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

94a3a3f2-b1b5-5d1f-b249-63ba3f74d07b.name: Water Hypersusceptibility (Sand Silhouette)
94a3a3f2-b1b5-5d1f-b249-63ba3f74d07b.description: For every 5 feet the sand silhouette moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 2 (1d4) cold damage. In addition, the silhouette takes 10 cold damage when it starts its turn at least partially submerged in water.

attributes.description: For every 5 feet the sand silhouette moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 2 (1d4) cold damage. In addition, the silhouette takes 10 cold damage when it starts its turn at least partially submerged in water.

9546bc23-5e10-52de-bfa6-eb2f368eb820.name: Engulf (Sand Silhouette)
9546bc23-5e10-52de-bfa6-eb2f368eb820.description: The sand silhouette engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded and restrained, and it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the sand silhouette's turns or take 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. If the sand silhouette moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The sand silhouette can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

attributes.description: The sand silhouette engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded and restrained, and it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the sand silhouette's turns or take 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. If the sand silhouette moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The sand silhouette can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

1cd6d03f-11e0-5eda-8009-197d19a06b0f.name: Haunted Haboob
1cd6d03f-11e0-5eda-8009-197d19a06b0f.description: The sand silhouette creates a storm of whirling sand and wailing souls around itself. The storm is a 10-foot-radius, 30-foot-tall cylinder centered on the silhouette and moves with the silhouette for 1 minute, until it ends the storm as a bonus action, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). The sandstorm's area is lightly obscured, and a creature that starts its turn in the sandstorm's area or enters it for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 3 (1d6) necrotic damage and be frightened for 1 minute. An engulfed creature automatically succeeds on this saving throw. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

The storm is a 10-foot-radius, 30-foot-tall cylinder centered on the silhouette and moves with the silhouette for 1 minute, until it ends the storm as a bonus action, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). d9c7184e-d5f7-59a1-867c-dce8ad6a76c1.description: The sand silhouette makes two Slam attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 15), and the silhouette uses its Engulf on the target.

cc684cec-886b-59e0-bf71-bd95b0fcfde3.name: Bite (Sand Spider)
cc684cec-886b-59e0-bf71-bd95b0fcfde3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

07e50c82-7b78-5f6c-b89c-00550a6ab94d.name: Impaling Leg
07e50c82-7b78-5f6c-b89c-00550a6ab94d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns, and the sand spider can't use the same Impaling Leg on another target. The sand spider has four Impaling Legs.

a15ba0f4-70f2-5444-ad19-0635bb17d109.name: Multiattack (Sand Spider)
a15ba0f4-70f2-5444-ad19-0635bb17d109.description: The sand spider makes one Bite attack and two Impaling Leg attacks.

4db156c7-2578-54b8-a422-6bfde04dcaaf.name: Trapdoor Ambush
4db156c7-2578-54b8-a422-6bfde04dcaaf.description: When the sand spider is burrowed just below the surface of sand and a Medium or smaller creature enters the space on the surface just above where it is burrowed, the sand spider makes one Impaling Leg attack against the creature, bursting from the sand and revealing itself in the process. The target has disadvantage on the saving throw to avoid being grappled.

19c2d92a-96e5-5979-96b1-b0bbfbe411a5.name: Magic Resistance (Sandman)
19c2d92a-96e5-5979-96b1-b0bbfbe411a5.description: The sandman has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

0ad2ce48-a924-5137-8c18-b054bc9d29ed.name: Stuff of Dreams
0ad2ce48-a924-5137-8c18-b054bc9d29ed.description: Made partially from dreams and imagination, the sandman isn’t fully real. Any critical hit against the sandman is a normal hit.

attributes.description: Made partially from dreams and imagination, the sandman isn’t fully real. Any critical hit against the sandman is a normal hit.

33bed37c-c340-5077-afb8-36832299b403.name: Claw (Sandman)
33bed37c-c340-5077-afb8-36832299b403.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) psychic damage. Damage from this attack doesn't wake an unconscious creature, unless the unconscious creature is below half its hp maximum. If the sandman scores a critical hit, the target is cursed with the eye-closer's curse. While cursed, the creature is blinded until it finishes a long rest or until the curse is lifted by remove curse or similar magic.

18fd1400-506f-5609-a920-17f32452bc62.name: Dreamer's Sand
18fd1400-506f-5609-a920-17f32452bc62.description: The sandman throws magical sand in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 10 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or another creature uses an action to wake it.

attributes.description: The sandman throws magical sand in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 10 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or another creature uses an action to wake it.

fd504e91-fe97-5d09-94d0-f3b36a220978.name: Encourage Dreams
fd504e91-fe97-5d09-94d0-f3b36a220978.description: The sandman encourages powerful dreams in the minds of up to three unconscious creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, nightmares fill the target's mind, and the target takes 35 (10d6) psychic damage, wakes from its sleep, and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, pleasant dreams fill the target's mind, and the target regains 10 (3d6) hp and can choose to remain unconscious or awaken. A frightened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

b9fd2bc0-f5e9-528b-9da6-0332af964880.name: Multiattack (Sandwyrm)
b9fd2bc0-f5e9-528b-9da6-0332af964880.description: The sandwyrm makes one Bite attack, one Gore attack, and one Stinger attack.

fa651676-d16e-50c8-8342-dcb27fc9e509.name: Spine Trap
fa651676-d16e-50c8-8342-dcb27fc9e509.description: When the sandwyrm is burrowed just below the surface of sand with its back spines exposed and a Medium or smaller creature enters the spines' space, the sandwyrm closes the spines on the creature. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained. When the sandwyrm moves, a restrained creature moves with it. The sandwyrm can have only one creature restrained at a time. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take an action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 15 Strength check.

If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

91eb882f-4c93-5bdf-a1f0-f3a028e34c15.description: If the sap demon takes fire damage, its speed is increased by 10 feet until the end of its next turn. If it takes cold damage, its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

97995e64-27e8-5a27-a750-79a5aa1cf15c.name: Lob Sap

d65719d4-5aa0-5bac-b0be-9e661beea81d.description: The sap demon makes two Slam or Lob Sap attacks. If both Slam attacks hit a Medium or smaller creature, the creature is grappled (escape DC 12).

087f0603-dc0f-528c-ae39-dbf265c5fe89.name: Slam (Sap Demon)

0c33a167-38f5-534c-b0df-043caec1a937.name: Soul Sap
0c33a167-38f5-534c-b0df-043caec1a937.description: One humanoid the sap demon is grappling or that is incapacitated within 5 feet of the sap demon must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be possessed by the sap demon. The sap demon then disappears, and the target is incapacitated and loses control of its body. The sap demon now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The ooze can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that restore a creature's hp maximum. The ooze retains its Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma and condition immunities. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

63e9bd0e-a3b9-5d69-b0dd-dcacbbc9c682.name: Corrupting Gaze
63e9bd0e-a3b9-5d69-b0dd-dcacbbc9c682.description: One creature the sarcophagus slime can see within 30 feet of it must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. A Humanoid slain by this effect rises 24 hours later as a sarcophagus slime, unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed.

If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the sarcophagus slime's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

e32ac798-9e92-5588-b522-5e3b4c842990.name: Agonizing Aura
e32ac798-9e92-5588-b522-5e3b4c842990.description: The sathaq worm emits ultrasonic noise and minor vibrations that cause pain and subtly disrupt the functions of most creatures. A creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the sathaq worm must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of its next turn. Creatures with resistance or immunity to thunder damage automatically succeed on the saving throw.

f41ca466-7dfd-5bdb-b607-551cfbfd326c.name: Multiattack (Sathaq Worm)
f41ca466-7dfd-5bdb-b607-551cfbfd326c.description: The sathaq worm makes one Bite attack and two Slam attacks, or it makes three Slam attacks. It can replace its Bite attack with a use of Swallow.

de9e12df-d4bf-54be-a64b-5cc2d81797bd.name: Slam (Sathaq Worm)

ea847a54-8784-5054-9ed8-b95a277eb9f8.name: Swallow (Sathaq Worm)
ea847a54-8784-5054-9ed8-b95a277eb9f8.description: The sathaq worm makes one Bite attack against a Large or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the worm (including the worm's Agonizing Aura), and takes 10 (3d6) piercing damage and 10 (3d6) acid damage at the start of each of the sathaq worm's turns. The sathaq worm can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

86b41d88-108d-5847-bb38-be1cd4074e78.description: If the savager doesn’t move during its turn, it has advantage on the next Claw attack it makes before the start of its next turn.

12f979bf-868c-5c2e-b39b-ab4c819177c6.description: A creature that touches the savager or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage. In addition, a creature grappled by or grappling the savager takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage at the start of the savager’s turn.

6ab7552e-d588-54d9-b142-461fe318f7f2.description: The savager makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. If both Claw attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or take 9 (2d8) slashing damage as the savager rips into the target.

4f080d4d-2768-504c-90d9-af274dd6b69c.description: A creature grappling the scheznyki can take its action to cut off the scheznyki’s beard by succeeding on a DC 15 Strength check while holding an edged weapon. If its beard is cut off, the scheznyki can’t use Spellcasting until its beard regrows.

0e526351-90e8-53e8-bffd-1c476fecd5b4.description: The scheznyki magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment it wears or carries is invisible with it.

949e989f-56a4-5f91-94fa-d94d8d673fd9.name: Spellcasting (Scheznyki)
949e989f-56a4-5f91-94fa-d94d8d673fd9.description:
The scheznyki casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):

- **At Will:** dancing lights, faerie fire
- **3/Day Each:** locate object, hideous laughter, ray of enfeeblement
- **1/Day Each:** dispel magic, hold person

28496f22-a5a6-5222-a49c-97b6f294b4df.description: The dragon exhales a crushing wave of frigid seawater in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 11 (2d10) bludgeoning damage and 11 (2d10) cold damage and is pushed up to 5 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

421b09f7-36dc-5b69-bf16-939b29252d97.name: Musk
421b09f7-36dc-5b69-bf16-939b29252d97.description: The serpopard releases foul-smelling musk in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 hour or until it spends 10 minutes washing off the musk. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. While a creature is poisoned in this way, any creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the poisoned creature must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its turn.

171cb146-68d6-55c7-9533-12235d9277c2.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the shadhavar’s darkvision.

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the shadhavar’s darkvision.

648d2146-47d9-515e-b987-9e676682fa87.name: Darkness Aura
648d2146-47d9-515e-b987-9e676682fa87.description: A 15-foot radius of magical darkness extends out from the shadhavar, moves with it, and spreads around corners. The darkness lasts as long as the shadhavar maintains concentration, up to 10 minutes (as if concentrating on a spell). Darkvision can't penetrate this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled.

da88d590-be5c-580c-946a-df5d94275a47.description: The shadhavar plays a captivating melody through its hollow horn. Each creature within 60 feet of the shadhavar that can hear it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the start of the shadhavar's next turn. While charmed, a creature is incapacitated, its speed is reduced to 0, and the shadhavar has advantage on attack rolls against it.

a404b98b-1f4e-5d2a-a3b3-d86e8c64452e.description: If the shadow antipaladin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the antipaladin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

c611fd97-3254-52ac-a442-488ebe9c8868.description: While in sunlight, the shadow antipaladin has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

ae49292b-81da-56fc-afb7-59cf05412cec.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

d937b02d-d8cc-5e66-9cd1-c191ae7beddd.name: Infectious Insanity
d937b02d-d8cc-5e66-9cd1-c191ae7beddd.description: The shadow antipaladin magically assaults the minds of up to three creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) psychic damage and is incapacitated for 1 minute as its mind fills with thoughts of eldritch terrors and otherworldly entities. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated. An incapacitated creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

d81adadf-95c9-5576-b5ac-7bc0e2623ea4.name: Shadow Weapons
d81adadf-95c9-5576-b5ac-7bc0e2623ea4.description: The shadow beast’s weapon attacks are magical. When the shadow beast hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

dc8ce800-2741-5652-9e41-edcfb82b8387.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Shadow Beast)
dc8ce800-2741-5652-9e41-edcfb82b8387.description: While in sunlight, the shadow beast has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the shadow beast has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

42864da6-cc92-5417-8056-8ce652f6840e.name: Bite (Shadow Beast)
42864da6-cc92-5417-8056-8ce652f6840e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

5c933f52-78e8-5d53-9865-f39559c79a60.name: Claw (Shadow Beast)
5c933f52-78e8-5d53-9865-f39559c79a60.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

c0a4b9a8-5da2-5179-a30f-99df2153b02f.name: Frightful Shadows
c0a4b9a8-5da2-5179-a30f-99df2153b02f.description: The shadow beast releases a wave of shadows filled with frightening images of eyes, fangs, and other barely seen and terrifying beasts in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 42 (12d6) necrotic damage and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't frightened. A frightened creature must take the Dash action and move away from the shadow beast by the safest available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

2cf8c188-d03c-52d2-a749-f6e35293c994.name: Multiattack (Shadow Beast)
2cf8c188-d03c-52d2-a749-f6e35293c994.description: The shadow beast makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The shadow beast makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

64ad2502-dbfc-513c-ad24-aa7858f68f0c.name: Undead Nature (Sharkjaw Skeleton)
64ad2502-dbfc-513c-ad24-aa7858f68f0c.description: The sharkjaw skeleton doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The sharkjaw skeleton doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

b6add9a6-6c56-5435-be54-bf443a330355.name: Bite (Sharkjaw Skeleton)
b6add9a6-6c56-5435-be54-bf443a330355.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 13). The skeleton can grapple up to two targets at a time.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 13). The skeleton can grapple up to two targets at a time.

69dcba7e-37c7-5ca0-b632-7b95de8aff86.name: Devouring Embrace
69dcba7e-37c7-5ca0-b632-7b95de8aff86.description: The sharkjaw skeleton devours a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The grapple ends, the devoured target is restrained in the skeleton's many jaws, and the target takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage at the start of each of the skeleton's turns. If the skeleton moves, the devoured target moves with it. The skeleton can devour only one target at a time. A creature, including the devoured target, can take its action to pry the devoured target out of the skeleton's many jaws by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check.

27c053dd-8eda-57a4-a9e6-fa74a85d819e.name: Amphibious (Shellycoat)
27c053dd-8eda-57a4-a9e6-fa74a85d819e.description: The shellycoat can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The shellycoat can breathe air and water.

ee58a1a9-94a0-56f9-b1b2-93ac7a84a4d1.name: Hazesight
ee58a1a9-94a0-56f9-b1b2-93ac7a84a4d1.description: The shellycoat can see through areas obscured by fog, smoke, and steam without penalty.

18649e52-71ad-5f59-8aa2-1d798a1d57a9.name: Keen Hearing (Shellycoat)
18649e52-71ad-5f59-8aa2-1d798a1d57a9.description: The shellycoat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

attributes.description: The shellycoat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

e6454fb2-0f26-5594-bf92-305b48f51f92.name: Regeneration (Shellycoat)
e6454fb2-0f26-5594-bf92-305b48f51f92.description: The shellycoat regains 3 hp at the start of its turn. If the shellycoat takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the shellycoat’s next turn. The shellycoat dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

caf9b71e-15f6-5d97-983e-37367cf48422.name: Sunlight Petrification
caf9b71e-15f6-5d97-983e-37367cf48422.description: If the shellycoat remains in nonmagical sunlight for 1 minute, it becomes petrified at the end of that minute.

bf54cd60-8a13-5be2-9830-edd1b6bdf912.name: Water Camouflage (Shellycoat)
bf54cd60-8a13-5be2-9830-edd1b6bdf912.description: The shellycoat has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide while at least partially submerged in water.

attributes.description: The shellycoat has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide while at least partially submerged in water.

c8744547-3ee2-534a-b3f2-d857e38d2326.name: Claw (Shellycoat)
c8744547-3ee2-534a-b3f2-d857e38d2326.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained. The shellycoat has two claws, each of which can grapple only one creature.

3ae49846-ebaf-593b-814f-4d60486a44b8.name: Multiattack (Shellycoat)
3ae49846-ebaf-593b-814f-4d60486a44b8.description: The shellycoat makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

2818d74b-c5d3-51a6-9899-1fcdd928e5c9.name: Shellycoat's Fog
2818d74b-c5d3-51a6-9899-1fcdd928e5c9.description: While in contact with water, the shellycoat can create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point it can see within 60 feet of it for 1 minute. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. A creature that enters the fog for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned and unable to breathe, unless it can breathe water, for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

bc1bf46b-5b12-5f63-824a-46d49c9ac72a.name: Absorb Flesh
bc1bf46b-5b12-5f63-824a-46d49c9ac72a.description: When the shoggoth kills a creature while within 15 feet of it, the creature’s body is absorbed into the shoggoth’s. The creature can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell.

3795637f-7d6e-548e-9cb2-e98a8c37bc22.name: Amorphous (Shoggoth)
3795637f-7d6e-548e-9cb2-e98a8c37bc22.description: The shoggoth can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The shoggoth can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide without squeezing.
The shoggoth doesn’t require air.

30a12371-9e62-562e-b63f-2eb90fee28dc.name: Hideous Cacophony
30a12371-9e62-562e-b63f-2eb90fee28dc.description: The shoggoth’s many mouths constantly emit whistles, fluting, and other high-pitched noises. It has disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to be unheard. Each creature that starts its turn within 60 feet of the shoggoth and that can hear it must make a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or be disoriented until the start of its next turn. A disoriented creature is incapacitated, and when it moves, it moves in a random direction.

86373e99-a906-5887-afaa-20c888f64ff7.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Shoggoth)
86373e99-a906-5887-afaa-20c888f64ff7.description: The shoggoth has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

82eac884-5ed0-51ec-8b6b-b17d8b2ddfe4.name: Limited Mutability
82eac884-5ed0-51ec-8b6b-b17d8b2ddfe4.description: Any spell or effect that would alter the shoggoth’s form alters it for only 1 round. Afterward, the shoggoth returns to its amorphous blob form.

6c187f39-c489-5539-91d4-f9a6a408fb05.name: Crush (Shoggoth)
6c187f39-c489-5539-91d4-f9a6a408fb05.description: The shoggoth crushes up to two creatures it is grappling by rolling them beneath its bulk. Each target must succeed on a DC 19 Strength saving throw or take 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage, be unable to breathe, and be restrained until the grapple ends. If the shoggoth moves, a creature beneath it is no longer restrained and is able to breathe, but it remains grappled.

a8eca36d-c9c1-5ec3-b61f-555ba03de52a.name: Multiattack (Shoggoth)
a8eca36d-c9c1-5ec3-b61f-555ba03de52a.description: The shoggoth makes four Slam attacks. It can replace two Slam attacks with a use of Crush.

attributes.description: The shoggoth makes four Slam attacks. It can replace two Slam attacks with a use of Crush.

1ff78fbb-2857-5df2-a09d-ebe67e605f2f.name: Slam (Shoggoth)
1ff78fbb-2857-5df2-a09d-ebe67e605f2f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18) if it is a Large or smaller creature.

f0ed8fdd-b52c-5480-ba08-f447ed65e254.name: Amorphous (Shroud)
f0ed8fdd-b52c-5480-ba08-f447ed65e254.description: The shroud can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The shroud can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

e353c36a-2e77-541b-8fef-e9a74c0951bd.name: Shadow Evolution
e353c36a-2e77-541b-8fef-e9a74c0951bd.description: If the shroud deals at least 12 necrotic damage to a creature that isn’t a Construct or Undead in 1 minute or less, the shroud transforms into a shadow at the start of the turn after it last dealt damage. It uses the statistics of the shadow, except it reduces the shadow’s hp by an amount equal to the damage the shroud took before it transformed.

08560434-19d1-5ddc-b646-164ef70b15e1.name: Sunlight Weakness
08560434-19d1-5ddc-b646-164ef70b15e1.description: While in sunlight, the shroud has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

e604bc5b-ae3c-5dd2-b023-31d7d5673385.name: Undead Nature (Shroud)
e604bc5b-ae3c-5dd2-b023-31d7d5673385.description: The shroud doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

12fc1e71-657c-52f6-bd5b-76969d846d8d.name: Shadow Stealth (Shroud)
12fc1e71-657c-52f6-bd5b-76969d846d8d.description: While in dim light or darkness, the shroud takes the Hide action.

attributes.description: While in dim light or darkness, the shroud takes the Hide action.

9256fb92-bdd9-5150-9e58-ec6bbe82ae9e.name: Strength Drain
9256fb92-bdd9-5150-9e58-ec6bbe82ae9e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) necrotic damage, and the target has disadvantage on weapon attacks that use Strength until the end of its next turn. If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a new shroud rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

ce33c56b-fb24-5ac7-b744-2c20c4c8837c.name: Fate’s Resistance (3/Day)
ce33c56b-fb24-5ac7-b744-2c20c4c8837c.description: If the skein witch fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the skein witch fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

5e581d81-fa66-5d17-9cce-ca2becea1677.name: Magic Resistance (Skein Witch)
5e581d81-fa66-5d17-9cce-ca2becea1677.description: The skein witch has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The skein witch has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

45ee998c-f944-5f2f-8de4-2673403035b2.name: Bind Fates
45ee998c-f944-5f2f-8de4-2673403035b2.description: One creature within 60 feet of the skein witch must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or the target's fate is bound to one of its ally's (chosen at random). Any damage or condition the target suffers is inflicted on the individual to which they are bound instead, and vice versa. A creature can be bound to only one other creature at a time. This binding lasts until lifted by a heal or heroes' feast spell or similar magic.

Any damage or condition the target suffers is inflicted on the individual to which they are bound instead, and vice versa. A creature can be bound to only one other creature at a time. This binding lasts until lifted by a heal or heroes' feast spell or similar magic.

290f6e46-7b39-5831-b4cf-44dab0b06766.name: Destiny Distortion Wave
290f6e46-7b39-5831-b4cf-44dab0b06766.description: The skein witch frays the strands of fate in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If any creature that failed the saving throw is affected by a condition, such as incapacitated or poisoned, those conditions are randomly redistributed among all the creatures that failed the saving throw.

2814d271-a1a7-5cfa-8147-cbb11e2bf509.name: Fate's Step
2814d271-a1a7-5cfa-8147-cbb11e2bf509.description: The skein witch teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. A tiny hourglass shatters into a swirl of sand at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

8f8e4005-ed0e-5ea4-9c5e-0690c2461411.name: Inexorable Thread
8f8e4005-ed0e-5ea4-9c5e-0690c2461411.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one creature. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one creature. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) radiant damage.

72727e00-dac3-5c7e-a910-6ee521dbcd64.name: Multiattack (Skein Witch)
72727e00-dac3-5c7e-a910-6ee521dbcd64.description: The skein witch makes three Inexorable Thread attacks. If two Inexorable Thread attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on the next death saving throw it makes before it finishes a short rest. If a creature fails this saving throw multiple times, these effects are cumulative, affecting up to three of the creature's next death saving throws before it finishes a short rest.

If a creature fails this saving throw multiple times, these effects are cumulative, affecting up to three of the creature's next death saving throws before it finishes a short rest.

ff782029-a81e-5786-992f-af915ea98997.name: Parry Spell
ff782029-a81e-5786-992f-af915ea98997.description: If the skein witch succeeds on a saving throw against a spell of 4th level or lower that targets only the skein witch, the spell has no effect. If the skein witch succeeds on the saving throw by 5 or more, the spell is reflected back at the spellcaster, using the slot level, spell save DC, attack bonus, and spellcasting ability of the caster.

c10f1dd4-c428-5d57-80ca-0d936631fe9f.name: Echolocation
c10f1dd4-c428-5d57-80ca-0d936631fe9f.description: The skin bat can’t use its blindsight while deafened.

attributes.description: The skin bat can’t use its blindsight while deafened.

15e59e2d-668e-599f-9d78-2d41d17a382c.name: Hungry Dead Nature (Skin Bat)
15e59e2d-668e-599f-9d78-2d41d17a382c.description: The skin bat doesn’t require air or sleep.

attributes.description: The skin bat doesn’t require air or sleep.

2b965c37-e212-5fc1-ab03-a052eb1e5f94.name: Attract Bats
2b965c37-e212-5fc1-ab03-a052eb1e5f94.description: When the skin bat is reduced to below half its hp maximum while underground or outside at night, it releases a high-frequency cry similar to that of an injured bat, attracting other bats to it. On initiative count 20 of the next round, 1d6 bats arrive and aid the skin bat. These bats aren't under the skin bat's control, but they protect it to the best of their abilities, attacking those that harm the skin bat.

4761eae6-e66f-5dc6-b2ad-8197116cb6a7.name: Bite (Skin Bat)
4761eae6-e66f-5dc6-b2ad-8197116cb6a7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn. On a success, the target can't be paralyzed in this way by the skin bat again for 24 hours.

99c4d4ff-09b2-52ff-82f6-d0c9bdefc25c.name: Broken Shell
99c4d4ff-09b2-52ff-82f6-d0c9bdefc25c.description: A creature that hits the skitterhaunt with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage.

attributes.description: A creature that hits the skitterhaunt with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage.
The skitterhaunt doesn’t require sleep.

582ea092-6099-5a46-8a29-f456a1149208.name: Vermin Encasement
582ea092-6099-5a46-8a29-f456a1149208.description: The creature within the vermin’s shell is a shapeless ooze protected by the vermin’s exoskeleton. When the skitterhaunt is reduced to 0 hp, the exoskeleton breaks, and the skitterhaunt ooze exits it. Once out of its exoskeleton, the ooze is Small, has an AC of 10, 10 hp, and a speed of 15 feet, and it can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. In addition, its only attack is a Slam that uses the same statistics as its Sting, except it deals bludgeoning damage instead of piercing damage. The skitterhaunt dies if it remains outside of a host for more than 24 hours. It can exit or enter a dead host’s exoskeleton as a bonus action.

Once out of its exoskeleton, the ooze is Small, has an AC of 10, 10 hp, and a speed of 15 feet, and it can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. In addition, its only attack is a Slam that uses the same statistics as its Sting, except it deals bludgeoning damage instead of piercing damage. The skitterhaunt dies if it remains outside of a host for more than 24 hours. It can exit or enter a dead host’s exoskeleton as a bonus action.

5e81fb31-3c3d-57a7-8e83-e05f9c1a90c0.name: Acid Spray (Skitterhaunt)
5e81fb31-3c3d-57a7-8e83-e05f9c1a90c0.description: The skitterhaunt spits acid in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The skitterhaunt spits acid in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

525ff74d-3b8f-5d3c-9916-035817c8f283.name: Infest Vermin
525ff74d-3b8f-5d3c-9916-035817c8f283.description: The skitterhaunt infests a Large or smaller Beast with an exoskeleton within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned until the skitterhaunt no longer infests it. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw or take 7 (2d6) acid damage, and its hp maximum is reduced by that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest after the skitterhaunt no longer infests it. The target dies if this reduces its hp maximum to 0. The skitterhaunt then takes control of the body, dissolving the flesh and hiding within the exoskeleton. A target that succeeds on two consecutive saving throws forces the skitterhaunt out of its body and is immune to the skitterhaunt's Infest Vermin for the next 24 hours.

6a3ac384-94b2-5d7c-8105-a78c7e97dba0.name: Mandibles
6a3ac384-94b2-5d7c-8105-a78c7e97dba0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) acid damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12) if it is a Medium or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the skitterhaunt can't use its Mandibles on another target.

9f943a18-affe-5e68-89e9-c0b29de99e2d.name: Elemental Nature (Slow Storm)
9f943a18-affe-5e68-89e9-c0b29de99e2d.description: The slow storm doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The slow storm doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

b8196db4-f9ed-5d59-91b8-141deef8afb1.name: Eye of the Storm
b8196db4-f9ed-5d59-91b8-141deef8afb1.description: The slow storm is surrounded by a 15-foot-radius wind storm. The storm imposes disadvantage on ranged weapon attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks based on sight or hearing within the area. The winds extinguish open flames and disperse fog. A flying creature in the storm must land at the end of its turn or fall. Each creature that starts its turn in the area must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or take 9 (2d8) lightning damage. The storm’s area is difficult terrain for any creature other than the slow storm.

a0376914-72ed-545b-975a-f0545f914f05.name: Lightning Bolt
a0376914-72ed-545b-975a-f0545f914f05.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) lightning damage.

55af37d5-3ebe-5c10-a896-d75295330149.name: Multiattack (Slow Storm)
55af37d5-3ebe-5c10-a896-d75295330149.description: The slow storm makes three Slam attacks or four Lightning Bolt attacks. If two Slam attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be wracked with pain for 1 minute. While the target is wracked with pain, minute bits of electricity dance within its body, and the target takes 4 (1d8) lightning damage for every 5 feet it moves. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7c19b88f-04a7-52a9-b5a4-cdff248a84dd.name: Slam (Slow Storm)

5d03328e-b4a3-5921-872b-90dbee11df80.name: Static Shock
5d03328e-b4a3-5921-872b-90dbee11df80.description: The slow storm releases built-up electricity in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that fails this saving throw by 5 or more is also stunned for 1 minute. A stunned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

3425d5b8-69d4-579b-a6e3-dd2af08d3d4a.name: Enchanted Weapons (Smaragdine Golem)
3425d5b8-69d4-579b-a6e3-dd2af08d3d4a.description: The golem’s weapon attacks are magical. When the golem hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 5d8 force damage (included in the attack).

893e74bd-755a-5d58-9fd8-83011daf2b8b.name: Magic Vessel
893e74bd-755a-5d58-9fd8-83011daf2b8b.description: When the smaragdine golem counters or ends a spell with Absorb Spell, it holds the spell’s magical energy within its body and becomes Charged for 1 minute. While Charged, the golem sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius.

attributes.description: When the smaragdine golem counters or ends a spell with Absorb Spell, it holds the spell’s magical energy within its body and becomes Charged for 1 minute. While Charged, the golem sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius.

40f8e0e9-1a19-5b28-9e08-b7a942e1992d.name: Absorb Spell (Smaragdine Golem)
40f8e0e9-1a19-5b28-9e08-b7a942e1992d.description: When a creature the smaragdine golem can see within 30 feet of it casts a spell, the golem can absorb the spell's energy, countering it. This works like the counterspell spell, except the golem must always make a spellcasting ability check, no matter the spell's level. Alternatively, when a creature the golem can see within 30 feet of the golem starts its turn while under the effects of a spell, such as bless or heroes' feast, the golem can absorb the spell's magic, ending the effect. In either case, the golem's ability check for this is +10. If it successfully counters or ends the spell, it becomes Charged (see the Magic Vessel trait). The golem can't use Absorb Spell while it is Charged.

3abc43a0-6855-5d33-aab9-ca019472fd65.name: Multiattack (Smaragdine Golem)
3abc43a0-6855-5d33-aab9-ca019472fd65.description: The smaragdine golem makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Release Spell.

e59b19ba-b6e6-5a6d-ace4-a219663eb563.name: Release Spell
e59b19ba-b6e6-5a6d-ace4-a219663eb563.description: The smaragdine golem releases an absorbed spell's energy in a green burst centered on a point the golem can see within 60 feet of it. Each creature, other than the smaragdine golem, within 5 feet of that point per level of the absorbed spell must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 10 (3d6) force damage per level of the absorbed spell and is incapacitated until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated. The golem can use this action only if it is Charged (see the Magic Vessel trait).

c89836a0-9df3-51e4-bc4a-5882077e242d.name: Ice Climb
c89836a0-9df3-51e4-bc4a-5882077e242d.description: When climbing on ice, the Snow Queen has a climbing speed of 20 feet, and she can climb difficult surfaces made of ice and snow, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

ff34f342-5fe3-5699-b60f-c858c841e675.name: Icy Weapons (Snow Queen)

6cda8061-4de0-57e0-b754-63fd9a4e8d1e.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Snow Queen)
6cda8061-4de0-57e0-b754-63fd9a4e8d1e.description: If the Snow Queen fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

94a1d2ef-bf8c-5048-b3ca-13b9283b3403.name: Snow Walk
94a1d2ef-bf8c-5048-b3ca-13b9283b3403.description: The Snow Queen can move across icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost her extra movement.

ca4bb3fa-1db6-5dca-bffc-e105bbd87990.name: Snowsight
ca4bb3fa-1db6-5dca-bffc-e105bbd87990.description: The Snow Queen can see through areas obscured by snowfall, sleet, rain, and other wintry precipitation without penalty.

81beeb75-d05b-587f-ab12-e22a1c1ca79b.name: Attack (Snow Queen)
81beeb75-d05b-587f-ab12-e22a1c1ca79b.description: The Snow Queen makes a Claw or Ice Bolt attack.

d6f6894e-fd04-50f8-96d5-e37be6ade9c6.name: Claw (Snow Queen)
d6f6894e-fd04-50f8-96d5-e37be6ade9c6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) cold damage.

27758f89-2add-5f5e-acf2-07d520fe2250.name: Cold Snap
27758f89-2add-5f5e-acf2-07d520fe2250.description: The Snow Queen causes the temperature around her to drop dramatically. Each creature without 30 feet of the Snow Queen must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 42 (12d6) cold damage and suffers one level of exhaustion. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't suffer exhaustion. A creature that is immune to cold damage doesn't suffer exhaustion, even if it fails the saving throw. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is petrified in ice for 1 minute. A petrified creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A petrified creature that takes fire damage has advantage on the saving throw to end the effect.

A creature with immunity to cold damage that fails this saving throw instead loses its immunity to cold damage but isn't vulnerable to it.

4641f59f-6936-5b05-a9ef-b64d5460f230.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Son of Fenris)
4641f59f-6936-5b05-a9ef-b64d5460f230.description: The son of Fenris has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

d17d9261-ea30-5710-aaa3-efd252ac407b.name: Bite (Son of Fenris)
d17d9261-ea30-5710-aaa3-efd252ac407b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage or radiant damage (the son's choice). If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the son of Fenris. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the son, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the son's turns. The son can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

10815e5a-9f64-5fec-ad35-c537082ebdd5.name: Snake Breath
10815e5a-9f64-5fec-ad35-c537082ebdd5.description: The two snake tongues of the son of Fenris each exhale poison in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide, resulting in two lines. Each creature in a line must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the lines overlap, each creature in the overlapping lines must make one saving throw with disadvantage against only one of the lines rather than one saving throw for each line.

f27c3dce-4670-50ec-a035-52317666e0a0.name: Soul Sense

3e712f03-0833-5983-92dc-d77d0c328e05.name: Hasten Consumption
3e712f03-0833-5983-92dc-d77d0c328e05.description: The soul eater emits a wave of psychic energy to hasten the demise of nearby creatures, bringing them one step closer to having their souls consumed. Each creature within 20 feet of the soul eater must make a DC 14 Charisma saving throw, taking 31 (9d6) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature reduced to below half its hp maximum by this effect has disadvantage on the saving throw against the soul eater's Soul Drain for 1 minute.

ae558b4e-1e94-5089-82d6-0a643353905b.name: Soul Drain
ae558b4e-1e94-5089-82d6-0a643353905b.description: When the soul eater reduces a target to 0 hp, the soul eater consumes that creature's soul. The victim must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or immediately die as the soul eater consumes its soul. A creature killed in this way can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell. If the soul eater is killed within 120 feet of the body of a soul it consumed and the victim has been dead for no longer than 1 minute, the victim's soul returns to the body and returns to life, unconscious and stable with 0 hp.

58a8550d-cd41-5a4f-ac70-74128c21a3f4.name: Elemental Nature (Spark)

941058c0-e527-50f8-ae83-e7b169cee34c.name: Electric Touch
941058c0-e527-50f8-ae83-e7b169cee34c.description: Melee Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) lightning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) lightning damage.

cc849916-fdfe-5949-84e6-a97003b0684e.name: Inhabit (Spark)
cc849916-fdfe-5949-84e6-a97003b0684e.description: One Humanoid that the spark can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or be inhabited by the spark. The spark then disappears, fusing with the target's nervous system, and the target is incapacitated and loses control of its body. The spark now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The spark can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, immunity to being paralyzed, petrified, or unconscious, and its Electric Touch attack. It otherwise uses the inhabited target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

4933e80c-dbca-52c0-b108-979bd1a12d5e.name: Command Vermin
4933e80c-dbca-52c0-b108-979bd1a12d5e.description: The spawn of Akyishigal can command any Beast with an Intelligence of 2 or lower within 30 feet of it that isn’t under the magical control of another creature, provided the Beast is insectoid and doesn’t have a Challenge Rating higher than the spawn’s. The Beast obeys the spawn’s commands to the best of its ability, heedless of its own safety.

8ade3ad9-f2fa-5731-b803-c1f5b48b8351.name: Swarming Cough
8ade3ad9-f2fa-5731-b803-c1f5b48b8351.description: The spawn belches forth a swarm of insects. The swarm is an ally of the spawn, obeys its spoken commands, and takes its turn immediately after the spawn's. The swarm remains for 1 minute, until the spawn dies, or until the spawn dismisses it as a bonus action. The spawn can have no more than two swarms under its control at a time.

The insects remain for 1 hour, until the spawn dies, or until the spawn dismisses them as a bonus action.

A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

db1861a2-90d9-55a9-98dd-df5384e5e5a5.name: Disgrace Bound
db1861a2-90d9-55a9-98dd-df5384e5e5a5.description: The spectral guardian is bound to a tomb, castle ruins, or other place related to the disgrace in life that caused it to rise as a spectral guardian in death. If the guardian starts its turn more than 1 mile from its bound location, it loses its Spectral Blade action until it returns to the region. If it remains outside the region, it automatically teleports back to its bound location after 24 hours, regardless of distance.

The arcane guardian casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

- **At Will:** dancing lights, fog cloud, minor illusion
- **3/Day Each:** fear, slow
- **1/Day Each:** arcane hand

c335f7ae-be20-54c5-8355-992fec082cc6.description: A creature that hits the spider of Leng with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) poison damage.

d06843f8-ffba-5b11-a322-3bbcb7e8594d.description: When the spider of Leng dies, the poisonous blood in its body vaporizes, forming a cloud in the spider’s space until initiative count 20 on the next round. Each creature within 5 feet of the spider and each creature that enters the cloud for the first time on a turn must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 9 (2d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

de840c8a-24ce-5f12-9836-ebaa800876c1.name: Poisonous Riposte
de840c8a-24ce-5f12-9836-ebaa800876c1.description: The spider of Leng adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the spider must see the attacker. If this effect causes the attack to miss, the attacker takes 4 (1d8) poison damage.

Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) piercing damage, and the spider thief pulls itself in a straight line up to 25 feet toward the target, stopping in the nearest unoccupied space to the target. When the spider thief moves in this way, opportunity attacks against it have disadvantage.

b120639e-4e8f-5e87-a19c-3d9216a7b217.name: Wire Jump
b120639e-4e8f-5e87-a19c-3d9216a7b217.description: The spider thief throws a hooked wire at a point on a surface, such as the ground or wall, it can see within 30 feet of it, attaching one end of the wire to that point. It then reels in the wire, pulling itself to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of that point. It can bring along objects and willing creatures as long as their total weight doesn't exceed 100 pounds. When the spider moves in this way, opportunity attacks against it have disadvantage.

acf1e875-c19d-55a4-a75e-1f8469b15054.name: Hold Breath (Spinosaurus)

3a3bb82e-2cde-5503-a985-377d8d3832e0.name: Reptilian Affinity
3a3bb82e-2cde-5503-a985-377d8d3832e0.description: The spinosaurus never willingly attacks a reptilian Humanoid, such as a lizardfolk or dragonborn, unless attacked first. If magically forced to attack such a creature, the spinosaurus has disadvantage on attack rolls against it. This trait doesn’t function if the spinosaurus’s rider or tamer directs it to attack.

d6bb31ef-c5c6-5e69-8ba7-e282c33f0732.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 33 (4d12 + 7) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 18). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the spinosaurus can't Bite another target.

bae6c249-0042-571e-8480-9884ae45fb0d.name: Frightful Presence (Spinosaurus)
bae6c249-0042-571e-8480-9884ae45fb0d.description: Each creature of the spinosaurus' choice that is within 120 feet of the spinosaurus and aware of it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the spinosaurus's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

2f1b4d24-f257-56ee-89a1-c226e93a637a.name: Energized Body

0e026a42-c82a-50ea-b609-0c7c75c6dae5.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) lightning damage, and each creature, other than the target, within 10 feet of the target must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

55d7fd9e-1118-5648-99ae-ad83d0db144e.name: Steeple Step
55d7fd9e-1118-5648-99ae-ad83d0db144e.description: The spire walker teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The destination must be on the steeple of a building, mast of a ship, corner of a rooftop, or similar narrow point or feature.

6d2c64a0-23e1-5c19-924e-cb02291f3279.description: At the start of each of the drake’s turns, each creature within 10 feet of it and that can see it must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

5c615368-10a3-532e-a4ae-bf771819bd98.description: The drake makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks, or it makes four Searing Star attacks. If two Searing Star attacks hit one creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

d82ba604-2f25-5812-9152-5abe8ac26203.name: Planar Traveler
d82ba604-2f25-5812-9152-5abe8ac26203.description: The star drake can transport itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the drake can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature to another plane.

f9d8313c-3a9f-5b9e-8093-80eea0faf729.description: The drake exhales raw magic in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

343111ec-c06d-5f81-9271-907d1056f618.name: Crushing Claws

159d0967-abad-512f-b5b3-1782a6a35bab.name: Dimensional Stomp
159d0967-abad-512f-b5b3-1782a6a35bab.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d20 + 7) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 19 Charisma saving throw or be teleported to an unoccupied space the star spawn can see within 30 feet of it.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d20 + 7) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 19 Charisma saving throw or be teleported to an unoccupied space the star spawn can see within 30 feet of it.

95375d37-3b62-5c5b-955d-8819248369a6.name: Disintegrating Gaze
95375d37-3b62-5c5b-955d-8819248369a6.description: One creature the star spawn can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or take 27 (6d8) necrotic damage and be transformed into a misty cloud for 1 minute. The transformed creature's only method of movement is a flying speed of 10 feet, and it can enter and occupy the space of another creature. In addition, the transformed target can't talk, attack, cast spells, or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. The transformed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, taking 13 (3d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or ending the effect on itself on a successful one. A creature killed by this effect can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell.

ad7dd956-e648-53d3-b370-91b7dba2e26a.name: Interdimensional Step
ad7dd956-e648-53d3-b370-91b7dba2e26a.description: The star spawn of Cthulhu teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Small tears in reality appear at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

5b2335ea-7166-5b0b-b7bb-f3bb90f007e2.name: Multiattack (Star Spawn of Cthulhu)
5b2335ea-7166-5b0b-b7bb-f3bb90f007e2.description: The star spawn of Cthulhu makes two Crushing Claws attacks and one Dimensional Stomp attack, or it makes three Void Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Disintegrating Gaze, if available.

15baebf7-6e76-5fe3-9c21-7164e81c63f8.name: Void Bolt
15baebf7-6e76-5fe3-9c21-7164e81c63f8.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +15 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (5d8 + 10) necrotic damage.

201f06c9-d3b1-5f8c-a534-ac67ad0ad31f.name: Boiler Weakness
201f06c9-d3b1-5f8c-a534-ac67ad0ad31f.description: If the steam golem starts its turn immersed in water, or if it was soaked with at least 20 gallons of water on its previous turn, it risks losing steam pressure in its boiler. The steam golem must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw or its internal fire is extinguished. Until its internal fire is relit, the golem’s speed is halved, its AC is reduced by 2, and it must repeat the saving throw at the start of each of its turns. On a failure, it stops repeating this saving throw and becomes dormant, effectively dead until the fire is relit. A Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet of the golem can take an action to relight the golem’s internal fire, making it active again.

3b11ad0f-e733-5782-8794-004abdfb3c89.description: The steam golem releases a blast of steam in a 30-foot cone or in a 10-foot-radius cloud that extends from it, spreading around corners. Each creature in the area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

c0e17933-d504-5f17-bcde-3d5310d35665.description: When a creature the steam golem can see within 30 feet of it casts a spell, the steam golem emits a shriek from its twin steam whistles. The spellcaster must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or the spell fails and has no effect.

890ad85a-77ae-5d4f-80ee-c99b529f26f4.description: When a creature within 30 feet of the strife takes psychic damage, the strife gains 5 temporary hp or gains advantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn (the strife’s choice).

5fafb88a-a1db-5d69-8c17-67d64d211751.name: Familiar (Strife)
5fafb88a-a1db-5d69-8c17-67d64d211751.description: The stryx can serve another creature as a familiar, forming a magic, telepathic bond with that willing companion. While the two are bonded, the companion can sense what the stryx senses as long as they are within 1 mile of each other. While the stryx is within 10 feet of its companion, the companion shares the stryx's Keen Hearing and Sight trait. At any time and for any reason, the stryx can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.

5a020be8-56e9-5ada-8d56-d14760970ab3.name: Induce Doubt
5a020be8-56e9-5ada-8d56-d14760970ab3.description: If a creature misses the strife with an attack, the strife can cause the attacker to doubt itself. The attacker must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or each time it makes an attack roll or saving throw before the end of its next turn, it must roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from the attack roll or saving throw.

e2a8efa0-fd16-55f3-a056-a799d803efd7.name: Multiattack (Strife)

4fae4e86-c98e-5be2-b1cc-3cf869c3099b.name: Sow Discord
4fae4e86-c98e-5be2-b1cc-3cf869c3099b.description: The strife attempts to sow discord in up to two creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage and distrusts its allies until the start of the strife's next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't distrust its allies. A creature that distrusts its allies can't give or receive aid from its allies, including spells, class features like Sneak Attack, and the Help action.

5dfbff44-19a2-5180-9a22-a583220a0dc6.description: The stuhac telekinetically tears the tendons and ligaments of one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or take 13 (3d8) force damage and its speed is reduced by 10 feet. The stuhac can't reduce a creature's speed below 0 feet with this action. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest or until removed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic.

25f4f4ae-45dd-5b2c-8edd-696421edbbee.name: Illusory Appearance (Stuhac)
25f4f4ae-45dd-5b2c-8edd-696421edbbee.description: The stuhac covers itself and anything it is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes it look like another creature of its general size and Humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the stuhac takes a bonus action to end it or if the stuhac dies.

4babdbcd-1952-5022-adde-9bbcebadadbd.name: Multiattack (Stuhac)
4babdbcd-1952-5022-adde-9bbcebadadbd.description: The stuhac can use Hobble. It then makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The stuhac can use Hobble. It then makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

6daac450-b865-5e4e-a844-132737b88a0d.name: Multiattack (Stygian Fat-Tailed Scorpion)
6daac450-b865-5e4e-a844-132737b88a0d.description: The Stygian fat-tailed scorpion makes two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

attributes.description: The Stygian fat-tailed scorpion makes two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

ecc6a1a3-6e20-5936-912b-93bb88184488.name: Sting (Stygian Fat-Tailed Scorpion)
ecc6a1a3-6e20-5936-912b-93bb88184488.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until it finishes a short or long rest. Each time the poisoned creature takes poison damage, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion.

Each time the poisoned creature takes poison damage, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion.

481b646c-5161-52f2-8fdb-96dbd487eba6.name: Flood Fever
481b646c-5161-52f2-8fdb-96dbd487eba6.description: During flood season, the subek is overcome with bloodthirsty malice, becoming more aggressive and losing its proficiency in Intelligence (History) and Intelligence (Investigation) checks. If it hasn’t fed within the past 8 hours, it enters a frenzy, spending each turn attacking the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the subek attacks an object, with preference for an object smaller than itself. During the frenzy, it has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

e8879f20-a5c8-59c6-acab-05ffb7828ddc.name: Hold Breath (Subek)
e8879f20-a5c8-59c6-acab-05ffb7828ddc.description: The subek can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

attributes.description: The subek can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

44261da1-6b63-5100-99db-3d6b435fc8f4.name: Multiattack (Subek)
44261da1-6b63-5100-99db-3d6b435fc8f4.description: The subek makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. If both Claw attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or take 7 (2d6) slashing damage as the subek tears into the target.

attributes.description: The subek makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. If both Claw attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or take 7 (2d6) slashing damage as the subek tears into the target.

80d4098e-b4c6-57b2-a3e4-3be9af195181.name: Detect Lies
80d4098e-b4c6-57b2-a3e4-3be9af195181.description: The suturefly knows if it hears a lie and can pinpoint the location of a creature within 60 feet of it that lied within the last minute.

attributes.description: The suturefly knows if it hears a lie and can pinpoint the location of a creature within 60 feet of it that lied within the last minute.

df61bfc9-fee9-59d2-a355-af8cbecbd3c7.name: Forest Camouflage (Suturefly)
df61bfc9-fee9-59d2-a355-af8cbecbd3c7.description: The suturefly has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

attributes.description: The suturefly has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

f486dbc4-99ae-559a-8d0a-a7e9b55a0144.name: Sew
f486dbc4-99ae-559a-8d0a-a7e9b55a0144.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw or the suturefly sews the target's mouth, nose, or one of its eyes closed (the suturefly's choice). With supernatural speed, the suturefly repeatedly pierces the target's face, each time threading a loop of the target's own skin through the previous hole. These skin loops rapidly blacken, shrink, and draw the orifice tightly closed. If a target's mouth is sewn shut, it can't speak. If its mouth and nose are sewn shut, it can't breathe, and if both eyes are sewn shut, it is blinded. A creature, including the target, can take its action to cut open one of the sewn orifices by succeeding on a DC 12 Dexterity check with an edged weapon or tool.

ef35ef64-9c48-5a2c-9efc-2d24e1615d23.name: Swamp Camouflage (Swamp Adder)
ef35ef64-9c48-5a2c-9efc-2d24e1615d23.description: The swamp adder has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

attributes.description: The swamp adder has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

863a53d0-da6e-5561-89b8-1ec7b83f45e8.name: Bite (Swamp Adder)
863a53d0-da6e-5561-89b8-1ec7b83f45e8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 5 (2d4) poison damage and is paralyzed for 1 minute. On a success, a target takes half the damage and isn't paralyzed. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

03c7ffed-8b76-56ce-aac7-06ab1ecbe01c.name: Elemental Nature (Swarm of Fire Dancers)
03c7ffed-8b76-56ce-aac7-06ab1ecbe01c.description: The swarm of fire dancers doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The swarm of fire dancers doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

a5082489-14e7-5d18-a55e-cec06a33370e.name: Fire Form
a5082489-14e7-5d18-a55e-cec06a33370e.description: A creature that touches the swarm or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. In addition, the first time the swarm enters a creature’s space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage and catches fire. Until a creature, which can include the target, uses an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

Until a creature, which can include the target, uses an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

b8bd0077-ca90-56f2-b6d5-35d2cf9d9666.name: Illumination
b8bd0077-ca90-56f2-b6d5-35d2cf9d9666.description: The swarm sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light to an additional 30 feet.

attributes.description: The swarm sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light to an additional 30 feet.

0909db27-4c80-5f8b-846f-a750f3246dfe.name: Swarm (Swarm of Fire Dancers)
0909db27-4c80-5f8b-846f-a750f3246dfe.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny Elemental. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny Elemental. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

0d532707-39b4-5178-a49a-22d8fd01a2c9.name: Water Susceptibility (Swarm of Fire Dancers)
0d532707-39b4-5178-a49a-22d8fd01a2c9.description: For every 5 feet the swarm moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 1 cold damage.

attributes.description: For every 5 feet the swarm moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 1 cold damage.

7f80caac-e72b-5713-a7c2-214f5f83f588.name: Frightening Visage
7f80caac-e72b-5713-a7c2-214f5f83f588.description: The swarm rearranges itself into the shape of a giant, blue, flaming Humanoid skull. Each Humanoid within 30 feet of the swarm that can see it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

0e011225-0fc4-540e-9b61-979156024241.name: Multiattack (Swarm of Fire Dancers)
0e011225-0fc4-540e-9b61-979156024241.description: The swarm of fire dancers can use its Frightening Visage, if available. It then makes two Singe attacks.
