76e7487d-43d6-5124-8bae-ce731f1b7255.name: Singe
76e7487d-43d6-5124-8bae-ce731f1b7255.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 22 (4d10) fire damage, or 11 (2d10) fire damage if the swarm has half its hp or fewer.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 22 (4d10) fire damage, or 11 (2d10) fire damage if the swarm has half its hp or fewer.

6db1e302-1d31-51cd-9ea3-9c1997e021d5.name: Limited Magic Immunity
6db1e302-1d31-51cd-9ea3-9c1997e021d5.description: The swarm of manabane scarabs can’t be affected or detected by spells of 2nd level or lower unless it wishes to be. It has advantage on saving throws against all other spells and magical effects.

attributes.description: The swarm of manabane scarabs can’t be affected or detected by spells of 2nd level or lower unless it wishes to be. It has advantage on saving throws against all other spells and magical effects.

41daa3a5-9a03-5de1-b59c-40b91352658b.name: Sense Magic (Swarm of Manabane Scarabs)
41daa3a5-9a03-5de1-b59c-40b91352658b.description: The swarm of manabane scarabs senses magic within 120 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: The swarm of manabane scarabs senses magic within 120 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

be531436-d4a8-5dc4-8eeb-1de870ad1ac0.name: Bites (Swarm of Manabane Scarabs)
be531436-d4a8-5dc4-8eeb-1de870ad1ac0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 28 (8d6) piercing damage, or 14 (4d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer, and the swarm can attempt to end one random magical effect of 2nd level or lower on the target. This effect works like the dispel magic spell, except the swarm must always make an ability check. Its ability check for this is +5.

d91ed09e-ea31-5c06-bec5-92fc67da1f48.name: Drain Magic Item
d91ed09e-ea31-5c06-bec5-92fc67da1f48.description: The swarm drains the magic from one magic item in its space that isn't being worn or carried. A magic item with charges loses 1d4 charges, an item with limited uses per day loses one daily use, and a single-use item, such as a potion or spell scroll is destroyed. All other magic items have their effects suppressed for 1 minute. A drained item regains its magic after 1 hour.

All other magic items have their effects suppressed for 1 minute. A drained item regains its magic after 1 hour.

88a639f0-3429-5052-8d54-7458641eebcb.name: Glittering Carapace
88a639f0-3429-5052-8d54-7458641eebcb.description: When a creature that can see the swarm starts its turn within 30 feet of the swarm and the swarm is in bright or dim light, the swarm can force the creature to make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw if the swarm isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature falls unconscious. Otherwise, a creature that fails the save is incapacitated and its speed is reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn, as it remains transfixed in place by the glitter of the swarm. A creature has advantage on the saving throw if the swarm is in dim light.

On a failure, a creature takes 10 (4d4) poison damage and is euphoric for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't euphoric. A euphoric creature has disadvantage on saving throws. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

fa382de7-6fae-55ce-a082-24eec734cb04.name: Sunlight Weakness (Swarm of Sluaghs)
fa382de7-6fae-55ce-a082-24eec734cb04.description: While in sunlight, the swarm of sluaghs has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

5a2bb329-2ec0-5872-9a7c-99aa7473a72e.name: Chilling Touch
5a2bb329-2ec0-5872-9a7c-99aa7473a72e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 28 (8d6) cold damage, or 14 (4d6) cold damage if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be unable to regain hp for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

1785af63-7f23-5572-8414-5d37107a68ef.name: Shadow Stealth (Swarm of Sluaghs)

d673d6d3-ca74-54fb-b575-62a02f37822e.description: The swarm of wharflings can breathe air and water.

800de5a6-3cb5-5da6-bb8d-dcace849117f.name: Snapping Jaws
800de5a6-3cb5-5da6-bb8d-dcace849117f.description: A creature that attempts to move out of or through the swarm of wharflings must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 7 (2d6) piercing damage.

93ea07bc-cc11-5ef7-b0c6-3be0a4492799.name: Swarm (Swarm of Wharflings)

78366021-09f0-5047-b6b5-fcad7c3e6c31.name: Pilfering Bites
78366021-09f0-5047-b6b5-fcad7c3e6c31.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 28 (8d6) piercing damage, or 14 (4d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or lose one item it is wearing or carrying to the swarm, provided the item weighs no more than 10 pounds, isn't a weapon, and isn't wrapped around or firmly attached to the target, such as a shirt or armor.

b2632d87-d1db-5a9a-8ae9-b775ad681f53.name: Incorporeal Movement (Swarm of Wolf Spirits)
b2632d87-d1db-5a9a-8ae9-b775ad681f53.description: The swarm of wolf spirits can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

b354ea9f-42fd-5b1f-932c-972c18a553ef.name: Swarm (Swarm of Wolf Spirits)
b354ea9f-42fd-5b1f-932c-972c18a553ef.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

2cf3621a-6d8a-5e7b-859c-b1acb3bfd7df.name: Undead Nature (Swarm of Wolf Spirits)
2cf3621a-6d8a-5e7b-859c-b1acb3bfd7df.description: The swarm of wolf spirits doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The swarm of wolf spirits doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

5c4c24dd-5e06-5c27-8122-0e505e89fadc.name: Chilling Howl
5c4c24dd-5e06-5c27-8122-0e505e89fadc.description: The swarm of wolf spirits howls, causing cold fear to course through those that hear it. Each creature within 15 feet that can hear the howl must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) cold damage and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't frightened. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more also suffers one level of exhaustion. A frightened creature can make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

e1fe7a6a-1a14-56b5-943d-ef61a84e3145.name: Multiattack (Swarm of Wolf Spirits)
e1fe7a6a-1a14-56b5-943d-ef61a84e3145.description: The swarm of wolf spirits makes two Spectral Bites attacks.

bc6f3d73-1de6-54d1-ac65-16b79c753450.name: Spectral Bites

97abd6d0-e63f-5453-8c12-df93985dfc5b.name: Magic Resistance (Temple Dog)
97abd6d0-e63f-5453-8c12-df93985dfc5b.description: The temple dog has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

e0bfaae2-d322-5996-b561-1ffee69514fa.name: Protector’s Instincts
e0bfaae2-d322-5996-b561-1ffee69514fa.description: The temple dog has advantage on initiative rolls while in its temple or within 30 feet of a priest of its deity.

attributes.description: The temple dog has advantage on initiative rolls while in its temple or within 30 feet of a priest of its deity.

e6157fc0-c45d-5cec-80ee-abc03a5582a5.name: Radiant Jaws
e6157fc0-c45d-5cec-80ee-abc03a5582a5.description: The temple dog’s Bite attacks are magical. When it hits with a Bite attack, the Bite deals an extra 2d6 radiant damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The temple dog’s Bite attacks are magical. When it hits with a Bite attack, the Bite deals an extra 2d6 radiant damage (included in the attack).

92c30d75-fd13-59ca-855b-50b14dfeb40f.name: Rushing Bite
92c30d75-fd13-59ca-855b-50b14dfeb40f.description: If the temple dog moves at least 15 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a Bite attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the temple dog. If the target is pushed, the temple dog can move up to 10 feet straight toward the target without provoking opportunity attacks.

If the target is pushed, the temple dog can move up to 10 feet straight toward the target without provoking opportunity attacks.

cd98a19c-62b4-5686-b807-a6a68d038b6a.name: Bite (Temple Dog)
cd98a19c-62b4-5686-b807-a6a68d038b6a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) radiant damage.

1f44a4c0-2ed5-5e51-a9ff-824247501c70.name: Multiattack (Temple Dog)
1f44a4c0-2ed5-5e51-a9ff-824247501c70.description: The temple dog makes two Bite attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the temple dog sinks in its teeth, shaking its head violently, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or take 9 (2d8) slashing damage and be grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and temple dog can't Bite another target.

Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and temple dog can't Bite another target.

91f1ec36-cd8c-5bf8-9004-197876290acc.name: Green Regeneration
91f1ec36-cd8c-5bf8-9004-197876290acc.description: While in a forest, the tendril puppet regains 5 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

attributes.description: While in a forest, the tendril puppet regains 5 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

60fd53bd-3104-5237-ba57-d916e384a3d9.name: Magic Resistance (Tendril Puppet)
60fd53bd-3104-5237-ba57-d916e384a3d9.description: The tendril puppet has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The tendril puppet has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

64053791-cb17-5273-a8f3-e351706da6b6.name: Root Mind
64053791-cb17-5273-a8f3-e351706da6b6.description: The vine lord and the tendril puppets it has created are connected via a hive mind. The vine lord and its puppets can telepathically communicate with each other, provided the communicating creatures are within 1 mile of each other. In addition, while in a forest, the tendril puppet can’t be [rule]surprise;surprised[/condition].

a6169e48-7640-55bc-b532-744fac637593.name: Woodland Walk
a6169e48-7640-55bc-b532-744fac637593.description: Difficult terrain composed of nonmagical plants doesn’t cost the tendril puppet extra movement, and it can pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

attributes.description: Difficult terrain composed of nonmagical plants doesn’t cost the tendril puppet extra movement, and it can pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

b4ff9ff1-f461-55eb-be3f-a2d736c0e00e.name: Ball of Thorns
b4ff9ff1-f461-55eb-be3f-a2d736c0e00e.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (4d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the ball bursts, scattering sharp thorns around the target. Each creature within 5 feet of the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 5 (2d4) piercing damage.

a8283126-a478-596a-8313-bef56a19efa0.name: Thorned Slam (Tendril Puppet)
a8283126-a478-596a-8313-bef56a19efa0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) piercing damage.

8b321316-da8d-534e-8e91-63a55c642548.name: Chilling Presence (Thuellai)
8b321316-da8d-534e-8e91-63a55c642548.description: At the start of each of the thuellai’s turns, each creature within 15 feet of it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) cold damage. For each minute a creature spends within 15 feet of the thuellai, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or suffer one level of exhaustion from cold exposure. Unprotected, nonmagical flames within 15 feet of the thuellai are extinguished. Any spells of 3rd level or lower that provide resistance to cold damage and that are within 15 feet of the thuellai immediately end. Water freezes if it remains within 15 feet of the thuellai for at least 1 minute.

cb030de8-ba4d-5359-ae13-e9201141f7e8.name: Elemental Nature (Thuellai)
cb030de8-ba4d-5359-ae13-e9201141f7e8.description: The thuellai doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

b366d269-f560-548b-87e6-2da2a61234fd.name: Snowsight (Thuellai)
b366d269-f560-548b-87e6-2da2a61234fd.description: The thuellai can see through areas obscured by snowfall, sleet, rain, and other wintry precipitation without penalty.

634b893a-65a9-545b-883d-c00aa768bd68.name: Freezing Breath
634b893a-65a9-545b-883d-c00aa768bd68.description: The thuellai exhales an icy blast in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 49 (14d6) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

6ecd5f2d-7377-596e-958e-8444a781fbbc.name: Icy Claw
6ecd5f2d-7377-596e-958e-8444a781fbbc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.

54fac46f-947c-5348-b8cf-112604dc6d95.name: Cast Iron Stomach
54fac46f-947c-5348-b8cf-112604dc6d95.description: The thursir has advantage on saving throws against being poisoned.

attributes.description: The thursir has advantage on saving throws against being poisoned.

b65d73d8-cd1c-5c51-953d-2d5e81747aa7.name: Rock (Thursir)
b65d73d8-cd1c-5c51-953d-2d5e81747aa7.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

c32d0c85-0e10-574f-b7bb-fa80de4af6cb.name: Runic Blood
c32d0c85-0e10-574f-b7bb-fa80de4af6cb.description: The thursir touches a weapon, painting the thurs rune on the weapon in the thursir's blood. When the thursir hits with the weapon while the rune is active, the weapon deals an extra 9 (2d8) lightning damage, and the target can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. The rune lasts for 1 minute.

a08ef454-f411-5c65-9948-f47c083ad3f7.name: Warhammer (Thursir)
a08ef454-f411-5c65-9948-f47c083ad3f7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, or 15 (2d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

4d3d3459-2300-5c6a-ae87-e2a5bea55a36.name: Slither
4d3d3459-2300-5c6a-ae87-e2a5bea55a36.description: If the titanoboa hasn’t eaten a Huge creature in the last 24 hours, it can easily move through any open large enough for a Large creature, and it can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Medium creature. The titanoboa’s destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

The titanoboa’s destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

93f602c1-9892-57d6-ad9c-f4013fdddf2e.name: Sparkling Scales
93f602c1-9892-57d6-ad9c-f4013fdddf2e.description: When a creature that can see the titanoboa starts its turn within 30 feet of the titanoboa and the titanoboa is in bright light, isn’t incapacitated, and can see the creature, the titanoboa can force the creature to make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is stunned until the start of its next turn.

023e1d57-b76c-50c8-980c-50a9f3099a98.name: Bite (Titanoboa)
023e1d57-b76c-50c8-980c-50a9f3099a98.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (5d8 + 8) piercing damage.

c1bcbddd-b107-55f0-b8d6-7d744c96b5fa.name: Constrict (Titanoboa)
c1bcbddd-b107-55f0-b8d6-7d744c96b5fa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18) if it is a Huge or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the titanoboa can't Constrict another target.

a0c4563d-c0c5-54b5-be25-916ec8067ac4.name: Multiattack (Titanoboa)
a0c4563d-c0c5-54b5-be25-916ec8067ac4.description: The titanoboa makes two Bite attacks or one Bite attack and one Constrict attack. It can replace one Bite attack with a use of Swallow.

c6e4dadd-231b-5b1b-b125-abdfab6b8175.name: Swallow (Titanoboa)
c6e4dadd-231b-5b1b-b125-abdfab6b8175.description: The titanoboa makes one Bite attack against a Huge or smaller target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the titanoboa, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the titanoboa's turns. If the titanoboa takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a swallowed creature, the titanoboa must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the titanoboa. If the titanoboa dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

d24369fe-ab75-5ee7-afa7-0ed71ac128d3.name: Burning Heart
d24369fe-ab75-5ee7-afa7-0ed71ac128d3.description: The tophet sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. Each creature in the bright light has resistance to cold damage. At the start of each of its turns, the tophet chooses whether this light is active.

85b19bbb-1282-5fcc-92f5-0b4f4b00edbd.name: Construct Nature (Tophet)
85b19bbb-1282-5fcc-92f5-0b4f4b00edbd.description: The tophet doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

a37c8dbc-1b4b-5865-916b-e7bbcc65ec3e.name: Heated Body (Tophet)
a37c8dbc-1b4b-5865-916b-e7bbcc65ec3e.description: A creature that touches the tophet or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the tophet or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) fire damage.

0401a77e-8daa-5aca-beb8-a1be5f909a8a.name: Burning Belly
0401a77e-8daa-5aca-beb8-a1be5f909a8a.description: The tophet makes one Slam attack against a target it is grappling as it shoves the creature into its open, flame-filled belly. If the attack hits, the target is forced into the tophet's burning belly, and the grapple ends. While inside the belly, the target is restrained, has three-quarters cover against attacks and other effects outside the belly, and it takes 14 (4d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature, including the target, can take its action to pull the target free from the belly by succeeding on a DC 16 Strength check. The creature making the attempt takes 7 (2d6) fire damage.

348ac0fa-641e-5871-97b3-bba8503791d8.description: Flames erupt on a point the tophet can see within 100 feet of it. Each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

8e78d92d-5a26-5453-aecf-b62ae88198f7.name: Multiattack (Tophet)

aa483082-21f9-5cae-b2f1-99fd8a9c6a7f.name: Slam (Tophet)
aa483082-21f9-5cae-b2f1-99fd8a9c6a7f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16) if it is a Large or smaller creature.

43a6d12c-9cab-535c-8826-a38c42b44732.name: Crowd Tactics
43a6d12c-9cab-535c-8826-a38c42b44732.description: The tosculi can share its space with up to one other tosculi. While sharing its space with one other tosculi, it has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if the other tosculi in its space isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The tosculi can share its space with up to one other tosculi. While sharing its space with one other tosculi, it has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if the other tosculi in its space isn’t incapacitated.

f0249b8b-25df-575a-85eb-80af3487b940.name: Glide (Tosculi Drone)
f0249b8b-25df-575a-85eb-80af3487b940.description: The tosculi can extend its vestigial wings while falling to slow its rate of descent to 60 feet per round, landing on its feet and taking no falling damage. It can move up to 5 feet horizontally for every 1 foot it falls. The tosculi can’t gain height with its wings alone. If subjected to a strong wind or lift of any kind, it can use the updraft to glide farther.

9f9385c6-9000-524a-94ca-92be801fa0a4.name: Hive Sense
9f9385c6-9000-524a-94ca-92be801fa0a4.description: The tosculi can pinpoint the location of its hive queen when she is within 300 feet of it, and it can sense the general direction and distance to the hive where its queen makes her home.

fe068256-3b2b-5069-ae72-2e5d4fa51296.name: Archer
fe068256-3b2b-5069-ae72-2e5d4fa51296.description: A ranged weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the tosculi hits with it (included in the attack).

2e0740de-7566-5ea6-b66d-76950231b87f.description: When the tosculi makes a ranged attack with a bow, it doesn’t have disadvantage on the attack roll from being within 5 feet of a hostile creature, though it may still have disadvantage from other sources.

4af3ba3d-18d8-5e14-af02-72284fef59f9.name: Skirmisher
4af3ba3d-18d8-5e14-af02-72284fef59f9.description: The tosculi takes the Dash or Disengage action.

73956570-836e-5c48-9ec1-24e91c3f8bba.description: The hive queen knows the direction and distance to all members of her hive and the range of her telepathy extends to 20 miles when communicating with a member of her hive.

58224a75-9c2d-5c21-babf-2940d66bec35.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Tosculi Hive Queen)
58224a75-9c2d-5c21-babf-2940d66bec35.description: If the hive queen fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

f3e8a750-bf5d-548d-9490-a9d1dbe7d295.description: The hive queen flies up to half her flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

493ff572-aa4f-5dbd-941a-838dd48cf6f8.name: Glitter Dust
493ff572-aa4f-5dbd-941a-838dd48cf6f8.description: The hive queen beats her wings and creates a cloud of glittering, golden particles. Each non-tosculi creature within 20 feet of her must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

7acb8197-95ea-5c90-a93a-d5ef44fd7485.name: Implant Egg
7acb8197-95ea-5c90-a93a-d5ef44fd7485.description: The hive queen implants an egg into an incapacitated creature within 5 feet of her that isn't a Construct or Undead. Until the egg hatches or is removed, the creature is poisoned, paralyzed, and doesn't need to eat or drink. The egg hatches after 30 days, and the larval tosculi bursts out of the host, killing the host in the process. A creature can take its action to remove the egg by succeeding on a DC 20 Wisdom (Medicine) check. Alternatively, a spell or effect that cures disease disintegrates the unhatched tosculi.

db7b4db4-7c76-5a7d-ab47-2dea48c87ef7.name: Multiattack (Tosculi Hive Queen)
db7b4db4-7c76-5a7d-ab47-2dea48c87ef7.description: The tosculi hive queen makes four Scimitar attacks.

attributes.description: The tosculi hive queen makes four Scimitar attacks.

44b1c0af-8ab3-58f2-abc2-331891585eda.name: Scimitar (Tosculi Hive Queen)
44b1c0af-8ab3-58f2-abc2-331891585eda.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) slashing damage.

00df6721-20ab-520f-81ff-1ea665318d84.name: Stinger (Tosculi Hive Queen)
00df6721-20ab-520f-81ff-1ea665318d84.description: The hive queen makes one Stinger attack.

attributes.description: The hive queen makes one Stinger attack.

4b0908a4-c8a9-52c1-87af-97b8a1d9978a.name: Claw (Tosculi Warrior)
4b0908a4-c8a9-52c1-87af-97b8a1d9978a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) slashing damage.

6c47dbd8-99c2-57af-86ff-88550de14c9d.name: Multiattack (Tosculi Warrior)
6c47dbd8-99c2-57af-86ff-88550de14c9d.description: The tosculi warrior makes one Claw attack and one Stinger attack.

attributes.description: The tosculi warrior makes one Claw attack and one Stinger attack.

94512f1a-bbd5-5a8b-813b-abe98e8212e3.name: Prepare Host
94512f1a-bbd5-5a8b-813b-abe98e8212e3.description: The tosculi extends the paralysis on a creature within 5 feet of it that was paralyzed by a tosculi's Stinger attack. The paralyzed target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 8 hours and no longer makes saving throws to end the paralysis. The paralysis ends if the target takes damage while below half its hp maximum. Otherwise, a spell or effect that cures disease ends this paralysis.

a06e353e-e7e9-556e-9cec-fd0d6cdc1fdf.name: Stinger (Tosculi Warrior)
a06e353e-e7e9-556e-9cec-fd0d6cdc1fdf.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, the target is also paralyzed. A poisoned target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

A poisoned target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

01e37b48-7c1a-5c31-a182-6b5e0aa40767.name: Improvised Tools
01e37b48-7c1a-5c31-a182-6b5e0aa40767.description: The kobold trapsmith can use any Tiny objects at hand to pick locks and disarm traps, as if any such object was part of a set of thieves’ tools. It is proficient in using Tiny objects in this way. In addition, the trapsmith has advantage on ability checks to pick locks and disarm traps.

f4c3974b-3c58-5fcd-b2f1-494c38fb2b1d.name: Pack Tactics (Trapsmith)
f4c3974b-3c58-5fcd-b2f1-494c38fb2b1d.description: The kobold trapsmith has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the trapsmith’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The kobold trapsmith has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the trapsmith’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

f7da02d2-3b59-564f-b729-b177c913075a.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Trapsmith)
f7da02d2-3b59-564f-b729-b177c913075a.description: While in sunlight, the kobold trapsmith has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the kobold trapsmith has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

2570c5fd-46cc-5135-813f-0f027a4174ab.name: Dagger (Trapsmith)
2570c5fd-46cc-5135-813f-0f027a4174ab.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.

a3a4d069-682a-5b6a-be76-21a9a42ee18f.name: Makeshift Trap
a3a4d069-682a-5b6a-be76-21a9a42ee18f.description: The kobold trapsmith cobbles together a quick trap with materials at hand and throws it at a point on the ground it can see within 30 feet of it. The trapsmith chooses one of the following traps. Each creature in the trap's area must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or suffer the trap's effects.

b4b9ddda-2c47-5300-b71a-fe1c192ad12d.name: Multiattack (Trapsmith)
b4b9ddda-2c47-5300-b71a-fe1c192ad12d.description: The trapsmith uses Makeshift Trap then makes one Dagger or Spare Part attack.

410fa369-cb5d-58e0-bcd1-f637e59fd41d.name: Spare Part
410fa369-cb5d-58e0-bcd1-f637e59fd41d.description: Ranged Weapon Attack:+5 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage or slashing damage (the trapsmith's choice).

dd7ca036-9d81-5151-add8-38da926b2e55.name: Amorphous (Treacle)
dd7ca036-9d81-5151-add8-38da926b2e55.description: The treacle can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The treacle can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

4821202d-89f0-527d-937c-471d3f035236.name: Mimicry (Treacle)
4821202d-89f0-527d-937c-471d3f035236.description: The treacle can mimic animal sounds. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

attributes.description: The treacle can mimic animal sounds. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

295d5f7b-c38a-523c-aa3a-c1973853a862.name: Blood Drain
295d5f7b-c38a-523c-aa3a-c1973853a862.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: The treacle attaches to the target. While attached, the treacle can't attack, and at the start of each of the treacle's turns, the target loses 5 (2d4) hp due to blood loss. Each time the target loses hp in this way, it must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the treacle is attached and harming it, otherwise it is unaware the hp loss is from the treacle. A creature that loses hp in this way while below half its hp maximum automatically succeeds on this check.

While attached, the treacle can't attack, and at the start of each of the treacle's turns, the target loses 5 (2d4) hp due to blood loss. Each time the target loses hp in this way, it must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the treacle is attached and harming it, otherwise it is unaware the hp loss is from the treacle. A creature that loses hp in this way while below half its hp maximum automatically succeeds on this check.

963fcc13-df7b-5ed1-b62d-36ced37a7896.name: Mimic Innocence
963fcc13-df7b-5ed1-b62d-36ced37a7896.description: When a creature the treacle can see moves within 120 feet of it, the treacle squishes, stretches, and molds its body into the shape of a Tiny Beast or object the creature finds least threatening, such as an injured rabbit or a long-lost toy. The treacle's body takes on most of the coloration of the desired shape, but some part of it is always white, pale, or pearlescent. Regardless of the shape, the treacle's flesh doesn't change and is soft and plush to the touch. The treacle can maintain this shape for up to 8 hours or until another creature it can see moves within 120 feet of it.

9ba2de72-ecd7-5af4-9a9a-b6bdbd37be5d.name: Regeneration (Trollkin Reaver)
9ba2de72-ecd7-5af4-9a9a-b6bdbd37be5d.description: The trollkin reaver regains 5 hp at the start of its turn. If the trollkin takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the trollkin’s next turn. The trollkin dies if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

7cabf19e-7345-52b6-a44a-8a90565aadd2.name: Thick Hide
7cabf19e-7345-52b6-a44a-8a90565aadd2.description: The trollkin reaver’s skin is thick and tough, granting it a +1 bonus to Armor Class. This bonus is already factored into the trollkin’s AC.

attributes.description: The trollkin reaver’s skin is thick and tough, granting it a +1 bonus to Armor Class. This bonus is already factored into the trollkin’s AC.

89ace045-5d8e-5b2d-a529-6de1b3c27e23.name: Bite (Trollkin Reaver)
89ace045-5d8e-5b2d-a529-6de1b3c27e23.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) piercing damage.

fe703881-15c9-51fd-84d1-0d5a887573df.name: Handaxe (Trollkin Reaver)
fe703881-15c9-51fd-84d1-0d5a887573df.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

01f2bae1-7f15-545f-8172-b84c097d9525.name: Howl of Battle
01f2bae1-7f15-545f-8172-b84c097d9525.description: The trollkin reaver howls a battle cry at up to three friendly creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target can make one weapon attack as a reaction and has advantage on the attack roll.

attributes.description: The trollkin reaver howls a battle cry at up to three friendly creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target can make one weapon attack as a reaction and has advantage on the attack roll.

fbeb520e-cda7-576c-9a4d-bc297483e3ef.name: Multiattack (Trollkin Reaver)
fbeb520e-cda7-576c-9a4d-bc297483e3ef.description: The trollkin raider makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks, or it makes three Handaxe attacks. It can replace one Claw attack with a Battleaxe attack.

attributes.description: The trollkin raider makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks, or it makes three Handaxe attacks. It can replace one Claw attack with a Battleaxe attack.

bf75ac32-ef56-591a-b485-e740b5666ae7.name: Electrified Tendrils
bf75ac32-ef56-591a-b485-e740b5666ae7.description: A creature that touches the skyfish or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) lightning damage. In addition, a creature that starts its turn beneath the skyfish while the skyfish is hovering takes 3 (1d6) lightning damage, provided the creature is within 15 feet of the skyfish.

In addition, a creature that starts its turn beneath the skyfish while the skyfish is hovering takes 3 (1d6) lightning damage, provided the creature is within 15 feet of the skyfish.

a17eda5f-5a5f-54d7-9bc7-e57fb8016a49.name: Mobile Grappler (Tusked Skyfish)
a17eda5f-5a5f-54d7-9bc7-e57fb8016a49.description: While grappling a creature, the tusked skyfish can move at its full speed, carrying the grappled creature along with it.

attributes.description: While grappling a creature, the tusked skyfish can move at its full speed, carrying the grappled creature along with it.

bc2627a5-3cf6-5325-b576-cabcc1082576.name: Electrified Tentacles
bc2627a5-3cf6-5325-b576-cabcc1082576.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13) if it is a Medium or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 14 (4d6) lightning damage at the start of each of its turns, and the skyfish can't use its Electrified Tentacles on another target.

69d9bd8d-b32e-5704-b977-282858527843.name: Multiattack (Tusked Skyfish)
69d9bd8d-b32e-5704-b977-282858527843.description: The tusked skyfish makes one Gore attack and one Electrified Tentacles attack.

attributes.description: The tusked skyfish makes one Gore attack and one Electrified Tentacles attack.

73d914da-fa70-5193-9b6e-60e0d19ac610.name: Stench Spray
73d914da-fa70-5193-9b6e-60e0d19ac610.description: The tusked skyfish sprays foul-smelling liquid in a 20-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature falls unconscious while poisoned in this way. The unconscious creature wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

6d5c4f01-86f8-5adb-b75d-56eeb5af55e3.name: Incorporeal Movement (Umbral Vampire)
6d5c4f01-86f8-5adb-b75d-56eeb5af55e3.description: The umbral vampire can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The umbral vampire can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

1f33916d-46ee-538e-b8fa-3971e444b644.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Umbral Vampire)
1f33916d-46ee-538e-b8fa-3971e444b644.description: While in sunlight, the umbral vampire has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the umbral vampire has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

5cda8ae3-54b5-5592-847c-b2bf78129d37.name: Undead Nature (Umbral Vampire)
5cda8ae3-54b5-5592-847c-b2bf78129d37.description: The umbral vampire doesn’t require air.

attributes.description: The umbral vampire doesn’t require air.

34ef1f23-ea25-5c9e-b8f2-8b0e2059a46c.name: Multiattack (Umbral Vampire)
34ef1f23-ea25-5c9e-b8f2-8b0e2059a46c.description: The umbral vampire can use its Umbral Grasp. It then makes two Shadow Touch attacks.

attributes.description: The umbral vampire can use its Umbral Grasp. It then makes two Shadow Touch attacks.

1ea35d54-0a89-54d7-ade8-a974f692b091.name: Shadow Stealth (Umbral Vampire)
1ea35d54-0a89-54d7-ade8-a974f692b091.description: While in dim light or darkness, the umbral vampire takes the Hide action.

attributes.description: While in dim light or darkness, the umbral vampire takes the Hide action.

1b243325-daaa-561b-8f94-7de578307fe2.name: Shadow Touch
1b243325-daaa-561b-8f94-7de578307fe2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. A non-evil Humanoid slain by this attack rises 24 hours later as a shadow under the vampire's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life. The vampire can have no more than five shadows under its control at one time.

517c15c0-c834-5df0-9c1f-0c3e97947dbd.name: Umbral Grasp
517c15c0-c834-5df0-9c1f-0c3e97947dbd.description: The umbral vampire sends a giant hand of shadow to grab one creature it can see that is in dim light or darkness within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained by wisps of magical shadow for 1 minute. While restrained, the target takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The umbral vampire can have no more than two creatures restrained by its Umbral Grasp at a time.

71b13899-04e1-5019-9072-6d937504d03b.name: Flyby (Uraeus)
71b13899-04e1-5019-9072-6d937504d03b.description: The uraeus doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

a975d199-0632-52df-97af-86dec50c7d6c.name: Magic Resistance (Uraeus)
a975d199-0632-52df-97af-86dec50c7d6c.description: The uraeus has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The uraeus has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

86646f94-03e9-5645-8d56-b37a8c529d7c.name: Bite (Uraeus)
86646f94-03e9-5645-8d56-b37a8c529d7c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned, the target takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

9bbb310e-4738-57fd-b5d5-361f5109c497.name: Bonded Savior
9bbb310e-4738-57fd-b5d5-361f5109c497.description: When the uraeus's bonded ward takes damage, the uraeus prevents the ward from taking the damage and loses hp equal to that amount instead, regardless of the type of damage dealt.

4f0afd3b-37ff-5f9d-8343-c8b2ddd650d3.name: Searing Breath
4f0afd3b-37ff-5f9d-8343-c8b2ddd650d3.description: The uraeus exhales a 15-foot cone of fire. Each creature in the area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The uraeus exhales a 15-foot cone of fire. Each creature in the area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

8831abf6-16b8-5958-a69c-3717caedf4c2.name: Spit Fire
8831abf6-16b8-5958-a69c-3717caedf4c2.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (4d6 + 2) fire damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (4d6 + 2) fire damage.

c90768db-a5cb-5c92-92bf-588aa9cf677b.name: Ward Bond
c90768db-a5cb-5c92-92bf-588aa9cf677b.description: The uraeus forms a magical bond with a willing creature within 5 feet of it. While bonded, the uraeus and its ward know the distance and direction to each other and the general state of each other's health, even if the two are on different planes of existence. The bond lasts until the uraeus or its ward dies, until the uraeus ends it as a bonus action, or until the uraeus uses this bonus action to create a bond with another creature.

attributes.description: The uraeus forms a magical bond with a willing creature within 5 feet of it. While bonded, the uraeus and its ward know the distance and direction to each other and the general state of each other's health, even if the two are on different planes of existence. The bond lasts until the uraeus or its ward dies, until the uraeus ends it as a bonus action, or until the uraeus uses this bonus action to create a bond with another creature.

d145c914-a7a4-50ef-86f3-b54732e00205.name: Mind-Rending Death
d145c914-a7a4-50ef-86f3-b54732e00205.description: When the urochar dies, it releases all the fear it consumed in its lifetime in a single, mind-rending wave. Each creature within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 19 Charisma saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature takes 14 (4d6) psychic damage at the start of each of its turns. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

4ed6678e-1064-58da-97d6-0cf22784df4e.name: Rubbery Body
4ed6678e-1064-58da-97d6-0cf22784df4e.description: The urochar’s body is rubbery with few bones, allowing it to easily move through any opening large enough for a Medium creature. It can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Small creature. The urochar’s destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

It can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Small creature. The urochar’s destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

08fc6d32-68a4-56d2-8324-f93e9c424851.name: Spider Climb (Urochar)
08fc6d32-68a4-56d2-8324-f93e9c424851.description: The urochar can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The urochar can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

d65fdd12-7afc-5db3-9a59-268649106af0.name: Hidden Step (Urochar)
d65fdd12-7afc-5db3-9a59-268649106af0.description: The urochar magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see and takes the Hide action. Grappled creatures are no longer grappled and don't teleport with it.

attributes.description: The urochar magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see and takes the Hide action. Grappled creatures are no longer grappled and don't teleport with it.

65656a3e-aa7a-58eb-9199-c81f508b6330.name: Multiattack (Urochar)
65656a3e-aa7a-58eb-9199-c81f508b6330.description: The urochar can use its Paralyzing Gaze. It then makes four Tentacle attacks.

attributes.description: The urochar can use its Paralyzing Gaze. It then makes four Tentacle attacks.

9999c69c-de36-577a-a5d7-6295165aa9c0.name: Paralyzing Gaze
9999c69c-de36-577a-a5d7-6295165aa9c0.description: The urochar turns its eerie gaze upon one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the urochar's Paralyzing Gaze for the next 24 hours.

If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the urochar's Paralyzing Gaze for the next 24 hours.

9ff3e2f6-b472-5773-a08b-c66435c80af5.name: Strangling Grasp
9ff3e2f6-b472-5773-a08b-c66435c80af5.description: Each creature grappled by the urochar must make a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage and can't breathe until the grapple ends. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and can still breathe.

af35b5ce-90d8-549a-8d4f-5552c089caf5.name: Tentacle (Urochar)
af35b5ce-90d8-549a-8d4f-5552c089caf5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 19) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The urochar has four tentacles, each can grapple only one target.

a2d76c0d-bbb4-5659-a760-ac23c7ec4b6f.name: False Appearance (Ushabti)
a2d76c0d-bbb4-5659-a760-ac23c7ec4b6f.description: While the ushabti is motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal funerary statue.

attributes.description: While the ushabti is motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal funerary statue.

5f9539a6-31ce-52e8-9c80-4ce1014b6303.name: Immutable Form (Ushabti)
5f9539a6-31ce-52e8-9c80-4ce1014b6303.description: The ushabti is immune to spells and effects that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The ushabti is immune to spells and effects that would alter its form.

f041e672-3020-5748-9be9-eacec2acd95c.name: Magic Resistance (Ushabti)
f041e672-3020-5748-9be9-eacec2acd95c.description: The ushabti has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ushabti has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

93dedf10-ad1d-5110-abbb-a04b2655afab.name: Necrotic Weapons (Ushabti)
93dedf10-ad1d-5110-abbb-a04b2655afab.description: The ushabti’s weapon attacks are magical. When the ushabti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The ushabti’s weapon attacks are magical. When the ushabti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

179e7921-c42a-5a3a-88db-d8ad4af50a63.name: Multiattack (Ushabti)
179e7921-c42a-5a3a-88db-d8ad4af50a63.description: The ushabti makes two Nabboot attacks.

attributes.description: The ushabti makes two Nabboot attacks.

e7d0a490-c406-5073-ba35-b2ea6997a0d5.name: Nabboot
e7d0a490-c406-5073-ba35-b2ea6997a0d5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with tomb taint. The cursed target's speed is halved, and its hp maximum decreases by 3 (1d6) for every 24 hours that elapse. If the curse reduces the target's hp maximum to 0, the target dies, and its body turns to dust. The curse lasts until removed by the remove curse spell or comparable magic.

3c3ec67f-9484-533d-8d8d-9927ae72cceb.name: Serpentine Armlets
3c3ec67f-9484-533d-8d8d-9927ae72cceb.description: The ushabti commands its armlets to drop to the floor and transform into two giant, poisonous snakes. The snakes act as allies of the ushabti and obey its spoken commands. The snakes remain for 1 hour, until the ushabti dies, or until the ushabti dismisses one or both of them as a bonus action. When the snakes disappear, they become wisps of smoke and reform as armlets around the ushabti's arms.

f0f11543-05b0-506d-a184-2bcd8bdc4268.name: Telekinesis
f0f11543-05b0-506d-a184-2bcd8bdc4268.description: One creature the ushabti can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or the ushabti moves the creature up to 30 feet in any direction (including upward). The target is restrained until the start of the ushabti's next turn.

54e92ab4-5694-55c6-a68f-b15513745d4a.name: Healing Leech
54e92ab4-5694-55c6-a68f-b15513745d4a.description: If a creature within 30 feet of the ushabti regains hp from a spell or magical effect, the creature regains only half the amount and the ushabti regains the other half.

3d58d87f-872b-5e02-ace4-3ee149dd4d63.name: Immutable Form (Ushabti Royal Guard)
3d58d87f-872b-5e02-ace4-3ee149dd4d63.description: The ushabti is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

96efb19a-fbc5-5c28-9c58-2a7ef05e9390.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Ushabti Royal Guard)
96efb19a-fbc5-5c28-9c58-2a7ef05e9390.description: If the ushabti fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

4fbba6c8-e07c-54cf-8cfd-d2bc273d6071.name: Necrotic Weapons (Ushabti Royal Guard)
4fbba6c8-e07c-54cf-8cfd-d2bc273d6071.description: The ushabti’s weapon attacks are magical. When the ushabti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d8 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The ushabti’s weapon attacks are magical. When the ushabti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d8 necrotic damage (included in the attack).

99b9abe8-09de-576a-af71-e1fa1aaf3f79.name: Breath-Stealing Presence
99b9abe8-09de-576a-af71-e1fa1aaf3f79.description: Each creature of the ushabti's choice within 30 feet of the ushabti and aware of it must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or take 9 (2d8) necrotic damage and be unable to speak or breathe for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the ushabti's Breath-Stealing Presence for the next 24 hours.

A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the ushabti's Breath-Stealing Presence for the next 24 hours.

f2402ace-ebc8-5790-8414-998ab6a53e72.name: Enervating Surge
f2402ace-ebc8-5790-8414-998ab6a53e72.description: The ushabti emits waves of necrotic energy. Each creature within 30 feet of the ushabti must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 49 (11d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that can't breathe because of the ushabti's Breath-Stealing Presence has disadvantage on the saving throw. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature also suffers one level of exhaustion. A Humanoid slain by this effect rises 1d4 hours later as a mummy under the ushabti's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The ushabti can have no more than five mummies under its control at one time.

ee2c2992-ea51-5f73-9cef-a8b3d7f26814.name: Move (Ushabti Royal Guard)
ee2c2992-ea51-5f73-9cef-a8b3d7f26814.description: The ushabti moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

b9347b45-ae4a-57d8-bcfe-bdd9e205e776.name: Multiattack (Ushabti Royal Guard)
b9347b45-ae4a-57d8-bcfe-bdd9e205e776.description: The ushabti can use its Breath-Stealing Presence. It then makes two Khopesh attacks and one Medjai's Scepter attack.

e0ded2f8-dbf7-525b-8b7f-ad01a3896f6d.description: When a creature more than 5 feet away from the ushabti moves to a space within 5 feet of the ushabti, the ushabti can make one Khopesh attack against it.

80818e36-58f2-59e8-9f93-9fb8f70fe876.name: Telekinesis (Ushabti Royal Guard)
80818e36-58f2-59e8-9f93-9fb8f70fe876.description: Up to two creatures the ushabti can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or the ushabti moves the creature up to 30 feet in any direction (including upward). A moved target is then restrained until the start of the ushabti's next turn.

4fb6acf5-ce88-5921-8325-e1f2c2447380.name: Aura of Valor
4fb6acf5-ce88-5921-8325-e1f2c2447380.description: Friendly creatures wielding weapons within 30 feet of the valkyrie have advantage on weapon attack rolls and ability checks. At the start of each of its turns, the valkyrie can choose to exclude any number of friendly creatures from this aura (no action required).

6514e1af-b935-5889-b7ca-8f260a1acd23.name: Immortal Nature (Valkyrie)
6514e1af-b935-5889-b7ca-8f260a1acd23.description: The valkyrie doesn’t require food, drink, or sleep.

b02bc487-d8d1-54bc-ba7b-aae0f8eb89eb.name: Magic Resistance (Valkyrie)
b02bc487-d8d1-54bc-ba7b-aae0f8eb89eb.description: The valkyrie has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

98a8c572-bee1-5f03-9fe8-4427cc7c5c69.name: Radiant Weapons
98a8c572-bee1-5f03-9fe8-4427cc7c5c69.description: The valkyrie’s weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 16 (3d10) radiant damage (included in the attack).

attributes.description: The valkyrie’s weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 16 (3d10) radiant damage (included in the attack).

84c7f490-98a3-546a-8c4b-c028b71d58b9.name: Ascension
84c7f490-98a3-546a-8c4b-c028b71d58b9.description: When a friendly creature the valkyrie can see and within its Aura of Valor is reduced to 0 hp while engaged in melee combat, the valkyrie can reincarnate the creature as a gladiator. If the gladiator reduces at least three creatures to 0 hp within 1 minute of its reincarnation, it transforms into an einherjar. The valkyrie can provide ascension to up to two creatures each hour with this reaction.

2a88b2e1-86a5-5750-a946-8d2bbc70acf0.name: Gaze of Doom
2a88b2e1-86a5-5750-a946-8d2bbc70acf0.description: The valkyrie's gaze foretells a doomed fate for one creature the valkyrie can see within 60 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

7fd3fa58-a49e-5961-8ba2-3b39f7f0bc24.name: Healing Touch
7fd3fa58-a49e-5961-8ba2-3b39f7f0bc24.description: The valkyrie touches another creature. The target magically regains 21 (6d6) hp and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.

612630b3-6d70-5e9c-a671-4c152af6cb2d.name: Longsword (Valkyrie)
612630b3-6d70-5e9c-a671-4c152af6cb2d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 16 (3d10) radiant damage.

2c7969ff-d2c9-551e-a760-7511b5cdc961.name: Multiattack (Valkyrie)
2c7969ff-d2c9-551e-a760-7511b5cdc961.description: The valkyrie can use its Gaze of Doom. It then makes two Longsword attacks and one Spear attack, or it makes three Radiant Bolt attacks.

1e1d1026-b751-5b9a-9c48-4a88e1436840.name: Radiant Bolt (Valkyrie)
1e1d1026-b751-5b9a-9c48-4a88e1436840.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (4d10 + 4) radiant damage.

a83d8032-c1e6-58c9-a17e-9f8c6837dfc0.name: Spear (Valkyrie)
a83d8032-c1e6-58c9-a17e-9f8c6837dfc0.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack, plus 16 (3d10) radiant damage.

01386799-7614-5ca8-9787-b7ef8c6ef79a.name: Fog Flow
01386799-7614-5ca8-9787-b7ef8c6ef79a.description: While in fog or mist, the vapor lynx can move through a space as narrow at 1 inch wide without squeezing, provided the fog or mist is flowing through the space.

attributes.description: While in fog or mist, the vapor lynx can move through a space as narrow at 1 inch wide without squeezing, provided the fog or mist is flowing through the space.

b708f631-07cf-552d-b192-551eeb903be6.name: Hazesight (Vapor Lynx)
b708f631-07cf-552d-b192-551eeb903be6.description: The vapor lynx can see through areas obscured by fog, mist, and steam without penalty.

attributes.description: The vapor lynx can see through areas obscured by fog, mist, and steam without penalty.

056ff83d-e134-5519-be65-e4cd9aa8a352.name: Swamp Walk (Vapor Lynx)
056ff83d-e134-5519-be65-e4cd9aa8a352.description: Difficult terrain composed of mud, shallow water, and water plants doesn’t cost the vapor lynx extra movement.

attributes.description: Difficult terrain composed of mud, shallow water, and water plants doesn’t cost the vapor lynx extra movement.

c1b8a7af-195f-5e96-a6b4-bc4e553d2db5.name: Fog Step
c1b8a7af-195f-5e96-a6b4-bc4e553d2db5.description: The vapor lynx teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The origin and destination spaces must contain fog.

d2100697-8c7b-5b64-a6dd-dcf48db1e0f3.name: Multiattack (Vapor Lynx)
d2100697-8c7b-5b64-a6dd-dcf48db1e0f3.description: The vapor lynx makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

attributes.description: The vapor lynx makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

d27c058a-baca-5152-b848-051cae2346c3.name: Poison Breath (Vapor Lynx)
d27c058a-baca-5152-b848-051cae2346c3.description: The vapor lynx exhales poisonous fog in a 20-foot radius centered on itself. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 28 (8d6) poison damage and is poisoned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. The fog lasts for 1 minute. A creature that starts its turn in the fog or enters the fog for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

f4a165cc-1f18-58da-8f28-2bbed66c6489.name: Toxic Smoke
f4a165cc-1f18-58da-8f28-2bbed66c6489.description: If the venomous mummy takes fire damage, each creature within 10 feet of it must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw as its venom-soaked wraps emit a poisonous smoke. On a failure, a creature takes 7 (2d6) poison damage and is poisoned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn’t poisoned. The smoke fills a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on the mummy. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. It lasts until the end of the mummy’s next turn. A creature that enters the cloud for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there is poisoned until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: If the venomous mummy takes fire damage, each creature within 10 feet of it must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw as its venom-soaked wraps emit a poisonous smoke. 205a292f-50ee-5408-a376-ec58e4a7bd67.name: Undead Nature (Venomous Mummy)
205a292f-50ee-5408-a376-ec58e4a7bd67.description: The venomous mummy doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The venomous mummy doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

ca4e5f8f-1e0e-526b-b0cb-ddc45a139950.name: Venom-Soaked Wraps
ca4e5f8f-1e0e-526b-b0cb-ddc45a139950.description: A creature that touches the mummy or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the mummy or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) poison damage.

97b49deb-0673-5b51-941d-41111266dd43.name: Venomous Fist
97b49deb-0673-5b51-941d-41111266dd43.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be cursed. Every 24 hours that elapse, the cursed target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) poison damage, and its hp maximum is reduced by that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest after the curse is removed. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. The curse lasts until removed by the remove curse spell or similar magic.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be cursed. Every 24 hours that elapse, the cursed target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) poison damage, and its hp maximum is reduced by that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest after the curse is removed. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. The curse lasts until removed by the remove curse spell or similar magic.

5944b93c-9e5a-5747-a9de-c086497a5c4d.name: Oasis Appearance (Vesiculosa)
5944b93c-9e5a-5747-a9de-c086497a5c4d.description: While the vesiculosa remains motionless and partially submerged on the surface of sand or soil, it is indistinguishable from a small oasis or pond. The vesiculosa’s pitcher produces enough water for plants to grow around it, provided the vesiculosa remains in the area for an extended period of time. A creature that eats a fruit from a plant growing in the vesiculosa’s water is affected by the Sweet Water trait as if it drank the water.

attributes.description: While the vesiculosa remains motionless and partially submerged on the surface of sand or soil, it is indistinguishable from a small oasis or pond. The vesiculosa’s pitcher produces enough water for plants to grow around it, provided the vesiculosa remains in the area for an extended period of time. A creature that eats a fruit from a plant growing in the vesiculosa’s water is affected by the Sweet Water trait as if it drank the water.

da861dd0-2d25-5e5c-8d2a-983231101dd9.name: Sweet Fragrance
da861dd0-2d25-5e5c-8d2a-983231101dd9.description: When a creature that can smell the vesiculosa’s sweet fragrance starts its turn within 30 feet of the vesiculosa, the creature must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed, the creature must move on its turn toward the vesiculosa by the safest available route to get within 5 feet of the plant and drink its water. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the vesiculosa’s Sweet Fragrance for the next 24 hours.

attributes.description: When a creature that can smell the vesiculosa’s sweet fragrance starts its turn within 30 feet of the vesiculosa, the creature must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed, the creature must move on its turn toward the vesiculosa by the safest available route to get within 5 feet of the plant and drink its water. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the vesiculosa’s Sweet Fragrance for the next 24 hours.

a658fa11-118e-55c6-b29f-e8204fd2140f.name: Sweet Water
a658fa11-118e-55c6-b29f-e8204fd2140f.description: A creature that drinks water from the vesiculosa’s pitcher regains 5 (2d4) hp, reduces its exhaustion level by 1, and must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 10 minutes. An unconscious creature wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake. Drinking the water provides a creature enough nourishment to sustain it for one day.

An unconscious creature wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake. Drinking the water provides a creature enough nourishment to sustain it for one day.

be484e11-a1f9-5c6e-b7a4-ae318553af41.name: Bury
be484e11-a1f9-5c6e-b7a4-ae318553af41.description: One creature grappled by the vesiculosa is knocked prone, dragged into the ground, and buried just below the surface, ending the grapple. The buried creature is restrained and unable to breathe or stand up. A creature, including the buried creature, can take its action to free the buried creature by succeeding on a DC 16 Strength check. This bonus action doesn't wake a creature that is unconscious from the vesiculosa's Sweet Water trait or Spit Sweet Water action.

fdd8140c-b91a-5090-8235-65fe99646a13.name: Multiattack (Vesiculosa)
fdd8140c-b91a-5090-8235-65fe99646a13.description: The vesiculosa makes four Root or Spit Sweet Water attacks.

attributes.description: The vesiculosa makes four Root or Spit Sweet Water attacks.

e2108c01-5815-5a37-b06f-3a4daa27a83a.name: Root
e2108c01-5815-5a37-b06f-3a4daa27a83a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16). Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained. The vesiculosa has four roots, each of which can grapple only one target.

a69a8e0e-16ff-5501-9a28-e20976479c93.name: Spit Sweet Water
a69a8e0e-16ff-5501-9a28-e20976479c93.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 18 (3d10 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 1 minute. The target wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.

6745dcfb-3865-5b4b-aba6-5a65017c231d.name: Forest’s Defender
6745dcfb-3865-5b4b-aba6-5a65017c231d.description: Difficult terrain composed of nonmagical plants doesn’t cost the vila extra movement, and it can pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard. In addition, while in forested terrain, the vila has advantage on initiative rolls.

95741c68-6afe-5233-8585-a38e4cd1ed42.name: Poisoned Weapons (Vila)
95741c68-6afe-5233-8585-a38e4cd1ed42.description: The vila’s weapons are coated with a magical poison harvest from the forest. When the vila hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 poison damage (included in the attack).

c6cf7c99-a6d7-5879-8cae-668d769a0eba.name: Speak with Beasts (Vila)
c6cf7c99-a6d7-5879-8cae-668d769a0eba.description: The vila can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The vila can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

75ff5041-c5ee-5531-a8b5-d341c1d1d6b4.name: Denizens of the Wilds
75ff5041-c5ee-5531-a8b5-d341c1d1d6b4.description: The vila magically calls 1d4 wolves or 1 wampus cat. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the vila and obeying its spoken commands. The creatures remain for 1 hour, until the vila dies, or until the vila dismisses them as a bonus action.

c9aff958-5002-571e-8500-1d3d1ba0b235.name: Multiattack (Vila)
c9aff958-5002-571e-8500-1d3d1ba0b235.description: The vila can use its Song of the Forest. It then makes two Shortsword or Shortbow attacks.

attributes.description: The vila can use its Song of the Forest. It then makes two Shortsword or Shortbow attacks.

b3028298-da66-5039-bfea-f3cd9ab4475e.name: Shortbow (Vila)
b3028298-da66-5039-bfea-f3cd9ab4475e.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

3627d027-8573-5b26-9702-1d32b0efe48f.name: Shortsword (Vila)
3627d027-8573-5b26-9702-1d32b0efe48f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

1f43f3a1-9582-5963-95b4-5608ecb6d0c2.name: Song of the Forest
1f43f3a1-9582-5963-95b4-5608ecb6d0c2.description: The vila sings one of the following songs at up to three creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target that can hear the song must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or suffer the song's effect.

attributes.description: The vila sings one of the following songs at up to three creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target that can hear the song must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or suffer the song's effect.

54531e2e-d4ec-531f-989f-4e4edfde4f8d.name: Blood Frenzy (Vile Barber)
54531e2e-d4ec-531f-989f-4e4edfde4f8d.description: The vile barber has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

attributes.description: The vile barber has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

00af1739-9fce-51f8-9b8e-4fd0ce65a889.name: Frightening Cut
00af1739-9fce-51f8-9b8e-4fd0ce65a889.description: The vile barber makes one Straight Razor attack against a creature it can see within 5 feet of it. If the attack hits and deals damage, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) necrotic damage, and each creature that can see the attack within 15 feet of the target must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

attributes.description: The vile barber makes one Straight Razor attack against a creature it can see within 5 feet of it. If the attack hits and deals damage, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) necrotic damage, and each creature that can see the attack within 15 feet of the target must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

ba67376b-f65c-5e04-8c3f-6903b885174a.name: Hidden Step (Vile Barber)
ba67376b-f65c-5e04-8c3f-6903b885174a.description: The vile barber magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see and takes the Hide action.

attributes.description: The vile barber magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see and takes the Hide action.

524b648c-1d9e-5e03-9fb0-535b87c92e3a.name: Multiattack (Vile Barber)
524b648c-1d9e-5e03-9fb0-535b87c92e3a.description: The vile barber makes two Straight Razor attacks. If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or lose 3 (1d6) hp at the start of each of its turns due to a bleeding wound. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

ead9eebe-c8a5-5f07-b953-93b363f6d858.name: Straight Razor
ead9eebe-c8a5-5f07-b953-93b363f6d858.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the vile barber can steal one item the target is wearing or carrying, provided the item weighs no more than 10 pounds, isn't a weapon, and isn't wrapped around or firmly attached to the target, such as a shirt or armor.

91b9d7db-cf61-5760-89ec-6bba72210625.name: Green Regeneration (Vine Lord)
91b9d7db-cf61-5760-89ec-6bba72210625.description: While in a forest, the vine lord regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if it hast at least 1 hp.

attributes.description: While in a forest, the vine lord regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if it hast at least 1 hp.

be10d2e4-d5dc-5892-869a-532883226e5d.name: Magic Resistance (Vine Lord)
be10d2e4-d5dc-5892-869a-532883226e5d.description: The vine lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The vine lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

ec439380-95dd-5da8-8409-050b1befc29c.name: Root Mind (Vine Lord)
ec439380-95dd-5da8-8409-050b1befc29c.description: The vine lord and the tendril puppets it has created are connected via a hive mind. The vine lord and its puppets can telepathically communicate with each other, provided the communicating creatures are within 1 mile of each other. In addition, while in a forest, the vine lord can’t be surprised.

attributes.description: The vine lord and the tendril puppets it has created are connected via a hive mind. The vine lord and its puppets can telepathically communicate with each other, provided the communicating creatures are within 1 mile of each other. In addition, while in a forest, the vine lord can’t be surprised.

ef25bfcb-eedf-54d9-94e8-b66fdc62e996.name: Vine Seed
ef25bfcb-eedf-54d9-94e8-b66fdc62e996.description: A creature infected with a vine lord’s vine seed suffers near-constant pain as the seed takes root and spreads tendrils throughout its body. For the first 24 hours after infection, the creature has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks, as the pain from the spreading roots distracts it. Then, the seed becomes a disease, devouring the creature from the inside as it grows vines throughout the creature’s body. Until the disease is cured, the infected creature can’t regain hp, and its hp maximum decreases by 7 (2d6) for every 24 hours that elapse. This reduction lasts until the disease is cured. The creature dies if this disease reduces its hp maximum to 0.

a0819f61-8d6f-5906-bf6e-f828778e4dc4.name: Woodland Walk (Vine Lord)
a0819f61-8d6f-5906-bf6e-f828778e4dc4.description: Difficult terrain composed of plants doesn’t cost the vine lord extra movement. In addition, it can pass through plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

d457144e-cd82-54b6-aff4-7b5e6ea65134.name: Forest Protectors
d457144e-cd82-54b6-aff4-7b5e6ea65134.description: The vine lord magically calls 1d4 awakened trees or tendril puppets, or it calls 1 Plant with a challenge rating of 4 or lower. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the vine lord and obeying its spoken commands. The Plants remain for 1 hour, until the vine lord dies, or until the vine lord dismisses them as a bonus action.

37cbf4c3-dd46-55e8-97aa-96f6a26023ee.name: Multiattack (Vine Lord)
37cbf4c3-dd46-55e8-97aa-96f6a26023ee.description: The vine lord makes one Tendril attack and two Thorned Slam attacks.

98505621-8414-5aa6-82d2-463307533b4c.name: Tendril (Vine Lord)
98505621-8414-5aa6-82d2-463307533b4c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become infected with a vine seed (see the Vine Seed trait).

299235f6-9ed8-5f17-9ee7-ae8045b98b87.name: Thorned Slam (Vine Lord)
299235f6-9ed8-5f17-9ee7-ae8045b98b87.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (4d4) piercing damage.

496a5d0d-397b-5906-8be2-5bce88cd9c37.name: Regeneration (Vine Troll Skeleton)
496a5d0d-397b-5906-8be2-5bce88cd9c37.description: The vine troll skeleton regains 5 hp at the start of its turn. If the skeleton takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the skeleton’s next turn. The skeleton dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate or if its bound tree is destroyed (see Tree Bound trait).

87fcb53c-a419-51c4-a677-369f944728a5.name: Tree Bound
87fcb53c-a419-51c4-a677-369f944728a5.description: The vine troll skeleton is magically bound to a duskthorn dryad, tree, or treant, and the skeleton must stay within 1 mile of it. If the skeleton’s bound duskthorn dryad, tree, or treant dies, the skeleton is immediately destroyed and doesn’t regenerate.

997f504f-450a-5075-bb2d-cc42ad0652f3.name: Undead Nature (Vine Troll Skeleton)

c24e9158-0368-5305-ba2c-3aed4a98736f.name: Bite (Vine Troll Skeleton)
c24e9158-0368-5305-ba2c-3aed4a98736f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) piercing damage.

8aeef5f0-75ad-5aeb-81fc-fc2b7d0cdac4.name: Claw (Vine Troll Skeleton)
8aeef5f0-75ad-5aeb-81fc-fc2b7d0cdac4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) slashing damage.

5474ca71-10f8-5f13-b914-fbffec76cb9e.name: Multiattack (Vine Troll Skeleton)
5474ca71-10f8-5f13-b914-fbffec76cb9e.description: The skeleton makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks, or it makes three Poisoned Thorn attacks.

bc120b66-76b6-5362-ad9f-137a168849d0.name: Poisoned Thorn
bc120b66-76b6-5362-ad9f-137a168849d0.description: Ranged Weapon Attack:+5 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d6 + 1) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

69374db4-cf4b-5bd4-b1d0-67bf6bd34348.name: Gravitic Breath (Void Dragon Wyrmling)
69374db4-cf4b-5bd4-b1d0-67bf6bd34348.description: The dragon exhales localized gravity in a 15-foot cube, originating from the dragon. When a creature ends a fall in the cube, it takes 1d10 bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it fell, to a maximum of 20d10. A creature that enters the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature is restrained. On a success, the creature's speed is halved as long as it remains in the cube. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The cube lasts until the start of the dragon's next turn.

A creature that enters the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature is restrained. On a success, the creature's speed is halved as long as it remains in the cube. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The cube lasts until the start of the dragon's next turn.

61ae790a-4191-5811-a0d7-01f4ddec088d.name: Stellar Breath (Void Dragon Wyrmling)
61ae790a-4191-5811-a0d7-01f4ddec088d.description: The dragon exhales star fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage and 10 (3d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
